authors_text: Pingbang Hu
title: Travel the Same Path: A Novel TSP Solving Strategy
title_zh: 走同样的路：一种新颖的 TSP 解决策略
abstract: In this paper, we provide a novel strategy for solving Traveling Salesman Problem, which is a famous combinatorial optimization problem studied intensely in the TCS community. In particular, we consider the imitation learning framework, which helps a deterministic algorithm making good choices whenever it needs to, resulting in a speed up while maintaining the exactness of the solution without suffering from the unpredictability and a potential large deviation. Furthermore, we demonstrate a strong generalization ability of a graph neural network trained under the imitation learning framework. Specifically, the model is capable of solving a large instance of TSP faster than the baseline while has only seen small TSP instances when training.
summary: In this paper, we provide a novel strategy for solving Traveling Salesman Problem, which is a famous combinatorial optimization problem studied intensely in the TCS community. In particular, we consider the imitation learning framework, which helps a deterministic algorithm making good choices whenever it needs to, resulting in a speed up while maintaining the exactness of the solution without suffering from the unpredictability and a potential large deviation. Furthermore, we demonstrate a strong generalization ability of a graph neural network trained under the imitation learning framework. Specifically, the model is capable of solving a large instance of TSP faster than the baseline while has only seen small TSP instances when training.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提供了一种解决旅行商问题的新策略，这是 TCS 社区中广泛研究的著名组合优化问题。特别是，我们考虑模仿学习框架，它可以帮助确定性算法在需要时做出正确的选择，从而在保持解决方案的准确性的同时提高速度，而不会遭受不可预测性和潜在的大偏差。此外，我们展示了在模仿学习框架下训练的图神经网络的强大泛化能力。具体来说，该模型能够比基线更快地解决大型 TSP 实例，而在训练时只能看到小型 TSP 实例。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于模仿学习框架的新策略，用于解决旅行商问题（TSP），结合图神经网络实现高效求解。
AI.motivation: 传统TSP求解方法存在不可预测性和较大偏差，而模仿学习可帮助确定性算法做出优质决策，同时保持解的精确性并提升速度。
AI.method: 采用模仿学习框架训练图神经网络，使模型在小规模TSP实例训练后，具备解决大规模TSP问题的能力。
AI.result: 模型在未接触过大规模实例的情况下，仍能比基线方法更快求解大型TSP问题，验证了其强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过模仿学习与图神经网络结合，有效提升了TSP求解效率，为组合优化问题提供了新思路。

authors_text: Xiaosu Zhu,Jingkuan Song,Yu Lei,Lianli Gao,Heng Tao Shen
title: A Lower Bound of Hash Codes' Performance
title_zh: 哈希码性能的下限
abstract: As a crucial approach for compact representation learning, hashing has achieved great success in effectiveness and efficiency. Numerous heuristic Hamming space metric learning objectives are designed to obtain high-quality hash codes. Nevertheless, a theoretical analysis of criteria for learning good hash codes remains largely unexploited. In this paper, we prove that inter-class distinctiveness and intra-class compactness among hash codes determine the lower bound of hash codes' performance. Promoting these two characteristics could lift the bound and improve hash learning. We then propose a surrogate model to fully exploit the above objective by estimating the posterior of hash codes and controlling it, which results in a low-bias optimization. Extensive experiments reveal the effectiveness of the proposed method. By testing on a series of hash-models, we obtain performance improvements among all of them, with an up to $26.5\%$ increase in mean Average Precision and an up to $20.5\%$ increase in accuracy. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/VL-Group/LBHash.
summary: As a crucial approach for compact representation learning, hashing has achieved great success in effectiveness and efficiency. Numerous heuristic Hamming space metric learning objectives are designed to obtain high-quality hash codes. Nevertheless, a theoretical analysis of criteria for learning good hash codes remains largely unexploited. In this paper, we prove that inter-class distinctiveness and intra-class compactness among hash codes determine the lower bound of hash codes' performance. Promoting these two characteristics could lift the bound and improve hash learning. We then propose a surrogate model to fully exploit the above objective by estimating the posterior of hash codes and controlling it, which results in a low-bias optimization. Extensive experiments reveal the effectiveness of the proposed method. By testing on a series of hash-models, we obtain performance improvements among all of them, with an up to $26.5\%$ increase in mean Average Precision and an up to $20.5\%$ increase in accuracy. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/VL-Group/LBHash.
abstract_zh: 作为紧凑表示学习的重要方法，哈希在有效性和效率方面取得了巨大的成功。许多启发式汉明空间度量学习目标旨在获得高质量的哈希码。然而，对学习良好哈希码的标准的理论分析在很大程度上仍未得到开发。在本文中，我们证明哈希码之间的类间独特性和类内紧凑性决定了哈希码性能的下限。提升这两个特性可以解除限制并改进哈希学习。然后，我们提出一种代理模型，通过估计哈希码的后验并对其进行控制来充分利用上述目标，从而实现低偏差优化。大量的实验揭示了所提出方法的有效性。通过对一系列哈希模型进行测试，我们获得了所有模型的性能改进，平均精度提高了 26.5\%$，准确度提高了 20.5\%$。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/VL-Group/LBHash 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究哈希码性能的理论下限，提出通过提升类间区分度和类内紧致性来优化哈希学习的方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管哈希方法在效率和效果上表现优异，但缺乏对学习优质哈希码理论标准的系统分析，限制了进一步优化。
AI.method: 提出一个替代模型，通过估计并控制哈希码的后验分布，实现低偏差优化以增强类间区分度与类内紧致性。
AI.result: 在多个哈希模型上实现性能提升，mAP最高提升26.5%，准确率最高提升20.5%。
AI.conclusion: 理论分析证实类间区分度和类内紧致性决定哈希性能下限，所提方法有效提升多种哈希模型表现。

authors_text: Shuangzhi Li,Zhijie Wang,Felix Juefei-Xu,Qing Guo,Xingyu Li,Lei Ma
title: Common Corruption Robustness of Point Cloud Detectors: Benchmark and Enhancement
title_zh: 点云检测器的通用腐蚀鲁棒性：基准和增强
abstract: Object detection through LiDAR-based point cloud has recently been important in autonomous driving. Although achieving high accuracy on public benchmarks, the state-of-the-art detectors may still go wrong and cause a heavy loss due to the widespread corruptions in the real world like rain, snow, sensor noise, etc. Nevertheless, there is a lack of a large-scale dataset covering diverse scenes and realistic corruption types with different severities to develop practical and robust point cloud detectors, which is challenging due to the heavy collection costs. To alleviate the challenge and start the first step for robust point cloud detection, we propose the physical-aware simulation methods to generate degraded point clouds under different real-world common corruptions. Then, for the first attempt, we construct a benchmark based on the physical-aware common corruptions for point cloud detectors, which contains a total of 1,122,150 examples covering 7,481 scenes, 25 common corruption types, and 6 severities. With such a novel benchmark, we conduct extensive empirical studies on 8 state-of-the-art detectors that contain 6 different detection frameworks. Thus we get several insight observations revealing the vulnerabilities of the detectors and indicating the enhancement directions. Moreover, we further study the effectiveness of existing robustness enhancement methods based on data augmentation and data denoising. The benchmark can potentially be a new platform for evaluating point cloud detectors, opening a door for developing novel robustness enhancement methods.
summary: Object detection through LiDAR-based point cloud has recently been important in autonomous driving. Although achieving high accuracy on public benchmarks, the state-of-the-art detectors may still go wrong and cause a heavy loss due to the widespread corruptions in the real world like rain, snow, sensor noise, etc. Nevertheless, there is a lack of a large-scale dataset covering diverse scenes and realistic corruption types with different severities to develop practical and robust point cloud detectors, which is challenging due to the heavy collection costs. To alleviate the challenge and start the first step for robust point cloud detection, we propose the physical-aware simulation methods to generate degraded point clouds under different real-world common corruptions. Then, for the first attempt, we construct a benchmark based on the physical-aware common corruptions for point cloud detectors, which contains a total of 1,122,150 examples covering 7,481 scenes, 25 common corruption types, and 6 severities. With such a novel benchmark, we conduct extensive empirical studies on 8 state-of-the-art detectors that contain 6 different detection frameworks. Thus we get several insight observations revealing the vulnerabilities of the detectors and indicating the enhancement directions. Moreover, we further study the effectiveness of existing robustness enhancement methods based on data augmentation and data denoising. The benchmark can potentially be a new platform for evaluating point cloud detectors, opening a door for developing novel robustness enhancement methods.
abstract_zh: 最近，通过基于激光雷达的点云进行物体检测在自动驾驶中非常重要。尽管在公共基准上实现了高精度，但由于现实世界中雨、雪、传感器噪声等广泛的损坏，最先进的检测器仍然可能会出错并造成重大损失。然而，缺乏涵盖不同场景和不同严重程度的现实损坏类型的大规模数据集来开发实用且鲁棒的点云检测器，由于收集成本高昂，这具有挑战性。为了缓解这一挑战并开始稳健点云检测的第一步，我们提出了物理感知模拟方法来在不同的现实世界常见损坏下生成退化的点云。然后，我们第一次尝试基于点云检测器的物理感知常见损坏构建了一个基准，其中总共包含 1,122,150 个示例，涵盖 7,481 个场景、25 种常见损坏类型和 6 种严重程度。有了这样一个新颖的基准，我们对包含 6 种不同检测框架的 8 个最先进的检测器进行了广泛的实证研究。因此，我们得到了一些深入的观察结果，揭示了探测器的漏洞并指出了增强方向。此外，我们进一步研究了现有基于数据增强和数据去噪的鲁棒性增强方法的有效性。该基准有可能成为评估点云检测器的新平台，为开发新颖的鲁棒性增强方法打开了一扇大门。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于物理感知模拟方法的点云检测器鲁棒性基准，并通过数据增强和去噪方法提升检测器性能。
AI.motivation: 现有点云检测器在真实世界中因雨雪、传感器噪声等常见干扰导致性能下降，但缺乏覆盖多样场景和真实退化类型的大型数据集来评估和提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用物理感知模拟生成不同真实世界常见退化类型的点云数据，构建包含112万例、25种退化类型和6种严重程度的基准数据集，并对8种先进检测框架进行实验分析。
AI.result: 揭示了检测器在不同退化场景下的脆弱性，验证了数据增强和去噪方法的有效性，为鲁棒性改进提供方向。
AI.conclusion: 该基准为点云检测器鲁棒性评估提供了新平台，推动了新型鲁棒性增强方法的研究与开发。

method: 采用物理感知模拟生成不同真实世界常见退化类型的点云数据，构建包含112万例、25种退化类型和6种严重程度的基准数据集，并对8种先进检测框架进行实验分析。
result: 揭示了检测器在不同退化场景下的脆弱性，验证了数据增强和去噪方法的有效性，为鲁棒性改进提供方向。
conclusion: 该基准为点云检测器鲁棒性评估提供了新平台，推动了新型鲁棒性增强方法的研究与开发。
search_text: Common Corruption Robustness of Point Cloud Detectors: Benchmark and Enhancement 点云检测器的通用腐蚀鲁棒性：基准和增强 Object detection through LiDAR-based point cloud has recently been important in autonomous driving. Although achieving high accuracy on public benchmarks, the state-of-the-art detectors may still go wrong and cause a heavy loss due to the widespread corruptions in the real world like rain, snow, sensor noise, etc. Nevertheless, there is a lack of a large-scale dataset covering diverse scenes and realistic corruption types with different severities to develop practical and robust point cloud detectors, which is challenging due to the heavy collection costs. To alleviate the challenge and start the first step for robust point cloud detection, we propose the physical-aware simulation methods to generate degraded point clouds under different real-world common corruptions. Then, for the first attempt, we construct a benchmark based on the physical-aware common corruptions for point cloud detectors, which contains a total of 1,122,150 examples covering 7,481 scenes, 25 common corruption types, and 6 severities. With such a novel benchmark, we conduct extensive empirical studies on 8 state-of-the-art detectors that contain 6 different detection frameworks. Thus we get several insight observations revealing the vulnerabilities of the detectors and indicating the enhancement directions. Moreover, we further study the effectiveness of existing robustness enhancement methods based on data augmentation and data denoising. The benchmark can potentially be a new platform for evaluating point cloud detectors, opening a door for developing novel robustness enhancement methods. 最近，通过基于激光雷达的点云进行物体检测在自动驾驶中非常重要。尽管在公共基准上实现了高精度，但由于现实世界中雨、雪、传感器噪声等广泛的损坏，最先进的检测器仍然可能会出错并造成重大损失。然而，缺乏涵盖不同场景和不同严重程度的现实损坏类型的大规模数据集来开发实用且鲁棒的点云检测器，由于收集成本高昂，这具有挑战性。为了缓解这一挑战并开始稳健点云检测的第一步，我们提出了物理感知模拟方法来在不同的现实世界常见损坏下生成退化的点云。然后，我们第一次尝试基于点云检测器的物理感知常见损坏构建了一个基准，其中总共包含 1,122,150 个示例，涵盖 7,481 个场景、25 种常见损坏类型和 6 种严重程度。有了这样一个新颖的基准，我们对包含 6 种不同检测框架的 8 个最先进的检测器进行了广泛的实证研究。因此，我们得到了一些深入的观察结果，揭示了探测器的漏洞并指出了增强方向。此外，我们进一步研究了现有基于数据增强和数据去噪的鲁棒性增强方法的有效性。该基准有可能成为评估点云检测器的新平台，为开发新颖的鲁棒性增强方法打开了一扇大门。 本文提出了一种基于物理感知模拟方法的点云检测器鲁棒性基准，并通过数据增强和去噪方法提升检测器性能。 Shuangzhi Li,Zhijie Wang,Felix Juefei-Xu,Qing Guo,Xingyu Li,Lei Ma cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Haodong Duan,Jiaqi Wang,Kai Chen,Dahua Lin
title: DG-STGCN: Dynamic Spatial-Temporal Modeling for Skeleton-based Action Recognition
title_zh: DG-STGCN：基于骨架的动作识别的动态时空建模
comment: Codes will be released in https://github.com/kennymckormick/pyskl
comments: Codes will be released in https://github.com/kennymckormick/pyskl
abstract: Graph convolution networks (GCN) have been widely used in skeleton-based action recognition. We note that existing GCN-based approaches primarily rely on prescribed graphical structures (ie., a manually defined topology of skeleton joints), which limits their flexibility to capture complicated correlations between joints. To move beyond this limitation, we propose a new framework for skeleton-based action recognition, namely Dynamic Group Spatio-Temporal GCN (DG-STGCN). It consists of two modules, DG-GCN and DG-TCN, respectively, for spatial and temporal modeling. In particular, DG-GCN uses learned affinity matrices to capture dynamic graphical structures instead of relying on a prescribed one, while DG-TCN performs group-wise temporal convolutions with varying receptive fields and incorporates a dynamic joint-skeleton fusion module for adaptive multi-level temporal modeling. On a wide range of benchmarks, including NTURGB+D, Kinetics-Skeleton, BABEL, and Toyota SmartHome, DG-STGCN consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, often by a notable margin.
summary: Graph convolution networks (GCN) have been widely used in skeleton-based action recognition. We note that existing GCN-based approaches primarily rely on prescribed graphical structures (ie., a manually defined topology of skeleton joints), which limits their flexibility to capture complicated correlations between joints. To move beyond this limitation, we propose a new framework for skeleton-based action recognition, namely Dynamic Group Spatio-Temporal GCN (DG-STGCN). It consists of two modules, DG-GCN and DG-TCN, respectively, for spatial and temporal modeling. In particular, DG-GCN uses learned affinity matrices to capture dynamic graphical structures instead of relying on a prescribed one, while DG-TCN performs group-wise temporal convolutions with varying receptive fields and incorporates a dynamic joint-skeleton fusion module for adaptive multi-level temporal modeling. On a wide range of benchmarks, including NTURGB+D, Kinetics-Skeleton, BABEL, and Toyota SmartHome, DG-STGCN consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, often by a notable margin.
abstract_zh: 图卷积网络（GCN）已广泛应用于基于骨架的动作识别。我们注意到，现有的基于 GCN 的方法主要依赖于规定的图形结构（即手动定义的骨架关节拓扑），这限制了它们捕获关节之间复杂相关性的灵活性。为了突破这个限制，我们提出了一种基于骨架的动作识别的新框架，即动态组时空 GCN (DG-STGCN)。它由两个模块组成，DG-GCN 和 DG-TCN，分别用于空间和时间建模。特别是，DG-GCN 使用学习到的亲和力矩阵来捕获动态图形结构，而不是依赖于规定的图形结构，而 DG-TCN 使用不同的感受野执行分组时间卷积，并结合动态关节骨架融合模块进行自适应多级时间建模。在包括 NTURGB+D、Kinetics-Skeleton、BABEL 和 Toyota SmartHome 在内的各种基准测试中，DG-STGCN 始终优于最先进的方法，而且往往遥遥领先。

AI.tldr: 提出一种动态时空建模方法用于基于骨架的动作识别，以提升动作识别的准确性与灵活性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖预定义的骨骼关节拓扑结构，难以灵活捕捉关节间的复杂关联，限制了模型表现。
AI.method: 提出DG-STGCN框架，包含动态图卷积模块（DG-GCN）和动态时间卷积模块（DG-TCN），分别通过学习亲和矩阵构建动态图结构，并采用分组时间卷积与动态融合实现多级时序建模。
AI.result: 在NTURGB+D、Kinetics-Skeleton等数据集上显著优于现有方法，验证了模型的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 动态图结构与时序建模相结合有效提升了骨架动作识别的性能，为相关研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Guanrui Li,Xinyang Liu,Giuseppe Loianno
title: Human-Aware Physical Human-Robot Collaborative Transportation and Manipulation with Multiple Aerial Robots
title_zh: 具有人类意识的物理人机协作运输和多个空中机器人的操纵
comment: Guanrui Li and Xinyang Liu contributed equally to this paper. This paper has been accepted to IEEE Transaction on Robotics (T-RO): https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/10758214. Please cite it with the proper format
comments: Guanrui Li and Xinyang Liu contributed equally to this paper. This paper has been accepted to IEEE Transaction on Robotics (T-RO): https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/10758214. Please cite it with the proper format
abstract: Human-robot interaction will play an essential role in various industries and daily tasks, enabling robots to effectively collaborate with humans and reduce their physical workload. Most of the existing approaches for physical human-robot interaction focus on collaboration between a human and a single ground or aerial robot. In recent years, very little progress has been made in this research area when considering multiple aerial robots, which offer increased versatility and mobility. This paper proposes a novel approach for physical human-robot collaborative transportation and manipulation of a cable-suspended payload with multiple aerial robots. The proposed method enables smooth and intuitive interaction between the transported objects and a human worker. In the same time, we consider distance constraints during the operations by exploiting the internal redundancy of the multi-robot transportation system. The key elements of our approach are (a) a collaborative payload external wrench estimator that does not rely on any force sensor; (b) a 6D admittance controller for human-aerial-robot collaborative transportation and manipulation; (c) a human-aware force distribution that exploits the internal system redundancy to guarantee the execution of additional tasks such inter-human-robot separation without affecting the payload trajectory tracking or quality of interaction. We validate the approach through extensive simulation and real-world experiments. These include scenarios where the robot team assists the human in transporting and manipulating a load, or where the human helps the robot team navigate the environment. We experimentally demonstrate for the first time, to the best of our knowledge, that our approach enables a quadrotor team to physically collaborate with a human in manipulating a payload in all 6 DoF in collaborative human-robot transportation and manipulation tasks.

Most of the existing approaches for physical human-robot interaction focus on collaboration between a human and a single ground or aerial robot. In recent years, very little progress has been made in this research area when considering multiple aerial robots, which offer increased versatility and mobility. This paper proposes a novel approach for physical human-robot collaborative transportation and manipulation of a cable-suspended payload with multiple aerial robots. The proposed method enables smooth and intuitive interaction between the transported objects and a human worker. In the same time, we consider distance constraints during the operations by exploiting the internal redundancy of the multi-robot transportation system. The key elements of our approach are (a) a collaborative payload external wrench estimator that does not rely on any force sensor; (b) a 6D admittance controller for human-aerial-robot collaborative transportation and manipulation; (c) a human-aware force distribution that exploits the internal system redundancy to guarantee the execution of additional tasks such inter-human-robot separation without affecting the payload trajectory tracking or quality of interaction. We validate the approach through extensive simulation and real-world experiments. These include scenarios where the robot team assists the human in transporting and manipulating a load, or where the human helps the robot team navigate the environment. We experimentally demonstrate for the first time, to the best of our knowledge, that our approach enables a quadrotor team to physically collaborate with a human in manipulating a payload in all 6 DoF in collaborative human-robot transportation and manipulation tasks.
abstract_zh: 人机交互将在各个行业和日常任务中发挥重要作用，使机器人能够有效地与人类协作并减少其体力工作量。大多数现有的人机交互方法都侧重于人与单个地面或空中机器人之间的协作。近年来，在考虑多功能性和机动性增强的多个空中机器人时，这一研究领域取得的进展甚少。本文提出了一种利用多个空中机器人进行物理人机协作运输和操纵缆绳悬挂有效负载的新方法。所提出的方法可以实现运输物体和人类工人之间平滑直观的交互。同时，我们通过利用多机器人运输系统的内部冗余来考虑操作过程中的距离限制。我们方法的关键要素是（a）不依赖于任何力传感器的协作有效负载外部扳手估计器； (b) 用于人-空-机器人协同运输和操纵的6D准入控制器； (c) 具有人类意识的力量分配，利用内部系统冗余来保证执行额外任务，例如人机分离，而不影响有效载荷轨迹跟踪或交互质量。我们通过广泛的模拟和真实实验验证了该方法。其中包括机器人团队协助人类运输和操纵负载的场景，或者人类帮助机器人团队在环境中导航的场景。据我们所知，我们首次通过实验证明，我们的方法使四旋翼飞行器团队能够与人类进行物理协作，在人机协作运输和操纵任务中操纵所有 6 个自由度的有效负载。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用多架空中机器人实现人机协作运输和操作悬吊负载的新方法。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注单个地面或空中机器人与人类的协作，而多架空中机器人协作在该领域的研究进展有限，需提升系统灵活性与移动性。
AI.method: 提出三种关键技术：无需力传感器的协作负载外部力矩估计器、6D阻抗控制器、利用系统冗余的人机分离力分布策略。
AI.result: 通过仿真和实物实验验证，首次实现四旋翼团队与人类在6自由度下的物理协作操作，成功完成负载运输与环境导航任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了多空中机器人人机协作中的轨迹跟踪与交互质量保障问题，为复杂人机协作任务提供了新方案。

We validate the approach through extensive simulation and real-world experiments. These include scenarios where the robot team assists the human in transporting and manipulating a load, or where the human helps the robot team navigate the environment. We experimentally demonstrate for the first time, to the best of our knowledge, that our approach enables a quadrotor team to physically collaborate with a human in manipulating a payload in all 6 DoF in collaborative human-robot transportation and manipulation tasks. 人机交互将在各个行业和日常任务中发挥重要作用，使机器人能够有效地与人类协作并减少其体力工作量。大多数现有的人机交互方法都侧重于人与单个地面或空中机器人之间的协作。近年来，在考虑多功能性和机动性增强的多个空中机器人时，这一研究领域取得的进展甚少。本文提出了一种利用多个空中机器人进行物理人机协作运输和操纵缆绳悬挂有效负载的新方法。所提出的方法可以实现运输物体和人类工人之间平滑直观的交互。同时，我们通过利用多机器人运输系统的内部冗余来考虑操作过程中的距离限制。我们方法的关键要素是（a）不依赖于任何力传感器的协作有效负载外部扳手估计器； (b) 用于人-空-机器人协同运输和操纵的6D准入控制器； (c) 具有人类意识的力量分配，利用内部系统冗余来保证执行额外任务，例如人机分离，而不影响有效载荷轨迹跟踪或交互质量。我们通过广泛的模拟和真实实验验证了该方法。其中包括机器人团队协助人类运输和操纵负载的场景，或者人类帮助机器人团队在环境中导航的场景。据我们所知，我们首次通过实验证明，我们的方法使四旋翼飞行器团队能够与人类进行物理协作，在人机协作运输和操纵任务中操纵所有 6 个自由度的有效负载。 本文提出了一种利用多架空中机器人实现人机协作运输和操作悬吊负载的新方法。 Guanrui Li,Xinyang Liu,Giuseppe Loianno cs.RO

authors_text: Souvik Dhara,Julia Gaudio,Elchanan Mossel,Colin Sandon
title: The Power of Two Matrices in Spectral Algorithms for Community Recovery
title_zh: 社区恢复谱算法中两个矩阵的威力
comment: 39 pages, 1 figure; Corrected minor errors. IEEE Transactions on Information Theory (2023)
comments: 39 pages, 1 figure; Corrected minor errors. IEEE Transactions on Information Theory (2023)
abstract: Spectral algorithms are some of the main tools in optimization and inference problems on graphs. Typically, the graph is encoded as a matrix and eigenvectors and eigenvalues of the matrix are then used to solve the given graph problem. Spectral algorithms have been successfully used for graph partitioning, hidden clique recovery and graph coloring. In this paper, we study the power of spectral algorithms using two matrices in a graph partitioning problem. We use two different matrices resulting from two different encodings of the same graph and then combine the spectral information coming from these two matrices. We analyze a two-matrix spectral algorithm for the problem of identifying latent community structure in large random graphs. In particular, we consider the problem of recovering community assignments exactly in the censored stochastic block model, where each edge status is revealed independently with some probability. We show that spectral algorithms based on two matrices are optimal and succeed in recovering communities up to the information theoretic threshold. Further, we show that for most choices of the parameters, any spectral algorithm based on one matrix is suboptimal. The latter observation is in contrast to our prior works (2022a, 2022b) which showed that for the symmetric Stochastic Block Model and the Planted Dense Subgraph problem, a spectral algorithm based on one matrix achieves the information theoretic threshold. We additionally provide more general geometric conditions for the (sub)-optimality of spectral algorithms.

Typically, the graph is encoded as a matrix and eigenvectors and eigenvalues of the matrix are then used to solve the given graph problem. In this paper, we study the power of spectral algorithms using two matrices in a graph partitioning problem. We use two different matrices resulting from two different encodings of the same graph and then combine the spectral information coming from these two matrices. We analyze a two-matrix spectral algorithm for the problem of identifying latent community structure in large random graphs. In particular, we consider the problem of recovering community assignments exactly in the censored stochastic block model, where each edge status is revealed independently with some probability. We show that spectral algorithms based on two matrices are optimal and succeed in recovering communities up to the information theoretic threshold. Further, we show that for most choices of the parameters, any spectral algorithm based on one matrix is suboptimal. The latter observation is in contrast to our prior works (2022a, 2022b) which showed that for the symmetric Stochastic Block Model and the Planted Dense Subgraph problem, a spectral algorithm based on one matrix achieves the information theoretic threshold. We additionally provide more general geometric conditions for the (sub)-optimality of spectral algorithms.
abstract_zh: 谱算法是图优化和推理问题的一些主要工具。通常，图被编码为矩阵，然后使用矩阵的特征向量和特征值来解决给定的图问题。谱算法已成功用于图划分、隐藏团恢复和图着色。在本文中，我们研究了在图划分问题中使用两个矩阵的谱算法的威力。我们使用由同一图的两种不同编码产生的两个不同矩阵，然后组合来自这两个矩阵的光谱信息。我们分析了用于识别大型随机图中潜在社区结构问题的二矩阵谱算法。特别是，我们考虑在审查随机块模型中精确恢复社区分配的问题，其中每个边缘状态以一定概率独立揭示。我们证明基于两个矩阵的谱算法是最优的，并且成功地将社区恢复到信息论阈值。此外，我们表明，对于大多数参数选择，任何基于一个矩阵的谱算法都是次优的。后一个观察结果与我们之前的工作（2022a，2022b）形成鲜明对比，我们之前的工作表明，对于对称随机块模型和种植密集子图问题，基于一个矩阵的谱算法实现了信息论阈值。我们还为谱算法的（次）最优性提供了更通用的几何条件。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在图划分问题中使用两个矩阵的谱算法，以提升在随机图中恢复潜在社区结构的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统单矩阵谱算法在某些参数设置下无法达到信息论极限，而使用两个矩阵可能提供更优的社区恢复效果。
AI.method: 通过两种不同图编码方式生成两个矩阵，结合它们的谱信息设计算法，并分析其在截断随机块模型中的恢复能力及几何条件。
AI.result: 双矩阵谱算法可达到信息论阈值且最优，而单矩阵方法在多数参数下表现次优，与对称模型中的结论形成对比。
AI.conclusion: 双矩阵方法在截断模型中是必要的最优方案，而单矩阵方法的次优性依赖于模型结构和参数设置。

authors_text: Yequan Wang,Jiawen Deng,Aixin Sun,Xuying Meng
title: Perplexity from PLM Is Unreliable for Evaluating Text Quality
title_zh: PLM 的困惑对于评估文本质量来说并不可靠
abstract: Recently, amounts of works utilize perplexity~(PPL) to evaluate the quality of the generated text. They suppose that if the value of PPL is smaller, the quality(i.e. fluency) of the text to be evaluated is better. However, we find that the PPL referee is unqualified and it cannot evaluate the generated text fairly for the following reasons: (i) The PPL of short text is larger than long text, which goes against common sense, (ii) The repeated text span could damage the performance of PPL, and (iii) The punctuation marks could affect the performance of PPL heavily. Experiments show that the PPL is unreliable for evaluating the quality of given text. Last, we discuss the key problems with evaluating text quality using language models.
summary: Recently, amounts of works utilize perplexity~(PPL) to evaluate the quality of the generated text. They suppose that if the value of PPL is smaller, the quality(i.e. fluency) of the text to be evaluated is better. However, we find that the PPL referee is unqualified and it cannot evaluate the generated text fairly for the following reasons: (i) The PPL of short text is larger than long text, which goes against common sense, (ii) The repeated text span could damage the performance of PPL, and (iii) The punctuation marks could affect the performance of PPL heavily. Experiments show that the PPL is unreliable for evaluating the quality of given text. Last, we discuss the key problems with evaluating text quality using language models.
abstract_zh: 最近，大量的工作利用困惑度（PPL）来评估生成文本的质量。他们认为，如果 PPL 的值越小，则待评估文本的质量（即流畅性）就越好。然而，我们发现PPL裁判员不合格，无法公平地评估生成的文本，原因如下：（i）短文本的PPL大于长文本，这违背常识；（ii）重复的文本跨度可能会损害PPL的性能；（iii）标点符号可能会严重影响PPL的性能。实验表明，PPL 对于评估给定文本的质量并不可靠。最后，我们讨论使用语言模型评估文本质量的关键问题。

AI.tldr: 本文分析并证明基于预训练语言模型（PLM）的困惑度（PPL）在评估文本质量时存在不可靠性
AI.motivation: 现有研究普遍采用困惑度（PPL）评估文本质量，但作者发现其存在多方面缺陷，需重新审视其可靠性
AI.method: 通过实验分析PPL在短文本、重复文本及标点符号影响下的表现，揭示其评估偏差
AI.result: 实验表明PPL无法公平评估文本质量，存在显著偏差
AI.conclusion: 结论指出依赖PPL评估文本质量存在根本性缺陷，需探索更可靠的评估方法

authors_text: Zhaoxuan Zhang,Xiaoguang Han,Bo Dong,Tong Li,Baocai Yin,Xin Yang
title: Point Cloud Scene Completion with Joint Color and Semantic Estimation from Single RGB-D Image
title_zh: 使用单个 RGB-D 图像的联合颜色和语义估计完成点云场景
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1903.04019
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1903.04019
abstract: We present a deep reinforcement learning method of progressive view inpainting for colored semantic point cloud scene completion under volume guidance, achieving high-quality scene reconstruction from only a single RGB-D image with severe occlusion. Our approach is end-to-end, consisting of three modules: 3D scene volume reconstruction, 2D RGB-D and segmentation image inpainting, and multi-view selection for completion. Given a single RGB-D image, our method first predicts its semantic segmentation map and goes through the 3D volume branch to obtain a volumetric scene reconstruction as a guide to the next view inpainting step, which attempts to make up the missing information; the third step involves projecting the volume under the same view of the input, concatenating them to complete the current view RGB-D and segmentation map, and integrating all RGB-D and segmentation maps into the point cloud. Since the occluded areas are unavailable, we resort to a A3C network to glance around and pick the next best view for large hole completion progressively until a scene is adequately reconstructed while guaranteeing validity. All steps are learned jointly to achieve robust and consistent results. We perform qualitative and quantitative evaluations with extensive experiments on the 3D-FUTURE data, obtaining better results than state-of-the-arts.
summary: We present a deep reinforcement learning method of progressive view inpainting for colored semantic point cloud scene completion under volume guidance, achieving high-quality scene reconstruction from only a single RGB-D image with severe occlusion. Our approach is end-to-end, consisting of three modules: 3D scene volume reconstruction, 2D RGB-D and segmentation image inpainting, and multi-view selection for completion. Given a single RGB-D image, our method first predicts its semantic segmentation map and goes through the 3D volume branch to obtain a volumetric scene reconstruction as a guide to the next view inpainting step, which attempts to make up the missing information; the third step involves projecting the volume under the same view of the input, concatenating them to complete the current view RGB-D and segmentation map, and integrating all RGB-D and segmentation maps into the point cloud. Since the occluded areas are unavailable, we resort to a A3C network to glance around and pick the next best view for large hole completion progressively until a scene is adequately reconstructed while guaranteeing validity. All steps are learned jointly to achieve robust and consistent results. We perform qualitative and quantitative evaluations with extensive experiments on the 3D-FUTURE data, obtaining better results than state-of-the-arts.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种在体积引导下完成彩色语义点云场景的渐进式视图修复的深度强化学习方法，仅从具有严重遮挡的单个 RGB-D 图像中实现高质量的场景重建。我们的方法是端到端的，由三个模块组成：3D 场景体积重建、2D RGB-D 和分割图像修复以及完成的多视图选择。给定单个 RGB-D 图像，我们的方法首先预测其语义分割图，并通过 3D 体积分支获得体积场景重建，作为下一个视图修复步骤的指南，该步骤试图弥补缺失的信息；第三步涉及在输入的同一视图下投影体积，将它们连接起来以完成当前视图 RGB-D 和分割图，并将所有 RGB-D 和分割图集成到点云中。由于遮挡区域不可用，我们采用 A3C 网络环顾四周，并逐步选择下一个最佳视图来完成大洞，直到场景得到充分重建，同时保证有效性。所有步骤都是共同学习的，以实现稳健且一致的结果。我们通过对 3D-FUTURE 数据进行大量实验进行定性和定量评估，获得了比最先进技术更好的结果。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于深度强化学习的单目RGB-D图像点云场景补全方法，能够处理严重遮挡情况下的彩色语义点云重建。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效处理单目RGB-D图像中的严重遮挡问题，导致点云场景补全质量不足，需提出更鲁棒的联合颜色与语义估计方法。
AI.method: 采用端到端三模块架构：3D体积重建、2D RGB-D与分割图像补全、多视角选择。通过A3C网络逐步选择最佳视角进行补全，联合学习保证结果一致性。
AI.result: 在3D-FUTURE数据集上实验表明，该方法在定性和定量评估中均优于现有最先进方法，尤其在处理遮挡区域时表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合体积引导与强化学习的视角选择策略，实现了更高质量的点云场景补全，为单目输入下的复杂场景重建提供了新思路。

search_text: Point Cloud Scene Completion with Joint Color and Semantic Estimation from Single RGB-D Image 使用单个 RGB-D 图像的联合颜色和语义估计完成点云场景 We present a deep reinforcement learning method of progressive view inpainting for colored semantic point cloud scene completion under volume guidance, achieving high-quality scene reconstruction from only a single RGB-D image with severe occlusion. Our approach is end-to-end, consisting of three modules: 3D scene volume reconstruction, 2D RGB-D and segmentation image inpainting, and multi-view selection for completion. Given a single RGB-D image, our method first predicts its semantic segmentation map and goes through the 3D volume branch to obtain a volumetric scene reconstruction as a guide to the next view inpainting step, which attempts to make up the missing information; the third step involves projecting the volume under the same view of the input, concatenating them to complete the current view RGB-D and segmentation map, and integrating all RGB-D and segmentation maps into the point cloud. Since the occluded areas are unavailable, we resort to a A3C network to glance around and pick the next best view for large hole completion progressively until a scene is adequately reconstructed while guaranteeing validity. All steps are learned jointly to achieve robust and consistent results. We perform qualitative and quantitative evaluations with extensive experiments on the 3D-FUTURE data, obtaining better results than state-of-the-arts. 我们提出了一种在体积引导下完成彩色语义点云场景的渐进式视图修复的深度强化学习方法，仅从具有严重遮挡的单个 RGB-D 图像中实现高质量的场景重建。我们的方法是端到端的，由三个模块组成：3D 场景体积重建、2D RGB-D 和分割图像修复以及完成的多视图选择。给定单个 RGB-D 图像，我们的方法首先预测其语义分割图，并通过 3D 体积分支获得体积场景重建，作为下一个视图修复步骤的指南，该步骤试图弥补缺失的信息；第三步涉及在输入的同一视图下投影体积，将它们连接起来以完成当前视图 RGB-D 和分割图，并将所有 RGB-D 和分割图集成到点云中。由于遮挡区域不可用，我们采用 A3C 网络环顾四周，并逐步选择下一个最佳视图来完成大洞，直到场景得到充分重建，同时保证有效性。所有步骤都是共同学习的，以实现稳健且一致的结果。我们通过对 3D-FUTURE 数据进行大量实验进行定性和定量评估，获得了比最先进技术更好的结果。 该论文提出了一种基于深度强化学习的单目RGB-D图像点云场景补全方法，能够处理严重遮挡情况下的彩色语义点云重建。 Zhaoxuan Zhang,Xiaoguang Han,Bo Dong,Tong Li,Baocai Yin,Xin Yang cs.CV

authors_text: Mohammed Ayman Shalaby,Charles Champagne Cossette,James Richard Forbes,Jerome Le Ny
title: Calibration and Uncertainty Characterization for Ultra-Wideband Two-Way-Ranging Measurements
title_zh: 超宽带双向测距测量的校准和不确定度表征
comment: 7 pages, 7 figures, to appear at the 2023 International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
comments: 7 pages, 7 figures, to appear at the 2023 International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
abstract: Ultra-Wideband (UWB) systems are becoming increasingly popular for indoor localization, where range measurements are obtained by measuring the time-of-flight of radio signals. However, the range measurements typically suffer from a systematic error or bias that must be corrected for high-accuracy localization. In this paper, a ranging protocol is proposed alongside a robust and scalable antenna-delay calibration procedure to accurately and efficiently calibrate antenna delays for many UWB tags. Additionally, the bias and uncertainty of the measurements are modelled as a function of the received-signal power. The full calibration procedure is presented using experimental training data of 3 aerial robots fitted with 2 UWB tags each, and then evaluated on 2 test experiments. A localization problem is then formulated on the experimental test data, and the calibrated measurements and their modelled uncertainty are fed into an extended Kalman filter (EKF). The proposed calibration is shown to yield an average of 46% improvement in localization accuracy. Lastly, the paper is accompanied by an open-source UWB-calibration Python library, which can be found at https://github.com/decargroup/uwb_calibration.
summary: Ultra-Wideband (UWB) systems are becoming increasingly popular for indoor localization, where range measurements are obtained by measuring the time-of-flight of radio signals. However, the range measurements typically suffer from a systematic error or bias that must be corrected for high-accuracy localization. In this paper, a ranging protocol is proposed alongside a robust and scalable antenna-delay calibration procedure to accurately and efficiently calibrate antenna delays for many UWB tags. Additionally, the bias and uncertainty of the measurements are modelled as a function of the received-signal power. The full calibration procedure is presented using experimental training data of 3 aerial robots fitted with 2 UWB tags each, and then evaluated on 2 test experiments. A localization problem is then formulated on the experimental test data, and the calibrated measurements and their modelled uncertainty are fed into an extended Kalman filter (EKF). The proposed calibration is shown to yield an average of 46% improvement in localization accuracy. Lastly, the paper is accompanied by an open-source UWB-calibration Python library, which can be found at https://github.com/decargroup/uwb_calibration.
abstract_zh: 超宽带 (UWB) 系统在室内定位中越来越受欢迎，其中通过测量无线电信号的飞行时间来获得距离测量。然而，距离测量通常会受到系统误差或偏差的影响，必须对其进行校正才能实现高精度定位。在本文中，提出了一种测距协议以及强大且可扩展的天线延迟校准程序，以准确有效地校准许多 UWB 标签的天线延迟。此外，测量的偏差和不确定性被建模为接收信号功率的函数。使用 3 个分别装有 2 个 UWB 标签的空中机器人的实验训练数据呈现完整的校准过程，然后在 2 个测试实验中进行评估。然后根据实验测试数据制定定位问题，并将校准的测量值及其建模的不确定性输入扩展卡尔曼滤波器（EKF）。结果表明，所提出的校准可使定位精度平均提高 46%。最后，本文附有一个开源 UWB 校准 Python 库，可以在 https://github.com/decargroup/uwb_calibration 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对超宽带（UWB）双向测距的校准方法，通过建模测量偏差和不确定性以提高室内定位精度。
AI.motivation: UWB系统在室内定位中存在系统性偏差，需通过校准和不确定性建模提升定位准确性，现有方法缺乏高效且可扩展的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计双向测距协议，结合实验数据提出可扩展的天线延迟校准流程，并建立基于接收信号功率的偏差与不确定性模型，结合扩展卡尔曼滤波器（EKF）优化定位。
AI.result: 校准后定位精度平均提升46%，并开源了UWB校准Python库以支持实际应用。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过校准与不确定性建模有效提升了UWB定位性能，为高精度室内定位提供了可复用的工具和理论支持。

authors_text: Wei Quan,Denise Gorse
title: A Novel Multi-Objective Velocity-Free Boolean Particle Swarm Optimization
title_zh: 一种新颖的多目标无速度布尔粒子群优化
abstract: This paper extends boolean particle swarm optimization to a multi-objective setting, to our knowledge for the first time in the literature. Our proposed new boolean algorithm, MBOnvPSO, is notably simplified by the omission of a velocity update rule and has enhanced exploration ability due to the inclusion of a 'noise' term in the position update rule that prevents particles being trapped in local optima. Our algorithm additionally makes use of an external archive to store non-dominated solutions and implements crowding distance to encourage solution diversity. In benchmark tests, MBOnvPSO produced high quality Pareto fronts, when compared to benchmarked alternatives, for all of the multi-objective test functions considered, with competitive performance in search spaces with up to 600 discrete dimensions.
summary: This paper extends boolean particle swarm optimization to a multi-objective setting, to our knowledge for the first time in the literature. Our proposed new boolean algorithm, MBOnvPSO, is notably simplified by the omission of a velocity update rule and has enhanced exploration ability due to the inclusion of a 'noise' term in the position update rule that prevents particles being trapped in local optima. Our algorithm additionally makes use of an external archive to store non-dominated solutions and implements crowding distance to encourage solution diversity. In benchmark tests, MBOnvPSO produced high quality Pareto fronts, when compared to benchmarked alternatives, for all of the multi-objective test functions considered, with competitive performance in search spaces with up to 600 discrete dimensions.
abstract_zh: 本文首次将布尔粒子群优化扩展到多目标设置，这是我们在文献中首次了解的。我们提出的新布尔算法 MBOnvPSO 通过省略速度更新规则而得到显着简化，并且由于在位置更新规则中包含“噪声”项来防止粒子陷入局部最优，因此增强了探索能力。我们的算法还利用外部档案来存储非支配解决方案，并实现拥挤距离以鼓励解决方案多样性。在基准测试中，与基准替代方案相比，MBOnvPSO 为所有考虑的多目标测试函数生成了高质量的 Pareto 前沿，在多达 600 个离散维度的搜索空间中具有竞争性的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新颖的多目标无速度布尔粒子群优化算法MBOnvPSO，通过省略速度更新规则并引入噪声项提升优化性能。
AI.motivation: 现有布尔粒子群优化算法在多目标场景下存在局部最优陷阱和复杂速度更新规则的局限性，需改进探索能力与解的多样性。
AI.method: 设计无需速度更新的简化框架，在位置更新中引入噪声项增强探索能力，结合外部存档与拥挤距离维持非支配解的多样性。
AI.result: 在多目标基准测试中，MBOnvPSO生成的帕累托前沿质量优于现有方法，且在最高600维离散空间中保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: MBOnvPSO通过结构简化与噪声机制有效解决了多目标优化难题，为高维离散问题提供了新的求解思路。

method: 设计无需速度更新的简化框架，在位置更新中引入噪声项增强探索能力，结合外部存档与拥挤距离维持非支配解的多样性。
result: 在多目标基准测试中，MBOnvPSO生成的帕累托前沿质量优于现有方法，且在最高600维离散空间中保持竞争力。
conclusion: MBOnvPSO通过结构简化与噪声机制有效解决了多目标优化难题，为高维离散问题提供了新的求解思路。
search_text: A Novel Multi-Objective Velocity-Free Boolean Particle Swarm Optimization 一种新颖的多目标无速度布尔粒子群优化 This paper extends boolean particle swarm optimization to a multi-objective setting, to our knowledge for the first time in the literature. Our proposed new boolean algorithm, MBOnvPSO, is notably simplified by the omission of a velocity update rule and has enhanced exploration ability due to the inclusion of a 'noise' term in the position update rule that prevents particles being trapped in local optima. Our algorithm additionally makes use of an external archive to store non-dominated solutions and implements crowding distance to encourage solution diversity. In benchmark tests, MBOnvPSO produced high quality Pareto fronts, when compared to benchmarked alternatives, for all of the multi-objective test functions considered, with competitive performance in search spaces with up to 600 discrete dimensions. 本文首次将布尔粒子群优化扩展到多目标设置，这是我们在文献中首次了解的。我们提出的新布尔算法 MBOnvPSO 通过省略速度更新规则而得到显着简化，并且由于在位置更新规则中包含“噪声”项来防止粒子陷入局部最优，因此增强了探索能力。我们的算法还利用外部档案来存储非支配解决方案，并实现拥挤距离以鼓励解决方案多样性。在基准测试中，与基准替代方案相比，MBOnvPSO 为所有考虑的多目标测试函数生成了高质量的 Pareto 前沿，在多达 600 个离散维度的搜索空间中具有竞争性的性能。 本文提出了一种新颖的多目标无速度布尔粒子群优化算法MBOnvPSO，通过省略速度更新规则并引入噪声项提升优化性能。 Wei Quan,Denise Gorse cs.NE

authors_text: Kohei Uehara,Tatsuya Harada
title: Learning by Asking Questions for Knowledge-based Novel Object Recognition
title_zh: 通过提问来学习基于知识的新物体识别
abstract: In real-world object recognition, there are numerous object classes to be recognized. Conventional image recognition based on supervised learning can only recognize object classes that exist in the training data, and thus has limited applicability in the real world. On the other hand, humans can recognize novel objects by asking questions and acquiring knowledge about them. Inspired by this, we study a framework for acquiring external knowledge through question generation that would help the model instantly recognize novel objects. Our pipeline consists of two components: the Object Classifier, which performs knowledge-based object recognition, and the Question Generator, which generates knowledge-aware questions to acquire novel knowledge. We also propose a question generation strategy based on the confidence of the knowledge-aware prediction of the Object Classifier. To train the Question Generator, we construct a dataset that contains knowledge-aware questions about objects in the images. Our experiments show that the proposed pipeline effectively acquires knowledge about novel objects compared to several baselines.
summary: In real-world object recognition, there are numerous object classes to be recognized. Conventional image recognition based on supervised learning can only recognize object classes that exist in the training data, and thus has limited applicability in the real world. On the other hand, humans can recognize novel objects by asking questions and acquiring knowledge about them. Inspired by this, we study a framework for acquiring external knowledge through question generation that would help the model instantly recognize novel objects. Our pipeline consists of two components: the Object Classifier, which performs knowledge-based object recognition, and the Question Generator, which generates knowledge-aware questions to acquire novel knowledge. We also propose a question generation strategy based on the confidence of the knowledge-aware prediction of the Object Classifier. To train the Question Generator, we construct a dataset that contains knowledge-aware questions about objects in the images. Our experiments show that the proposed pipeline effectively acquires knowledge about novel objects compared to several baselines.
abstract_zh: 在现实世界的对象识别中，有许多对象类别需要识别。传统的基于监督学习的图像识别只能识别训练数据中存在的对象类，因此在现实世界中的适用性有限。另一方面，人类可以通过提出问题并获取有关新物体的知识来识别新物体。受此启发，我们研究了一个通过问题生成获取外部知识的框架，这将有助于模型立即识别新物体。我们的管道由两个组件组成：对象分类器（执行基于知识的对象识别）和问题生成器（生成知识感知问题以获取新知识）。我们还提出了一种基于对象分类器知识感知预测的置信度的问题生成策略。为了训练问题生成器，我们构建了一个数据集，其中包含有关图像中对象的知识感知问题。我们的实验表明，与几个基线相比，所提出的管道有效地获取了有关新对象的知识。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于知识问答的框架，通过生成问题获取外部知识以实现对新物体的识别。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习方法无法识别训练数据中未出现的物体类别，而人类通过提问获取知识来识别新物体，因此需要模仿这一过程提升模型的泛化能力。
AI.method: 框架包含两个组件：基于知识的物体分类器和生成知识感知问题的问题生成器。通过分类器置信度策略生成问题，并构建包含图像知识问答的数据集进行训练。
AI.result: 实验表明，与多个基线方法相比，该框架能更有效地获取新物体的知识并提升识别性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过问题生成与知识获取的结合，模型能够突破传统监督学习的限制，实现对未知物体的识别。

authors_text: Haitong Huang,Xinghua Xue,Cheng Liu,Ying Wang,Tao Luo,Long Cheng,Huawei Li,Xiaowei Li
title: Statistical Modeling of Soft Error Influence on Neural Networks
title_zh: 软错误对神经网络影响的统计建模
abstract: Soft errors in large VLSI circuits pose dramatic influence on computing- and memory-intensive neural network (NN) processing. Understanding the influence of soft errors on NNs is critical to protect against soft errors for reliable NN processing. Prior work mainly rely on fault simulation to analyze the influence of soft errors on NN processing. They are accurate but usually specific to limited configurations of errors and NN models due to the prohibitively slow simulation speed especially for large NN models and datasets. With the observation that the influence of soft errors propagates across a large number of neurons and accumulates as well, we propose to characterize the soft error induced data disturbance on each neuron with normal distribution model according to central limit theorem and develop a series of statistical models to analyze the behavior of NN models under soft errors in general. The statistical models reveal not only the correlation between soft errors and NN model accuracy, but also how NN parameters such as quantization and architecture affect the reliability of NNs. The proposed models are compared with fault simulation and verified comprehensively. In addition, we observe that the statistical models that characterize the soft error influence can also be utilized to predict fault simulation results in many cases and we explore the use of the proposed statistical models to accelerate fault simulations of NNs. According to our experiments, the accelerated fault simulation shows almost two orders of magnitude speedup with negligible simulation accuracy loss over the baseline fault simulations.
summary: Soft errors in large VLSI circuits pose dramatic influence on computing- and memory-intensive neural network (NN) processing. Understanding the influence of soft errors on NNs is critical to protect against soft errors for reliable NN processing. Prior work mainly rely on fault simulation to analyze the influence of soft errors on NN processing. They are accurate but usually specific to limited configurations of errors and NN models due to the prohibitively slow simulation speed especially for large NN models and datasets. With the observation that the influence of soft errors propagates across a large number of neurons and accumulates as well, we propose to characterize the soft error induced data disturbance on each neuron with normal distribution model according to central limit theorem and develop a series of statistical models to analyze the behavior of NN models under soft errors in general. The statistical models reveal not only the correlation between soft errors and NN model accuracy, but also how NN parameters such as quantization and architecture affect the reliability of NNs. The proposed models are compared with fault simulation and verified comprehensively. In addition, we observe that the statistical models that characterize the soft error influence can also be utilized to predict fault simulation results in many cases and we explore the use of the proposed statistical models to accelerate fault simulations of NNs. According to our experiments, the accelerated fault simulation shows almost two orders of magnitude speedup with negligible simulation accuracy loss over the baseline fault simulations.
abstract_zh: 大型 VLSI 电路中的软错误对计算和内存密集型神经网络 (NN) 处理产生巨大影响。了解软错误对神经网络的影响对于防止软错误以实现可靠的神经网络处理至关重要。先前的工作主要依靠故障模拟来分析软错误对神经网络处理的影响。它们是准确的，但通常特定于错误和神经网络模型的有限配置，因为仿真速度过慢，特别是对于大型神经网络模型和数据集。通过观察软错误的影响在大量神经元中传播并累积，我们提出根据中心极限定理用正态分布模型来表征软错误引起的每个神经元上的数据扰动，并开发一系列统计模型来分析神经网络模型在软错误下的一般行为。统计模型不仅揭示了软错误和神经网络模型精度之间的相关性，还揭示了量化和架构等神经网络参数如何影响神经网络的可靠性。所提出的模型与故障模拟进行了比较并进行了全面验证。此外，我们观察到，在许多情况下，表征软错误影响的统计模型也可以用来预测故障模拟结果，并且我们探索使用所提出的统计模型来加速神经网络的故障模拟。根据我们的实验，加速故障模拟显示出与基线故障模拟相比几乎两个数量级的加速，模拟精度损失可以忽略不计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于统计模型的方法，分析软错误对神经网络的影响，以替代传统的故障仿真方法。
AI.motivation: 传统故障仿真方法因速度慢且受限于特定配置，难以高效分析大规模神经网络的软错误影响，需更通用且快速的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于中心极限定理，用正态分布建模软错误对神经元的数据扰动，构建统计模型分析神经网络可靠性，并利用模型加速故障仿真。
AI.result: 统计模型准确揭示了软错误与模型精度的关系，加速后的故障仿真速度提升两个数量级且精度损失可忽略。
AI.conclusion: 提出的统计模型有效替代传统仿真，为神经网络可靠性分析提供高效工具，同时可预测故障仿真结果。

authors_text: Chaerin Kong,DongHyeon Jeon,Ohjoon Kwon,Nojun Kwak
title: Leveraging Off-the-shelf Diffusion Model for Multi-attribute Fashion Image Manipulation
title_zh: 利用现成的扩散模型进行多属性时尚图像处理
abstract: Fashion attribute editing is a task that aims to convert the semantic attributes of a given fashion image while preserving the irrelevant regions. Previous works typically employ conditional GANs where the generator explicitly learns the target attributes and directly execute the conversion. These approaches, however, are neither scalable nor generic as they operate only with few limited attributes and a separate generator is required for each dataset or attribute set. Inspired by the recent advancement of diffusion models, we explore the classifier-guided diffusion that leverages the off-the-shelf diffusion model pretrained on general visual semantics such as Imagenet. In order to achieve a generic editing pipeline, we pose this as multi-attribute image manipulation task, where the attribute ranges from item category, fabric, pattern to collar and neckline. We empirically show that conventional methods fail in our challenging setting, and study efficient adaptation scheme that involves recently introduced attention-pooling technique to obtain a multi-attribute classifier guidance. Based on this, we present a mask-free fashion attribute editing framework that leverages the classifier logits and the cross-attention map for manipulation. We empirically demonstrate that our framework achieves convincing sample quality and attribute alignments.
summary: Fashion attribute editing is a task that aims to convert the semantic attributes of a given fashion image while preserving the irrelevant regions. Previous works typically employ conditional GANs where the generator explicitly learns the target attributes and directly execute the conversion. These approaches, however, are neither scalable nor generic as they operate only with few limited attributes and a separate generator is required for each dataset or attribute set. Inspired by the recent advancement of diffusion models, we explore the classifier-guided diffusion that leverages the off-the-shelf diffusion model pretrained on general visual semantics such as Imagenet. In order to achieve a generic editing pipeline, we pose this as multi-attribute image manipulation task, where the attribute ranges from item category, fabric, pattern to collar and neckline. We empirically show that conventional methods fail in our challenging setting, and study efficient adaptation scheme that involves recently introduced attention-pooling technique to obtain a multi-attribute classifier guidance. Based on this, we present a mask-free fashion attribute editing framework that leverages the classifier logits and the cross-attention map for manipulation. We empirically demonstrate that our framework achieves convincing sample quality and attribute alignments.
abstract_zh: 时尚属性编辑是一项旨在转换给定时尚图像的语义属性同时保留不相关区域的任务。以前的工作通常采用条件 GAN，其中生成器显式学习目标属性并直接执行转换。然而，这些方法既不可扩展，也不通用，因为它们仅对少数有限的属性进行操作，并且每个数据集或属性集都需要单独的生成器。受扩散模型最新进展的启发，我们探索了分类器引导的扩散，该扩散利用了在 Imagenet 等通用视觉语义上预训练的现成扩散模型。为了实现通用编辑流程，我们将其视为多属性图像处理任务，其中属性范围从项目类别、面料、图案到衣领和领口。我们凭经验证明传统方法在我们具有挑战性的环境中失败，并研究有效的适应方案，其中涉及最近引入的注意力池技术以获得多属性分类器指导。基于此，我们提出了一种无掩模时尚属性编辑框架，该框架利用分类器逻辑和交叉注意力图进行操作。我们凭经验证明我们的框架实现了令人信服的样本质量和属性对齐。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于现成扩散模型的多属性时尚图像编辑框架，通过分类器引导和交叉注意力机制实现无需掩码的属性编辑。
AI.motivation: 传统条件GAN方法在时尚属性编辑任务中存在可扩展性差、属性集依赖性强等问题，难以处理多属性联合编辑的复杂场景。
AI.method: 采用预训练扩散模型结合分类器引导技术，通过注意力池化实现多属性分类器指导，利用分类器logits和交叉注意力图进行无掩码图像编辑。
AI.result: 实验表明框架在复杂多属性编辑任务中取得优于传统方法的样本质量与属性对齐效果，验证了方法的通用性和有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法为多属性时尚图像编辑提供了可扩展的通用解决方案，通过扩散模型与分类器引导的结合实现了高质量的无掩码属性操控。

authors_text: Ziyin Zeng,Yongyang Xu,Zhong Xie,Wei Tang,Jie Wan,Weichao Wu
title: LACV-Net: Semantic Segmentation of Large-Scale Point Cloud Scene via Local Adaptive and Comprehensive VLAD
title_zh: LACV-Net：通过局部自适应和综合 VLAD 对大规模点云场景进行语义分割
comment: ef:Expert Systems with Applications, vol. 246, Jul. 2024
comments: ef:Expert Systems with Applications, vol. 246, Jul. 2024
abstract: Large-scale point cloud semantic segmentation is an important task in 3D computer vision, which is widely applied in autonomous driving, robotics, and virtual reality. Current large-scale point cloud semantic segmentation methods usually use down-sampling operations to improve computation efficiency and acquire point clouds with multi-resolution. However, this may cause the problem of missing local information. Meanwhile, it is difficult for networks to capture global information in large-scale distributed contexts. To capture local and global information effectively, we propose an end-to-end deep neural network called LACV-Net for large-scale point cloud semantic segmentation. The proposed network contains three main components: 1) a local adaptive feature augmentation module (LAFA) to adaptively learn the similarity of centroids and neighboring points to augment the local context; 2) a comprehensive VLAD module (C-VLAD) that fuses local features with multi-layer, multi-scale, and multi-resolution to represent a comprehensive global description vector; and 3) an aggregation loss function to effectively optimize the segmentation boundaries by constraining the adaptive weight from the LAFA module. Compared to state-of-the-art networks on several large-scale benchmark datasets, including S3DIS, Toronto3D, and SensatUrban, we demonstrated the effectiveness of the proposed network.
summary: Large-scale point cloud semantic segmentation is an important task in 3D computer vision, which is widely applied in autonomous driving, robotics, and virtual reality. Current large-scale point cloud semantic segmentation methods usually use down-sampling operations to improve computation efficiency and acquire point clouds with multi-resolution. However, this may cause the problem of missing local information. Meanwhile, it is difficult for networks to capture global information in large-scale distributed contexts. To capture local and global information effectively, we propose an end-to-end deep neural network called LACV-Net for large-scale point cloud semantic segmentation. The proposed network contains three main components: 1) a local adaptive feature augmentation module (LAFA) to adaptively learn the similarity of centroids and neighboring points to augment the local context; 2) a comprehensive VLAD module (C-VLAD) that fuses local features with multi-layer, multi-scale, and multi-resolution to represent a comprehensive global description vector; and 3) an aggregation loss function to effectively optimize the segmentation boundaries by constraining the adaptive weight from the LAFA module. Compared to state-of-the-art networks on several large-scale benchmark datasets, including S3DIS, Toronto3D, and SensatUrban, we demonstrated the effectiveness of the proposed network.
abstract_zh: 大规模点云语义分割是3D计算机视觉中的一项重要任务，广泛应用于自动驾驶、机器人和虚拟现实等领域。目前的大规模点云语义分割方法通常采用下采样操作来提高计算效率并获取多分辨率的点云。然而，这可能会导致本地信息丢失的问题。同时，网络很难在大规模分布式环境中捕获全局信息。为了有效地捕获局部和全局信息，我们提出了一种称为 LACV-Net 的端到端深度神经网络，用于大规模点云语义分割。所提出的网络包含三个主要组件：1）局部自适应特征增强模块（LAFA），用于自适应学习质心和相邻点的相似性以增强局部上下文； 2）综合VLAD模块（C-VLAD），融合多层、多尺度、多分辨率的局部特征，表示综合的全局描述向量； 3）聚合损失函数，通过约束 LAFA 模块的自适应权重来有效优化分割边界。与几个大型基准数据集（包括 S3DIS、Toronto3D 和 SensatUrban）上最先进的网络相比，我们证明了所提出网络的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LACV-Net的端到端深度神经网络，用于大规模点云场景的语义分割。
AI.motivation: 当前大规模点云语义分割方法通常使用下采样操作，虽然提高了计算效率，但可能导致局部信息丢失，且网络难以捕捉全局信息。
AI.method: LACV-Net包含三个主要组件：1) 局部自适应特征增强模块（LAFA）用于自适应学习质心和邻近点的相似性以增强局部上下文；2) 综合VLAD模块（C-VLAD）融合多层、多尺度和多分辨率的局部特征以表示全面的全局描述向量；3) 聚合损失函数通过约束LAFA模块的自适应权重来有效优化分割边界。
AI.result: 在多个大规模基准数据集（如S3DIS、Toronto3D和SensatUrban）上，与最先进的网络相比，所提出的网络表现出有效性。
AI.conclusion: LACV-Net通过结合局部和全局信息，有效提升了大规模点云语义分割的性能。

authors_text: Kien Nguyen,Hugo Proença,Fernando Alonso-Fernandez
title: Deep Learning for Iris Recognition: A Survey
title_zh: 用于虹膜识别的深度学习：一项调查
abstract: In this survey, we provide a comprehensive review of more than 200 papers, technical reports, and GitHub repositories published over the last 10 years on the recent developments of deep learning techniques for iris recognition, covering broad topics on algorithm designs, open-source tools, open challenges, and emerging research. First, we conduct a comprehensive analysis of deep learning techniques developed for two main sub-tasks in iris biometrics: segmentation and recognition. Second, we focus on deep learning techniques for the robustness of iris recognition systems against presentation attacks and via human-machine pairing. Third, we delve deep into deep learning techniques for forensic application, especially in post-mortem iris recognition. Fourth, we review open-source resources and tools in deep learning techniques for iris recognition. Finally, we highlight the technical challenges, emerging research trends, and outlook for the future of deep learning in iris recognition.
summary: In this survey, we provide a comprehensive review of more than 200 papers, technical reports, and GitHub repositories published over the last 10 years on the recent developments of deep learning techniques for iris recognition, covering broad topics on algorithm designs, open-source tools, open challenges, and emerging research. First, we conduct a comprehensive analysis of deep learning techniques developed for two main sub-tasks in iris biometrics: segmentation and recognition. Second, we focus on deep learning techniques for the robustness of iris recognition systems against presentation attacks and via human-machine pairing. Third, we delve deep into deep learning techniques for forensic application, especially in post-mortem iris recognition. Fourth, we review open-source resources and tools in deep learning techniques for iris recognition. Finally, we highlight the technical challenges, emerging research trends, and outlook for the future of deep learning in iris recognition.
abstract_zh: 在本次调查中，我们全面回顾了过去 10 年发表的 200 多篇论文、技术报告和 GitHub 存储库，内容涉及虹膜识别深度学习技术的最新发展，涵盖算法设计、开源工具、开放挑战和新兴研究等广泛主题。首先，我们对为虹膜生物识别的两个主要子任务开发的深度学习技术进行了全面分析：分割和识别。其次，我们专注于深度学习技术，以提高虹膜识别系统针对演示攻击和人机配对的鲁棒性。第三，我们深入研究用于法医应用的深度学习技术，特别是在死后虹膜识别方面。第四，我们回顾了虹膜识别深度学习技术的开源资源和工具。最后，我们强调了虹膜识别中深度学习的技术挑战、新兴研究趋势以及未来展望。

AI.tldr: 综述过去十年深度学习在虹膜识别中的发展，涵盖算法设计、开源工具、挑战及趋势。
AI.motivation: 系统梳理深度学习在虹膜识别领域的研究进展，总结技术挑战与未来方向，为后续研究提供参考。
AI.method: 通过分析200余篇文献及开源资源，从算法设计、鲁棒性、法医应用、工具资源及挑战趋势五个维度系统综述深度学习在虹膜识别中的应用。
AI.result: 总结了深度学习在虹膜分割、识别、抗攻击、法医应用中的技术进展，梳理了开源工具，并指出现有挑战与未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习显著提升了虹膜识别性能，但需解决数据多样性、模型鲁棒性等问题，未来将向多模态融合与跨学科应用发展。

search_text: Deep Learning for Iris Recognition: A Survey 用于虹膜识别的深度学习：一项调查 In this survey, we provide a comprehensive review of more than 200 papers, technical reports, and GitHub repositories published over the last 10 years on the recent developments of deep learning techniques for iris recognition, covering broad topics on algorithm designs, open-source tools, open challenges, and emerging research. First, we conduct a comprehensive analysis of deep learning techniques developed for two main sub-tasks in iris biometrics: segmentation and recognition. Second, we focus on deep learning techniques for the robustness of iris recognition systems against presentation attacks and via human-machine pairing. Third, we delve deep into deep learning techniques for forensic application, especially in post-mortem iris recognition. Fourth, we review open-source resources and tools in deep learning techniques for iris recognition. Finally, we highlight the technical challenges, emerging research trends, and outlook for the future of deep learning in iris recognition. 在本次调查中，我们全面回顾了过去 10 年发表的 200 多篇论文、技术报告和 GitHub 存储库，内容涉及虹膜识别深度学习技术的最新发展，涵盖算法设计、开源工具、开放挑战和新兴研究等广泛主题。首先，我们对为虹膜生物识别的两个主要子任务开发的深度学习技术进行了全面分析：分割和识别。其次，我们专注于深度学习技术，以提高虹膜识别系统针对演示攻击和人机配对的鲁棒性。第三，我们深入研究用于法医应用的深度学习技术，特别是在死后虹膜识别方面。第四，我们回顾了虹膜识别深度学习技术的开源资源和工具。最后，我们强调了虹膜识别中深度学习的技术挑战、新兴研究趋势以及未来展望。 综述过去十年深度学习在虹膜识别中的发展，涵盖算法设计、开源工具、挑战及趋势。 Kien Nguyen,Hugo Proença,Fernando Alonso-Fernandez cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Changjia Ma,Zhichao Han,Tingrui Zhang,Jingping Wang,Long Xu,Chengyang Li,Chao Xu,Fei Gao
title: Decentralized Planning for Car-Like Robotic Swarm in Cluttered Environments
title_zh: 杂乱环境中类车机器人群的分散规划
abstract: Robot swarm is a hot spot in robotic research community. In this paper, we propose a decentralized framework for car-like robotic swarm which is capable of real-time planning in cluttered environments. In this system, path finding is guided by environmental topology information to avoid frequent topological change, and search-based speed planning is leveraged to escape from infeasible initial value's local minima. Then spatial-temporal optimization is employed to generate a safe, smooth and dynamically feasible trajectory. During optimization, the trajectory is discretized by fixed time steps. Penalty is imposed on the signed distance between agents to realize collision avoidance, and differential flatness cooperated with limitation on front steer angle satisfies the non-holonomic constraints. With trajectories broadcast to the wireless network, agents are able to check and prevent potential collisions. We validate the robustness of our system in simulation and real-world experiments. Code will be released as open-source packages.
summary: Robot swarm is a hot spot in robotic research community. In this paper, we propose a decentralized framework for car-like robotic swarm which is capable of real-time planning in cluttered environments. In this system, path finding is guided by environmental topology information to avoid frequent topological change, and search-based speed planning is leveraged to escape from infeasible initial value's local minima. Then spatial-temporal optimization is employed to generate a safe, smooth and dynamically feasible trajectory. During optimization, the trajectory is discretized by fixed time steps. Penalty is imposed on the signed distance between agents to realize collision avoidance, and differential flatness cooperated with limitation on front steer angle satisfies the non-holonomic constraints. With trajectories broadcast to the wireless network, agents are able to check and prevent potential collisions. We validate the robustness of our system in simulation and real-world experiments. Code will be released as open-source packages.
abstract_zh: 机器人群是机器人研究领域的热点。在本文中，我们提出了一种类似于汽车的机器人群的去中心化框架，它能够在杂乱的环境中进行实时规划。在该系统中，路径查找由环境拓扑信息引导，以避免频繁的拓扑变化，并利用基于搜索的速度规划来摆脱不可行的初始值的局部最小值。然后采用时空优化来生成安全、平滑且动态可行的轨迹。在优化过程中，轨迹按固定时间步长离散化。对智能体之间的符号距离进行惩罚以实现碰撞避免，并且微分平坦度配合前转向角的限制满足非完整约束。通过将轨迹广播到无线网络，代理能够检查并防止潜在的碰撞。我们在模拟和现实实验中验证了我们系统的鲁棒性。代码将作为开源包发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于复杂环境中轮式机器人集群的去中心化路径规划框架，实现安全、平滑且动态可行的轨迹生成。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人集群在复杂环境中易受拓扑变化影响，且难以避免局部最优解和碰撞，亟需高效去中心化规划方法。
AI.method: 结合环境拓扑引导、基于搜索的速度规划、时空优化及差分平坦约束，通过固定时间步长离散轨迹并施加碰撞惩罚实现避障。
AI.result: 在仿真与真实实验中验证了系统的鲁棒性，成功避免碰撞并生成符合非完整约束的可行轨迹。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为复杂环境中轮式机器人集群提供了高效去中心化解决方案，开源代码可推动相关研究应用。

authors_text: Ziyi Wu,Nikita Dvornik,Klaus Greff,Thomas Kipf,Animesh Garg
title: SlotFormer: Unsupervised Visual Dynamics Simulation with Object-Centric Models
title_zh: SlotFormer：使用以对象为中心的模型进行无监督视觉动力学仿真
comment: Accepted by ICLR 2023. Project page: https://slotformer.github.io/
comments: Accepted by ICLR 2023. Project page: https://slotformer.github.io/
abstract: Understanding dynamics from visual observations is a challenging problem that requires disentangling individual objects from the scene and learning their interactions. While recent object-centric models can successfully decompose a scene into objects, modeling their dynamics effectively still remains a challenge. We address this problem by introducing SlotFormer -- a Transformer-based autoregressive model operating on learned object-centric representations. Given a video clip, our approach reasons over object features to model spatio-temporal relationships and predicts accurate future object states. In this paper, we successfully apply SlotFormer to perform video prediction on datasets with complex object interactions. Moreover, the unsupervised SlotFormer's dynamics model can be used to improve the performance on supervised downstream tasks, such as Visual Question Answering (VQA), and goal-conditioned planning. Compared to past works on dynamics modeling, our method achieves significantly better long-term synthesis of object dynamics, while retaining high quality visual generation. Besides, SlotFormer enables VQA models to reason about the future without object-level labels, even outperforming counterparts that use ground-truth annotations. Finally, we show its ability to serve as a world model for model-based planning, which is competitive with methods designed specifically for such tasks.
summary: Understanding dynamics from visual observations is a challenging problem that requires disentangling individual objects from the scene and learning their interactions. While recent object-centric models can successfully decompose a scene into objects, modeling their dynamics effectively still remains a challenge. We address this problem by introducing SlotFormer -- a Transformer-based autoregressive model operating on learned object-centric representations. Given a video clip, our approach reasons over object features to model spatio-temporal relationships and predicts accurate future object states. In this paper, we successfully apply SlotFormer to perform video prediction on datasets with complex object interactions. Moreover, the unsupervised SlotFormer's dynamics model can be used to improve the performance on supervised downstream tasks, such as Visual Question Answering (VQA), and goal-conditioned planning. Compared to past works on dynamics modeling, our method achieves significantly better long-term synthesis of object dynamics, while retaining high quality visual generation. Besides, SlotFormer enables VQA models to reason about the future without object-level labels, even outperforming counterparts that use ground-truth annotations. Finally, we show its ability to serve as a world model for model-based planning, which is competitive with methods designed specifically for such tasks.
abstract_zh: 从视觉观察中理解动态是一个具有挑战性的问题，需要将单个对象从场景中分离出来并学习它们的相互作用。虽然最近的以对象为中心的模型可以成功地将场景分解为对象，但有效地对其动态进行建模仍然是一个挑战。我们通过引入 SlotFormer 来解决这个问题——一种基于 Transformer 的自回归模型，在学习到的以对象为中心的表示上运行。给定视频剪辑，我们的方法通过对象特征进行推理来建模时空关系并预测准确的未来对象状态。在本文中，我们成功地应用 SlotFormer 对具有复杂对象交互的数据集进行视频预测。此外，无监督 SlotFormer 的动态模型可用于提高监督下游任务的性能，例如视觉问答 (VQA) 和目标条件规划。与过去的动力学建模工作相比，我们的方法明显更好地实现了对象动力学的长期合成，同时保留了高质量的视觉生成。此外，SlotFormer 使 VQA 模型能够在没有对象级标签的情况下推理未来，甚至优于使用真实注释的模型。最后，我们展示了它作为基于模型的规划的世界模型的能力，这与专门为此类任务设计的方法具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SlotFormer，一种基于Transformer的无监督视觉动态模拟方法，通过物体中心表示预测视频中物体的未来状态，并提升下游任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有物体中心模型虽能分解场景，但难以有效建模复杂物体交互的动态关系，且缺乏对长期动态预测的能力。
AI.method: 设计SlotFormer自回归模型，基于Transformer架构处理物体特征，建模时空关系以预测未来物体状态，无需监督信号。
AI.result: 在复杂交互数据集上实现高质量视频预测，提升VQA和目标导向规划任务效果，长期动态合成优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: SlotFormer有效捕捉物体动态规律，作为世界模型在规划任务中表现优异，验证了无监督动态建模的潜力。

search_text: SlotFormer: Unsupervised Visual Dynamics Simulation with Object-Centric Models SlotFormer：使用以对象为中心的模型进行无监督视觉动力学仿真 Understanding dynamics from visual observations is a challenging problem that requires disentangling individual objects from the scene and learning their interactions. While recent object-centric models can successfully decompose a scene into objects, modeling their dynamics effectively still remains a challenge. We address this problem by introducing SlotFormer -- a Transformer-based autoregressive model operating on learned object-centric representations. Given a video clip, our approach reasons over object features to model spatio-temporal relationships and predicts accurate future object states. In this paper, we successfully apply SlotFormer to perform video prediction on datasets with complex object interactions. Moreover, the unsupervised SlotFormer's dynamics model can be used to improve the performance on supervised downstream tasks, such as Visual Question Answering (VQA), and goal-conditioned planning. Compared to past works on dynamics modeling, our method achieves significantly better long-term synthesis of object dynamics, while retaining high quality visual generation. Besides, SlotFormer enables VQA models to reason about the future without object-level labels, even outperforming counterparts that use ground-truth annotations. Finally, we show its ability to serve as a world model for model-based planning, which is competitive with methods designed specifically for such tasks. 从视觉观察中理解动态是一个具有挑战性的问题，需要将单个对象从场景中分离出来并学习它们的相互作用。虽然最近的以对象为中心的模型可以成功地将场景分解为对象，但有效地对其动态进行建模仍然是一个挑战。我们通过引入 SlotFormer 来解决这个问题——一种基于 Transformer 的自回归模型，在学习到的以对象为中心的表示上运行。给定视频剪辑，我们的方法通过对象特征进行推理来建模时空关系并预测准确的未来对象状态。在本文中，我们成功地应用 SlotFormer 对具有复杂对象交互的数据集进行视频预测。此外，无监督 SlotFormer 的动态模型可用于提高监督下游任务的性能，例如视觉问答 (VQA) 和目标条件规划。与过去的动力学建模工作相比，我们的方法明显更好地实现了对象动力学的长期合成，同时保留了高质量的视觉生成。此外，SlotFormer 使 VQA 模型能够在没有对象级标签的情况下推理未来，甚至优于使用真实注释的模型。最后，我们展示了它作为基于模型的规划的世界模型的能力，这与专门为此类任务设计的方法具有竞争力。 本文提出SlotFormer，一种基于Transformer的无监督视觉动态模拟方法，通过物体中心表示预测视频中物体的未来状态，并提升下游任务性能。 Ziyi Wu,Nikita Dvornik,Klaus Greff,Thomas Kipf,Animesh Garg cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Nathaniel Simon,Allen Z. Ren,Alexander Piqué,David Snyder,Daphne Barretto,Marcus Hultmark,Anirudha Majumdar
title: FlowDrone: Wind Estimation and Gust Rejection on UAVs Using Fast-Response Hot-Wire Flow Sensors
title_zh: FlowDrone：使用快速响应热线流量传感器对无人机进行风力估计和阵风抑制
comment: Submitted to ICRA 2023. See supplementary video at https://youtu.be/KWqkH9Z-338
comments: Submitted to ICRA 2023. See supplementary video at https://youtu.be/KWqkH9Z-338
abstract: Unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) are finding use in applications that place increasing emphasis on robustness to external disturbances including extreme wind. However, traditional multirotor UAV platforms do not directly sense wind; conventional flow sensors are too slow, insensitive, or bulky for widespread integration on UAVs. Instead, drones typically observe the effects of wind indirectly through accumulated errors in position or trajectory tracking. In this work, we integrate a novel flow sensor based on micro-electro-mechanical systems (MEMS) hot-wire technology developed in our prior work onto a multirotor UAV for wind estimation. These sensors are omnidirectional, lightweight, fast, and accurate. In order to achieve superior tracking performance in windy conditions, we train a `wind-aware' residual-based controller via reinforcement learning using simulated wind gusts and their aerodynamic effects on the drone. In extensive hardware experiments, we demonstrate the wind-aware controller outperforming two strong `wind-unaware' baseline controllers in challenging windy conditions. See: https://youtu.be/KWqkH9Z-338.
summary: Unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) are finding use in applications that place increasing emphasis on robustness to external disturbances including extreme wind. However, traditional multirotor UAV platforms do not directly sense wind; conventional flow sensors are too slow, insensitive, or bulky for widespread integration on UAVs. Instead, drones typically observe the effects of wind indirectly through accumulated errors in position or trajectory tracking. In this work, we integrate a novel flow sensor based on micro-electro-mechanical systems (MEMS) hot-wire technology developed in our prior work onto a multirotor UAV for wind estimation. These sensors are omnidirectional, lightweight, fast, and accurate. In order to achieve superior tracking performance in windy conditions, we train a `wind-aware' residual-based controller via reinforcement learning using simulated wind gusts and their aerodynamic effects on the drone. In extensive hardware experiments, we demonstrate the wind-aware controller outperforming two strong `wind-unaware' baseline controllers in challenging windy conditions. See: https://youtu.be/KWqkH9Z-338.
abstract_zh: 无人机 (UAV) 正在越来越多地强调对外部干扰（包括极端风）的鲁棒性的应用。然而，传统的多旋翼无人机平台并不直接感知风；传统的流量传感器速度太慢、不灵敏或体积庞大，无法广泛集成到无人机上。相反，无人机通常通过位置或轨迹跟踪的累积误差来间接观察风的影响。在这项工作中，我们将一种基于微机电系统（MEMS）热线技术的新型流量传感器集成到多旋翼无人机上以进行风估计。这些传感器是全向、轻便、快速且准确的。为了在大风条件下实现卓越的跟踪性能，我们使用模拟阵风及其对无人机的空气动力学影响，通过强化学习来训练“风感知”残差控制器。在大量的硬件实验中，我们证明了风感知控制器在具有挑战性的大风条件下优于两个强大的“风感知”基线控制器。请参阅：https://youtu.be/KWqkH9Z-338。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FlowDrone的无人机风速估计与阵风抑制方法，使用快速响应的MEMS热线流速传感器和强化学习训练的控制器。
AI.motivation: 传统无人机平台无法直接感知风速，常规流速传感器速度慢、灵敏度低或体积大，难以集成到无人机上，因此需要一种更高效的方法来估计风速并提高无人机在强风环境下的飞行性能。
AI.method: 本文将基于MEMS热线技术的新型流速传感器集成到多旋翼无人机上，用于风速估计，并通过强化学习训练了一个‘风感知’的残差控制器，以提高在强风条件下的跟踪性能。
AI.result: 在广泛的硬件实验中，本文提出的‘风感知’控制器在强风条件下优于两个‘无风感知’的基线控制器。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法能够有效提高无人机在强风环境下的飞行性能，为无人机在复杂风场中的应用提供了新的解决方案。

authors_text: Chen Sun,Wannan Yang,Thomas Jiralerspong,Dane Malenfant,Benjamin Alsbury-Nealy,Yoshua Bengio,Blake Richards
title: Contrastive Retrospection: honing in on critical steps for rapid learning and generalization in RL
title_zh: 对比回顾：磨练强化学习快速学习和泛化的关键步骤
abstract: In real life, success is often contingent upon multiple critical steps that are distant in time from each other and from the final reward. These critical steps are challenging to identify with traditional reinforcement learning (RL) methods that rely on the Bellman equation for credit assignment. Here, we present a new RL algorithm that uses offline contrastive learning to hone in on these critical steps. This algorithm, which we call Contrastive Retrospection (ConSpec), can be added to any existing RL algorithm. ConSpec learns a set of prototypes for the critical steps in a task by a novel contrastive loss and delivers an intrinsic reward when the current state matches one of the prototypes. The prototypes in ConSpec provide two key benefits for credit assignment: (i) They enable rapid identification of all the critical steps. (ii) They do so in a readily interpretable manner, enabling out-of-distribution generalization when sensory features are altered. Distinct from other contemporary RL approaches to credit assignment, ConSpec takes advantage of the fact that it is easier to retrospectively identify the small set of steps that success is contingent upon (and ignoring other states) than it is to prospectively predict reward at every taken step. ConSpec greatly improves learning in a diverse set of RL tasks. The code is available at the link: https://github.com/sunchipsster1/ConSpec
summary: In real life, success is often contingent upon multiple critical steps that are distant in time from each other and from the final reward. These critical steps are challenging to identify with traditional reinforcement learning (RL) methods that rely on the Bellman equation for credit assignment. Here, we present a new RL algorithm that uses offline contrastive learning to hone in on these critical steps. This algorithm, which we call Contrastive Retrospection (ConSpec), can be added to any existing RL algorithm. ConSpec learns a set of prototypes for the critical steps in a task by a novel contrastive loss and delivers an intrinsic reward when the current state matches one of the prototypes. The prototypes in ConSpec provide two key benefits for credit assignment: (i) They enable rapid identification of all the critical steps. (ii) They do so in a readily interpretable manner, enabling out-of-distribution generalization when sensory features are altered. Distinct from other contemporary RL approaches to credit assignment, ConSpec takes advantage of the fact that it is easier to retrospectively identify the small set of steps that success is contingent upon (and ignoring other states) than it is to prospectively predict reward at every taken step. ConSpec greatly improves learning in a diverse set of RL tasks. The code is available at the link: https://github.com/sunchipsster1/ConSpec
abstract_zh: 在现实生活中，成功往往取决于多个关键步骤，这些步骤在时间上和最终奖励上相距甚远。这些关键步骤对于依赖贝尔曼方程进行学分分配的传统强化学习 (RL) 方法来说是具有挑战性的。在这里，我们提出了一种新的强化学习算法，该算法使用离线对比学习来磨练这些关键步骤。该算法称为对比回顾 (ConSpec)，可以添加到任何现有的 RL 算法中。 ConSpec 通过新颖的对比损失来学习任务中关键步骤的一组原型，并在当前状态与其中一个原型匹配时提供内在奖励。 ConSpec 中的原型为学分分配提供了两个主要优势：(i) 它们能够快速识别所有关键步骤。 (ii) 它们以易于解释的方式做到这一点，当感官特征改变时能够实现分布外泛化。与其他当代 RL 信用分配方法不同，ConSpec 利用了这样一个事实：回顾性地识别成功所依赖的一小部分步骤（并忽略其他状态）比前瞻性地预测每个步骤的奖励更容易。 ConSpec 极大地改善了各种 RL 任务的学习。代码可从以下链接获取：https://github.com/sunchipsster1/ConSpec

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ConSpec的强化学习算法，通过离线对比学习识别任务中的关键步骤，以提升学习效率和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习方法依赖贝尔曼方程进行奖励分配，难以识别与最终奖励在时间上相距较远的关键步骤，导致学习效率低下。
AI.method: ConSpec通过新型对比损失学习任务关键步骤的原型，并在当前状态匹配原型时提供内在奖励，从而实现快速且可解释的信用分配。
AI.result: ConSpec在多种强化学习任务中显著提升了学习效果，并支持在感官特征变化时的分布外泛化。
AI.conclusion: ConSpec通过回顾性识别关键步骤，为强化学习提供了更高效、可解释的信用分配方法，适用于复杂任务的快速学习与泛化。
