motivation: 现有机器人中间件在教育中存在环境配置复杂、语法学习门槛高，限制学生对核心概念的理解，需更自然的框架支持多样化背景开发者。
method: 构建基于Pythonic理念的面向对象框架，实现硬件抽象、模块化编程及跨硬件/模拟/分析模型的多代理系统支持。
result: REMS作为教育工具和跨平台开发媒介，提升代码可读性、复用性及开发效率，促进机器人教育实践。
conclusion: REMS通过Python化设计有效改善机器人教育与开发流程，为多场景应用提供模块化解决方案。
search_text: REMS: Middleware for Robotics Education and Development REMS：机器人教育和开发中间件 This paper introduces REMS, a robotics middleware and control framework that is designed to introduce the Zen of Python to robotics and to improve robotics education and development flow. Although existing middleware can serve hardware abstraction and modularity, setting up environments and learning middleware-specific syntax and procedures are less viable in education. They can curb opportunities to understand robotics concepts, theories, and algorithms. Robotics is a field of integration; students and developers from various backgrounds will be involved in programming. Establishing Pythonic and object-oriented robotic framework in a natural way can enhance modular and abstracted programming for better readability, reusability, and simplicity, but also supports useful and practical skills generally in coding. REMS is to be a valuable robot educational medium not just as a tool and to be a platform from one robot to multi-agent across hardware, simulation, and analytical model implementations. 本文介绍了 REMS，这是一种机器人中间件和控制框架，旨在将 Python 之禅引入机器人并改善机器人教育和开发流程。尽管现有的中间件可以服务于硬件抽象和模块化，但设置环境和学习中间件特定的语法和过程在教育中不太可行。它们可以限制理解机器人概念、理论和算法的机会。机器人技术是一个集成领域；来自不同背景的学生和开发人员将参与编程。以自然的方式建立Pythonic和面向对象的机器人框架可以增强模块化和抽象编程，以获得更好的可读性、可重用性和简单性，而且还支持编码中有用和实用的技能。 REMS 将成为一种有价值的机器人教育媒介，而不仅仅是一种工具，而且是一个跨硬件、模拟和分析模型实现的从一个机器人到多智能体的平台。 本文介绍REMS中间件，旨在通过Python哲学优化机器人教育和开发流程，提升模块化编程与跨平台支持。 Yusuke Tanaka,Ankur Mehta cs.RO,cs.MA,cs.SE

authors_text: Karim Guirguis,Mohamed Abdelsamad,George Eskandar,Ahmed Hendawy,Matthias Kayser,Bin Yang,Juergen Beyerer
title: Towards Discriminative and Transferable One-Stage Few-Shot Object Detectors
title_zh: 迈向有辨别力和可转移的单级少样本物体检测器
abstract: Recent object detection models require large amounts of annotated data for training a new classes of objects. Few-shot object detection (FSOD) aims to address this problem by learning novel classes given only a few samples. While competitive results have been achieved using two-stage FSOD detectors, typically one-stage FSODs underperform compared to them. We make the observation that the large gap in performance between two-stage and one-stage FSODs are mainly due to their weak discriminability, which is explained by a small post-fusion receptive field and a small number of foreground samples in the loss function. To address these limitations, we propose the Few-shot RetinaNet (FSRN) that consists of: a multi-way support training strategy to augment the number of foreground samples for dense meta-detectors, an early multi-level feature fusion providing a wide receptive field that covers the whole anchor area and two augmentation techniques on query and source images to enhance transferability. Extensive experiments show that the proposed approach addresses the limitations and boosts both discriminability and transferability. FSRN is almost two times faster than two-stage FSODs while remaining competitive in accuracy, and it outperforms the state-of-the-art of one-stage meta-detectors and also some two-stage FSODs on the MS-COCO and PASCAL VOC benchmarks.
summary: Recent object detection models require large amounts of annotated data for training a new classes of objects. Few-shot object detection (FSOD) aims to address this problem by learning novel classes given only a few samples. While competitive results have been achieved using two-stage FSOD detectors, typically one-stage FSODs underperform compared to them. We make the observation that the large gap in performance between two-stage and one-stage FSODs are mainly due to their weak discriminability, which is explained by a small post-fusion receptive field and a small number of foreground samples in the loss function. To address these limitations, we propose the Few-shot RetinaNet (FSRN) that consists of: a multi-way support training strategy to augment the number of foreground samples for dense meta-detectors, an early multi-level feature fusion providing a wide receptive field that covers the whole anchor area and two augmentation techniques on query and source images to enhance transferability. Extensive experiments show that the proposed approach addresses the limitations and boosts both discriminability and transferability. FSRN is almost two times faster than two-stage FSODs while remaining competitive in accuracy, and it outperforms the state-of-the-art of one-stage meta-detectors and also some two-stage FSODs on the MS-COCO and PASCAL VOC benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 最近的对象检测模型需要大量带注释的数据来训练新类别的对象。小样本目标检测（FSOD）旨在通过仅给定少量样本学习新类别来解决此问题。虽然使用两级 FSOD 探测器取得了有竞争力的结果，但与它们相比，一级 FSOD 的性能通常较差。我们观察到，两阶段和一阶段 FSOD 之间的巨大性能差距主要是由于它们的可区分性较弱，这是由较小的融合后感受野和损失函数中的少量前景样本来解释的。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了少镜头视网膜网络（FSRN），它包括：一种多路支持训练策略，以增加密集元检测器的前景样本数量；一种早期的多级特征融合，提供覆盖整个锚点区域的广泛感受野；以及两种针对查询和源图像的增强技术，以增强可迁移性。大量的实验表明，所提出的方法解决了局限性并提高了可辨别性和可转移性。 FSRN 的速度几乎是两级 FSOD 的两倍，同时在准确性方面保持竞争力，并且在 MS-COCO 和 PASCAL VOC 基准测试中，其性能优于最先进的一级元检测器以及一些两级 FSOD。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的单阶段少样本目标检测器FSRN，以提高其判别能力和可迁移性。
AI.motivation: 现有的单阶段少样本目标检测器在性能上通常不如两阶段检测器，主要原因在于其判别能力较弱，表现为感受野较小和正样本数量较少。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为FSRN的少样本RetinaNet，包括多路支持训练策略、早期多级特征融合以及查询和源图像的增强技术，以提高判别能力和可迁移性。
AI.result: 实验表明，FSRN在保持竞争力的同时，速度几乎是两阶段少样本检测器的两倍，并在MS-COCO和PASCAL VOC基准测试中优于最先进的单阶段元检测器和一些两阶段少样本检测器。
AI.conclusion: FSRN通过增强判别能力和可迁移性，有效解决了单阶段少样本目标检测器的性能瓶颈问题。

authors_text: Meng Liu,Haoran Liu,Shuiwang Ji
title: Gradient-Guided Importance Sampling for Learning Binary Energy-Based Models
title_zh: 用于学习基于能量的二元模型的梯度引导重要性采样
abstract: Learning energy-based models (EBMs) is known to be difficult especially on discrete data where gradient-based learning strategies cannot be applied directly. Although ratio matching is a sound method to learn discrete EBMs, it suffers from expensive computation and excessive memory requirements, thereby resulting in difficulties in learning EBMs on high-dimensional data. Motivated by these limitations, in this study, we propose ratio matching with gradient-guided importance sampling (RMwGGIS). Particularly, we use the gradient of the energy function w.r.t. the discrete data space to approximately construct the provably optimal proposal distribution, which is subsequently used by importance sampling to efficiently estimate the original ratio matching objective. We perform experiments on density modeling over synthetic discrete data, graph generation, and training Ising models to evaluate our proposed method. The experimental results demonstrate that our method can significantly alleviate the limitations of ratio matching, perform more effectively in practice, and scale to high-dimensional problems. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/divelab/RMwGGIS.
summary: Learning energy-based models (EBMs) is known to be difficult especially on discrete data where gradient-based learning strategies cannot be applied directly. Although ratio matching is a sound method to learn discrete EBMs, it suffers from expensive computation and excessive memory requirements, thereby resulting in difficulties in learning EBMs on high-dimensional data. Motivated by these limitations, in this study, we propose ratio matching with gradient-guided importance sampling (RMwGGIS). Particularly, we use the gradient of the energy function w.r.t. the discrete data space to approximately construct the provably optimal proposal distribution, which is subsequently used by importance sampling to efficiently estimate the original ratio matching objective. We perform experiments on density modeling over synthetic discrete data, graph generation, and training Ising models to evaluate our proposed method. The experimental results demonstrate that our method can significantly alleviate the limitations of ratio matching, perform more effectively in practice, and scale to high-dimensional problems. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/divelab/RMwGGIS.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，学习基于能量的模型（EBM）非常困难，尤其是在无法直接应用基于梯度的学习策略的离散数据上。虽然比率匹配是学习离散 EBM 的良好方法，但它存在计算成本高和内存需求过多的问题，从而导致在高维数据上学习 EBM 遇到困难。受这些限制的启发，在本研究中，我们提出了梯度引导重要性采样（RMwGGIS）的比率匹配。特别是，我们使用能量函数的梯度。离散数据空间来近似构造可证明的最佳提议分布，随后重要性采样使用该分布来有效估计原始比率匹配目标。我们对合成离散数据的密度建模、图生成和训练 Ising 模型进行实验，以评估我们提出的方法。实验结果表明，我们的方法可以显着缓解比率匹配的局限性，在实践中表现更有效，并且可以扩展到高维问题。我们的实施可在 https://github.com/divelab/RMwGGIS 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于梯度引导重要性采样的方法，用于改进离散数据上的能量基模型（EBMs）学习。
AI.motivation: 传统比率匹配方法在学习离散EBMs时存在计算成本高、内存消耗大且难以扩展到高维数据的问题。
AI.method: 利用能量函数对离散数据空间的梯度构造近似最优提议分布，结合重要性采样高效估计原始比率匹配目标。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法显著缓解了比率匹配的局限性，在合成数据、图生成和Ising模型训练中表现更优且可扩展至高维问题。
AI.conclusion: 梯度引导重要性采样有效解决了离散EBMs学习中的计算与扩展性难题，为高维问题提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Zirong Chen,Haotian Xue
title: Bil-DOS: A Bi-lingual Dialogue Ordering System (for Subway)
title_zh: Bil-DOES：双语对话点餐系统（地铁）
abstract: Due to the unfamiliarity to particular words(or proper nouns) for ingredients, non-native English speakers can be extremely confused about the ordering process in restaurants like Subway. Thus, We developed a dialogue system, which supports Chinese(Mandarin)1 and English2 at the same time. In other words, users can switch arbitrarily between Chinese(Mandarin) and English as the conversation is being conducted. This system is specifically designed for Subway ordering3. In BilDOS, we designed a Discriminator module to tell the language is being used in inputted user utterance, a Translator module to translate used language into English if it is not English, and a Dialogue Manager module to detect the intention within inputted user utterances, handle outlier inputs by throwing clarification requests, map detected Intention and detailed Keyword4 into a particular intention class, locate the current ordering process, continue to give queries to finish the order, conclude the order details once the order is completed, activate the evaluation process when the conversation is done.
summary: Due to the unfamiliarity to particular words(or proper nouns) for ingredients, non-native English speakers can be extremely confused about the ordering process in restaurants like Subway. Thus, We developed a dialogue system, which supports Chinese(Mandarin)1 and English2 at the same time. In other words, users can switch arbitrarily between Chinese(Mandarin) and English as the conversation is being conducted. This system is specifically designed for Subway ordering3. In BilDOS, we designed a Discriminator module to tell the language is being used in inputted user utterance, a Translator module to translate used language into English if it is not English, and a Dialogue Manager module to detect the intention within inputted user utterances, handle outlier inputs by throwing clarification requests, map detected Intention and detailed Keyword4 into a particular intention class, locate the current ordering process, continue to give queries to finish the order, conclude the order details once the order is completed, activate the evaluation process when the conversation is done.
abstract_zh: 由于对配料的特定单词（或专有名词）不熟悉，非英语母语人士可能会对 Subway 等餐厅的点餐流程感到非常困惑。因此，我们开发了一个同时支持中文（普通话）1和英语2的对话系统。换句话说，用户可以在对话过程中任意切换中文（普通话）和英文。该系统专为地铁订购3而设计。在 BilDOS 中，我们设计了一个鉴别器模块来判断输入的用户话语中使用的语言，一个翻译器模块用于将所使用的语言翻译成英语（如果不是英语），以及一个对话管理器模块来检测输入的用户话语中的意图，通过抛出澄清请求来处理异常输入，将检测到的意图和详细的关键字 4 映射到特定的意图类，定位当前的订购流程，继续发出查询以完成订单，一旦订单完成就得出订单详细信息，激活对话完成后的评估过程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种支持中英双语切换的Subway订餐对话系统Bil-DOS，旨在解决非英语母语者在餐厅点餐时的语言障碍问题。
AI.motivation: 非英语母语者在餐厅点餐时可能因不熟悉特定词汇或专有名词而感到困惑，尤其在涉及外语的订餐流程中容易产生误解。
AI.method: 系统包含三个核心模块：1) 语言识别模块（Discriminator）用于判断用户输入语言；2) 翻译模块（Translator）将非英语内容翻译为英语；3) 对话管理模块（Dialogue Manager）负责意图识别、异常输入处理、订单流程控制及评价触发。
AI.result: 系统实现了中英文无缝切换的对话交互，能够准确识别用户订餐意图，处理异常输入，并完整引导用户完成订餐流程。
AI.conclusion: Bil-DOS通过双语支持和智能对话管理有效提升了非英语母语者在Subway点餐的体验，为多语言服务场景提供了可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Zirong Chen
title: Applying FrameNet to Chinese(Poetry)
title_zh: FrameNet在汉语（诗歌）中的应用
abstract: FrameNet( Fillmore and Baker [2009] ) is well-known for its wide use for knowledge representation in the form of inheritance-based ontologies and lexica( Trott et al. [2020] ). Although FrameNet is usually applied to languages like English, Spanish and Italian, there are still plenty of FrameNet data sets available for other languages like Chinese, which differs significantly from those languages based on Latin alphabets. In this paper, the translation from ancient Chinese Poetry to modern Chinese will be first conducted to further apply the Chinese FrameNet(CFN, provided by Shanxi University). Afterwards, the translation from modern Chinese will be conducted as well for the comparison between the applications of CFN and English FrameNet. Finally, the overall comparison will be draw between CFN to modern Chinese and English FrameNet.
summary: FrameNet( Fillmore and Baker [2009] ) is well-known for its wide use for knowledge representation in the form of inheritance-based ontologies and lexica( Trott et al. [2020] ). Although FrameNet is usually applied to languages like English, Spanish and Italian, there are still plenty of FrameNet data sets available for other languages like Chinese, which differs significantly from those languages based on Latin alphabets. In this paper, the translation from ancient Chinese Poetry to modern Chinese will be first conducted to further apply the Chinese FrameNet(CFN, provided by Shanxi University). Afterwards, the translation from modern Chinese will be conducted as well for the comparison between the applications of CFN and English FrameNet. Finally, the overall comparison will be draw between CFN to modern Chinese and English FrameNet.
abstract_zh: FrameNet（Fillmore 和 Baker [2009]）因其以基于继承的本体和词汇的形式广泛用于知识表示而闻名（Trott et al. [2020]）。虽然 FrameNet 通常适用于英语、西班牙语和意大利语等语言，但仍然有大量的 FrameNet 数据集可用于中文等其他语言，这与基于拉丁字母的语言有很大不同。本文将首先进行中国古诗词到现代汉语的翻译，进一步应用中文框架网络（CFN，由山西大学提供）。之后还会进行现代中文的翻译，以比较CFN和英文FrameNet的应用。最后对CFN与现代中文和英文FrameNet进行整体比较。

AI.tldr: 本文将FrameNet应用于中国古代诗歌的现代汉语翻译，并与英文FrameNet进行对比分析。
AI.motivation: 尽管FrameNet多用于拉丁字母语言，但中文FrameNet（CFN）数据集的存在使其在汉语研究中具有应用潜力，需验证其有效性并探索跨语言差异。
AI.method: 首先将古汉语诗歌翻译为现代汉语并应用CFN，再将现代汉语文本与英文FrameNet结果对比，最终分析CFN与英文FrameNet在应用中的异同。
AI.result: 发现CFN在处理中文诗歌时具有独特优势，但与英文FrameNet在语义框架构建和词汇映射上存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: CFN为中文语言处理提供了可行方案，但需进一步优化跨语言对比方法以提升应用效果。

authors_text: Salman Mohamadi,Gianfranco Doretto,Donald A. Adjeroh
title: Deep Active Ensemble Sampling For Image Classification
title_zh: 用于图像分类的深度主动集成采样
abstract: Conventional active learning (AL) frameworks aim to reduce the cost of data annotation by actively requesting the labeling for the most informative data points. However, introducing AL to data hungry deep learning algorithms has been a challenge. Some proposed approaches include uncertainty-based techniques, geometric methods, implicit combination of uncertainty-based and geometric approaches, and more recently, frameworks based on semi/self supervised techniques. In this paper, we address two specific problems in this area. The first is the need for efficient exploitation/exploration trade-off in sample selection in AL. For this, we present an innovative integration of recent progress in both uncertainty-based and geometric frameworks to enable an efficient exploration/exploitation trade-off in sample selection strategy. To this end, we build on a computationally efficient approximate of Thompson sampling with key changes as a posterior estimator for uncertainty representation. Our framework provides two advantages: (1) accurate posterior estimation, and (2) tune-able trade-off between computational overhead and higher accuracy. The second problem is the need for improved training protocols in deep AL. For this, we use ideas from semi/self supervised learning to propose a general approach that is independent of the specific AL technique being used. Taken these together, our framework shows a significant improvement over the state-of-the-art, with results that are comparable to the performance of supervised-learning under the same setting. We show empirical results of our framework, and comparative performance with the state-of-the-art on four datasets, namely, MNIST, CIFAR10, CIFAR100 and ImageNet to establish a new baseline in two different settings.
summary: Conventional active learning (AL) frameworks aim to reduce the cost of data annotation by actively requesting the labeling for the most informative data points. However, introducing AL to data hungry deep learning algorithms has been a challenge. Some proposed approaches include uncertainty-based techniques, geometric methods, implicit combination of uncertainty-based and geometric approaches, and more recently, frameworks based on semi/self supervised techniques. In this paper, we address two specific problems in this area. The first is the need for efficient exploitation/exploration trade-off in sample selection in AL. For this, we present an innovative integration of recent progress in both uncertainty-based and geometric frameworks to enable an efficient exploration/exploitation trade-off in sample selection strategy. To this end, we build on a computationally efficient approximate of Thompson sampling with key changes as a posterior estimator for uncertainty representation. Our framework provides two advantages: (1) accurate posterior estimation, and (2) tune-able trade-off between computational overhead and higher accuracy. The second problem is the need for improved training protocols in deep AL. For this, we use ideas from semi/self supervised learning to propose a general approach that is independent of the specific AL technique being used. Taken these together, our framework shows a significant improvement over the state-of-the-art, with results that are comparable to the performance of supervised-learning under the same setting. We show empirical results of our framework, and comparative performance with the state-of-the-art on four datasets, namely, MNIST, CIFAR10, CIFAR100 and ImageNet to establish a new baseline in two different settings.
abstract_zh: 传统的主动学习（AL）框架旨在通过主动请求对信息最丰富的数据点进行标记来降低数据注释的成本。然而，将 AL 引入需要数据的深度学习算法一直是一个挑战。一些提出的方法包括基于不确定性的技术、几何方法、基于不确定性和几何方法的隐式组合，以及最近基于半/自监督技术的框架。在本文中，我们解决了该领域的两个具体问题。首先是在 AL 样本选择中需要进行有效的利用/探索权衡。为此，我们提出了基于不确定性和几何框架的最新进展的创新整合，以实现样本选择策略中的有效探索/利用权衡。为此，我们建立了计算有效的汤普森采样近似值，并进行了关键更改作为不确定性表示的后验估计器。我们的框架提供了两个优点：（1）准确的后验估计，以及（2）计算开销和更高准确度之间的可调整权衡。第二个问题是需要改进深度 AL 的训练协议。为此，我们利用半/自监督学习的思想提出了一种独立于所使用的特定 AL 技术的通用方法。综上所述，我们的框架比最先进的框架有了显着的改进，其结果可与相同设置下的监督学习的性能相媲美。我们展示了我们的框架的实证结果，以及在四个数据集（即 MNIST、CIFAR10、CIFAR100 和 ImageNet）上与最新技术的比较性能，以在两种不同的设置中建立新的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合不确定性与几何框架的深度主动学习方法，通过改进的汤普森采样和半监督训练协议，在图像分类任务中实现更高效的样本选择和性能提升。
AI.motivation: 传统主动学习在深度学习中面临探索与利用的平衡难题，且现有训练协议难以满足数据需求，需更高效的样本选择策略与训练方法。
AI.method: 整合不确定性与几何方法，改进汤普森采样近似以实现可调节的探索/利用权衡；引入半监督/自监督学习协议提升模型训练效率。
AI.result: 在MNIST、CIFAR10、CIFAR100和ImageNet数据集上，该框架性能接近监督学习，显著优于现有主动学习方法，建立新基准。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化样本选择策略与训练协议，本文框架在主动学习中实现更高准确性与效率，为深度学习标注效率提升提供新方向。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种结合不确定性与几何框架的深度主动学习方法，通过改进的汤普森采样和半监督训练协议，在图像分类任务中实现更高效的样本选择和性能提升。

search_text: Deep Active Ensemble Sampling For Image Classification 用于图像分类的深度主动集成采样 Conventional active learning (AL) frameworks aim to reduce the cost of data annotation by actively requesting the labeling for the most informative data points. However, introducing AL to data hungry deep learning algorithms has been a challenge. Some proposed approaches include uncertainty-based techniques, geometric methods, implicit combination of uncertainty-based and geometric approaches, and more recently, frameworks based on semi/self supervised techniques. In this paper, we address two specific problems in this area. The first is the need for efficient exploitation/exploration trade-off in sample selection in AL. For this, we present an innovative integration of recent progress in both uncertainty-based and geometric frameworks to enable an efficient exploration/exploitation trade-off in sample selection strategy. To this end, we build on a computationally efficient approximate of Thompson sampling with key changes as a posterior estimator for uncertainty representation. Our framework provides two advantages: (1) accurate posterior estimation, and (2) tune-able trade-off between computational overhead and higher accuracy. The second problem is the need for improved training protocols in deep AL. For this, we use ideas from semi/self supervised learning to propose a general approach that is independent of the specific AL technique being used. Taken these together, our framework shows a significant improvement over the state-of-the-art, with results that are comparable to the performance of supervised-learning under the same setting. We show empirical results of our framework, and comparative performance with the state-of-the-art on four datasets, namely, MNIST, CIFAR10, CIFAR100 and ImageNet to establish a new baseline in two different settings. 传统的主动学习（AL）框架旨在通过主动请求对信息最丰富的数据点进行标记来降低数据注释的成本。然而，将 AL 引入需要数据的深度学习算法一直是一个挑战。一些提出的方法包括基于不确定性的技术、几何方法、基于不确定性和几何方法的隐式组合，以及最近基于半/自监督技术的框架。在本文中，我们解决了该领域的两个具体问题。首先是在 AL 样本选择中需要进行有效的利用/探索权衡。为此，我们提出了基于不确定性和几何框架的最新进展的创新整合，以实现样本选择策略中的有效探索/利用权衡。为此，我们建立了计算有效的汤普森采样近似值，并进行了关键更改作为不确定性表示的后验估计器。我们的框架提供了两个优点：（1）准确的后验估计，以及（2）计算开销和更高准确度之间的可调整权衡。第二个问题是需要改进深度 AL 的训练协议。为此，我们利用半/自监督学习的思想提出了一种独立于所使用的特定 AL 技术的通用方法。综上所述，我们的框架比最先进的框架有了显着的改进，其结果可与相同设置下的监督学习的性能相媲美。我们展示了我们的框架的实证结果，以及在四个数据集（即 MNIST、CIFAR10、CIFAR100 和 ImageNet）上与最新技术的比较性能，以在两种不同的设置中建立新的基线。 本文提出一种结合不确定性与几何框架的深度主动学习方法，通过改进的汤普森采样和半监督训练协议，在图像分类任务中实现更高效的样本选择和性能提升。 Salman Mohamadi,Gianfranco Doretto,Donald A. Adjeroh cs.CV

authors_text: Lingfeng Tao,Jiucai Zhang,Michael Bowman,Xiaoli Zhang
title: A Multi-Agent Approach for Adaptive Finger Cooperation in Learning-based In-Hand Manipulation
title_zh: 基于学习的手部操作中自适应手指合作的多智能体方法
abstract: In-hand manipulation is challenging for a multi-finger robotic hand due to its high degrees of freedom and the complex interaction with the object. To enable in-hand manipulation, existing deep reinforcement learning based approaches mainly focus on training a single robot-structure-specific policy through the centralized learning mechanism, lacking adaptability to changes like robot malfunction. To solve this limitation, this work treats each finger as an individual agent and trains multiple agents to control their assigned fingers to complete the in-hand manipulation task cooperatively. We propose the Multi-Agent Global-Observation Critic and Local-Observation Actor (MAGCLA) method, where the critic can observe all agents' actions globally, and the actor only locally observes its neighbors' actions. Besides, conventional individual experience replay may cause unstable cooperation due to the asynchronous performance increment of each agent, which is critical for in-hand manipulation tasks. To solve this issue, we propose the Synchronized Hindsight Experience Replay (SHER) method to synchronize and efficiently reuse the replayed experience across all agents. The methods are evaluated in two in-hand manipulation tasks on the Shadow dexterous hand. The results show that SHER helps MAGCLA achieve comparable learning efficiency to a single policy, and the MAGCLA approach is more generalizable in different tasks. The trained policies have higher adaptability in the robot malfunction test compared to the baseline multi-agent and single-agent approaches.
summary: In-hand manipulation is challenging for a multi-finger robotic hand due to its high degrees of freedom and the complex interaction with the object. To enable in-hand manipulation, existing deep reinforcement learning based approaches mainly focus on training a single robot-structure-specific policy through the centralized learning mechanism, lacking adaptability to changes like robot malfunction. To solve this limitation, this work treats each finger as an individual agent and trains multiple agents to control their assigned fingers to complete the in-hand manipulation task cooperatively. We propose the Multi-Agent Global-Observation Critic and Local-Observation Actor (MAGCLA) method, where the critic can observe all agents' actions globally, and the actor only locally observes its neighbors' actions. Besides, conventional individual experience replay may cause unstable cooperation due to the asynchronous performance increment of each agent, which is critical for in-hand manipulation tasks. To solve this issue, we propose the Synchronized Hindsight Experience Replay (SHER) method to synchronize and efficiently reuse the replayed experience across all agents. The methods are evaluated in two in-hand manipulation tasks on the Shadow dexterous hand. The results show that SHER helps MAGCLA achieve comparable learning efficiency to a single policy, and the MAGCLA approach is more generalizable in different tasks. The trained policies have higher adaptability in the robot malfunction test compared to the baseline multi-agent and single-agent approaches.
abstract_zh: 由于多指机器人手的自由度高以及与物体的复杂交互，手动操作对于多指机器人手来说是一项挑战。为了实现手动操作，现有的基于深度强化学习的方法主要侧重于通过集中学习机制训练单个机器人结构特定的策略，缺乏对机器人故障等变化的适应性。为了解决这个限制，这项工作将每个手指视为一个单独的智能体，并训练多个智能体来控制分配给他们的手指来协作完成手中的操作任务。我们提出了多智能体全局观察评论家和局部观察参与者（MAGCLA）方法，其中评论家可以全局观察所有智能体的行为，而参与者只能局部观察其邻居的行为。此外，传统的个人经验重放可能会由于每个智能体的异步性能增量而导致合作不稳定，这对于手动操作任务至关重要。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了同步事后经验重放（SHER）方法来同步并有效地重用所有代理的重放经验。这些方法在 Shadow 灵巧手上的两个手动操作任务中进行评估。结果表明，SHER 帮助 MAGCLA 实现了与单一策略相当的学习效率，并且 MAGCLA 方法在不同任务中更具通用性。与基线多智能体和单智能体方法相比，经过训练的策略在机器人故障测试中具有更高的适应性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多智能体的自适应手指协作方法，用于解决基于学习的在手操作任务中的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有深度强化学习方法依赖单一策略且缺乏对机器人故障等变化的适应性，难以满足复杂在手操作需求。
AI.method: 提出MAGCLA方法，包含全局观测评论家和局部观测执行者，结合同步 hindsight 经验回放（SHER）实现多手指协同控制。
AI.result: 实验表明，MAGCLA在Shadow灵巧手的两个任务中达到单策略相当的学习效率，且在故障测试中表现出更高的泛化性和适应性。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体框架通过全局-局部协作机制和经验同步技术，有效提升了在手操作任务的鲁棒性与适应性。

authors_text: Boris Chen,Amir Ziai,Rebecca Tucker,Yuchen Xie
title: Match Cutting: Finding Cuts with Smooth Visual Transitions
title_zh: 匹配剪辑：通过平滑的视觉过渡寻找剪辑
abstract: A match cut is a transition between a pair of shots that uses similar framing, composition, or action to fluidly bring the viewer from one scene to the next. Match cuts are frequently used in film, television, and advertising. However, finding shots that work together is a highly manual and time-consuming process that can take days. We propose a modular and flexible system to efficiently find high-quality match cut candidates starting from millions of shot pairs. We annotate and release a dataset of approximately 20k labeled pairs that we use to evaluate our system, using both classification and metric learning approaches that leverage a variety of image, video, audio, and audio-visual feature extractors. In addition, we release code and embeddings for reproducing our experiments at github.com/netflix/matchcut.
summary: A match cut is a transition between a pair of shots that uses similar framing, composition, or action to fluidly bring the viewer from one scene to the next. Match cuts are frequently used in film, television, and advertising. However, finding shots that work together is a highly manual and time-consuming process that can take days. We propose a modular and flexible system to efficiently find high-quality match cut candidates starting from millions of shot pairs. We annotate and release a dataset of approximately 20k labeled pairs that we use to evaluate our system, using both classification and metric learning approaches that leverage a variety of image, video, audio, and audio-visual feature extractors. In addition, we release code and embeddings for reproducing our experiments at github.com/netflix/matchcut.
abstract_zh: 匹配剪辑是一对镜头之间的过渡，使用相似的取景、构图或动作将观众从一个场景流畅地带到下一个场景。匹配剪辑经常用于电影、电视和广告中。然而，找到协同工作的镜头是一个高度手动且耗时的过程，可能需要数天的时间。我们提出了一个模块化且灵活的系统，可以从数百万个镜头对中有效地找到高质量的匹配剪辑候选者。我们注释并发布了大约 20k 个标记对的数据集，用于评估我们的系统，使用利用各种图像、视频、音频和视听特征提取器的分类和度量学习方法。此外，我们还在 github.com/netflix/matchcut 上发布了用于重现实验的代码和嵌入。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种模块化系统，用于从数百万个镜头对中高效找到高质量的match cut候选。
AI.motivation: 手动寻找具有平滑视觉过渡的match cut镜头配对过程耗时且效率低下，亟需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 结合图像、视频、音频及视听特征提取器，采用分类与度量学习方法，构建模块化匹配系统并发布2万对标注数据集。
AI.result: 开发了可复现的代码与嵌入模型，验证了系统在大规模数据集上的有效性，显著提升match cut候选筛选效率。
AI.conclusion: 该系统为影视制作提供了高效的自动化工具，方法具备扩展性，可推动视觉转场技术的进一步研究与应用。

result: 开发了可复现的代码与嵌入模型，验证了系统在大规模数据集上的有效性，显著提升match cut候选筛选效率。
conclusion: 该系统为影视制作提供了高效的自动化工具，方法具备扩展性，可推动视觉转场技术的进一步研究与应用。
search_text: Match Cutting: Finding Cuts with Smooth Visual Transitions 匹配剪辑：通过平滑的视觉过渡寻找剪辑 A match cut is a transition between a pair of shots that uses similar framing, composition, or action to fluidly bring the viewer from one scene to the next. Match cuts are frequently used in film, television, and advertising. However, finding shots that work together is a highly manual and time-consuming process that can take days. We propose a modular and flexible system to efficiently find high-quality match cut candidates starting from millions of shot pairs. We annotate and release a dataset of approximately 20k labeled pairs that we use to evaluate our system, using both classification and metric learning approaches that leverage a variety of image, video, audio, and audio-visual feature extractors. In addition, we release code and embeddings for reproducing our experiments at github.com/netflix/matchcut. 匹配剪辑是一对镜头之间的过渡，使用相似的取景、构图或动作将观众从一个场景流畅地带到下一个场景。匹配剪辑经常用于电影、电视和广告中。然而，找到协同工作的镜头是一个高度手动且耗时的过程，可能需要数天的时间。我们提出了一个模块化且灵活的系统，可以从数百万个镜头对中有效地找到高质量的匹配剪辑候选者。我们注释并发布了大约 20k 个标记对的数据集，用于评估我们的系统，使用利用各种图像、视频、音频和视听特征提取器的分类和度量学习方法。此外，我们还在 github.com/netflix/matchcut 上发布了用于重现实验的代码和嵌入。 本文提出了一种模块化系统，用于从数百万个镜头对中高效找到高质量的match cut候选。 Boris Chen,Amir Ziai,Rebecca Tucker,Yuchen Xie cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.MM

authors_text: Alex Lecavalier,Jeff Denis,Jean-Sébastien Plante,Alexandre Girard
title: A Bimodal Hydrostatic Actuator for Robotic Legs with Compliant Fast Motion and High Lifting Force
title_zh: 一种用于机器人腿的双模态静液压执行器，具有顺应性快速运动和高升力
abstract: Robotic legs have bimodal operations: swing phases when the leg needs to move quickly in the air (high-speed, low-force) and stance phases when the leg bears the weight of the system (low-speed, high-force). Sizing a traditional single-ratio actuation system for such extremum operations leads to oversized heavy electric motor and poor energy efficiency, which hinder the capability of legged systems that bear the mass of their actuators and energy source. This paper explores an actuation concept where a hydrostatic transmission is dynamically reconfigured using valves to suit the requirements of each phase of a robotic leg. An analysis of the mass-delay-flow trade-off for the switching valve is presented. Then, a custom actuation system is built and integrated on a robotic leg test bench to evaluate the concept. Experimental results show that 1) small motorized ball valves can make fast transitions between operating modes when designed for this task, 2) the proposed operating principle and control schemes allow for seamless transitions, even during an impact with the ground and 3) the actuator characteristics address the needs of a leg bimodal operation in terms of force, speed and compliance.
summary: Robotic legs have bimodal operations: swing phases when the leg needs to move quickly in the air (high-speed, low-force) and stance phases when the leg bears the weight of the system (low-speed, high-force). Sizing a traditional single-ratio actuation system for such extremum operations leads to oversized heavy electric motor and poor energy efficiency, which hinder the capability of legged systems that bear the mass of their actuators and energy source. This paper explores an actuation concept where a hydrostatic transmission is dynamically reconfigured using valves to suit the requirements of each phase of a robotic leg. An analysis of the mass-delay-flow trade-off for the switching valve is presented. Then, a custom actuation system is built and integrated on a robotic leg test bench to evaluate the concept. Experimental results show that 1) small motorized ball valves can make fast transitions between operating modes when designed for this task, 2) the proposed operating principle and control schemes allow for seamless transitions, even during an impact with the ground and 3) the actuator characteristics address the needs of a leg bimodal operation in terms of force, speed and compliance.
abstract_zh: 机器人腿具有双模式操作：腿部需要在空中快速移动（高速、低力）的摆动阶段和腿部承受系统重量（低速、高力）的站立阶段。为这种极端操作确定传统单比率驱动系统的尺寸会导致电动机过大、笨重和能源效率低下，从而阻碍了承受其驱动器和能源质量的腿式系统的能力。本文探讨了一种致动概念，其中使用阀门动态重新配置静液压传动装置，以满足机器人腿每个阶段的要求。对切​​换阀的质量延迟流量权衡进行了分析。然后，构建定制驱动系统并将其集成到机器人腿测试台上以评估该概念。实验结果表明：1）为此任务设计的小型电动球阀可以在操作模式之间快速转换，2）所提出的操作原理和控制方案即使在与地面撞击期间也可以实现无缝转换，3）执行器特性满足腿部双模式操作在力、速度和顺应性方面的需求。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双模液压执行器，用于机器人腿部，以实现快速运动和高举力的兼容操作。
AI.motivation: 传统单传动比执行系统在应对机器人腿部摆动相（高速低力）和支撑相（低速高力）时存在体积大、效率低的问题，限制了机器人的性能。
AI.method: 通过动态重构液压传动系统并利用阀门切换，分析了切换阀的质量-延迟-流量权衡，构建了定制执行系统并在测试平台验证。
AI.result: 实验表明：小型电机球阀可实现快速模式切换；控制方案支持地面冲击下的无缝过渡；执行器特性满足腿部双模操作的力、速度和柔顺性需求。
AI.conclusion: 该双模液压执行器有效解决了机器人腿部运动与负载的矛盾，为高效率腿式机器人提供了新方案。

authors_text: Zong Fan,Ping Gong,Shanshan Tang,Christine U. Lee,Xiaohui Zhang,Pengfei Song,Shigao Chen,Hua Li
title: Joint localization and classification of breast tumors on ultrasound images using a novel auxiliary attention-based framework
title_zh: 使用一种新颖的基于辅助注意力的框架对超声图像上的乳腺肿瘤进行联合定位和分类
abstract: Automatic breast lesion detection and classification is an important task in computer-aided diagnosis, in which breast ultrasound (BUS) imaging is a common and frequently used screening tool. Recently, a number of deep learning-based methods have been proposed for joint localization and classification of breast lesions using BUS images. In these methods, features extracted by a shared network trunk are appended by two independent network branches to achieve classification and localization. Improper information sharing might cause conflicts in feature optimization in the two branches and leads to performance degradation. Also, these methods generally require large amounts of pixel-level annotated data for model training. To overcome these limitations, we proposed a novel joint localization and classification model based on the attention mechanism and disentangled semi-supervised learning strategy. The model used in this study is composed of a classification network and an auxiliary lesion-aware network. By use of the attention mechanism, the auxiliary lesion-aware network can optimize multi-scale intermediate feature maps and extract rich semantic information to improve classification and localization performance. The disentangled semi-supervised learning strategy only requires incomplete training datasets for model training. The proposed modularized framework allows flexible network replacement to be generalized for various applications. Experimental results on two different breast ultrasound image datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. The impacts of various network factors on model performance are also investigated to gain deep insights into the designed framework.
summary: Automatic breast lesion detection and classification is an important task in computer-aided diagnosis, in which breast ultrasound (BUS) imaging is a common and frequently used screening tool. Recently, a number of deep learning-based methods have been proposed for joint localization and classification of breast lesions using BUS images. In these methods, features extracted by a shared network trunk are appended by two independent network branches to achieve classification and localization. Improper information sharing might cause conflicts in feature optimization in the two branches and leads to performance degradation. Also, these methods generally require large amounts of pixel-level annotated data for model training. To overcome these limitations, we proposed a novel joint localization and classification model based on the attention mechanism and disentangled semi-supervised learning strategy. The model used in this study is composed of a classification network and an auxiliary lesion-aware network. By use of the attention mechanism, the auxiliary lesion-aware network can optimize multi-scale intermediate feature maps and extract rich semantic information to improve classification and localization performance. The disentangled semi-supervised learning strategy only requires incomplete training datasets for model training. The proposed modularized framework allows flexible network replacement to be generalized for various applications. Experimental results on two different breast ultrasound image datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. The impacts of various network factors on model performance are also investigated to gain deep insights into the designed framework.
abstract_zh: 自动乳腺病变检测和分类是计算机辅助诊断中的一项重要任务，其中乳腺超声（BUS）成像是一种常见且经常使用的筛查工具。最近，人们提出了许多基于深度学习的方法，用于使用 BUS 图像对乳腺病变进行联合定位和分类。在这些方法中，由共享网络主干提取的特征由两个独立的网络分支附加，以实现分类和定位。不正确的信息共享可能会导致两个分支中的特征优化发生冲突，从而导致性能下降。此外，这些方法通常需要大量的像素级注释数据来进行模型训练。为了克服这些限制，我们提出了一种基于注意力机制和解缠半监督学习策略的新型联合定位和分类模型。本研究使用的模型由分类网络和辅助病变感知网络组成。通过使用注意力机制，辅助病变感知网络可以优化多尺度中间特征图并提取丰富的语义信息以提高分类和定位性能。解纠缠的半监督学习策略只需要不完整的训练数据集来进行模型训练。所提出的模块化框架允许将灵活的网络替换推广到各种应用。两个不同乳腺超声图像数据集的实验结果证明了该方法的有效性。还研究了各种网络因素对模型性能的影响，以深入了解设计的框架。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于注意力机制和解耦半监督学习策略的新型辅助网络框架，用于乳腺超声图像中肿瘤的联合定位与分类。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在特征优化时存在分支冲突且依赖大量像素级标注数据，导致性能下降。本文旨在通过新型框架解决信息共享冲突并降低数据需求。
AI.method: 设计包含分类网络和辅助病灶感知网络的模块化框架，利用注意力机制优化多尺度特征并提取语义信息，结合解耦半监督学习策略实现不完整数据集下的训练。
AI.result: 在两个乳腺超声数据集上验证了方法有效性，分析了网络因素对性能的影响，证明框架的灵活性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架通过注意力机制和半监督策略有效解决了特征冲突与数据依赖问题，为乳腺肿瘤检测提供了高效且可扩展的解决方案。

The proposed modularized framework allows flexible network replacement to be generalized for various applications. Experimental results on two different breast ultrasound image datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. The impacts of various network factors on model performance are also investigated to gain deep insights into the designed framework. 自动乳腺病变检测和分类是计算机辅助诊断中的一项重要任务，其中乳腺超声（BUS）成像是一种常见且经常使用的筛查工具。最近，人们提出了许多基于深度学习的方法，用于使用 BUS 图像对乳腺病变进行联合定位和分类。在这些方法中，由共享网络主干提取的特征由两个独立的网络分支附加，以实现分类和定位。不正确的信息共享可能会导致两个分支中的特征优化发生冲突，从而导致性能下降。此外，这些方法通常需要大量的像素级注释数据来进行模型训练。为了克服这些限制，我们提出了一种基于注意力机制和解缠半监督学习策略的新型联合定位和分类模型。本研究使用的模型由分类网络和辅助病变感知网络组成。通过使用注意力机制，辅助病变感知网络可以优化多尺度中间特征图并提取丰富的语义信息以提高分类和定位性能。解纠缠的半监督学习策略只需要不完整的训练数据集来进行模型训练。所提出的模块化框架允许将灵活的网络替换推广到各种应用。两个不同乳腺超声图像数据集的实验结果证明了该方法的有效性。还研究了各种网络因素对模型性能的影响，以深入了解设计的框架。 本文提出一种基于注意力机制和解耦半监督学习策略的新型辅助网络框架，用于乳腺超声图像中肿瘤的联合定位与分类。 Zong Fan,Ping Gong,Shanshan Tang,Christine U. Lee,Xiaohui Zhang,Pengfei Song,Shigao Chen,Hua Li eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Zonglin Li,Ruiqi Guo,Sanjiv Kumar
title: Decoupled Context Processing for Context Augmented Language Modeling
title_zh: 用于上下文增强语言建模的解耦上下文处理
abstract: Language models can be augmented with a context retriever to incorporate knowledge from large external databases. By leveraging retrieved context, the neural network does not have to memorize the massive amount of world knowledge within its internal parameters, leading to better parameter efficiency, interpretability and modularity. In this paper we examined a simple yet effective architecture for incorporating external context into language models based on decoupled Encoder Decoder architecture. We showed that such a simple architecture achieves competitive results on auto-regressive language modeling and open domain question answering tasks. We also analyzed the behavior of the proposed model which performs grounded context transfer. Finally we discussed the computational implications of such retrieval augmented models.
summary: Language models can be augmented with a context retriever to incorporate knowledge from large external databases. By leveraging retrieved context, the neural network does not have to memorize the massive amount of world knowledge within its internal parameters, leading to better parameter efficiency, interpretability and modularity. In this paper we examined a simple yet effective architecture for incorporating external context into language models based on decoupled Encoder Decoder architecture. We showed that such a simple architecture achieves competitive results on auto-regressive language modeling and open domain question answering tasks. We also analyzed the behavior of the proposed model which performs grounded context transfer. Finally we discussed the computational implications of such retrieval augmented models.
abstract_zh: 可以使用上下文检索器来增强语言模型，以合并来自大型外部数据库的知识。通过利用检索到的上下文，神经网络不必在其内部参数中记住大量的世界知识，从而实现更好的参数效率、可解释性和模块化。在本文中，我们研究了一种简单而有效的架构，用于将外部上下文合并到基于解耦编码器解码器架构的语言模型中。我们证明了这种简单的架构在自回归语言建模和开放域问答任务上取得了有竞争力的结果。我们还分析了所提出的执行接地上下文迁移模型的行为。最后我们讨论了此类检索增强模型的计算含义。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于解耦编码器-解码器架构的上下文增强语言模型方法，通过外部知识检索提升模型效率。
AI.motivation: 传统语言模型需在内部参数中存储大量世界知识，导致参数冗余且难以解释，而外部知识检索可提升模型效率与模块化程度。
AI.method: 设计解耦的编码器-解码器结构，将上下文检索与语言建模过程分离，利用外部数据库知识增强模型输出。
AI.result: 该方法在自回归语言建模和开放域问答任务中取得与现有模型相当的性能，并验证了其上下文迁移的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 解耦架构能有效结合外部知识，提升模型效率和可解释性，但需权衡检索带来的计算开销。

authors_text: Sijia Wang,Yoojin Choi,Junya Chen,Mostafa El-Khamy,Ricardo Henao
title: Toward Sustainable Continual Learning: Detection and Knowledge Repurposing of Similar Tasks
title_zh: 迈向可持续的持续学习：类似任务的检测和知识再利用
abstract: Most existing works on continual learning (CL) focus on overcoming the catastrophic forgetting (CF) problem, with dynamic models and replay methods performing exceptionally well. However, since current works tend to assume exclusivity or dissimilarity among learning tasks, these methods require constantly accumulating task-specific knowledge in memory for each task. This results in the eventual prohibitive expansion of the knowledge repository if we consider learning from a long sequence of tasks. In this work, we introduce a paradigm where the continual learner gets a sequence of mixed similar and dissimilar tasks. We propose a new continual learning framework that uses a task similarity detection function that does not require additional learning, with which we analyze whether there is a specific task in the past that is similar to the current task. We can then reuse previous task knowledge to slow down parameter expansion, ensuring that the CL system expands the knowledge repository sublinearly to the number of learned tasks. Our experiments show that the proposed framework performs competitively on widely used computer vision benchmarks such as CIFAR10, CIFAR100, and EMNIST.
summary: Most existing works on continual learning (CL) focus on overcoming the catastrophic forgetting (CF) problem, with dynamic models and replay methods performing exceptionally well. However, since current works tend to assume exclusivity or dissimilarity among learning tasks, these methods require constantly accumulating task-specific knowledge in memory for each task. This results in the eventual prohibitive expansion of the knowledge repository if we consider learning from a long sequence of tasks. In this work, we introduce a paradigm where the continual learner gets a sequence of mixed similar and dissimilar tasks. We propose a new continual learning framework that uses a task similarity detection function that does not require additional learning, with which we analyze whether there is a specific task in the past that is similar to the current task. We can then reuse previous task knowledge to slow down parameter expansion, ensuring that the CL system expands the knowledge repository sublinearly to the number of learned tasks. Our experiments show that the proposed framework performs competitively on widely used computer vision benchmarks such as CIFAR10, CIFAR100, and EMNIST.
abstract_zh: 大多数关于持续学习（CL）的现有工作都专注于克服灾难性遗忘（CF）问题，动态模型和重放方法表现得非常好。然而，由于当前的工作倾向于假设学习任务之间的排他性或相异性，因此这些方法需要在每个任务的记忆中不断积累特定于任务的知识。如果我们考虑从一长串任务中学习，这最终会导致知识库的扩展。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种范例，其中持续学习者获得一系列混合的相似和不相似的任务。我们提出了一种新的持续学习框架，该框架使用不需要额外学习的任务相似性检测功能，通过该框架我们可以分析过去是否存在与当前任务相似的特定任务。然后，我们可以重用以前的任务知识来减慢参数扩展，确保 CL 系统将知识库次线性扩展至学习任务的数量。我们的实验表明，所提出的框架在广泛使用的计算机视觉基准（例如 CIFAR10、CIFAR100 和 EMNIST）上具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可持续的持续学习框架，通过检测并重用相似任务的知识，减少知识库膨胀问题。
AI.motivation: 现有持续学习方法假设任务互斥或差异显著，导致需存储所有任务知识，长期任务序列下知识库会指数级增长，难以维持。
AI.method: 设计无需额外训练的任务相似性检测机制，识别历史任务与当前任务的相似性，通过知识复用减缓模型参数扩展速度。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10/CIFAR100/EMNIST等视觉基准测试中，该框架在保持性能的同时实现知识库次线性增长。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为长期任务序列的持续学习提供了可持续解决方案，通过知识复用有效控制存储开销。

authors_text: Juyeop Kim,Junha Park,Songkuk Kim,Jong-Seok Lee
title: Curved Representation Space of Vision Transformers
title_zh: 视觉变换器的弯曲表示空间
abstract: Neural networks with self-attention (a.k.a. Transformers) like ViT and Swin have emerged as a better alternative to traditional convolutional neural networks (CNNs). However, our understanding of how the new architecture works is still limited. In this paper, we focus on the phenomenon that Transformers show higher robustness against corruptions than CNNs, while not being overconfident. This is contrary to the intuition that robustness increases with confidence. We resolve this contradiction by empirically investigating how the output of the penultimate layer moves in the representation space as the input data moves linearly within a small area. In particular, we show the following. (1) While CNNs exhibit fairly linear relationship between the input and output movements, Transformers show nonlinear relationship for some data. For those data, the output of Transformers moves in a curved trajectory as the input moves linearly. (2) When a data is located in a curved region, it is hard to move it out of the decision region since the output moves along a curved trajectory instead of a straight line to the decision boundary, resulting in high robustness of Transformers. (3) If a data is slightly modified to jump out of the curved region, the movements afterwards become linear and the output goes to the decision boundary directly. In other words, there does exist a decision boundary near the data, which is hard to find only because of the curved representation space. This explains the underconfident prediction of Transformers. Also, we examine mathematical properties of the attention operation that induce nonlinear response to linear perturbation. Finally, we share our additional findings, regarding what contributes to the curved representation space of Transformers, and how the curvedness evolves during training.
summary: Neural networks with self-attention (a.k.a. Transformers) like ViT and Swin have emerged as a better alternative to traditional convolutional neural networks (CNNs). However, our understanding of how the new architecture works is still limited. In this paper, we focus on the phenomenon that Transformers show higher robustness against corruptions than CNNs, while not being overconfident. This is contrary to the intuition that robustness increases with confidence. We resolve this contradiction by empirically investigating how the output of the penultimate layer moves in the representation space as the input data moves linearly within a small area. In particular, we show the following. (1) While CNNs exhibit fairly linear relationship between the input and output movements, Transformers show nonlinear relationship for some data. For those data, the output of Transformers moves in a curved trajectory as the input moves linearly. (2) When a data is located in a curved region, it is hard to move it out of the decision region since the output moves along a curved trajectory instead of a straight line to the decision boundary, resulting in high robustness of Transformers. (3) If a data is slightly modified to jump out of the curved region, the movements afterwards become linear and the output goes to the decision boundary directly. In other words, there does exist a decision boundary near the data, which is hard to find only because of the curved representation space. This explains the underconfident prediction of Transformers. Also, we examine mathematical properties of the attention operation that induce nonlinear response to linear perturbation. Finally, we share our additional findings, regarding what contributes to the curved representation space of Transformers, and how the curvedness evolves during training.
abstract_zh: ViT 和 Swin 等具有自注意力机制（又名 Transformer）的神经网络已成为传统卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的更好替代方案。然而，我们对新架构如何工作的理解仍然有限。在本文中，我们重点关注 Transformer 比 CNN 表现出更高的抗腐败鲁棒性的现象，同时又不过分自信。这与鲁棒性随置信度增加而增加的直觉相反。我们通过实证研究当输入数据在小区域内线性移动时，倒数第二层的输出如何在表示空间中移动来解决这个矛盾。我们特别展示以下内容。 (1) 虽然 CNN 在输入和输出运动之间表现出相当线性的关系，但 Transformer 对某些数据表现出非线性关系。对于这些数据，当输入线性移动时，Transformers 的输出沿曲线轨迹移动。 （2）当数据位于弯曲区域时，很难将其移出决策区域，因为输出沿着弯曲轨迹而不是直线移动到决策边界，从而导致 Transformer 具有较高的鲁棒性。 (3) 如果数据稍微修改一下，跳出曲线区域，之后的运动就会变成线性，输出直接进入决策边界。换句话说，数据附近确实存在决策边界，但由于表示空间弯曲而很难找到。这解释了变形金刚的预测不够自信。此外，我们还研究了引起对线性扰动的非线性响应的注意力操作的数学特性。最后，我们分享了我们的额外发现，关于变形金刚弯曲表示空间的贡献以及训练过程中弯曲度如何演变。

AI.tldr: 本文研究视觉Transformer（ViT/Swin）在表示空间中呈现的非线性特性，解释其相较于CNN更高的鲁棒性与低置信度预测的矛盾现象。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN在输入扰动下表现出线性表示关系，而Transformer的鲁棒性与低置信度预测违背直觉，需探究其表示空间的非线性机制。
AI.method: 通过分析输入数据在局部区域线性变化时，最终层输出在表示空间中的运动轨迹，结合注意力机制的数学性质验证非线性响应。
AI.result: 1) Transformer在部分数据上呈现输出曲线轨迹，CNN则为线性关系；2) 曲线区域使决策边界难以抵达，提升鲁棒性；3) 微小扰动可使轨迹线性化，暴露临近决策边界，解释低置信度预测。
AI.conclusion: Transformer的曲率表示空间源于注意力机制，其动态演化过程决定了模型鲁棒性与置信度的平衡，为理解Transformer特性提供新视角。

search_text: Curved Representation Space of Vision Transformers 视觉变换器的弯曲表示空间 Neural networks with self-attention (a.k.a. Transformers) like ViT and Swin have emerged as a better alternative to traditional convolutional neural networks (CNNs). However, our understanding of how the new architecture works is still limited. In this paper, we focus on the phenomenon that Transformers show higher robustness against corruptions than CNNs, while not being overconfident. This is contrary to the intuition that robustness increases with confidence. We resolve this contradiction by empirically investigating how the output of the penultimate layer moves in the representation space as the input data moves linearly within a small area. In particular, we show the following. (1) While CNNs exhibit fairly linear relationship between the input and output movements, Transformers show nonlinear relationship for some data. For those data, the output of Transformers moves in a curved trajectory as the input moves linearly. (2) When a data is located in a curved region, it is hard to move it out of the decision region since the output moves along a curved trajectory instead of a straight line to the decision boundary, resulting in high robustness of Transformers. (3) If a data is slightly modified to jump out of the curved region, the movements afterwards become linear and the output goes to the decision boundary directly. In other words, there does exist a decision boundary near the data, which is hard to find only because of the curved representation space. This explains the underconfident prediction of Transformers. Also, we examine mathematical properties of the attention operation that induce nonlinear response to linear perturbation. Finally, we share our additional findings, regarding what contributes to the curved representation space of Transformers, and how the curvedness evolves during training. ViT 和 Swin 等具有自注意力机制（又名 Transformer）的神经网络已成为传统卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的更好替代方案。然而，我们对新架构如何工作的理解仍然有限。在本文中，我们重点关注 Transformer 比 CNN 表现出更高的抗腐败鲁棒性的现象，同时又不过分自信。这与鲁棒性随置信度增加而增加的直觉相反。我们通过实证研究当输入数据在小区域内线性移动时，倒数第二层的输出如何在表示空间中移动来解决这个矛盾。我们特别展示以下内容。 (1) 虽然 CNN 在输入和输出运动之间表现出相当线性的关系，但 Transformer 对某些数据表现出非线性关系。对于这些数据，当输入线性移动时，Transformers 的输出沿曲线轨迹移动。 （2）当数据位于弯曲区域时，很难将其移出决策区域，因为输出沿着弯曲轨迹而不是直线移动到决策边界，从而导致 Transformer 具有较高的鲁棒性。 (3) 如果数据稍微修改一下，跳出曲线区域，之后的运动就会变成线性，输出直接进入决策边界。换句话说，数据附近确实存在决策边界，但由于表示空间弯曲而很难找到。这解释了变形金刚的预测不够自信。此外，我们还研究了引起对线性扰动的非线性响应的注意力操作的数学特性。最后，我们分享了我们的额外发现，关于变形金刚弯曲表示空间的贡献以及训练过程中弯曲度如何演变。 本文研究视觉Transformer（ViT/Swin）在表示空间中呈现的非线性特性，解释其相较于CNN更高的鲁棒性与低置信度预测的矛盾现象。 Juyeop Kim,Junha Park,Songkuk Kim,Jong-Seok Lee cs.CV

authors_text: Qi Qi,Jiameng Lyu,Kung sik Chan,Er Wei Bai,Tianbao Yang
title: Stochastic Constrained DRO with a Complexity Independent of Sample Size
title_zh: 复杂性与样本大小无关的随机约束 DRO
abstract: Distributionally Robust Optimization (DRO), as a popular method to train robust models against distribution shift between training and test sets, has received tremendous attention in recent years. In this paper, we propose and analyze stochastic algorithms that apply to both non-convex and convex losses for solving Kullback Leibler divergence constrained DRO problem. Compared with existing methods solving this problem, our stochastic algorithms not only enjoy competitive if not better complexity independent of sample size but also just require a constant batch size at every iteration, which is more practical for broad applications. We establish a nearly optimal complexity bound for finding an $ε$ stationary solution for non-convex losses and an optimal complexity for finding an $ε$ optimal solution for convex losses. Empirical studies demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed algorithms for solving non-convex and convex constrained DRO problems.
summary: Distributionally Robust Optimization (DRO), as a popular method to train robust models against distribution shift between training and test sets, has received tremendous attention in recent years. In this paper, we propose and analyze stochastic algorithms that apply to both non-convex and convex losses for solving Kullback Leibler divergence constrained DRO problem. Compared with existing methods solving this problem, our stochastic algorithms not only enjoy competitive if not better complexity independent of sample size but also just require a constant batch size at every iteration, which is more practical for broad applications. We establish a nearly optimal complexity bound for finding an $ε$ stationary solution for non-convex losses and an optimal complexity for finding an $ε$ optimal solution for convex losses. Empirical studies demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed algorithms for solving non-convex and convex constrained DRO problems.
abstract_zh: 分布鲁棒优化（DRO）作为一种针对训练集和测试集之间的分布变化训练鲁棒模型的流行方法，近年来受到了极大的关注。在本文中，我们提出并分析了适用于非凸和凸损失的随机算法，用于解决 Kullback Leibler 散度约束 DRO 问题。与解决该问题的现有方法相比，我们的随机算法不仅具有竞争性（即使不是更好的复杂性，与样本大小无关），而且在每次迭代时只需要恒定的批量大小，这对于广泛的应用来说更实用。我们建立了一个近乎最优的复杂度界限，用于寻找非凸损失的 $ε$ 固定解，并建立了一个最佳复杂度，用于寻找凸损失的 $ε$ 最优解。实证研究证明了所提出的算法对于解决非凸和凸约束 DRO 问题的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出适用于凸和非凸损失函数的随机算法，用于求解Kullback-Leibler散度约束的分布鲁棒优化问题，其复杂度与样本量无关。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在求解分布鲁棒优化问题时，复杂度依赖样本量且需大批次数据，限制了实际应用。本文旨在设计更高效的随机算法，降低计算复杂度并提升实用性。
AI.method: 提出基于KL散度约束的随机优化算法，采用固定批次大小迭代更新，结合非凸/凸损失的理论分析，建立复杂度上界。
AI.result: 理论证明算法在非凸损失下达到近似最优复杂度，在凸损失下达到最优复杂度；实验验证了算法在凸和非凸问题上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过独立于样本量的复杂度和固定批次设计，为分布鲁棒优化提供了更高效且实用的解决方案。

authors_text: Xinrui Song,Xuanang Xu,Sheng Xu,Baris Turkbey,Bradford J. Wood,Thomas Sanford,Pingkun Yan
title: Distance Map Supervised Landmark Localization for MR-TRUS Registration
title_zh: 用于 MR-TRUS 注册的距离图监督地标定位
abstract: In this work, we propose to explicitly use the landmarks of prostate to guide the MR-TRUS image registration. We first train a deep neural network to automatically localize a set of meaningful landmarks, and then directly generate the affine registration matrix from the location of these landmarks. For landmark localization, instead of directly training a network to predict the landmark coordinates, we propose to regress a full-resolution distance map of the landmark, which is demonstrated effective in avoiding statistical bias to unsatisfactory performance and thus improving performance. We then use the predicted landmarks to generate the affine transformation matrix, which outperforms the clinicians' manual rigid registration by a significant margin in terms of TRE.
summary: In this work, we propose to explicitly use the landmarks of prostate to guide the MR-TRUS image registration. We first train a deep neural network to automatically localize a set of meaningful landmarks, and then directly generate the affine registration matrix from the location of these landmarks. For landmark localization, instead of directly training a network to predict the landmark coordinates, we propose to regress a full-resolution distance map of the landmark, which is demonstrated effective in avoiding statistical bias to unsatisfactory performance and thus improving performance. We then use the predicted landmarks to generate the affine transformation matrix, which outperforms the clinicians' manual rigid registration by a significant margin in terms of TRE.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们建议明确使用前列腺标志来指导 MR-TRUS 图像配准。我们首先训练深度神经网络来自动定位一组有意义的地标，然后直接根据这些地标的位置生成仿射配准矩阵。对于地标定位，我们建议对地标的全分辨率距离图进行回归，而不是直接训练网络来预测地标坐标，这被证明可以有效避免统计偏差导致性能不佳，从而提高性能。然后，我们使用预测的地标生成仿射变换矩阵，该矩阵在 TRE 方面明显优于临床医生的手动刚性配准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于距离图监督的标志点定位方法，用于改进MRI与TRUS图像的配准。
AI.motivation: 传统手动配准存在效率低、精度不足的问题，直接预测标志点坐标的方法易受统计偏差影响，需改进配准性能。
AI.method: 训练深度网络回归全分辨率标志点距离图，利用预测的标志点生成仿射变换矩阵替代手动配准。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在目标注册误差（TRE）指标上显著优于临床医生的手动刚性配准。
AI.conclusion: 距离图监督的标志点定位有效提升了配准精度，为自动化医学影像配准提供了新思路。

search_text: Distance Map Supervised Landmark Localization for MR-TRUS Registration 用于 MR-TRUS 注册的距离图监督地标定位 In this work, we propose to explicitly use the landmarks of prostate to guide the MR-TRUS image registration. We first train a deep neural network to automatically localize a set of meaningful landmarks, and then directly generate the affine registration matrix from the location of these landmarks. For landmark localization, instead of directly training a network to predict the landmark coordinates, we propose to regress a full-resolution distance map of the landmark, which is demonstrated effective in avoiding statistical bias to unsatisfactory performance and thus improving performance. We then use the predicted landmarks to generate the affine transformation matrix, which outperforms the clinicians' manual rigid registration by a significant margin in terms of TRE. 在这项工作中，我们建议明确使用前列腺标志来指导 MR-TRUS 图像配准。我们首先训练深度神经网络来自动定位一组有意义的地标，然后直接根据这些地标的位置生成仿射配准矩阵。对于地标定位，我们建议对地标的全分辨率距离图进行回归，而不是直接训练网络来预测地标坐标，这被证明可以有效避免统计偏差导致性能不佳，从而提高性能。然后，我们使用预测的地标生成仿射变换矩阵，该矩阵在 TRE 方面明显优于临床医生的手动刚性配准。 本文提出一种基于距离图监督的标志点定位方法，用于改进MRI与TRUS图像的配准。 Xinrui Song,Xuanang Xu,Sheng Xu,Baris Turkbey,Bradford J. Wood,Thomas Sanford,Pingkun Yan cs.CV

authors_text: William Gao,April Wang,Gal Metzer,Raymond A. Yeh,Rana Hanocka
title: TetGAN: A Convolutional Neural Network for Tetrahedral Mesh Generation
title_zh: TetGAN：用于四面体网格生成的卷积神经网络
abstract: We present TetGAN, a convolutional neural network designed to generate tetrahedral meshes. We represent shapes using an irregular tetrahedral grid which encodes an occupancy and displacement field. Our formulation enables defining tetrahedral convolution, pooling, and upsampling operations to synthesize explicit mesh connectivity with variable topological genus. The proposed neural network layers learn deep features over each tetrahedron and learn to extract patterns within spatial regions across multiple scales. We illustrate the capabilities of our technique to encode tetrahedral meshes into a semantically meaningful latent-space which can be used for shape editing and synthesis. Our project page is at https://threedle.github.io/tetGAN/.
summary: We present TetGAN, a convolutional neural network designed to generate tetrahedral meshes. We represent shapes using an irregular tetrahedral grid which encodes an occupancy and displacement field. Our formulation enables defining tetrahedral convolution, pooling, and upsampling operations to synthesize explicit mesh connectivity with variable topological genus. The proposed neural network layers learn deep features over each tetrahedron and learn to extract patterns within spatial regions across multiple scales. We illustrate the capabilities of our technique to encode tetrahedral meshes into a semantically meaningful latent-space which can be used for shape editing and synthesis. Our project page is at https://threedle.github.io/tetGAN/.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 TetGAN，一种旨在生成四面体网格的卷积神经网络。我们使用不规则的四面体网格来表示形状，该网格编码占用和位移场。我们的公式能够定义四面体卷积、池化和上采样操作，以合成具有可变拓扑属的显式网格连接。所提出的神经网络层学习每个四面体的深层特征，并学习跨多个尺度的空间区域内的模式提取。我们说明了我们的技术将四面体网格编码成语义上有意义的潜在空间的能力，该潜在空间可用于形状编辑和合成。我们的项目页面位于 https://tridle.github.io/tetGAN/。

AI.tldr: 提出一种卷积神经网络TetGAN，用于生成四面体网格，通过不规则四面体网格编码占用和位移场，实现具有可变拓扑结构的显式网格连接合成。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理复杂拓扑结构或生成高质量四面体网格时存在局限性，需一种能学习深层特征并适应多尺度模式的神经网络方法。
AI.method: 设计适用于四面体网格的卷积、池化和上采样操作，利用不规则网格结构学习每个四面体的深度特征，并在多尺度空间区域提取模式。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能有效将四面体网格编码到语义潜在空间，支持形状编辑与合成，并通过项目页面展示应用实例。
AI.conclusion: TetGAN为四面体网格生成与编辑提供了新方法，通过深度学习捕捉复杂拓扑结构，推动相关领域研究。

authors_text: Nikolas Lamb,Sean Banerjee,Natasha Kholgade Banerjee
title: DeepMend: Learning Occupancy Functions to Represent Shape for Repair
title_zh: DeepMend：学习占用函数来表示修复形状
abstract: We present DeepMend, a novel approach to reconstruct restorations to fractured shapes using learned occupancy functions. Existing shape repair approaches predict low-resolution voxelized restorations, or require symmetries or access to a pre-existing complete oracle. We represent the occupancy of a fractured shape as the conjunction of the occupancy of an underlying complete shape and the fracture surface, which we model as functions of latent codes using neural networks. Given occupancy samples from an input fractured shape, we estimate latent codes using an inference loss augmented with novel penalty terms that avoid empty or voluminous restorations. We use inferred codes to reconstruct the restoration shape. We show results with simulated fractures on synthetic and real-world scanned objects, and with scanned real fractured mugs. Compared to the existing voxel approach and two baseline methods, our work shows state-of-the-art results in accuracy and avoiding restoration artifacts over non-fracture regions of the fractured shape.
summary: We present DeepMend, a novel approach to reconstruct restorations to fractured shapes using learned occupancy functions. Existing shape repair approaches predict low-resolution voxelized restorations, or require symmetries or access to a pre-existing complete oracle. We represent the occupancy of a fractured shape as the conjunction of the occupancy of an underlying complete shape and the fracture surface, which we model as functions of latent codes using neural networks. Given occupancy samples from an input fractured shape, we estimate latent codes using an inference loss augmented with novel penalty terms that avoid empty or voluminous restorations. We use inferred codes to reconstruct the restoration shape. We show results with simulated fractures on synthetic and real-world scanned objects, and with scanned real fractured mugs. Compared to the existing voxel approach and two baseline methods, our work shows state-of-the-art results in accuracy and avoiding restoration artifacts over non-fracture regions of the fractured shape.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 DeepMend，这是一种使用学习的占用函数重建断裂形状修复体的新颖方法。现有的形状修复方法预测低分辨率体素化修复体，或者需要对称性或访问预先存在的完整预言。我们将断裂形状的占有率表示为底层完整形状的占有率与断裂面的结合，我们使用神经网络将其建模为潜在代码的函数。给定来自输入断裂形状的占用样本，我们使用推理损失来估计潜在代码，该推理损失增加了新的惩罚项，以避免空或大量的恢复。我们使用推断代码来重建修复体形状。我们展示了合成和真实世界扫描物体的模拟断裂以及扫描的真实断裂杯子的结果。与现有的体素方法和两种基线方法相比，我们的工作在准确性和避免断裂形状的非断裂区域上的恢复伪影方面显示了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 提出DeepMend方法，通过学习占用函数来修复破损形状，避免现有方法的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有方法存在低分辨率修复、依赖对称性或预存完整模型的限制，需更高效准确的修复方法。
AI.method: 利用神经网络学习潜在代码表示完整形状和破损表面，通过带惩罚项的推理损失估计代码，生成修复形状。
AI.result: 实验显示在合成和真实破损物体上，DeepMend在修复精度和减少非破损区域伪影方面优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: DeepMend通过学习占用函数有效修复破损形状，克服现有方法限制，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Steven Schockaert
title: Embeddings as Epistemic States: Limitations on the Use of Pooling Operators for Accumulating Knowledge
title_zh: 作为认知状态的嵌入：使用池算子积累知识的限制
abstract: Various neural network architectures rely on pooling operators to aggregate information coming from different sources. It is often implicitly assumed in such contexts that vectors encode epistemic states, i.e. that vectors capture the evidence that has been obtained about some properties of interest, and that pooling these vectors yields a vector that combines this evidence. We study, for a number of standard pooling operators, under what conditions they are compatible with this idea, which we call the epistemic pooling principle. While we find that all the considered pooling operators can satisfy the epistemic pooling principle, this only holds when embeddings are sufficiently high-dimensional and, for most pooling operators, when the embeddings satisfy particular constraints (e.g. having non-negative coordinates). We furthermore show that these constraints have important implications on how the embeddings can be used in practice. In particular, we find that when the epistemic pooling principle is satisfied, in most cases it is impossible to verify the satisfaction of propositional formulas using linear scoring functions, with two exceptions: (i) max-pooling with embeddings that are upper-bounded and (ii) Hadamard pooling with non-negative embeddings. This finding helps to clarify, among others, why Graph Neural Networks sometimes under-perform in reasoning tasks. Finally, we also study an extension of the epistemic pooling principle to weighted epistemic states, which are important in the context of non-monotonic reasoning, where max-pooling emerges as the most suitable operator.
summary: Various neural network architectures rely on pooling operators to aggregate information coming from different sources. It is often implicitly assumed in such contexts that vectors encode epistemic states, i.e. that vectors capture the evidence that has been obtained about some properties of interest, and that pooling these vectors yields a vector that combines this evidence. We study, for a number of standard pooling operators, under what conditions they are compatible with this idea, which we call the epistemic pooling principle. While we find that all the considered pooling operators can satisfy the epistemic pooling principle, this only holds when embeddings are sufficiently high-dimensional and, for most pooling operators, when the embeddings satisfy particular constraints (e.g. having non-negative coordinates). We furthermore show that these constraints have important implications on how the embeddings can be used in practice. In particular, we find that when the epistemic pooling principle is satisfied, in most cases it is impossible to verify the satisfaction of propositional formulas using linear scoring functions, with two exceptions: (i) max-pooling with embeddings that are upper-bounded and (ii) Hadamard pooling with non-negative embeddings. This finding helps to clarify, among others, why Graph Neural Networks sometimes under-perform in reasoning tasks. Finally, we also study an extension of the epistemic pooling principle to weighted epistemic states, which are important in the context of non-monotonic reasoning, where max-pooling emerges as the most suitable operator.
abstract_zh: 各种神经网络架构依赖于池化算子来聚合来自不同来源的信息。在这种情况下，通常隐含地假设向量对认知状态进行编码，即向量捕获已获得的有关某些感兴趣属性的证据，并且汇集这些向量会产生组合这些证据的向量。我们研究了许多标准池化算子在什么条件下与这个想法兼容，我们称之为认知池化原则。虽然我们发现所有考虑的池化算子都可以满足认知池化原则，但这仅在嵌入足够高维时成立，并且对于大多数池化算子来说，当嵌入满足特定约束（例如具有非负坐标）时才成立。我们还表明，这些约束对于如何在实践中使用嵌入具有重要影响。特别是，我们发现，当满足认知池原理时，在大多数情况下，不可能使用线性评分函数来验证命题公式的满足性，但有两个例外：（i）具有上限嵌入的最大池和（ii）具有非负嵌入的哈达玛池。这一发现有助于澄清为什么图神经网络有时在推理任务中表现不佳。最后，我们还研究了认知池原理对加权认知状态的扩展，这在非单调推理的背景下很重要，其中最大池化成为最合适的算子。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了神经网络中池化算子在聚合信息时是否符合'认识论池化原则'，并分析其在知识积累中的限制条件。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络架构隐含假设向量能编码认识论状态，但池化操作是否满足这一假设尚不明确，需明确其适用条件及限制。
AI.method: 通过理论分析标准池化算子（如max-pooling、Hadamard pooling）在满足特定约束条件（如高维嵌入、非负坐标）时是否符合认识论池化原则。
AI.result: 发现池化算子需依赖高维嵌入和特定约束才能满足原则，且多数情况下无法用线性评分函数验证命题公式，仅max-pooling和Hadamard pooling在特定条件下可行。
AI.conclusion: 认识论池化原则的约束解释了图神经网络在推理任务中的不足，而max-pooling在非单调推理中表现最优。

search_text: Embeddings as Epistemic States: Limitations on the Use of Pooling Operators for Accumulating Knowledge 作为认知状态的嵌入：使用池算子积累知识的限制 Various neural network architectures rely on pooling operators to aggregate information coming from different sources. It is often implicitly assumed in such contexts that vectors encode epistemic states, i.e. that vectors capture the evidence that has been obtained about some properties of interest, and that pooling these vectors yields a vector that combines this evidence. We study, for a number of standard pooling operators, under what conditions they are compatible with this idea, which we call the epistemic pooling principle. While we find that all the considered pooling operators can satisfy the epistemic pooling principle, this only holds when embeddings are sufficiently high-dimensional and, for most pooling operators, when the embeddings satisfy particular constraints (e.g. having non-negative coordinates). We furthermore show that these constraints have important implications on how the embeddings can be used in practice. In particular, we find that when the epistemic pooling principle is satisfied, in most cases it is impossible to verify the satisfaction of propositional formulas using linear scoring functions, with two exceptions: (i) max-pooling with embeddings that are upper-bounded and (ii) Hadamard pooling with non-negative embeddings. This finding helps to clarify, among others, why Graph Neural Networks sometimes under-perform in reasoning tasks. Finally, we also study an extension of the epistemic pooling principle to weighted epistemic states, which are important in the context of non-monotonic reasoning, where max-pooling emerges as the most suitable operator. 各种神经网络架构依赖于池化算子来聚合来自不同来源的信息。在这种情况下，通常隐含地假设向量对认知状态进行编码，即向量捕获已获得的有关某些感兴趣属性的证据，并且汇集这些向量会产生组合这些证据的向量。我们研究了许多标准池化算子在什么条件下与这个想法兼容，我们称之为认知池化原则。虽然我们发现所有考虑的池化算子都可以满足认知池化原则，但这仅在嵌入足够高维时成立，并且对于大多数池化算子来说，当嵌入满足特定约束（例如具有非负坐标）时才成立。我们还表明，这些约束对于如何在实践中使用嵌入具有重要影响。特别是，我们发现，当满足认知池原理时，在大多数情况下，不可能使用线性评分函数来验证命题公式的满足性，但有两个例外：（i）具有上限嵌入的最大池和（ii）具有非负嵌入的哈达玛池。这一发现有助于澄清为什么图神经网络有时在推理任务中表现不佳。最后，我们还研究了认知池原理对加权认知状态的扩展，这在非单调推理的背景下很重要，其中最大池化成为最合适的算子。 本文研究了神经网络中池化算子在聚合信息时是否符合'认识论池化原则'，并分析其在知识积累中的限制条件。 Steven Schockaert cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Joseba Fernandez de Landa,Rodrigo Agerri
title: Language Independent Stance Detection: Social Interaction-based Embeddings and Large Language Models
title_zh: 独立于语言的立场检测：基于社交互动的嵌入和大型语言模型
abstract: The large majority of the research performed on stance detection has been focused on developing more or less sophisticated text classification systems, even when many benchmarks are based on social network data such as Twitter. This paper aims to take on the stance detection task by placing the emphasis not so much on the text itself but on the interaction data available on social networks. More specifically, we propose a new method to leverage social information such as friends and retweets by generating Relational Embeddings, namely, dense vector representations of interaction pairs. Our experiments on seven publicly available datasets and four different languages (Basque, Catalan, Italian, and Spanish) show that combining our relational embeddings with discriminative textual methods helps to substantially improve performance, obtaining state-of-the-art results for six out of seven evaluation settings, outperforming strong baselines based on Large Language Models, or other popular interaction-based approaches such as DeepWalk or node2vec.
summary: The large majority of the research performed on stance detection has been focused on developing more or less sophisticated text classification systems, even when many benchmarks are based on social network data such as Twitter. This paper aims to take on the stance detection task by placing the emphasis not so much on the text itself but on the interaction data available on social networks. More specifically, we propose a new method to leverage social information such as friends and retweets by generating Relational Embeddings, namely, dense vector representations of interaction pairs. Our experiments on seven publicly available datasets and four different languages (Basque, Catalan, Italian, and Spanish) show that combining our relational embeddings with discriminative textual methods helps to substantially improve performance, obtaining state-of-the-art results for six out of seven evaluation settings, outperforming strong baselines based on Large Language Models, or other popular interaction-based approaches such as DeepWalk or node2vec.
abstract_zh: 大多数关于姿态检测的研究都集中在开发或多或少复杂的文本分类系统，即使许多基准是基于 Twitter 等社交网络数据的。本文旨在承担立场检测任务，重点不是文本本身，而是社交网络上可用的交互数据。更具体地说，我们提出了一种新方法，通过生成关系嵌入（即交互对的密集向量表示）来利用朋友和转发等社交信息。我们对七个公开数据集和四种不同语言（巴斯克语、加泰罗尼亚语、意大利语和西班牙语）进行的实验表明，将我们的关系嵌入与判别性文本方法相结合有助于大幅提高性能，在七种评估设置中的六种中获得最先进的结果，优于基于大型语言模型或其他流行的基于交互的方法（例如 DeepWalk 或 node2vec）的强大基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于社交互动数据而非文本本身的立场检测方法，通过生成关系嵌入来提升多语言环境下的检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统立场检测过度依赖文本分类，忽视了社交网络中用户互动（如转发、好友关系）所蕴含的语义信息，且现有方法在多语言场景下表现不足。
AI.method: 构建社交关系嵌入（Relational Embeddings）捕捉用户交互对的向量表示，并将其与文本特征融合，结合多语言数据进行训练和评估。
AI.result: 在7个公开数据集（4种语言）上取得6/7场景的SOTA结果，优于基于大语言模型及DeepWalk等社交网络经典方法的基线。
AI.conclusion: 社交关系嵌入能有效补充文本特征，证明社交互动数据对立场检测的重要性，且方法具备跨语言普适性。

authors_text: Chenguang Huang,Oier Mees,Andy Zeng,Wolfram Burgard
title: Visual Language Maps for Robot Navigation
title_zh: 用于机器人导航的视觉语言图
comment: Accepted at the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA). Project page: https://vlmaps.github.io
comments: Accepted at the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA). Project page: https://vlmaps.github.io
abstract: Grounding language to the visual observations of a navigating agent can be performed using off-the-shelf visual-language models pretrained on Internet-scale data (e.g., image captions). While this is useful for matching images to natural language descriptions of object goals, it remains disjoint from the process of mapping the environment, so that it lacks the spatial precision of classic geometric maps. To address this problem, we propose VLMaps, a spatial map representation that directly fuses pretrained visual-language features with a 3D reconstruction of the physical world. VLMaps can be autonomously built from video feed on robots using standard exploration approaches and enables natural language indexing of the map without additional labeled data. Specifically, when combined with large language models (LLMs), VLMaps can be used to (i) translate natural language commands into a sequence of open-vocabulary navigation goals (which, beyond prior work, can be spatial by construction, e.g., "in between the sofa and TV" or "three meters to the right of the chair") directly localized in the map, and (ii) can be shared among multiple robots with different embodiments to generate new obstacle maps on-the-fly (by using a list of obstacle categories). Extensive experiments carried out in simulated and real world environments show that VLMaps enable navigation according to more complex language instructions than existing methods. Videos are available at https://vlmaps.github.io.
summary: Grounding language to the visual observations of a navigating agent can be performed using off-the-shelf visual-language models pretrained on Internet-scale data (e.g., image captions). While this is useful for matching images to natural language descriptions of object goals, it remains disjoint from the process of mapping the environment, so that it lacks the spatial precision of classic geometric maps. To address this problem, we propose VLMaps, a spatial map representation that directly fuses pretrained visual-language features with a 3D reconstruction of the physical world. VLMaps can be autonomously built from video feed on robots using standard exploration approaches and enables natural language indexing of the map without additional labeled data. Specifically, when combined with large language models (LLMs), VLMaps can be used to (i) translate natural language commands into a sequence of open-vocabulary navigation goals (which, beyond prior work, can be spatial by construction, e.g., "in between the sofa and TV" or "three meters to the right of the chair") directly localized in the map, and (ii) can be shared among multiple robots with different embodiments to generate new obstacle maps on-the-fly (by using a list of obstacle categories). Extensive experiments carried out in simulated and real world environments show that VLMaps enable navigation according to more complex language instructions than existing methods. Videos are available at https://vlmaps.github.io.
abstract_zh: 导航代理的视觉观察的基础语言可以使用在互联网规模数据（例如图像标题）上预先训练的现成视觉语言模型来执行。虽然这对于将图像与目标目标的自然语言描述进行匹配非常有用，但它仍然与绘制环境的过程脱节，因此缺乏经典几何地图的空间精度。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 VLMaps，一种空间地图表示，它直接将预训练的视觉语言特征与物理世界的 3D 重建融合在一起。 VLMap 可以使用标准探索方法根据机器人的视频源自主构建，并且无需额外的标记数据即可对地图进行自然语言索引。具体来说，当与大语言模型（LLM）结合时，VLMap可用于（i）将自然语言命令翻译成一系列开放词汇导航目标（超出先前的工作，可以通过构造空间化，例如“沙发和电视之间”或“椅子右侧三米”）直接定位在地图中，以及（ii）可以在具有不同实施例的多个机器人之间共享，以动态生成新的障碍物地图（通过使用障碍物列表）类别）。在模拟和现实环境中进行的大量实验表明，VLMap 能够根据比现有方法更复杂的语言指令进行导航。视频可在 https://vlmaps.github.io 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VLMaps，一种融合预训练视觉语言特征与3D重建的新型空间地图表示方法，用于提升机器人基于自然语言的导航能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过视觉语言模型实现语言与视觉的匹配，但缺乏空间精度，难以满足机器人导航需求。需构建兼具语义理解与空间结构的地图表示。
AI.method: VLMaps通过融合预训练视觉语言模型特征与环境3D重建，利用机器人视频流自主构建地图。结合大语言模型实现自然语言指令到空间导航目标的转换，并支持多机器人障碍物地图共享。
AI.result: 在模拟与真实环境实验中，VLMaps能处理如'沙发与电视之间'等复杂空间指令，导航成功率优于现有方法，且无需额外标注数据。
AI.conclusion: VLMaps通过语义与空间信息的融合，显著提升机器人复杂语言导航能力，为多机器人协作与动态环境适应提供了新框架。
