search_text: Visual Language Maps for Robot Navigation 用于机器人导航的视觉语言图 Grounding language to the visual observations of a navigating agent can be performed using off-the-shelf visual-language models pretrained on Internet-scale data (e.g., image captions). While this is useful for matching images to natural language descriptions of object goals, it remains disjoint from the process of mapping the environment, so that it lacks the spatial precision of classic geometric maps. To address this problem, we propose VLMaps, a spatial map representation that directly fuses pretrained visual-language features with a 3D reconstruction of the physical world. VLMaps can be autonomously built from video feed on robots using standard exploration approaches and enables natural language indexing of the map without additional labeled data. Specifically, when combined with large language models (LLMs), VLMaps can be used to (i) translate natural language commands into a sequence of open-vocabulary navigation goals (which, beyond prior work, can be spatial by construction, e.g., "in between the sofa and TV" or "three meters to the right of the chair") directly localized in the map, and (ii) can be shared among multiple robots with different embodiments to generate new obstacle maps on-the-fly (by using a list of obstacle categories). Extensive experiments carried out in simulated and real world environments show that VLMaps enable navigation according to more complex language instructions than existing methods. Videos are available at https://vlmaps.github.io. 导航代理的视觉观察的基础语言可以使用在互联网规模数据（例如图像标题）上预先训练的现成视觉语言模型来执行。虽然这对于将图像与目标目标的自然语言描述进行匹配非常有用，但它仍然与绘制环境的过程脱节，因此缺乏经典几何地图的空间精度。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 VLMaps，一种空间地图表示，它直接将预训练的视觉语言特征与物理世界的 3D 重建融合在一起。 VLMap 可以使用标准探索方法根据机器人的视频源自主构建，并且无需额外的标记数据即可对地图进行自然语言索引。具体来说，当与大语言模型（LLM）结合时，VLMap可用于（i）将自然语言命令翻译成一系列开放词汇导航目标（超出先前的工作，可以通过构造空间化，例如“沙发和电视之间”或“椅子右侧三米”）直接定位在地图中，以及（ii）可以在具有不同实施例的多个机器人之间共享，以动态生成新的障碍物地图（通过使用障碍物列表）类别）。在模拟和现实环境中进行的大量实验表明，VLMap 能够根据比现有方法更复杂的语言指令进行导航。视频可在 https://vlmaps.github.io 上获取。 本文提出VLMaps，一种融合预训练视觉语言特征与3D重建的新型空间地图表示方法，用于提升机器人基于自然语言的导航能力。 Chenguang Huang,Oier Mees,Andy Zeng,Wolfram Burgard cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Ziyuan Ye,Youzhi Qu,Zhichao Liang,Mo Wang,Quanying Liu
title: Explainable fMRI-based Brain Decoding via Spatial Temporal-pyramid Graph Convolutional Network
title_zh: 通过时空金字塔图卷积网络进行可解释的基于功能磁共振成像的大脑解码
abstract: Brain decoding, aiming to identify the brain states using neural activity, is important for cognitive neuroscience and neural engineering. However, existing machine learning methods for fMRI-based brain decoding either suffer from low classification performance or poor explainability. Here, we address this issue by proposing a biologically inspired architecture, Spatial Temporal-pyramid Graph Convolutional Network (STpGCN), to capture the spatial-temporal graph representation of functional brain activities. By designing multi-scale spatial-temporal pathways and bottom-up pathways that mimic the information process and temporal integration in the brain, STpGCN is capable of explicitly utilizing the multi-scale temporal dependency of brain activities via graph, thereby achieving high brain decoding performance. Additionally, we propose a sensitivity analysis method called BrainNetX to better explain the decoding results by automatically annotating task-related brain regions from the brain-network standpoint. We conduct extensive experiments on fMRI data under 23 cognitive tasks from Human Connectome Project (HCP) S1200. The results show that STpGCN significantly improves brain decoding performance compared to competing baseline models; BrainNetX successfully annotates task-relevant brain regions. Post hoc analysis based on these regions further validates that the hierarchical structure in STpGCN significantly contributes to the explainability, robustness and generalization of the model. Our methods not only provide insights into information representation in the brain under multiple cognitive tasks but also indicate a bright future for fMRI-based brain decoding.
summary: Brain decoding, aiming to identify the brain states using neural activity, is important for cognitive neuroscience and neural engineering. However, existing machine learning methods for fMRI-based brain decoding either suffer from low classification performance or poor explainability. Here, we address this issue by proposing a biologically inspired architecture, Spatial Temporal-pyramid Graph Convolutional Network (STpGCN), to capture the spatial-temporal graph representation of functional brain activities. By designing multi-scale spatial-temporal pathways and bottom-up pathways that mimic the information process and temporal integration in the brain, STpGCN is capable of explicitly utilizing the multi-scale temporal dependency of brain activities via graph, thereby achieving high brain decoding performance. Additionally, we propose a sensitivity analysis method called BrainNetX to better explain the decoding results by automatically annotating task-related brain regions from the brain-network standpoint. We conduct extensive experiments on fMRI data under 23 cognitive tasks from Human Connectome Project (HCP) S1200. The results show that STpGCN significantly improves brain decoding performance compared to competing baseline models; BrainNetX successfully annotates task-relevant brain regions. Post hoc analysis based on these regions further validates that the hierarchical structure in STpGCN significantly contributes to the explainability, robustness and generalization of the model. Our methods not only provide insights into information representation in the brain under multiple cognitive tasks but also indicate a bright future for fMRI-based brain decoding.
abstract_zh: 大脑解码旨在利用神经活动识别大脑状态，对于认知神经科学和神经工程非常重要。然而，现有的基于功能磁共振成像的大脑解码机器学习方法要么分类性能低，要么可解释性差。在这里，我们通过提出一种受生物学启发的架构来解决这个问题，即时空金字塔图卷积网络（STpGCN），以捕获功能性大脑活动的时空图表示。通过设计模拟大脑中信息处理和时间整合的多尺度时空通路和自下而上的通路，STpGCN能够通过图明确地利用大脑活动的多尺度时间依赖性，从而实现较高的大脑解码性能。此外，我们提出了一种名为 BrainNetX 的敏感性分析方法，通过从大脑网络的角度自动注释与任务相关的大脑区域来更好地解释解码结果。我们对人类连接组计划 (HCP) S1200 的 23 项认知任务下的 fMRI 数据进行了广泛的实验。结果表明，与竞争的基线模型相比，STpGCN 显着提高了大脑解码性能； BrainNetX 成功注释了与任务相关的大脑区域。基于这些区域的事后分析进一步验证了 STpGCN 中的层次结构对模型的可解释性、鲁棒性和泛化性有显着贡献。我们的方法不仅提供了对多种认知任务下大脑中信息表示的见解，而且还预示着基于功能磁共振成像的大脑解码的光明前景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可解释的基于fMRI的脑解码方法，通过空间时间金字塔图卷积网络（STpGCN）和敏感性分析方法BrainNetX提升解码性能与可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有fMRI脑解码方法存在分类性能低或可解释性差的问题，需设计兼顾性能与可解释性的新型神经网络架构。
AI.method: 提出STpGCN架构，包含多尺度时空路径和自底向上路径以模拟大脑信息处理；设计BrainNetX方法通过敏感性分析自动标注任务相关脑区。
AI.result: 在HCP S1200数据集的23项认知任务中，STpGCN显著优于基线模型，BrainNetX成功标注任务相关脑区，且分层结构验证了模型的可解释性与泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: STpGCN与BrainNetX为多任务脑状态解码提供了新思路，推动了基于fMRI的可解释脑解码研究发展。

authors_text: Hamit Basgol,Inci Ayhan,Emre Ugur
title: Predictive Event Segmentation and Representation with Neural Networks: A Self-Supervised Model Assessed by Psychological Experiments
title_zh: 神经网络的预测事件分割和表示：通过心理实验评估的自我监督模型
comment: 27 pages, 9 figures, supplementary document can be found in the latex file
comments: 27 pages, 9 figures, supplementary document can be found in the latex file
abstract: People segment complex, ever-changing and continuous experience into basic, stable and discrete spatio-temporal experience units, called events. Event segmentation literature investigates the mechanisms that allow people to extract events. Event segmentation theory points out that people predict ongoing activities and observe prediction error signals to find event boundaries that keep events apart. In this study, we investigated the mechanism giving rise to this ability by a computational model and accompanying psychological experiments. Inspired from event segmentation theory and predictive processing, we introduced a self-supervised model of event segmentation. This model consists of neural networks that predict the sensory signal in the next time-step to represent different events, and a cognitive model that regulates these networks on the basis of their prediction errors. In order to verify the ability of our model in segmenting events, learning them during passive observation, and representing them in its internal representational space, we prepared a video that depicts human behaviors represented by point-light displays. We compared event segmentation behaviors of participants and our model with this video in two hierarchical event segmentation levels. By using point-biserial correlation technique, we demonstrated that event segmentation decisions of our model correlated with the responses of participants. Moreover, by approximating representation space of participants by a similarity-based technique, we showed that our model formed a similar representation space with those of participants. The result suggests that our model that tracks the prediction error signals can produce human-like event boundaries and event representations. Finally, we discussed our contribution to the literature of event cognition and our understanding of how event segmentation is implemented in the brain.

Event segmentation literature investigates the mechanisms that allow people to extract events. Event segmentation theory points out that people predict ongoing activities and observe prediction error signals to find event boundaries that keep events apart. In this study, we investigated the mechanism giving rise to this ability by a computational model and accompanying psychological experiments. We compared event segmentation behaviors of participants and our model with this video in two hierarchical event segmentation levels. abstract_zh: 人们将复杂的、不断变化的、连续的经验分割成基本的、稳定的、离散的时空经验单元，称为事件。事件分割文献研究了人们提取事件的机制。事件分割理论指出，人们预测正在进行的活动并观察预测误差信号，以找到将事件分开的事件边界。在这项研究中，我们通过计算模型和伴随的心理实验研究了产生这种能力的机制。受事件分割理论和预测处理的启发，我们引入了事件分割的自监督模型。该模型由预测下一个时间步中代表不同事件的感觉信号的神经网络和根据预测误差调节这些网络的认知模型组成。为了验证我们的模型分割事件、在被动观察过程中学习事件以及在其内部表征空间中表示事件的能力，我们准备了一段视频来描述由点光显示器表示的人类行为。我们在两个分层事件分割级别上比较了参与者和我们的模型与该视频的事件分割行为。通过使用点双序列相关技术，我们证明了模型的事件分割决策与参与者的响应相关。此外，通过基于相似性的技术来近似参与者的表示空间，我们表明我们的模型与参与者的表示空间形成了相似的表示空间。结果表明，我们跟踪预测误差信号的模型可以产生类似人类的事件边界和事件表示。最后，我们讨论了我们对事件认知文献的贡献以及我们对事件分割如何在大脑中实现的理解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于预测误差的自监督神经网络模型，用于事件分割，并通过心理实验验证其与人类事件分割行为的一致性。
AI.motivation: 人类通过预测和监测预测误差来划分连续体验为离散事件，但现有模型难以模拟这一过程。本文旨在构建计算模型以揭示事件分割机制，并验证其与人类认知的关联。
AI.method: 设计自监督神经网络模型，通过预测下一时刻感官信号并调节网络以最小化预测误差。使用点光显示视频作为实验材料，比较模型与参与者的事件分割行为及表征空间相似性。
AI.result: 模型的事件分割决策与参与者响应呈显著相关，且其内部表征空间与参与者相似性分析结果一致，表明模型能生成类人类的事件边界与表征。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为事件认知研究提供了新视角，揭示了预测误差机制在大脑事件分割中的潜在实现方式，推动了计算模型与人类认知的结合。

search_text: Predictive Event Segmentation and Representation with Neural Networks: A Self-Supervised Model Assessed by Psychological Experiments 神经网络的预测事件分割和表示：通过心理实验评估的自我监督模型 People segment complex, ever-changing and continuous experience into basic, stable and discrete spatio-temporal experience units, called events. Event segmentation literature investigates the mechanisms that allow people to extract events. Event segmentation theory points out that people predict ongoing activities and observe prediction error signals to find event boundaries that keep events apart. In this study, we investigated the mechanism giving rise to this ability by a computational model and accompanying psychological experiments. Inspired from event segmentation theory and predictive processing, we introduced a self-supervised model of event segmentation. This model consists of neural networks that predict the sensory signal in the next time-step to represent different events, and a cognitive model that regulates these networks on the basis of their prediction errors. In order to verify the ability of our model in segmenting events, learning them during passive observation, and representing them in its internal representational space, we prepared a video that depicts human behaviors represented by point-light displays. We compared event segmentation behaviors of participants and our model with this video in two hierarchical event segmentation levels. By using point-biserial correlation technique, we demonstrated that event segmentation decisions of our model correlated with the responses of participants. Moreover, by approximating representation space of participants by a similarity-based technique, we showed that our model formed a similar representation space with those of participants. The result suggests that our model that tracks the prediction error signals can produce human-like event boundaries and event representations. Finally, we discussed our contribution to the literature of event cognition and our understanding of how event segmentation is implemented in the brain. 人们将复杂的、不断变化的、连续的经验分割成基本的、稳定的、离散的时空经验单元，称为事件。事件分割文献研究了人们提取事件的机制。事件分割理论指出，人们预测正在进行的活动并观察预测误差信号，以找到将事件分开的事件边界。在这项研究中，我们通过计算模型和伴随的心理实验研究了产生这种能力的机制。受事件分割理论和预测处理的启发，我们引入了事件分割的自监督模型。该模型由预测下一个时间步中代表不同事件的感觉信号的神经网络和根据预测误差调节这些网络的认知模型组成。为了验证我们的模型分割事件、在被动观察过程中学习事件以及在其内部表征空间中表示事件的能力，我们准备了一段视频来描述由点光显示器表示的人类行为。我们在两个分层事件分割级别上比较了参与者和我们的模型与该视频的事件分割行为。通过使用点双序列相关技术，我们证明了模型的事件分割决策与参与者的响应相关。此外，通过基于相似性的技术来近似参与者的表示空间，我们表明我们的模型与参与者的表示空间形成了相似的表示空间。结果表明，我们跟踪预测误差信号的模型可以产生类似人类的事件边界和事件表示。最后，我们讨论了我们对事件认知文献的贡献以及我们对事件分割如何在大脑中实现的理解。 本文提出了一种基于预测误差的自监督神经网络模型，用于事件分割，并通过心理实验验证其与人类事件分割行为的一致性。 Hamit Basgol,Inci Ayhan,Emre Ugur q-bio.NC,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Xiaolong Fan,Maoguo Gong,Yue Wu,Mingyang Zhang,Hao Li,Xiangming Jiang
title: Towards Consistency and Complementarity: A Multiview Graph Information Bottleneck Approach
title_zh: 走向一致性和互补性：多视图图信息瓶颈方法
abstract: The empirical studies of Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) broadly take the original node feature and adjacency relationship as singleview input, ignoring the rich information of multiple graph views. To circumvent this issue, the multiview graph analysis framework has been developed to fuse graph information across views. How to model and integrate shared (i.e. consistency) and view-specific (i.e. complementarity) information is a key issue in multiview graph analysis. In this paper, we propose a novel Multiview Variational Graph Information Bottleneck (MVGIB) principle to maximize the agreement for common representations and the disagreement for view-specific representations. Under this principle, we formulate the common and view-specific information bottleneck objectives across multiviews by using constraints from mutual information. However, these objectives are hard to directly optimize since the mutual information is computationally intractable. To tackle this challenge, we derive variational lower and upper bounds of mutual information terms, and then instead optimize variational bounds to find the approximate solutions for the information objectives. Extensive experiments on graph benchmark datasets demonstrate the superior effectiveness of the proposed method.
summary: The empirical studies of Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) broadly take the original node feature and adjacency relationship as singleview input, ignoring the rich information of multiple graph views. To circumvent this issue, the multiview graph analysis framework has been developed to fuse graph information across views. How to model and integrate shared (i.e. consistency) and view-specific (i.e. complementarity) information is a key issue in multiview graph analysis. In this paper, we propose a novel Multiview Variational Graph Information Bottleneck (MVGIB) principle to maximize the agreement for common representations and the disagreement for view-specific representations. Under this principle, we formulate the common and view-specific information bottleneck objectives across multiviews by using constraints from mutual information. However, these objectives are hard to directly optimize since the mutual information is computationally intractable. To tackle this challenge, we derive variational lower and upper bounds of mutual information terms, and then instead optimize variational bounds to find the approximate solutions for the information objectives. Extensive experiments on graph benchmark datasets demonstrate the superior effectiveness of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）的实证研究广泛将原始节点特征和邻接关系作为单视图输入，忽略了多个图视图的丰富信息。为了解决这个问题，开发了多视图图分析框架来融合跨视图的图信息。如何对共享（即一致性）和视图特定（即互补性）信息进行建模和集成是多视图图分析中的关键问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的多视图变分图信息瓶颈（MVGIB）原理，以最大化公共表示的一致性和特定视图表示的不一致。根据这一原则，我们通过使用互信息的约束来制定跨多视图的公共和特定于视图的信息瓶颈目标。然而，这些目标很难直接优化，因为互信息在计算上很难处理。为了应对这一挑战，我们推导了互信息项的变分下界和上限，然后优化变分界以找到信息目标的近似解。对图基准数据集的大量实验证明了所提出方法的卓越有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多视图变分图信息瓶颈方法（MVGIB），旨在通过最大化公共表示的一致性和视图特异性表示的差异性，提升多视图图分析的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有图神经网络（GNN）通常仅利用单一视图的节点特征和邻接关系，忽略了多视图图数据中丰富的共享信息与视图特异性信息，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 通过引入信息瓶颈理论，构建多视图下公共信息与视图特异性信息的优化目标，并利用变分下界和上界近似难以计算的互信息，实现对目标的可优化求解。
AI.result: 在多个图基准数据集上的实验表明，所提方法在节点分类等任务中优于现有主流多视图图分析方法。
AI.conclusion: MVGIB通过显式建模多视图间的共识与差异，有效提升了多视图图数据的表征学习能力，为多视图图分析提供了新思路。

authors_text: Stephanie C. Y. Chan,Ishita Dasgupta,Junkyung Kim,Dharshan Kumaran,Andrew K. Lampinen,Felix Hill
title: Transformers generalize differently from information stored in context vs in weights
title_zh: 变压器的概括与上下文中存储的信息和权重中存储的信息不同
abstract: Transformer models can use two fundamentally different kinds of information: information stored in weights during training, and information provided ``in-context'' at inference time. In this work, we show that transformers exhibit different inductive biases in how they represent and generalize from the information in these two sources. In particular, we characterize whether they generalize via parsimonious rules (rule-based generalization) or via direct comparison with observed examples (exemplar-based generalization). This is of important practical consequence, as it informs whether to encode information in weights or in context, depending on how we want models to use that information. In transformers trained on controlled stimuli, we find that generalization from weights is more rule-based whereas generalization from context is largely exemplar-based. In contrast, we find that in transformers pre-trained on natural language, in-context learning is significantly rule-based, with larger models showing more rule-basedness. We hypothesise that rule-based generalization from in-context information might be an emergent consequence of large-scale training on language, which has sparse rule-like structure. Using controlled stimuli, we verify that transformers pretrained on data containing sparse rule-like structure exhibit more rule-based generalization.
summary: Transformer models can use two fundamentally different kinds of information: information stored in weights during training, and information provided ``in-context'' at inference time. In this work, we show that transformers exhibit different inductive biases in how they represent and generalize from the information in these two sources. In particular, we characterize whether they generalize via parsimonious rules (rule-based generalization) or via direct comparison with observed examples (exemplar-based generalization). This is of important practical consequence, as it informs whether to encode information in weights or in context, depending on how we want models to use that information. In transformers trained on controlled stimuli, we find that generalization from weights is more rule-based whereas generalization from context is largely exemplar-based. In contrast, we find that in transformers pre-trained on natural language, in-context learning is significantly rule-based, with larger models showing more rule-basedness. We hypothesise that rule-based generalization from in-context information might be an emergent consequence of large-scale training on language, which has sparse rule-like structure. Using controlled stimuli, we verify that transformers pretrained on data containing sparse rule-like structure exhibit more rule-based generalization.
abstract_zh: Transformer 模型可以使用两种根本不同的信息：训练期间存储在权重中的信息，以及推理时“在上下文中”提供的信息。在这项工作中，我们表明变压器在如何表示和概括这两个来源的信息方面表现出不同的归纳偏差。特别是，我们描述了它们是通过简约规则（基于规则的泛化）进行泛化，还是通过与观察到的示例进行直接比较（基于样本的泛化）进行泛化。这具有重要的实际意义，因为它决定是否在权重或上下文中对信息进行编码，具体取决于我们希望模型如何使用该信息。在受控刺激训练的 Transformer 中，我们发现权重的泛化更加基于规则，而上下文的泛化主要是基于示例的。相比之下，我们发现在自然语言预训练的 Transformer 中，上下文学习明显是基于规则的，较大的模型显示出更多的基于规则的性。我们假设，基于上下文信息的基于规则的泛化可能是大规模语言训练的自然结果，而语言具有稀疏的规则状结构。使用受控刺激，我们验证了对包含稀疏规则状结构的数据进行预训练的变换器表现出更多基于规则的泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 研究Transformer模型从权重信息和上下文信息中泛化的不同机制，分析其规则泛化与示例泛化的差异。
AI.motivation: 确定模型应如何存储信息（权重或上下文）以适应不同任务需求，需理解其泛化机制差异。
AI.method: 通过控制实验和自然语言预训练模型对比，分析模型在规则泛化与示例泛化上的表现差异。
AI.result: 权重信息泛化更依赖规则，而上下文泛化以示例为主；自然语言预训练模型的上下文学习显著规则化，且模型规模越大规则性越强。
AI.conclusion: 大规模语言训练使模型在上下文学习中涌现规则泛化能力，可能因自然语言的稀疏规则结构驱动。

ai_content.method: 通过控制实验和自然语言预训练模型对比，分析模型在规则泛化与示例泛化上的表现差异。

search_text: Transformers generalize differently from information stored in context vs in weights 变压器的概括与上下文中存储的信息和权重中存储的信息不同 Transformer models can use two fundamentally different kinds of information: information stored in weights during training, and information provided ``in-context'' at inference time. In this work, we show that transformers exhibit different inductive biases in how they represent and generalize from the information in these two sources. In particular, we characterize whether they generalize via parsimonious rules (rule-based generalization) or via direct comparison with observed examples (exemplar-based generalization). This is of important practical consequence, as it informs whether to encode information in weights or in context, depending on how we want models to use that information. In transformers trained on controlled stimuli, we find that generalization from weights is more rule-based whereas generalization from context is largely exemplar-based. In contrast, we find that in transformers pre-trained on natural language, in-context learning is significantly rule-based, with larger models showing more rule-basedness. We hypothesise that rule-based generalization from in-context information might be an emergent consequence of large-scale training on language, which has sparse rule-like structure. Using controlled stimuli, we verify that transformers pretrained on data containing sparse rule-like structure exhibit more rule-based generalization. Transformer 模型可以使用两种根本不同的信息：训练期间存储在权重中的信息，以及推理时“在上下文中”提供的信息。在这项工作中，我们表明变压器在如何表示和概括这两个来源的信息方面表现出不同的归纳偏差。特别是，我们描述了它们是通过简约规则（基于规则的泛化）进行泛化，还是通过与观察到的示例进行直接比较（基于样本的泛化）进行泛化。这具有重要的实际意义，因为它决定是否在权重或上下文中对信息进行编码，具体取决于我们希望模型如何使用该信息。在受控刺激训练的 Transformer 中，我们发现权重的泛化更加基于规则，而上下文的泛化主要是基于示例的。相比之下，我们发现在自然语言预训练的 Transformer 中，上下文学习明显是基于规则的，较大的模型显示出更多的基于规则的性。我们假设，基于上下文信息的基于规则的泛化可能是大规模语言训练的自然结果，而语言具有稀疏的规则状结构。使用受控刺激，我们验证了对包含稀疏规则状结构的数据进行预训练的变换器表现出更多基于规则的泛化能力。 研究Transformer模型从权重信息和上下文信息中泛化的不同机制，分析其规则泛化与示例泛化的差异。 Stephanie C. Y. Chan,Ishita Dasgupta,Junkyung Kim,Dharshan Kumaran,Andrew K. Lampinen,Felix Hill cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Andrea Pollastro,Giusiana Testa,Antonio Bilotta,Roberto Prevete
title: Semi-supervised detection of structural damage using Variational Autoencoder and a One-Class Support Vector Machine
title_zh: 使用变分自动编码器和一类支持向量机进行结构损伤的半监督检测
abstract: In recent years, Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs) have been introduced in Structural Health Monitoring (SHM) systems. A semi-supervised method with a data-driven approach allows the ANN training on data acquired from an undamaged structural condition to detect structural damages. In standard approaches, after the training stage, a decision rule is manually defined to detect anomalous data. However, this process could be made automatic using machine learning methods, whom performances are maximised using hyperparameter optimization techniques. The paper proposes a semi-supervised method with a data-driven approach to detect structural anomalies. The methodology consists of: (i) a Variational Autoencoder (VAE) to approximate undamaged data distribution and (ii) a One-Class Support Vector Machine (OC-SVM) to discriminate different health conditions using damage sensitive features extracted from VAE's signal reconstruction. The method is applied to a scale steel structure that was tested in nine damage's scenarios by IASC-ASCE Structural Health Monitoring Task Group.
summary: In recent years, Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs) have been introduced in Structural Health Monitoring (SHM) systems. A semi-supervised method with a data-driven approach allows the ANN training on data acquired from an undamaged structural condition to detect structural damages. In standard approaches, after the training stage, a decision rule is manually defined to detect anomalous data. However, this process could be made automatic using machine learning methods, whom performances are maximised using hyperparameter optimization techniques. The paper proposes a semi-supervised method with a data-driven approach to detect structural anomalies. The methodology consists of: (i) a Variational Autoencoder (VAE) to approximate undamaged data distribution and (ii) a One-Class Support Vector Machine (OC-SVM) to discriminate different health conditions using damage sensitive features extracted from VAE's signal reconstruction. The method is applied to a scale steel structure that was tested in nine damage's scenarios by IASC-ASCE Structural Health Monitoring Task Group.
abstract_zh: 近年来，人工神经网络（ANN）已被引入结构健康监测（SHM）系统中。采用数据驱动方法的半监督方法允许对从未损坏的结构条件获取的数据进行人工神经网络训练，以检测结构损坏。在标准方法中，在训练阶段之后，手动定义决策规则来检测异常数据。然而，这个过程可以使用机器学习方法实现自动化，并使用超参数优化技术来最大化其性能。该论文提出了一种采用数据驱动方法的半监督方法来检测结构异常。该方法包括：(i) 变分自动编码器 (VAE)，用于近似未损坏的数据分布；(ii) 一级支持向量机 (OC-SVM)，用于使用从 VAE 信号重建中提取的损坏敏感特征来区分不同的健康状况。该方法应用于规模钢结构，并由 IASC-ASCE 结构健康监测任务组在九种损坏场景中进行了测试。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督方法，结合变分自编码器（VAE）和一类支持向量机（OC-SVM），用于检测结构损伤。
AI.motivation: 传统结构健康监测方法依赖人工定义的决策规则，难以自动优化。通过引入机器学习和超参数优化技术，可提升检测自动化水平与准确性。
AI.method: 方法分为两步：首先使用VAE拟合无损状态的数据分布，再利用VAE重构信号提取的损伤敏感特征，输入OC-SVM进行健康状态分类。
AI.result: 该方法在IASC-ASCE任务组设计的九种损伤场景的缩尺钢结构实验中成功检测到异常数据。
AI.conclusion: 结合VAE与OC-SVM的半监督框架可有效实现结构损伤自动化检测，减少对人工规则的依赖，提升监测效率。

authors_text: Biling Wang,Michael Dohopolski,Ti Bai,Junjie Wu,Raquibul Hannan,Neil Desai,Aurelie Garant,Daniel Yang,Dan Nguyen,Mu-Han Lin,Robert Timmerman,Xinlei Wang,Steve Jiang
title: Performance Deterioration of Deep Learning Models after Clinical Deployment: A Case Study with Auto-segmentation for Definitive Prostate Cancer Radiotherapy
title_zh: 临床部署后深度学习模型的性能恶化：前列腺癌放射治疗自动分割的案例研究
abstract: We evaluated the temporal performance of a deep learning (DL) based artificial intelligence (AI) model for auto segmentation in prostate radiotherapy, seeking to correlate its efficacy with changes in clinical landscapes. Our study involved 1328 prostate cancer patients who underwent definitive radiotherapy from January 2006 to August 2022 at the University of Texas Southwestern Medical Center. We trained a UNet based segmentation model on data from 2006 to 2011 and tested it on data from 2012 to 2022 to simulate real world clinical deployment. We measured the model performance using the Dice similarity coefficient (DSC), visualized the trends in contour quality using exponentially weighted moving average (EMA) curves. Additionally, we performed Wilcoxon Rank Sum Test to analyze the differences in DSC distributions across distinct periods, and multiple linear regression to investigate the impact of various clinical factors. The model exhibited peak performance in the initial phase (from 2012 to 2014) for segmenting the prostate, rectum, and bladder. However, we observed a notable decline in performance for the prostate and rectum after 2015, while bladder contour quality remained stable. Key factors that impacted the prostate contour quality included physician contouring styles, the use of various hydrogel spacer, CT scan slice thickness, MRI-guided contouring, and using intravenous (IV) contrast. Rectum contour quality was influenced by factors such as slice thickness, physician contouring styles, and the use of various hydrogel spacers. The bladder contour quality was primarily affected by using IV contrast. This study highlights the challenges in maintaining AI model performance consistency in a dynamic clinical setting. It underscores the need for continuous monitoring and updating of AI models to ensure their ongoing effectiveness and relevance in patient care.
summary: We evaluated the temporal performance of a deep learning (DL) based artificial intelligence (AI) model for auto segmentation in prostate radiotherapy, seeking to correlate its efficacy with changes in clinical landscapes. Our study involved 1328 prostate cancer patients who underwent definitive radiotherapy from January 2006 to August 2022 at the University of Texas Southwestern Medical Center. We trained a UNet based segmentation model on data from 2006 to 2011 and tested it on data from 2012 to 2022 to simulate real world clinical deployment. We measured the model performance using the Dice similarity coefficient (DSC), visualized the trends in contour quality using exponentially weighted moving average (EMA) curves. Additionally, we performed Wilcoxon Rank Sum Test to analyze the differences in DSC distributions across distinct periods, and multiple linear regression to investigate the impact of various clinical factors. The model exhibited peak performance in the initial phase (from 2012 to 2014) for segmenting the prostate, rectum, and bladder. However, we observed a notable decline in performance for the prostate and rectum after 2015, while bladder contour quality remained stable. Key factors that impacted the prostate contour quality included physician contouring styles, the use of various hydrogel spacer, CT scan slice thickness, MRI-guided contouring, and using intravenous (IV) contrast. Rectum contour quality was influenced by factors such as slice thickness, physician contouring styles, and the use of various hydrogel spacers. The bladder contour quality was primarily affected by using IV contrast. This study highlights the challenges in maintaining AI model performance consistency in a dynamic clinical setting. It underscores the need for continuous monitoring and updating of AI models to ensure their ongoing effectiveness and relevance in patient care.
abstract_zh: 我们评估了用于前列腺放疗自动分割的基于深度学习 (DL) 的人工智能 (AI) 模型的时间性能，寻求将其疗效与临床情况的变化联系起来。我们的研究涉及 1328 名前列腺癌患者，他们于 2006 年 1 月至 2022 年 8 月在德克萨斯大学西南医学中心接受了根治性放射治疗。我们使用 2006 年至 2011 年的数据训练了基于 UNet 的分割模型，并使用 2012 年至 2022 年的数据对其进行了测试，以模拟现实世界的临床部署。我们使用 Dice 相似系数 (DSC) 测量模型性能，使用指数加权移动平均 (EMA) 曲线可视化轮廓质量的趋势。此外，我们还进行了 Wilcoxon Rank Sum 检验来分析不同时期 DSC 分布的差异，并进行多元线性回归来研究各种临床因素的影响。该模型在分割前列腺、直肠和膀胱的初始阶段（2012 年至 2014 年）表现出最佳性能。然而，我们观察到 2015 年之后前列腺和直肠的性能显着下降，而膀胱轮廓质量保持稳定。影响前列腺轮廓质量的关键因素包括医师轮廓风格、各种水凝胶垫片的使用、CT 扫描切片厚度、MRI 引导轮廓以及静脉 (IV) 造影剂的使用。直肠轮廓质量受到切片厚度、医生轮廓风格以及各种水凝胶垫片的使用等因素的影响。膀胱轮廓质量主要受使用 IV 造影剂的影响。这项研究强调了在动态临床环境中保持人工智能模型性能一致性的挑战。它强调需要持续监控和更新人工智能模型，以确保其在患者护理中的持续有效性和相关性。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了深度学习模型在临床部署后性能变化，以前列腺癌放疗的自动分割为例，分析其效能与临床环境变化的关系。
AI.motivation: 探讨深度学习模型在动态临床环境中部署后的性能稳定性，确保AI模型在实际应用中的持续有效性。
AI.method: 基于UNet的分割模型，使用2006-2011年数据训练，2012-2022年数据测试，通过Dice相似系数（DSC）、指数加权移动平均（EMA）曲线及统计检验分析性能变化和临床因素影响。
AI.result: 模型在2012-2014年表现最佳，但2015年后前列腺和直肠分割性能显著下降，膀胱稳定性较好。影响因素包括医生勾画风格、水凝胶间隔物、CT层厚、MRI引导及静脉造影等。
AI.conclusion: 动态临床环境中AI模型性能可能随时间衰减，需持续监测和更新模型以维持其临床适用性。

result: 模型在2012-2014年表现最佳，但2015年后前列腺和直肠分割性能显著下降，膀胱稳定性较好。影响因素包括医生勾画风格、水凝胶间隔物、CT层厚、MRI引导及静脉造影等。
conclusion: 动态临床环境中AI模型性能可能随时间衰减，需持续监测和更新模型以维持其临床适用性。
search_text: Performance Deterioration of Deep Learning Models after Clinical Deployment: A Case Study with Auto-segmentation for Definitive Prostate Cancer Radiotherapy 临床部署后深度学习模型的性能恶化：前列腺癌放射治疗自动分割的案例研究 We evaluated the temporal performance of a deep learning (DL) based artificial intelligence (AI) model for auto segmentation in prostate radiotherapy, seeking to correlate its efficacy with changes in clinical landscapes. Our study involved 1328 prostate cancer patients who underwent definitive radiotherapy from January 2006 to August 2022 at the University of Texas Southwestern Medical Center. We trained a UNet based segmentation model on data from 2006 to 2011 and tested it on data from 2012 to 2022 to simulate real world clinical deployment. We measured the model performance using the Dice similarity coefficient (DSC), visualized the trends in contour quality using exponentially weighted moving average (EMA) curves. Additionally, we performed Wilcoxon Rank Sum Test to analyze the differences in DSC distributions across distinct periods, and multiple linear regression to investigate the impact of various clinical factors. The model exhibited peak performance in the initial phase (from 2012 to 2014) for segmenting the prostate, rectum, and bladder. However, we observed a notable decline in performance for the prostate and rectum after 2015, while bladder contour quality remained stable. Key factors that impacted the prostate contour quality included physician contouring styles, the use of various hydrogel spacer, CT scan slice thickness, MRI-guided contouring, and using intravenous (IV) contrast. Rectum contour quality was influenced by factors such as slice thickness, physician contouring styles, and the use of various hydrogel spacers. The bladder contour quality was primarily affected by using IV contrast. This study highlights the challenges in maintaining AI model performance consistency in a dynamic clinical setting. It underscores the need for continuous monitoring and updating of AI models to ensure their ongoing effectiveness and relevance in patient care. 我们评估了用于前列腺放疗自动分割的基于深度学习 (DL) 的人工智能 (AI) 模型的时间性能，寻求将其疗效与临床情况的变化联系起来。我们的研究涉及 1328 名前列腺癌患者，他们于 2006 年 1 月至 2022 年 8 月在德克萨斯大学西南医学中心接受了根治性放射治疗。我们使用 2006 年至 2011 年的数据训练了基于 UNet 的分割模型，并使用 2012 年至 2022 年的数据对其进行了测试，以模拟现实世界的临床部署。我们使用 Dice 相似系数 (DSC) 测量模型性能，使用指数加权移动平均 (EMA) 曲线可视化轮廓质量的趋势。此外，我们还进行了 Wilcoxon Rank Sum 检验来分析不同时期 DSC 分布的差异，并进行多元线性回归来研究各种临床因素的影响。该模型在分割前列腺、直肠和膀胱的初始阶段（2012 年至 2014 年）表现出最佳性能。然而，我们观察到 2015 年之后前列腺和直肠的性能显着下降，而膀胱轮廓质量保持稳定。影响前列腺轮廓质量的关键因素包括医师轮廓风格、各种水凝胶垫片的使用、CT 扫描切片厚度、MRI 引导轮廓以及静脉 (IV) 造影剂的使用。直肠轮廓质量受到切片厚度、医生轮廓风格以及各种水凝胶垫片的使用等因素的影响。膀胱轮廓质量主要受使用 IV 造影剂的影响。这项研究强调了在动态临床环境中保持人工智能模型性能一致性的挑战。它强调需要持续监控和更新人工智能模型，以确保其在患者护理中的持续有效性和相关性。 本文评估了深度学习模型在临床部署后性能变化，以前列腺癌放疗的自动分割为例，分析其效能与临床环境变化的关系。 Biling Wang,Michael Dohopolski,Ti Bai,Junjie Wu,Raquibul Hannan,Neil Desai,Aurelie Garant,Daniel Yang,Dan Nguyen,Mu-Han Lin,Robert Timmerman,Xinlei Wang,Steve Jiang eess.IV,cs.CV,stat.AP

authors_text: Chuhan Xu,Xia Jiang
title: iMedBot: A Web-based Intelligent Agent for Healthcare Related Prediction and Deep Learning
title_zh: iMedBot：基于网络的智能代理，用于医疗保健相关预测和深度学习
abstract: Background: Breast cancer is a multifactorial disease, genetic and environmental factors will affect its incidence probability. Breast cancer metastasis is one of the main cause of breast cancer related deaths reported by the American Cancer Society (ACS). Method: the iMedBot is a web application that we developed using the python Flask web framework and deployed on Amazon Web Services. It contains a frontend and a backend. The backend is supported by a python program we developed using the python Keras and scikit-learn packages, which can be used to learn deep feedforward neural network (DFNN) models. Result: the iMedBot can provide two main services: 1. it can predict 5-, 10-, or 15-year breast cancer metastasis based on a set of clinical information provided by a user. The prediction is done by using a set of DFNN models that were pretrained, and 2. It can train DFNN models for a user using user-provided dataset. The model trained will be evaluated using AUC and both the AUC value and the AUC ROC curve will be provided. Conclusion: The iMedBot web application provides a user-friendly interface for user-agent interaction in conducting personalized prediction and model training. It is an initial attempt to convert results of deep learning research into an online tool that may stir further research interests in this direction. Keywords: Deep learning, Breast Cancer, Web application, Model training.
summary: Background: Breast cancer is a multifactorial disease, genetic and environmental factors will affect its incidence probability. Breast cancer metastasis is one of the main cause of breast cancer related deaths reported by the American Cancer Society (ACS). Result: the iMedBot can provide two main services: 1. it can predict 5-, 10-, or 15-year breast cancer metastasis based on a set of clinical information provided by a user. The prediction is done by using a set of DFNN models that were pretrained, and 2. It can train DFNN models for a user using user-provided dataset. The model trained will be evaluated using AUC and both the AUC value and the AUC ROC curve will be provided. Conclusion: The iMedBot web application provides a user-friendly interface for user-agent interaction in conducting personalized prediction and model training. It is an initial attempt to convert results of deep learning research into an online tool that may stir further research interests in this direction. Keywords: Deep learning, Breast Cancer, Web application, Model training.
abstract_zh: 背景：乳腺癌是一种多因素疾病，遗传和环境因素都会影响其发病概率。据美国癌​​症协会（ACS）报告，乳腺癌转移是乳腺癌相关死亡的主要原因之一。方法：iMedBot 是我们使用 python Flask Web 框架开发并部署在 Amazon Web Services 上的 Web 应用程序。它包含一个前端和一个后端。后端由我们使用 python Keras 和 scikit-learn 包开发的 python 程序支持，可用于学习深度前馈神经网络 (DFNN) 模型。结果：iMedBot 可以提供两项主要服务： 1. 它可以根据用户提供的一组临床信息预测 5 年、10 年或 15 年乳腺癌转移情况。预测是通过使用一组预训练的 DFNN 模型来完成的，2.它可以使用用户提供的数据集为用户训练 DFNN 模型。训练后的模型将使用 AUC 进行评估，并提供 AUC 值和 AUC ROC 曲线。结论：iMedBot Web 应用程序为用户代理交互提供了一个用户友好的界面，以进行个性化预测和模型训练。这是将深度学习研究成果转化为在线工具的初步尝试，可能会激发该方向的进一步研究兴趣。关键词：深度学习、乳腺癌、网络应用、模型训练。

AI.tldr: 本文提出iMedBot，一个基于网络的智能代理系统，用于乳腺癌转移预测和深度学习模型训练。
AI.motivation: 乳腺癌转移是导致死亡的主要原因，需开发可预测转移风险并支持个性化分析的工具，以辅助临床决策和推动深度学习在医疗领域的应用。
AI.method: 采用Python Flask框架构建Web应用，后端使用Keras和scikit-learn开发深度前馈神经网络模型，部署于AWS云平台，提供预训练模型预测及用户自定义数据训练功能。
AI.result: 系统实现两大功能：1. 基于用户输入的临床数据预测5/10/15年乳腺癌转移风险；2. 支持用户上传数据集训练DFNN模型并输出AUC值及ROC曲线评估结果。
AI.conclusion: iMedBot通过友好的交互界面实现了个性化预测与模型训练，为深度学习成果转化为在线医疗工具提供了初步探索，可能激发更多相关研究。

authors_text: Saeed Saadatnejad,Ali Rasekh,Mohammadreza Mofayezi,Yasamin Medghalchi,Sara Rajabzadeh,Taylor Mordan,Alexandre Alahi
title: A generic diffusion-based approach for 3D human pose prediction in the wild
title_zh: 一种基于扩散的通用方法，用于野外 3D 人体姿势预测
abstract: Predicting 3D human poses in real-world scenarios, also known as human pose forecasting, is inevitably subject to noisy inputs arising from inaccurate 3D pose estimations and occlusions. To address these challenges, we propose a diffusion-based approach that can predict given noisy observations. We frame the prediction task as a denoising problem, where both observation and prediction are considered as a single sequence containing missing elements (whether in the observation or prediction horizon). All missing elements are treated as noise and denoised with our conditional diffusion model. To better handle long-term forecasting horizon, we present a temporal cascaded diffusion model. We demonstrate the benefits of our approach on four publicly available datasets (Human3.6M, HumanEva-I, AMASS, and 3DPW), outperforming the state-of-the-art. Additionally, we show that our framework is generic enough to improve any 3D pose prediction model as a pre-processing step to repair their inputs and a post-processing step to refine their outputs. The code is available online: \url{https://github.com/vita-epfl/DePOSit}.
summary: Predicting 3D human poses in real-world scenarios, also known as human pose forecasting, is inevitably subject to noisy inputs arising from inaccurate 3D pose estimations and occlusions. To address these challenges, we propose a diffusion-based approach that can predict given noisy observations. We frame the prediction task as a denoising problem, where both observation and prediction are considered as a single sequence containing missing elements (whether in the observation or prediction horizon). All missing elements are treated as noise and denoised with our conditional diffusion model. To better handle long-term forecasting horizon, we present a temporal cascaded diffusion model. We demonstrate the benefits of our approach on four publicly available datasets (Human3.6M, HumanEva-I, AMASS, and 3DPW), outperforming the state-of-the-art. Additionally, we show that our framework is generic enough to improve any 3D pose prediction model as a pre-processing step to repair their inputs and a post-processing step to refine their outputs. The code is available online: \url{https://github.com/vita-epfl/DePOSit}.
abstract_zh: 在现实场景中预测 3D 人体姿势（也称为人体姿势预测）不可避免地会受到由于不准确的 3D 姿势估计和遮挡而产生的噪声输入的影响。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种基于扩散的方法，可以预测给定的噪声观测结果。我们将预测任务构建为去噪问题，其中观察和预测都被视为包含缺失元素的单个序列（无论是在观察范围内还是在预测范围内）。所有缺失的元素都被视为噪声，并使用我们的条件扩散模型进行去噪。为了更好地处理长期预测范围，我们提出了时间级联扩散模型。我们在四个公开可用的数据集（Human3.6M、HumanEva-I、AMASS 和 3DPW）上展示了我们的方法的优势，其性能优于最先进的技术。此外，我们表明我们的框架足够通用，可以改进任何 3D 姿态预测模型，作为修复输入的预处理步骤和细化输出的后处理步骤。该代码可在线获取：\url{https://github.com/vita-epfl/DePOSit}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于扩散模型的通用方法，用于在真实世界场景中预测3D人体姿态，以应对噪声输入和遮挡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理真实场景中的噪声3D姿态估计和遮挡问题时表现不足，需开发鲁棒的预测框架以提升准确性。
AI.method: 将预测任务建模为去噪问题，利用条件扩散模型处理观测和预测序列中的缺失元素，并设计时序级联扩散模型以增强长期预测能力。
AI.result: 在Human3.6M、HumanEva-I、AMASS和3DPW四个数据集上优于现有最佳方法，且可作为预处理和后处理模块提升其他模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过扩散模型有效处理噪声和遮挡，具有通用性，可作为改进3D姿态预测任务的通用工具。

conclusion: 该方法通过扩散模型有效处理噪声和遮挡，具有通用性，可作为改进3D姿态预测任务的通用工具。
search_text: A generic diffusion-based approach for 3D human pose prediction in the wild 一种基于扩散的通用方法，用于野外 3D 人体姿势预测 Predicting 3D human poses in real-world scenarios, also known as human pose forecasting, is inevitably subject to noisy inputs arising from inaccurate 3D pose estimations and occlusions. To address these challenges, we propose a diffusion-based approach that can predict given noisy observations. We frame the prediction task as a denoising problem, where both observation and prediction are considered as a single sequence containing missing elements (whether in the observation or prediction horizon). All missing elements are treated as noise and denoised with our conditional diffusion model. To better handle long-term forecasting horizon, we present a temporal cascaded diffusion model. We demonstrate the benefits of our approach on four publicly available datasets (Human3.6M, HumanEva-I, AMASS, and 3DPW), outperforming the state-of-the-art. Additionally, we show that our framework is generic enough to improve any 3D pose prediction model as a pre-processing step to repair their inputs and a post-processing step to refine their outputs. The code is available online: \url{https://github.com/vita-epfl/DePOSit}. 在现实场景中预测 3D 人体姿势（也称为人体姿势预测）不可避免地会受到由于不准确的 3D 姿势估计和遮挡而产生的噪声输入的影响。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种基于扩散的方法，可以预测给定的噪声观测结果。我们将预测任务构建为去噪问题，其中观察和预测都被视为包含缺失元素的单个序列（无论是在观察范围内还是在预测范围内）。所有缺失的元素都被视为噪声，并使用我们的条件扩散模型进行去噪。为了更好地处理长期预测范围，我们提出了时间级联扩散模型。我们在四个公开可用的数据集（Human3.6M、HumanEva-I、AMASS 和 3DPW）上展示了我们的方法的优势，其性能优于最先进的技术。此外，我们表明我们的框架足够通用，可以改进任何 3D 姿态预测模型，作为修复输入的预处理步骤和细化输出的后处理步骤。该代码可在线获取：\url{https://github.com/vita-epfl/DePOSit}。 本文提出了一种基于扩散模型的通用方法，用于在真实世界场景中预测3D人体姿态，以应对噪声输入和遮挡问题。 Saeed Saadatnejad,Ali Rasekh,Mohammadreza Mofayezi,Yasamin Medghalchi,Sara Rajabzadeh,Taylor Mordan,Alexandre Alahi cs.CV,cs.HC,cs.RO

authors_text: Yang Li,Xiaoxue Chen,Hao Zhao,Jiangtao Gong,Guyue Zhou,Federico Rossano,Yixin Zhu
title: Understanding Embodied Reference with Touch-Line Transformer
title_zh: 了解 Touch-Line Transformer 的具体参考
abstract: We study embodied reference understanding, the task of locating referents using embodied gestural signals and language references. Human studies have revealed that objects referred to or pointed to do not lie on the elbow-wrist line, a common misconception; instead, they lie on the so-called virtual touch line. However, existing human pose representations fail to incorporate the virtual touch line. To tackle this problem, we devise the touch-line transformer: It takes as input tokenized visual and textual features and simultaneously predicts the referent's bounding box and a touch-line vector. Leveraging this touch-line prior, we further devise a geometric consistency loss that encourages the co-linearity between referents and touch lines. Using the touch-line as gestural information improves model performances significantly. Experiments on the YouRefIt dataset show our method achieves a +25.0% accuracy improvement under the 0.75 IoU criterion, closing 63.6% of the gap between model and human performances. Furthermore, we computationally verify prior human studies by showing that computational models more accurately locate referents when using the virtual touch line than when using the elbow-wrist line.
summary: We study embodied reference understanding, the task of locating referents using embodied gestural signals and language references. Human studies have revealed that objects referred to or pointed to do not lie on the elbow-wrist line, a common misconception; instead, they lie on the so-called virtual touch line. However, existing human pose representations fail to incorporate the virtual touch line. To tackle this problem, we devise the touch-line transformer: It takes as input tokenized visual and textual features and simultaneously predicts the referent's bounding box and a touch-line vector. Leveraging this touch-line prior, we further devise a geometric consistency loss that encourages the co-linearity between referents and touch lines. Using the touch-line as gestural information improves model performances significantly. Experiments on the YouRefIt dataset show our method achieves a +25.0% accuracy improvement under the 0.75 IoU criterion, closing 63.6% of the gap between model and human performances. Furthermore, we computationally verify prior human studies by showing that computational models more accurately locate referents when using the virtual touch line than when using the elbow-wrist line.
abstract_zh: 我们研究具身参考理解，即使用具身手势信号和语言参考来定位所指对象的任务。人类研究表明，所提及或指向的物体并不位于肘腕线上，这是一种常见的误解；相反，他们位于所谓的虚拟边线上。然而，现有的人体姿势表示未能合并虚拟边线。为了解决这个问题，我们设计了触摸线转换器：它将标记化的视觉和文本特征作为输入，并同时预测所指对象的边界框和触摸线向量。利用这条边线先验，我们进一步设计了一种几何一致性损失，以促进参照物和边线之间的共线性。使用边线作为手势信息可以显着提高模型性能。 YouRefIt 数据集上的实验表明，我们的方法在 0.75 IoU 标准下实现了 +25.0% 的准确率提升，缩小了模型与人类表现之间 63.6% 的差距。此外，我们通过计算验证了先前的人类研究，表明使用虚拟边线时的计算模型比使用肘腕线时更准确地定位参考对象。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过结合肢体动作信号和语言参考来定位参照物，提出触线变换器模型以提升参照物定位准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有模型未考虑人类实际使用的虚拟触线（而非肘腕线）作为手势参考线，导致参照物定位存在偏差。
AI.method: 设计触线变换器模型，同时预测参照物边界框和触线向量，并引入几何一致性损失函数强化触线与参照物共线性关系。
AI.result: 在YouRefIt数据集上实现0.75 IoU指标下25%的准确率提升，缩小了63.6%的人机性能差距，并验证了虚拟触线的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 将虚拟触线作为手势信息纳入模型显著提升性能，计算验证了人类研究中触线机制的合理性。

authors_text: Nataniel Ruiz,Miriam Bellver,Timo Bolkart,Ambuj Arora,Ming C. Lin,Javier Romero,Raja Bala
title: Human Body Measurement Estimation with Adversarial Augmentation
title_zh: 对抗性增强的人体测量估计
comment: Published at the International Conference on 3D Vision (3DV) 2022
comments: Published at the International Conference on 3D Vision (3DV) 2022
abstract: We present a Body Measurement network (BMnet) for estimating 3D anthropomorphic measurements of the human body shape from silhouette images. Training of BMnet is performed on data from real human subjects, and augmented with a novel adversarial body simulator (ABS) that finds and synthesizes challenging body shapes. ABS is based on the skinned multiperson linear (SMPL) body model, and aims to maximize BMnet measurement prediction error with respect to latent SMPL shape parameters. ABS is fully differentiable with respect to these parameters, and trained end-to-end via backpropagation with BMnet in the loop. Experiments show that ABS effectively discovers adversarial examples, such as bodies with extreme body mass indices (BMI), consistent with the rarity of extreme-BMI bodies in BMnet's training set. Thus ABS is able to reveal gaps in training data and potential failures in predicting under-represented body shapes. Results show that training BMnet with ABS improves measurement prediction accuracy on real bodies by up to 10%, when compared to no augmentation or random body shape sampling. Furthermore, our method significantly outperforms SOTA measurement estimation methods by as much as 3x. Finally, we release BodyM, the first challenging, large-scale dataset of photo silhouettes and body measurements of real human subjects, to further promote research in this area. Project website: https://adversarialbodysim.github.io
summary: We present a Body Measurement network (BMnet) for estimating 3D anthropomorphic measurements of the human body shape from silhouette images. Training of BMnet is performed on data from real human subjects, and augmented with a novel adversarial body simulator (ABS) that finds and synthesizes challenging body shapes. ABS is based on the skinned multiperson linear (SMPL) body model, and aims to maximize BMnet measurement prediction error with respect to latent SMPL shape parameters. ABS is fully differentiable with respect to these parameters, and trained end-to-end via backpropagation with BMnet in the loop. Experiments show that ABS effectively discovers adversarial examples, such as bodies with extreme body mass indices (BMI), consistent with the rarity of extreme-BMI bodies in BMnet's training set. Thus ABS is able to reveal gaps in training data and potential failures in predicting under-represented body shapes. Results show that training BMnet with ABS improves measurement prediction accuracy on real bodies by up to 10%, when compared to no augmentation or random body shape sampling. Furthermore, our method significantly outperforms SOTA measurement estimation methods by as much as 3x. Finally, we release BodyM, the first challenging, large-scale dataset of photo silhouettes and body measurements of real human subjects, to further promote research in this area. Project website: https://adversarialbodysim.github.io
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个身体测量网络 (BMnet)，用于根据轮廓图像估计人体形状的 3D 拟人测量值。 BMnet 的训练是根据来自真实人类受试者的数据进行的，并通过新型对抗性身体模拟器 (ABS) 进行增强，该模拟器可以发现并合成具有挑战性的身体形状。 ABS 基于蒙皮多人线性 (SMPL) 人体模型，旨在最大化 BMnet 相对于潜在 SMPL 形状参数的测量预测误差。 ABS 对于这些参数是完全可微分的，并且通过循环中的 BMnet 反向传播进行端到端训练。实验表明，ABS 有效地发现了对抗性示例，例如具有极端体重指数 (BMI) 的身体，这与 BMnet 训练集中极端 BMI 身体的稀有性一致。因此，ABS 能够揭示训练数据的差距以及预测代表性不足的体型的潜在失败。结果表明，与不进行增强或随机体形采样相比，使用 ABS 训练 BMnet 将真实身体的测量预测精度提高了 10%。此外，我们的方法显着优于 SOTA 测量估计方法多达 3 倍。最后，我们发布了 BodyM，这是第一个具有挑战性的大规模真实人体照片轮廓和身体测量数据集，以进一步促进该领域的研究。项目网站：https://adversarialbodysim.github.io

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为BMnet的网络，通过对抗增强技术从人体轮廓图像中估计3D人体尺寸测量值。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理极端体型（如极高或极低BMI）等罕见人体形状时存在预测误差，训练数据不足导致模型泛化能力受限。
AI.method: 构建BMnet网络与对抗人体模拟器（ABS），ABS基于SMPL模型通过最大化预测误差生成挑战性样本，与BMnet端到端联合训练。
AI.result: 使用ABS增强后，BMnet在真实人体测量预测准确率提升最高达10%，较现有最优方法性能提升3倍，并发布包含真实人体轮廓与测量数据的BodyM数据集。
AI.conclusion: 对抗增强有效弥补训练数据缺陷，显著提升人体测量估计精度，为该领域研究提供新方法与数据支持。

Furthermore, our method significantly outperforms SOTA measurement estimation methods by as much as 3x. Finally, we release BodyM, the first challenging, large-scale dataset of photo silhouettes and body measurements of real human subjects, to further promote research in this area. Project website: https://adversarialbodysim.github.io 我们提出了一个身体测量网络 (BMnet)，用于根据轮廓图像估计人体形状的 3D 拟人测量值。 BMnet 的训练是根据来自真实人类受试者的数据进行的，并通过新型对抗性身体模拟器 (ABS) 进行增强，该模拟器可以发现并合成具有挑战性的身体形状。 ABS 基于蒙皮多人线性 (SMPL) 人体模型，旨在最大化 BMnet 相对于潜在 SMPL 形状参数的测量预测误差。 ABS 对于这些参数是完全可微分的，并且通过循环中的 BMnet 反向传播进行端到端训练。实验表明，ABS 有效地发现了对抗性示例，例如具有极端体重指数 (BMI) 的身体，这与 BMnet 训练集中极端 BMI 身体的稀有性一致。因此，ABS 能够揭示训练数据的差距以及预测代表性不足的体型的潜在失败。结果表明，与不进行增强或随机体形采样相比，使用 ABS 训练 BMnet 将真实身体的测量预测精度提高了 10%。此外，我们的方法显着优于 SOTA 测量估计方法多达 3 倍。最后，我们发布了 BodyM，这是第一个具有挑战性的大规模真实人体照片轮廓和身体测量数据集，以进一步促进该领域的研究。项目网站：https://adversarialbodysim.github.io 本文提出了一种名为BMnet的网络，通过对抗增强技术从人体轮廓图像中估计3D人体尺寸测量值。 Nataniel Ruiz,Miriam Bellver,Timo Bolkart,Ambuj Arora,Ming C. Lin,Javier Romero,Raja Bala cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Xiaoyang Wu,Yixing Lao,Li Jiang,Xihui Liu,Hengshuang Zhao
title: Point Transformer V2: Grouped Vector Attention and Partition-based Pooling
title_zh: Point Transformer V2：分组向量注意力和基于分区的池化
abstract: As a pioneering work exploring transformer architecture for 3D point cloud understanding, Point Transformer achieves impressive results on multiple highly competitive benchmarks. In this work, we analyze the limitations of the Point Transformer and propose our powerful and efficient Point Transformer V2 model with novel designs that overcome the limitations of previous work. In particular, we first propose group vector attention, which is more effective than the previous version of vector attention. Inheriting the advantages of both learnable weight encoding and multi-head attention, we present a highly effective implementation of grouped vector attention with a novel grouped weight encoding layer. We also strengthen the position information for attention by an additional position encoding multiplier. Furthermore, we design novel and lightweight partition-based pooling methods which enable better spatial alignment and more efficient sampling. Extensive experiments show that our model achieves better performance than its predecessor and achieves state-of-the-art on several challenging 3D point cloud understanding benchmarks, including 3D point cloud segmentation on ScanNet v2 and S3DIS and 3D point cloud classification on ModelNet40. Our code will be available at https://github.com/Gofinge/PointTransformerV2.
summary: As a pioneering work exploring transformer architecture for 3D point cloud understanding, Point Transformer achieves impressive results on multiple highly competitive benchmarks. In this work, we analyze the limitations of the Point Transformer and propose our powerful and efficient Point Transformer V2 model with novel designs that overcome the limitations of previous work. In particular, we first propose group vector attention, which is more effective than the previous version of vector attention. Inheriting the advantages of both learnable weight encoding and multi-head attention, we present a highly effective implementation of grouped vector attention with a novel grouped weight encoding layer. We also strengthen the position information for attention by an additional position encoding multiplier. Furthermore, we design novel and lightweight partition-based pooling methods which enable better spatial alignment and more efficient sampling. Extensive experiments show that our model achieves better performance than its predecessor and achieves state-of-the-art on several challenging 3D point cloud understanding benchmarks, including 3D point cloud segmentation on ScanNet v2 and S3DIS and 3D point cloud classification on ModelNet40. Our code will be available at https://github.com/Gofinge/PointTransformerV2.
abstract_zh: 作为探索 3D 点云理解的 Transformer 架构的开创性工作，Point Transformer 在多个竞争激烈的基准测试中取得了令人印象深刻的结果。在这项工作中，我们分析了 Point Transformer 的局限性，并提出了强大而高效的 Point Transformer V2 模型，其新颖的设计克服了先前工作的局限性。特别是，我们首先提出了组向量注意力，这比之前版本的向量注意力更有效。继承了可学习权重编码和多头注意力的优点，我们通过新颖的分组权重编码层提出了分组向量注意力的高效实现。我们还通过额外的位置编码乘数来加强位置信息以引起注意。此外，我们设计了新颖且轻量级的基于分区的池方法，可以实现更好的空间对齐和更有效的采样。大量实验表明，我们的模型比其前身实现了更好的性能，并在几个具有挑战性的 3D 点云理解基准上实现了最先进的水平，包括 ScanNet v2 和 S3DIS 上的 3D 点云分割以及 ModelNet40 上的 3D 点云分类。我们的代码将在 https://github.com/Gofinge/PointTransformerV2 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的Point Transformer V2模型，用于提升3D点云理解任务的性能。
AI.motivation: Point Transformer在3D点云理解任务中表现出色，但其存在一些局限性，例如注意力机制效率不高、位置信息表达不够充分等。本文旨在通过改进设计克服这些局限，提升模型性能。
AI.method: 本文提出了组向量注意力机制和基于分区的池化方法。组向量注意力结合了可学习权重编码和多头注意力的优势，并引入了位置编码乘数以增强位置信息。此外，基于分区的池化方法实现了更高效的采样和空间对齐。
AI.result: 实验表明，Point Transformer V2在多个3D点云理解基准测试中表现优于其前身，包括ScanNet v2和S3DIS的点云分割以及ModelNet40的点云分类任务，达到了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: Point Transformer V2通过创新的组向量注意力和分区池化设计，有效提升了3D点云理解任务的性能，为后续研究提供了新的思路和方法。

Inheriting the advantages of both learnable weight encoding and multi-head attention, we present a highly effective implementation of grouped vector attention with a novel grouped weight encoding layer. Extensive experiments show that our model achieves better performance than its predecessor and achieves state-of-the-art on several challenging 3D point cloud understanding benchmarks, including 3D point cloud segmentation on ScanNet v2 and S3DIS and 3D point cloud classification on ModelNet40. authors_text: Yue Jiang,Marc Habermann,Vladislav Golyanik,Christian Theobalt
title: HiFECap: Monocular High-Fidelity and Expressive Capture of Human Performances
title_zh: HiFECap：单目高保真、富有表现力的人类表演捕捉
abstract: Monocular 3D human performance capture is indispensable for many applications in computer graphics and vision for enabling immersive experiences. However, detailed capture of humans requires tracking of multiple aspects, including the skeletal pose, the dynamic surface, which includes clothing, hand gestures as well as facial expressions. No existing monocular method allows joint tracking of all these components. To this end, we propose HiFECap, a new neural human performance capture approach, which simultaneously captures human pose, clothing, facial expression, and hands just from a single RGB video. We demonstrate that our proposed network architecture, the carefully designed training strategy, and the tight integration of parametric face and hand models to a template mesh enable the capture of all these individual aspects. Importantly, our method also captures high-frequency details, such as deforming wrinkles on the clothes, better than the previous works. Furthermore, we show that HiFECap outperforms the state-of-the-art human performance capture approaches qualitatively and quantitatively while for the first time capturing all aspects of the human.
summary: Monocular 3D human performance capture is indispensable for many applications in computer graphics and vision for enabling immersive experiences. However, detailed capture of humans requires tracking of multiple aspects, including the skeletal pose, the dynamic surface, which includes clothing, hand gestures as well as facial expressions. No existing monocular method allows joint tracking of all these components. To this end, we propose HiFECap, a new neural human performance capture approach, which simultaneously captures human pose, clothing, facial expression, and hands just from a single RGB video. We demonstrate that our proposed network architecture, the carefully designed training strategy, and the tight integration of parametric face and hand models to a template mesh enable the capture of all these individual aspects. Importantly, our method also captures high-frequency details, such as deforming wrinkles on the clothes, better than the previous works. Furthermore, we show that HiFECap outperforms the state-of-the-art human performance capture approaches qualitatively and quantitatively while for the first time capturing all aspects of the human.
abstract_zh: 单目 3D 人体表演捕捉对于计算机图形和视觉领域的许多应用来说是必不可少的，以实现身临其境的体验。然而，对人体的详细捕捉需要跟踪多个方面，包括骨骼姿势、动态表面（包括服装、手势以及面部表情）。现有的单目方法还没有允许联合跟踪所有这些组件。为此，我们提出了 HiFECap，一种新的神经人类表演捕捉方法，它仅从单个 RGB 视频中同时捕捉人类姿势、服装、面部表情和手。我们证明了我们提出的网络架构、精心设计的训练策略以及参数化面部和手模型与模板网格的紧密集成，使得能够捕获所有这些单独的方面。重要的是，我们的方法还比以前的作品更好地捕捉高频细节，例如衣服上的变形皱纹。此外，我们还表明 HiFECap 在定性和定量上都优于最先进的人类表现捕获方法，同时首次捕获了人类的所有方面。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于单目RGB视频的高保真人体表演捕捉方法，同时追踪骨骼姿态、服装动态、面部表情及手势。
AI.motivation: 现有单目方法无法同时追踪人体骨骼姿态、服装动态、面部表情及手势，需整合参数化模型与训练策略实现多组件联合捕捉。
AI.method: 设计融合参数化面部及手部模型的神经网络架构，结合定制训练策略与模板网格整合，实现多模态细节捕捉。
AI.result: HiFECap在定性和定量指标上超越现有方法，首次实现人体姿态、服装、面部表情及手势的同步高精度捕捉。
AI.conclusion: HiFECap验证了单目多模态人体捕捉的可行性，为高保真虚拟角色生成与动画制作提供新方案。

authors_text: Nur Muhammad Mahi Shafiullah,Chris Paxton,Lerrel Pinto,Soumith Chintala,Arthur Szlam
title: CLIP-Fields: Weakly Supervised Semantic Fields for Robotic Memory
title_zh: CLIP-Fields：机器人记忆的弱监督语义场
comment: Code, video, and interactive demonstrations available at https://mahis.life/clip-fields. Accepted for publication at Robotics: Science and Systems 2023 in Daegu, Korea
comments: Code, video, and interactive demonstrations available at https://mahis.life/clip-fields. Accepted for publication at Robotics: Science and Systems 2023 in Daegu, Korea
abstract: We propose CLIP-Fields, an implicit scene model that can be used for a variety of tasks, such as segmentation, instance identification, semantic search over space, and view localization. CLIP-Fields learns a mapping from spatial locations to semantic embedding vectors. Importantly, we show that this mapping can be trained with supervision coming only from web-image and web-text trained models such as CLIP, Detic, and Sentence-BERT; and thus uses no direct human supervision. When compared to baselines like Mask-RCNN, our method outperforms on few-shot instance identification or semantic segmentation on the HM3D dataset with only a fraction of the examples. Finally, we show that using CLIP-Fields as a scene memory, robots can perform semantic navigation in real-world environments. Our code and demonstration videos are available here: https://mahis.life/clip-fields
summary: We propose CLIP-Fields, an implicit scene model that can be used for a variety of tasks, such as segmentation, instance identification, semantic search over space, and view localization. CLIP-Fields learns a mapping from spatial locations to semantic embedding vectors. Importantly, we show that this mapping can be trained with supervision coming only from web-image and web-text trained models such as CLIP, Detic, and Sentence-BERT; and thus uses no direct human supervision. When compared to baselines like Mask-RCNN, our method outperforms on few-shot instance identification or semantic segmentation on the HM3D dataset with only a fraction of the examples. Finally, we show that using CLIP-Fields as a scene memory, robots can perform semantic navigation in real-world environments. Our code and demonstration videos are available here: https://mahis.life/clip-fields
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 CLIP-Fields，这是一种隐式场景模型，可用于各种任务，例如分割、实例识别、空间语义搜索和视图定位。 CLIP-Fields 学习从空间位置到语义嵌入向量的映射。重要的是，我们表明，这种映射可以仅通过来自网络图像和网络文本训练模型（例如 CLIP、Detic 和 Sentence-BERT）的监督进行训练；因此不使用直接的人类监督。与 Mask-RCNN 等基线相比，我们的方法在仅使用一小部分示例的 HM3D 数据集上进行少样本实例识别或语义分割方面表现更好。最后，我们展示了使用 CLIP-Fields 作为场景记忆，机器人可以在现实环境中执行语义导航。我们的代码和演示视频可在此处获取：https://mahis.life/clip-fields

AI.tldr: 本文提出CLIP-Fields，一种无需人工标注数据的隐式场景模型，用于机器人记忆中的语义场景建模，支持分割、实例识别、空间搜索等任务。
AI.motivation: 传统场景理解方法依赖大量人工标注数据，而实际机器人应用中获取标注数据成本高昂。本文旨在利用预训练的图文模型（如CLIP）实现弱监督学习，降低对人工标注的依赖。
AI.method: 通过空间位置到语义嵌入向量的映射构建场景模型，利用CLIP、Detic等预训练模型从网络图像和文本中学习语义表示，无需直接人工标注。
AI.result: 在HM3D数据集上，CLIP-Fields在少量样本情况下优于Mask-RCNN等基线方法，并成功应用于真实环境中的机器人语义导航。
AI.conclusion: CLIP-Fields为机器人提供了无需人工标注的场景记忆能力，推动了弱监督语义导航的发展，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: CLIP-Fields: Weakly Supervised Semantic Fields for Robotic Memory CLIP-Fields：机器人记忆的弱监督语义场 We propose CLIP-Fields, an implicit scene model that can be used for a variety of tasks, such as segmentation, instance identification, semantic search over space, and view localization. CLIP-Fields learns a mapping from spatial locations to semantic embedding vectors. Importantly, we show that this mapping can be trained with supervision coming only from web-image and web-text trained models such as CLIP, Detic, and Sentence-BERT; and thus uses no direct human supervision. When compared to baselines like Mask-RCNN, our method outperforms on few-shot instance identification or semantic segmentation on the HM3D dataset with only a fraction of the examples. Finally, we show that using CLIP-Fields as a scene memory, robots can perform semantic navigation in real-world environments. Our code and demonstration videos are available here: https://mahis.life/clip-fields 我们提出了 CLIP-Fields，这是一种隐式场景模型，可用于各种任务，例如分割、实例识别、空间语义搜索和视图定位。 CLIP-Fields 学习从空间位置到语义嵌入向量的映射。重要的是，我们表明，这种映射可以仅通过来自网络图像和网络文本训练模型（例如 CLIP、Detic 和 Sentence-BERT）的监督进行训练；因此不使用直接的人类监督。与 Mask-RCNN 等基线相比，我们的方法在仅使用一小部分示例的 HM3D 数据集上进行少样本实例识别或语义分割方面表现更好。最后，我们展示了使用 CLIP-Fields 作为场景记忆，机器人可以在现实环境中执行语义导航。我们的代码和演示视频可在此处获取：https://mahis.life/clip-fields 本文提出CLIP-Fields，一种无需人工标注数据的隐式场景模型，用于机器人记忆中的语义场景建模，支持分割、实例识别、空间搜索等任务。 Nur Muhammad Mahi Shafiullah,Chris Paxton,Lerrel Pinto,Soumith Chintala,Arthur Szlam cs.RO,cs.CV

authors_text: Peter Kocsis,Peter Súkeník,Guillem Brasó,Matthias Nießner,Laura Leal-Taixé,Ismail Elezi
title: The Unreasonable Effectiveness of Fully-Connected Layers for Low-Data Regimes
title_zh: 全连接层对于低数据机制的不合理有效性
comment: Accepted to NeurIPS 2022, Homepage: https://peter-kocsis.github.io/LowDataGeneralization/ 24 pages, 14 figures, 12 tables
comments: Accepted to NeurIPS 2022, Homepage: https://peter-kocsis.github.io/LowDataGeneralization/ 24 pages, 14 figures, 12 tables
abstract: Convolutional neural networks were the standard for solving many computer vision tasks until recently, when Transformers of MLP-based architectures have started to show competitive performance. These architectures typically have a vast number of weights and need to be trained on massive datasets; hence, they are not suitable for their use in low-data regimes. In this work, we propose a simple yet effective framework to improve generalization from small amounts of data. We augment modern CNNs with fully-connected (FC) layers and show the massive impact this architectural change has in low-data regimes. We further present an online joint knowledge-distillation method to utilize the extra FC layers at train time but avoid them during test time. This allows us to improve the generalization of a CNN-based model without any increase in the number of weights at test time. We perform classification experiments for a large range of network backbones and several standard datasets on supervised learning and active learning. Our experiments significantly outperform the networks without fully-connected layers, reaching a relative improvement of up to $16\%$ validation accuracy in the supervised setting without adding any extra parameters during inference.
summary: Convolutional neural networks were the standard for solving many computer vision tasks until recently, when Transformers of MLP-based architectures have started to show competitive performance. These architectures typically have a vast number of weights and need to be trained on massive datasets; hence, they are not suitable for their use in low-data regimes. In this work, we propose a simple yet effective framework to improve generalization from small amounts of data. We augment modern CNNs with fully-connected (FC) layers and show the massive impact this architectural change has in low-data regimes. We further present an online joint knowledge-distillation method to utilize the extra FC layers at train time but avoid them during test time. This allows us to improve the generalization of a CNN-based model without any increase in the number of weights at test time. We perform classification experiments for a large range of network backbones and several standard datasets on supervised learning and active learning. Our experiments significantly outperform the networks without fully-connected layers, reaching a relative improvement of up to $16\%$ validation accuracy in the supervised setting without adding any extra parameters during inference.
abstract_zh: 直到最近，基于 MLP 架构的 Transformer 才开始展现出具有竞争力的性能，卷积神经网络一直是解决许多计算机视觉任务的标准。这些架构通常具有大量权重，需要在海量数据集上进行训练；因此，它们不适合在低数据情况下使用。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个简单而有效的框架来提高少量数据的泛化能力。我们用全连接 (FC) 层增强了现代 CNN，并展示了这种架构变化对低数据状态的巨大影响。我们进一步提出了一种在线联合知识蒸馏方法，在训练时利用额外的 FC 层，但在测试时避免使用它们。这使我们能够提高基于 CNN 的模型的泛化能力，而无需增加测试时权重的数量。我们对大量网络主干和监督学习和主动学习的几个标准数据集进行了分类实验。我们的实验显着优于没有全连接层的网络，在监督设置中实现了高达 16\%$ 验证精度的相对改进，而无需在推理过程中添加任何额外参数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过向卷积神经网络（CNN）添加全连接层（FC）并结合知识蒸馏方法，提升低数据量场景下的模型泛化能力。
AI.motivation: Transformer和MLP等架构虽性能优异，但依赖大规模数据集，在低数据场景下表现不佳。传统CNN在小数据下泛化能力有限，需改进。
AI.method: 在CNN中增加全连接层，并设计在线联合知识蒸馏方法，在训练时利用FC层提升性能，测试时移除FC层以避免参数增加。
AI.result: 在多个数据集和网络结构上，该方法在监督学习和主动学习中均显著优于无FC层的模型，验证准确率最高提升16%。
AI.conclusion: 添加全连接层结合知识蒸馏能有效提升CNN在低数据场景下的性能，且测试时无额外参数开销。

authors_text: Luigi Procopio,Simone Conia,Edoardo Barba,Roberto Navigli
title: Entity Disambiguation with Entity Definitions
title_zh: 使用实体定义进行实体消歧
abstract: Local models have recently attained astounding performances in Entity Disambiguation (ED), with generative and extractive formulations being the most promising research directions. However, previous works limited their studies to using, as the textual representation of each candidate, only its Wikipedia title. Although certainly effective, this strategy presents a few critical issues, especially when titles are not sufficiently informative or distinguishable from one another. In this paper, we address this limitation and investigate to what extent more expressive textual representations can mitigate it. We thoroughly evaluate our approach against standard benchmarks in ED and find extractive formulations to be particularly well-suited to these representations: we report a new state of the art on 2 out of 6 benchmarks we consider and strongly improve the generalization capability over unseen patterns. We release our code, data and model checkpoints at https://github.com/SapienzaNLP/extend.
summary: Local models have recently attained astounding performances in Entity Disambiguation (ED), with generative and extractive formulations being the most promising research directions. However, previous works limited their studies to using, as the textual representation of each candidate, only its Wikipedia title. Although certainly effective, this strategy presents a few critical issues, especially when titles are not sufficiently informative or distinguishable from one another. In this paper, we address this limitation and investigate to what extent more expressive textual representations can mitigate it. We thoroughly evaluate our approach against standard benchmarks in ED and find extractive formulations to be particularly well-suited to these representations: we report a new state of the art on 2 out of 6 benchmarks we consider and strongly improve the generalization capability over unseen patterns. We release our code, data and model checkpoints at https://github.com/SapienzaNLP/extend.
abstract_zh: 局部模型最近在实体消歧（ED）方面取得了惊人的表现，其中生成式和提取式是最有前途的研究方向。然而，之前的工作将他们的研究限制为仅使用其维基百科标题作为每个候选者的文本表示。尽管肯定有效，但这一策略也带来了一些关键问题，特别是当标题信息不足或彼此无法区分时。在本文中，我们解决了这一限制，并研究了更具表现力的文本表示可以在多大程度上缓解它。我们根据 ED 中的标准基准彻底评估我们的方法，并发现提取公式特别适合这些表示：我们在我们考虑的 6 个基准中的 2 个上报告了最新的技术水平，并极大地提高了对未见模式的泛化能力。我们在 https://github.com/SapienzaNLP/extend 发布了我们的代码、数据和模型检查点。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过更丰富的文本表示（如实体定义）改进实体消歧任务，以解决仅使用维基百科标题作为实体表示的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有实体消歧方法仅依赖实体的维基百科标题进行表示，导致在标题信息不足或相似时性能下降，需探索更有效的文本表示方式。
AI.method: 提出利用实体定义作为补充文本表示，结合生成式和抽取式模型，增强实体的语义区分能力。
AI.result: 在6个基准数据集中，抽取式方法在2个数据集上达到新SOTA，且模型对未见过的模式具有更强的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 实体定义能显著提升实体消歧效果，特别是抽取式模型能更好利用丰富文本表示，未来研究可进一步探索多源信息融合。

motivation: 现有实体消歧方法仅依赖实体的维基百科标题进行表示，导致在标题信息不足或相似时性能下降，需探索更有效的文本表示方式。
method: 提出利用实体定义作为补充文本表示，结合生成式和抽取式模型，增强实体的语义区分能力。
result: 在6个基准数据集中，抽取式方法在2个数据集上达到新SOTA，且模型对未见过的模式具有更强的泛化能力。
conclusion: 实体定义能显著提升实体消歧效果，特别是抽取式模型能更好利用丰富文本表示，未来研究可进一步探索多源信息融合。
search_text: Entity Disambiguation with Entity Definitions 使用实体定义进行实体消歧 Local models have recently attained astounding performances in Entity Disambiguation (ED), with generative and extractive formulations being the most promising research directions. However, previous works limited their studies to using, as the textual representation of each candidate, only its Wikipedia title. Although certainly effective, this strategy presents a few critical issues, especially when titles are not sufficiently informative or distinguishable from one another. In this paper, we address this limitation and investigate to what extent more expressive textual representations can mitigate it. We thoroughly evaluate our approach against standard benchmarks in ED and find extractive formulations to be particularly well-suited to these representations: we report a new state of the art on 2 out of 6 benchmarks we consider and strongly improve the generalization capability over unseen patterns. We release our code, data and model checkpoints at https://github.com/SapienzaNLP/extend. 局部模型最近在实体消歧（ED）方面取得了惊人的表现，其中生成式和提取式是最有前途的研究方向。然而，之前的工作将他们的研究限制为仅使用其维基百科标题作为每个候选者的文本表示。尽管肯定有效，但这一策略也带来了一些关键问题，特别是当标题信息不足或彼此无法区分时。在本文中，我们解决了这一限制，并研究了更具表现力的文本表示可以在多大程度上缓解它。我们根据 ED 中的标准基准彻底评估我们的方法，并发现提取公式特别适合这些表示：我们在我们考虑的 6 个基准中的 2 个上报告了最新的技术水平，并极大地提高了对未见模式的泛化能力。我们在 https://github.com/SapienzaNLP/extend 发布了我们的代码、数据和模型检查点。 本文研究如何通过更丰富的文本表示（如实体定义）改进实体消歧任务，以解决仅使用维基百科标题作为实体表示的局限性。 Luigi Procopio,Simone Conia,Edoardo Barba,Roberto Navigli cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Stirling Scholes,Germán Mora-Martín,Feng Zhu,Istvan Gyongy,Phil Soan,Jonathan Leach
title: Simulating single-photon detector array sensors for depth imaging
title_zh: 模拟用于深度成像的单光子探测器阵列传感器
abstract: Single-Photon Avalanche Detector (SPAD) arrays are a rapidly emerging technology. These multi-pixel sensors have single-photon sensitivities and pico-second temporal resolutions thus they can rapidly generate depth images with millimeter precision. Such sensors are a key enabling technology for future autonomous systems as they provide guidance and situational awareness. However, to fully exploit the capabilities of SPAD array sensors, it is crucial to establish the quality of depth images they are able to generate in a wide range of scenarios. Given a particular optical system and a finite image acquisition time, what is the best-case depth resolution and what are realistic images generated by SPAD arrays? In this work, we establish a robust yet simple numerical procedure that rapidly establishes the fundamental limits to depth imaging with SPAD arrays under real world conditions. Our approach accurately generates realistic depth images in a wide range of scenarios, allowing the performance of an optical depth imaging system to be established without the need for costly and laborious field testing. This procedure has applications in object detection and tracking for autonomous systems and could be easily extended to systems for underwater imaging or for imaging around corners.
summary: Single-Photon Avalanche Detector (SPAD) arrays are a rapidly emerging technology. These multi-pixel sensors have single-photon sensitivities and pico-second temporal resolutions thus they can rapidly generate depth images with millimeter precision. Such sensors are a key enabling technology for future autonomous systems as they provide guidance and situational awareness. In this work, we establish a robust yet simple numerical procedure that rapidly establishes the fundamental limits to depth imaging with SPAD arrays under real world conditions. Our approach accurately generates realistic depth images in a wide range of scenarios, allowing the performance of an optical depth imaging system to be established without the need for costly and laborious field testing. This procedure has applications in object detection and tracking for autonomous systems and could be easily extended to systems for underwater imaging or for imaging around corners.
abstract_zh: 单光子雪崩探测器 (SPAD) 阵列是一项快速新兴的技术。这些多像素传感器具有单光子灵敏度和皮秒时间分辨率，因此可以快速生成毫米级精度的深度图像。此类传感器是未来自主系统的关键支持技术，因为它们提供指导和态势感知。然而，为了充分利用 SPAD 阵列传感器的功能，确定它们能够在各种场景下生成的深度图像的质量至关重要。给定特定的光学系统和有限的图像采集时间，最佳情况的深度分辨率是多少？SPAD 阵列生成的真实图像是什么？在这项工作中，我们建立了一个强大而简单的数值程序，可以快速确定现实条件下 SPAD 阵列深度成像的基本限制。我们的方法可以在各种场景下准确地生成逼真的深度图像，从而无需进行昂贵且费力的现场测试即可确定光学深度成像系统的性能。该过程可应用于自主系统的物体检测和跟踪，并且可以轻松扩展到水下成像或角落成像系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于模拟单光子雪崩二极管（SPAD）阵列传感器深度成像性能的数值方法。
AI.motivation: SPAD阵列传感器在自动驾驶系统中具有重要应用，但需在无需昂贵实地测试的情况下评估其在不同场景下的深度成像性能极限。
AI.method: 建立了一种快速且稳健的数值模拟流程，通过考虑光学系统参数和成像时间，生成符合真实场景的深度图像以评估性能。
AI.result: 该方法能准确预测SPAD阵列在多种场景下的最佳深度分辨率及实际成像效果，为光学深度成像系统性能评估提供有效工具。
AI.conclusion: 该模拟方法可应用于自动驾驶系统的物体检测与追踪，并可扩展至水下或绕角成像等场景，显著降低实验成本。

authors_text: Chris Lu,Jakub Grudzien Kuba,Alistair Letcher,Luke Metz,Christian Schroeder de Witt,Jakob Foerster
title: Discovered Policy Optimisation
title_zh: 发现策略优化
abstract: Tremendous progress has been made in reinforcement learning (RL) over the past decade. Most of these advancements came through the continual development of new algorithms, which were designed using a combination of mathematical derivations, intuitions, and experimentation. Such an approach of creating algorithms manually is limited by human understanding and ingenuity. In contrast, meta-learning provides a toolkit for automatic machine learning method optimisation, potentially addressing this flaw. However, black-box approaches which attempt to discover RL algorithms with minimal prior structure have thus far not outperformed existing hand-crafted algorithms. Mirror Learning, which includes RL algorithms, such as PPO, offers a potential middle-ground starting point: while every method in this framework comes with theoretical guarantees, components that differentiate them are subject to design. In this paper we explore the Mirror Learning space by meta-learning a "drift" function. We refer to the immediate result as Learnt Policy Optimisation (LPO). By analysing LPO we gain original insights into policy optimisation which we use to formulate a novel, closed-form RL algorithm, Discovered Policy Optimisation (DPO). Our experiments in Brax environments confirm state-of-the-art performance of LPO and DPO, as well as their transfer to unseen settings.
summary: Tremendous progress has been made in reinforcement learning (RL) over the past decade. Most of these advancements came through the continual development of new algorithms, which were designed using a combination of mathematical derivations, intuitions, and experimentation. Such an approach of creating algorithms manually is limited by human understanding and ingenuity. In contrast, meta-learning provides a toolkit for automatic machine learning method optimisation, potentially addressing this flaw. However, black-box approaches which attempt to discover RL algorithms with minimal prior structure have thus far not outperformed existing hand-crafted algorithms. Mirror Learning, which includes RL algorithms, such as PPO, offers a potential middle-ground starting point: while every method in this framework comes with theoretical guarantees, components that differentiate them are subject to design. In this paper we explore the Mirror Learning space by meta-learning a "drift" function. We refer to the immediate result as Learnt Policy Optimisation (LPO). By analysing LPO we gain original insights into policy optimisation which we use to formulate a novel, closed-form RL algorithm, Discovered Policy Optimisation (DPO). Our experiments in Brax environments confirm state-of-the-art performance of LPO and DPO, as well as their transfer to unseen settings.
abstract_zh: 过去十年，强化学习（RL）取得了巨大进展。这些进步大部分来自新算法的不断开发，这些算法是结合数学推导、直觉和实验而设计的。这种手动创建算法的方法受到人类理解和聪明才智的限制。相比之下，元学习提供了一个用于自动机器学习方法优化的工具包，有可能解决这个缺陷。然而，试图发现具有最小先验结构的强化学习算法的黑盒方法迄今为止尚未优于现有的手工算法。镜像学习（包括 PPO 等 RL 算法）提供了一个潜在的中间起点：虽然该框架中的每种方法都有理论保证，但区分它们的组件却需要设计。在本文中，我们通过元学习“漂移”函数来探索镜像学习空间。我们将直接结果称为学习策略优化 (LPO)。通过分析 LPO，我们获得了对策略优化的独到见解，我们用它来制定一种新颖的封闭式 RL 算法，即发现策略优化 (DPO)。我们在 Brax 环境中进行的实验证实了 LPO 和 DPO 的最先进性能，以及它们向不可见设置的转移。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过元学习在镜像学习框架中自动优化策略，开发出LPO和DPO两种新型强化学习算法。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习算法依赖人工设计，受限于人类理解能力，而黑箱方法未能超越手工算法。镜像学习框架提供理论保证但仍有设计空间，需探索自动化优化途径。
AI.method: 在镜像学习空间中元学习'漂移'函数生成LPO，进而分析LPO特性推导出闭式算法DPO。
AI.result: 在Brax环境中，LPO和DPO均达到最先进水平，并展现出对未见场景的迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: 元学习与镜像学习结合可有效自动优化策略，DPO验证了该方法的可行性，为算法设计提供新范式。
