authors_text: Yang Ye,Xiulong Yang,Shihao Ji
title: APSNet: Attention Based Point Cloud Sampling
title_zh: APSNet：基于注意力的点云采样
comment: Published as a conference paper in BMVC 2022
comments: Published as a conference paper in BMVC 2022
abstract: Processing large point clouds is a challenging task. Therefore, the data is often downsampled to a smaller size such that it can be stored, transmitted and processed more efficiently without incurring significant performance degradation. Traditional task-agnostic sampling methods, such as farthest point sampling (FPS), do not consider downstream tasks when sampling point clouds, and thus non-informative points to the tasks are often sampled. This paper explores a task-oriented sampling for 3D point clouds, and aims to sample a subset of points that are tailored specifically to a downstream task of interest. Similar to FPS, we assume that point to be sampled next should depend heavily on the points that have already been sampled. We thus formulate point cloud sampling as a sequential generation process, and develop an attention-based point cloud sampling network (APSNet) to tackle this problem. At each time step, APSNet attends to all the points in a cloud by utilizing the history of previously sampled points, and samples the most informative one. Both supervised learning and knowledge distillation-based self-supervised learning of APSNet are proposed. Moreover, joint training of APSNet over multiple sample sizes is investigated, leading to a single APSNet that can generate arbitrary length of samples with prominent performances. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superior performance of APSNet against state-of-the-arts in various downstream tasks, including 3D point cloud classification, reconstruction, and registration.
summary: Processing large point clouds is a challenging task. Therefore, the data is often downsampled to a smaller size such that it can be stored, transmitted and processed more efficiently without incurring significant performance degradation. Traditional task-agnostic sampling methods, such as farthest point sampling (FPS), do not consider downstream tasks when sampling point clouds, and thus non-informative points to the tasks are often sampled. This paper explores a task-oriented sampling for 3D point clouds, and aims to sample a subset of points that are tailored specifically to a downstream task of interest. Similar to FPS, we assume that point to be sampled next should depend heavily on the points that have already been sampled. We thus formulate point cloud sampling as a sequential generation process, and develop an attention-based point cloud sampling network (APSNet) to tackle this problem. At each time step, APSNet attends to all the points in a cloud by utilizing the history of previously sampled points, and samples the most informative one. Both supervised learning and knowledge distillation-based self-supervised learning of APSNet are proposed. Moreover, joint training of APSNet over multiple sample sizes is investigated, leading to a single APSNet that can generate arbitrary length of samples with prominent performances. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superior performance of APSNet against state-of-the-arts in various downstream tasks, including 3D point cloud classification, reconstruction, and registration.
abstract_zh: 处理大型点云是一项具有挑战性的任务。因此，数据通常被下采样到较小的大小，以便可以更有效地存储、传输和处理数据，而不会导致性能显着下降。传统的与任务无关的采样方法，例如最远点采样（FPS），在对点云进行采样时不考虑下游任务，因此经常采样与任务无关的点。本文探讨了 3D 点云的面向任务的采样，旨在对专门针对感兴趣的下游任务定制的点子集进行采样。与 FPS 类似，我们假设接下来要采样的点应该很大程度上取决于已经采样的点。因此，我们将点云采样制定为顺序生成过程，并开发基于注意力的点云采样网络（APSNet）来解决这个问题。在每个时间步，APSNet 通过利用先前采样点的历史记录来关注云中的所有点，并采样信息最丰富的点。提出了APSNet的监督学习和基于知识蒸馏的自监督学习。此外，研究了 APSNet 在多个样本大小上的联合训练，导致单个 APSNet 可以生成具有突出性能的任意长度的样本。大量实验证明了 APSNet 在各种下游任务（包括 3D 点云分类、重建和配准）中相对于最先进的技术具有优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于注意力机制的点云采样方法APSNet，旨在根据下游任务需求生成更具信息量的点云子集。
AI.motivation: 传统点云采样方法如最远点采样（FPS）忽视下游任务特性，导致采样结果包含大量对任务无用的信息点，影响后续处理性能。
AI.method: 将点云采样建模为序列生成过程，设计注意力网络APSNet。通过利用已采样点的历史信息，动态计算所有点的重要性并选择最具信息量的点。提出监督学习与知识蒸馏自监督学习方案，并通过多尺度联合训练实现任意长度样本生成。
AI.result: 在点云分类、重建和配准等下游任务中，APSNet相较现有方法取得显著性能提升，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: APSNet通过任务导向的注意力机制实现了高效点云采样，在保持计算效率的同时显著提升了下游任务性能，具有广泛适用性。

authors_text: Claudio Ravasio,Lyndon Da Cruz,Christos Bergeles
title: Oflib: Facilitating Operations with and on Optical Flow Fields in Python
title_zh: Oflib：促进 Python 中光流场的操作
comment: "What is Motion for?" - ECCV 2022 Workshop Submission
comments: "What is Motion for?" - ECCV 2022 Workshop Submission
abstract: We present a robust theoretical framework for the characterisation and manipulation of optical flow, i.e 2D vector fields, in the context of their use in motion estimation algorithms and beyond. The definition of two frames of reference guides the mathematical derivation of flow field application, inversion, evaluation, and composition operations. This structured approach is then used as the foundation for an implementation in Python 3, with the fully differentiable PyTorch version oflibpytorch supporting back-propagation as required for deep learning. We verify the flow composition method empirically and provide a working example for its application to optical flow ground truth in synthetic training data creation. All code is publicly available.
summary: We present a robust theoretical framework for the characterisation and manipulation of optical flow, i.e 2D vector fields, in the context of their use in motion estimation algorithms and beyond. The definition of two frames of reference guides the mathematical derivation of flow field application, inversion, evaluation, and composition operations. This structured approach is then used as the foundation for an implementation in Python 3, with the fully differentiable PyTorch version oflibpytorch supporting back-propagation as required for deep learning. We verify the flow composition method empirically and provide a working example for its application to optical flow ground truth in synthetic training data creation. All code is publicly available.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个强大的理论框架，用于光流（即二维矢量场）的表征和操纵，在运动估计算法及其他领域的使用。两个参考系的定义指导流场应用、反演、评估和合成运算的数学推导。这种结构化方法随后被用作 Python 3 实现的基础，完全可微分的 PyTorch 版本的 libpytorch 支持深度学习所需的反向传播。我们凭经验验证了流合成方法，并为其在合成训练数据创建中的光流地面实况应用提供了一个工作示例。所有代码都是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为oflib的Python库，用于实现光学流场的数学操作，包括应用、逆变换、评估和组合，并提供PyTorch可微分版本支持深度学习。
AI.motivation: 现有光学流处理方法缺乏系统化的理论框架和高效的工具支持，尤其在深度学习中需要可微分操作以实现反向传播优化。
AI.method: 通过定义两个参考系构建数学推导框架，实现流场操作的Python库，并基于PyTorch开发可微分版本以支持深度学习训练。
AI.result: 实验验证了流场组合方法的有效性，并展示了其在合成训练数据生成中的应用案例，所有代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为光学流处理提供了系统化工具，可微分实现增强了其在深度学习中的适用性，开源代码便于社区使用与扩展。

authors_text: Sebastian Perez-Salazar,Mohit Singh,Alejandro Toriello
title: The IID Prophet Inequality with Limited Flexibility
title_zh: 灵活性有限的 IID 先知不等式
abstract: In online sales, sellers usually offer each potential buyer a posted price in a take-it-or-leave fashion. Buyers can sometimes see posted prices faced by other buyers, and changing the price frequently could be considered unfair. The literature on posted price mechanisms and prophet inequality problems has studied the two extremes of pricing policies, the fixed price policy and fully dynamic pricing. The former is suboptimal in revenue but is perceived as fairer than the latter. This work examines the middle situation, where there are at most $k$ distinct prices over the selling horizon. Using the framework of prophet inequalities with independent and identically distributed random variables, we propose a new prophet inequality for strategies that use at most $k$ thresholds. We present asymptotic results in $k$ and results for small values of $k$. For $k=2$ prices, we show an improvement of at least $11\%$ over the best fixed-price solution. Moreover, $k=5$ prices suffice to guarantee almost $99\%$ of the approximation factor obtained by a fully dynamic policy that uses an arbitrary number of prices. From a technical standpoint, we use an infinite-dimensional linear program in our analysis; this formulation could be of independent interest to other online selection problems.
summary: In online sales, sellers usually offer each potential buyer a posted price in a take-it-or-leave fashion. Buyers can sometimes see posted prices faced by other buyers, and changing the price frequently could be considered unfair. The literature on posted price mechanisms and prophet inequality problems has studied the two extremes of pricing policies, the fixed price policy and fully dynamic pricing. The former is suboptimal in revenue but is perceived as fairer than the latter. This work examines the middle situation, where there are at most $k$ distinct prices over the selling horizon. Using the framework of prophet inequalities with independent and identically distributed random variables, we propose a new prophet inequality for strategies that use at most $k$ thresholds. We present asymptotic results in $k$ and results for small values of $k$. For $k=2$ prices, we show an improvement of at least $11\%$ over the best fixed-price solution. Moreover, $k=5$ prices suffice to guarantee almost $99\%$ of the approximation factor obtained by a fully dynamic policy that uses an arbitrary number of prices. From a technical standpoint, we use an infinite-dimensional linear program in our analysis; this formulation could be of independent interest to other online selection problems.
abstract_zh: 在网上销售中，卖家通常以“接受或离开”的方式向每个潜在买家提供标价。买家有时可以看到其他买家面临的公布价格，频繁更改价格可能被认为是不公平的。关于公布价格机制和先知不平等问题的文献研究了定价政策的两个极端，即固定价格政策和完全动态定价。前者的收入并不理想，但被认为比后者更公平。这项工作研究了中间情况，其中在销售范围内最多有 $k$ 的不同价格。使用具有独立同分布随机变量的预言不等式框架，我们为最多使用 $k$ 阈值的策略提出了一种新的预言不等式。我们给出 $k$ 的渐近结果和 $k$ 小值的结果。对于 $k=2$ 价格，我们显示比最佳固定价格解决方案至少提高了 $11\%$。此外，$k=5$ 价格足以保证通过使用任意数量价格的完全动态策略获得近 $99\%$ 的近似因子。从技术角度来看，我们在分析中使用无限维线性程序；这个公式可能与其他在线选择问题有独立的关系。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在线销售中有限价格调整策略下的先知不等式问题，提出了一种允许最多使用k个价格阈值的新策略框架。
AI.motivation: 固定价格策略虽公平但收益低，完全动态定价虽收益高但被认为不公平，需在两者间寻找平衡点。
AI.method: 基于独立同分布随机变量的先知不等式框架，构建无限维线性规划模型分析有限阈值策略。
AI.result: 当k=2时收益提升至少11%，k=5时可达到完全动态策略99%的近似效果。
AI.conclusion: 有限价格调整策略能在公平性与收益间取得良好平衡，所用无限维线性规划方法对其他在线选择问题具有参考价值。

tldr: 本文研究了在线销售中有限价格调整策略下的先知不等式问题，提出了一种允许最多使用k个价格阈值的新策略框架。

conclusion: 有限价格调整策略能在公平性与收益间取得良好平衡，所用无限维线性规划方法对其他在线选择问题具有参考价值。
search_text: The IID Prophet Inequality with Limited Flexibility 灵活性有限的 IID 先知不等式 In online sales, sellers usually offer each potential buyer a posted price in a take-it-or-leave fashion. Buyers can sometimes see posted prices faced by other buyers, and changing the price frequently could be considered unfair. The literature on posted price mechanisms and prophet inequality problems has studied the two extremes of pricing policies, the fixed price policy and fully dynamic pricing. The former is suboptimal in revenue but is perceived as fairer than the latter. This work examines the middle situation, where there are at most $k$ distinct prices over the selling horizon. Using the framework of prophet inequalities with independent and identically distributed random variables, we propose a new prophet inequality for strategies that use at most $k$ thresholds. We present asymptotic results in $k$ and results for small values of $k$. For $k=2$ prices, we show an improvement of at least $11\%$ over the best fixed-price solution. Moreover, $k=5$ prices suffice to guarantee almost $99\%$ of the approximation factor obtained by a fully dynamic policy that uses an arbitrary number of prices. From a technical standpoint, we use an infinite-dimensional linear program in our analysis; this formulation could be of independent interest to other online selection problems. 在网上销售中，卖家通常以“接受或离开”的方式向每个潜在买家提供标价。买家有时可以看到其他买家面临的公布价格，频繁更改价格可能被认为是不公平的。关于公布价格机制和先知不平等问题的文献研究了定价政策的两个极端，即固定价格政策和完全动态定价。前者的收入并不理想，但被认为比后者更公平。这项工作研究了中间情况，其中在销售范围内最多有 $k$ 的不同价格。使用具有独立同分布随机变量的预言不等式框架，我们为最多使用 $k$ 阈值的策略提出了一种新的预言不等式。我们给出 $k$ 的渐近结果和 $k$ 小值的结果。对于 $k=2$ 价格，我们显示比最佳固定价格解决方案至少提高了 $11\%$。此外，$k=5$ 价格足以保证通过使用任意数量价格的完全动态策略获得近 $99\%$ 的近似因子。从技术角度来看，我们在分析中使用无限维线性程序；这个公式可能与其他在线选择问题有独立的关系。 本文研究了在线销售中有限价格调整策略下的先知不等式问题，提出了一种允许最多使用k个价格阈值的新策略框架。 Sebastian Perez-Salazar,Mohit Singh,Alejandro Toriello cs.GT,cs.DS,math.OC

authors_text: Karmesh Yadav,Ram Ramrakhya,Santhosh Kumar Ramakrishnan,Theo Gervet,John Turner,Aaron Gokaslan,Noah Maestre,Angel Xuan Chang,Dhruv Batra,Manolis Savva,Alexander William Clegg,Devendra Singh Chaplot
title: Habitat-Matterport 3D Semantics Dataset
title_zh: Habitat-Matterport 3D 语义数据集
abstract: We present the Habitat-Matterport 3D Semantics (HM3DSEM) dataset. HM3DSEM is the largest dataset of 3D real-world spaces with densely annotated semantics that is currently available to the academic community. It consists of 142,646 object instance annotations across 216 3D spaces and 3,100 rooms within those spaces. The scale, quality, and diversity of object annotations far exceed those of prior datasets. A key difference setting apart HM3DSEM from other datasets is the use of texture information to annotate pixel-accurate object boundaries. We demonstrate the effectiveness of HM3DSEM dataset for the Object Goal Navigation task using different methods. Policies trained using HM3DSEM perform outperform those trained on prior datasets. Introduction of HM3DSEM in the Habitat ObjectNav Challenge lead to an increase in participation from 400 submissions in 2021 to 1022 submissions in 2022.
summary: We present the Habitat-Matterport 3D Semantics (HM3DSEM) dataset. HM3DSEM is the largest dataset of 3D real-world spaces with densely annotated semantics that is currently available to the academic community. It consists of 142,646 object instance annotations across 216 3D spaces and 3,100 rooms within those spaces. The scale, quality, and diversity of object annotations far exceed those of prior datasets. A key difference setting apart HM3DSEM from other datasets is the use of texture information to annotate pixel-accurate object boundaries. We demonstrate the effectiveness of HM3DSEM dataset for the Object Goal Navigation task using different methods. Policies trained using HM3DSEM perform outperform those trained on prior datasets. Introduction of HM3DSEM in the Habitat ObjectNav Challenge lead to an increase in participation from 400 submissions in 2021 to 1022 submissions in 2022.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 Habitat-Matterport 3D Semantics (HM3DSEM) 数据集。 HM3DSEM 是目前学术界可用的最大的 3D 现实世界空间数据集，具有密集注释的语义。它由 216 个 3D 空间和这些空间内的 3,100 个房间的 142,646 个对象实例注释组成。对象注释的规模、质量和多样性远远超过以前的数据集。 HM3DSEM 与其他数据集的一个关键区别是使用纹理信息来注释像素精确的对象边界。我们使用不同的方法演示了 HM3DSEM 数据集对于对象目标导航任务的有效性。使用 HM3DSEM 训练的策略的性能优于在先前数据集上训练的策略。 Habitat ObjectNav 挑战赛中引入 HM3DSEM 后，参赛人数从 2021 年的 400 份参赛作品增加到 2022 年的 1022 份参赛作品。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Habitat-Matterport 3D语义（HM3DSEM）数据集，这是目前学术界可用的最大规模、高精度的3D真实世界空间语义标注数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有3D空间语义数据集在标注规模、质量和多样性上存在不足，且缺乏基于纹理信息的像素级物体边界标注，难以满足复杂导航任务的需求。
AI.method: 通过采集216个3D空间及3100个房间的纹理信息，采用像素级标注技术生成142,646个物体实例标注，构建大规模高精度语义数据集，并在目标导航任务中验证其有效性。
AI.result: 使用HM3DSEM训练的导航策略性能优于先前数据集，且该数据集的引入使Habitat目标导航挑战赛的参赛提交量从2021年的400份增至2022年的1022份。
AI.conclusion: HM3DSEM通过其规模、标注精度和多样性显著推动了3D空间理解与导航算法的研究，成为该领域的重要基准数据集。

authors_text: Abdulrahman Kerim,Felipe Chamone,Washington Ramos,Leandro Soriano Marcolino,Erickson R. Nascimento,Richard Jiang
title: Semantic Segmentation under Adverse Conditions: A Weather and Nighttime-aware Synthetic Data-based Approach
title_zh: 不利条件下的语义分割：一种天气和夜间感知的基于合成数据的方法
comment: This paper is accepted by BMVC 2022
comments: This paper is accepted by BMVC 2022
abstract: Recent semantic segmentation models perform well under standard weather conditions and sufficient illumination but struggle with adverse weather conditions and nighttime. Collecting and annotating training data under these conditions is expensive, time-consuming, error-prone, and not always practical. Usually, synthetic data is used as a feasible data source to increase the amount of training data. However, just directly using synthetic data may actually harm the model's performance under normal weather conditions while getting only small gains in adverse situations. Therefore, we present a novel architecture specifically designed for using synthetic training data for domain adaptation. We propose a simple yet powerful addition to DeepLabV3+ by using weather and time-of-the-day supervisors trained with multi-task learning, making it both weather and nighttime aware, which improves its mIoU accuracy by $14$ percentage points on the ACDC dataset while maintaining a score of $75\%$ mIoU on the Cityscapes dataset. Our code is available at https://github.com/lsmcolab/Semantic-Segmentation-under-Adverse-Conditions.
summary: Recent semantic segmentation models perform well under standard weather conditions and sufficient illumination but struggle with adverse weather conditions and nighttime. Collecting and annotating training data under these conditions is expensive, time-consuming, error-prone, and not always practical. Usually, synthetic data is used as a feasible data source to increase the amount of training data. However, just directly using synthetic data may actually harm the model's performance under normal weather conditions while getting only small gains in adverse situations. Therefore, we present a novel architecture specifically designed for using synthetic training data for domain adaptation. We propose a simple yet powerful addition to DeepLabV3+ by using weather and time-of-the-day supervisors trained with multi-task learning, making it both weather and nighttime aware, which improves its mIoU accuracy by $14$ percentage points on the ACDC dataset while maintaining a score of $75\%$ mIoU on the Cityscapes dataset. Our code is available at https://github.com/lsmcolab/Semantic-Segmentation-under-Adverse-Conditions.
abstract_zh: 最近的语义分割模型在标准天气条件和充足的照明下表现良好，但在恶劣的天气条件和夜间却表现不佳。在这些条件下收集和注释训练数据非常昂贵、耗时、容易出错，而且并不总是实用。通常，合成数据被用作可行的数据源来增加训练数据量。然而，直接使用合成数据实际上可能会损害模型在正常天气条件下的性能，而在不利情况下只能获得很小的收益。因此，我们提出了一种专门为使用合成训练数据进行领域适应而设计的新颖架构。我们提出了一个简单而强大的 DeepLabV3+ 附加功能，使用经过多任务学习训练的天气和时间监控器，使其能够感知天气和夜间，这将 ACDC 数据集上的 mIoU 准确度提高了 14% 个百分点，同时在 Cityscapes 数据集上保持了 75\%$ mIoU 的分数。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/lsmcolab/Semantic-Segmentation-under-Adverse-Conditions。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于合成数据的语义分割方法，专门应对恶劣天气和夜间场景的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有语义分割模型在恶劣天气和夜间表现不佳，而真实数据采集成本高且合成数据直接使用可能损害正常条件下的性能。
AI.method: 改进DeepLabV3+架构，引入天气和时间监督器，通过多任务学习实现对天气和夜间条件的感知。
AI.result: 在ACDC数据集上mIoU提升14个百分点，同时保持Cityscapes数据集75%的mIoU性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效利用合成数据提升恶劣条件下的分割性能，同时兼顾正常场景的稳定性。

authors_text: Jiapeng Tang,Lev Markhasin,Bi Wang,Justus Thies,Matthias Nießner
title: Neural Shape Deformation Priors
title_zh: 神经形状变形先验
abstract: We present Neural Shape Deformation Priors, a novel method for shape manipulation that predicts mesh deformations of non-rigid objects from user-provided handle movements. State-of-the-art methods cast this problem as an optimization task, where the input source mesh is iteratively deformed to minimize an objective function according to hand-crafted regularizers such as ARAP. In this work, we learn the deformation behavior based on the underlying geometric properties of a shape, while leveraging a large-scale dataset containing a diverse set of non-rigid deformations. Specifically, given a source mesh and desired target locations of handles that describe the partial surface deformation, we predict a continuous deformation field that is defined in 3D space to describe the space deformation. To this end, we introduce transformer-based deformation networks that represent a shape deformation as a composition of local surface deformations. It learns a set of local latent codes anchored in 3D space, from which we can learn a set of continuous deformation functions for local surfaces. Our method can be applied to challenging deformations and generalizes well to unseen deformations. We validate our approach in experiments using the DeformingThing4D dataset, and compare to both classic optimization-based and recent neural network-based methods.
summary: We present Neural Shape Deformation Priors, a novel method for shape manipulation that predicts mesh deformations of non-rigid objects from user-provided handle movements. State-of-the-art methods cast this problem as an optimization task, where the input source mesh is iteratively deformed to minimize an objective function according to hand-crafted regularizers such as ARAP. In this work, we learn the deformation behavior based on the underlying geometric properties of a shape, while leveraging a large-scale dataset containing a diverse set of non-rigid deformations. Specifically, given a source mesh and desired target locations of handles that describe the partial surface deformation, we predict a continuous deformation field that is defined in 3D space to describe the space deformation. To this end, we introduce transformer-based deformation networks that represent a shape deformation as a composition of local surface deformations. It learns a set of local latent codes anchored in 3D space, from which we can learn a set of continuous deformation functions for local surfaces. Our method can be applied to challenging deformations and generalizes well to unseen deformations. We validate our approach in experiments using the DeformingThing4D dataset, and compare to both classic optimization-based and recent neural network-based methods.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了神经形状变形先验，这是一种用于形状操纵的新颖方法，可以根据用户提供的手柄运动来预测非刚性对象的网格变形。最先进的方法将此问题视为优化任务，其中输入源网格迭代变形，以根据手工制作的正则化器（例如 ARAP）最小化目标函数。在这项工作中，我们根据形状的基础几何属性学习变形行为，同时利用包含各种非刚性变形的大规模数据集。具体来说，给定源网格和描述部分表面变形的手柄的所需目标位置，我们预测在 3D 空间中定义的连续变形场来描述空间变形。为此，我们引入基于变压器的变形网络，将形状变形表示为局部表面变形的组合。它学习一组锚定在 3D 空间中的局部潜在代码，从中我们可以学习一组局部表面的连续变形函数。我们的方法可以应用于具有挑战性的变形，并且可以很好地推广到看不见的变形。我们使用 DeformingThing4D 数据集在实验中验证了我们的方法，并与经典的基于优化的方法和最新的基于神经网络的方法进行了比较。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于神经网络的形状变形方法，通过用户提供的控制点移动预测非刚性物体的网格变形。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖手工设计的正则化器（如ARAP）进行优化，难以灵活处理复杂变形。本文旨在通过学习形状的几何属性及大规模变形数据，提升变形预测的泛化能力。
AI.method: 引入基于Transformer的变形网络，通过学习三维空间中的局部潜在代码，生成连续变形函数，将形状变形分解为局部表面变形的组合。
AI.result: 在DeformingThing4D数据集上验证，方法在复杂变形和未见变形场景中表现优于经典优化方法和最新神经网络方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过几何属性学习和大规模数据集训练，本文方法有效提升了形状变形预测的准确性与泛化能力，适用于复杂变形场景。

search_text: Neural Shape Deformation Priors 神经形状变形先验 We present Neural Shape Deformation Priors, a novel method for shape manipulation that predicts mesh deformations of non-rigid objects from user-provided handle movements. State-of-the-art methods cast this problem as an optimization task, where the input source mesh is iteratively deformed to minimize an objective function according to hand-crafted regularizers such as ARAP. In this work, we learn the deformation behavior based on the underlying geometric properties of a shape, while leveraging a large-scale dataset containing a diverse set of non-rigid deformations. Specifically, given a source mesh and desired target locations of handles that describe the partial surface deformation, we predict a continuous deformation field that is defined in 3D space to describe the space deformation. To this end, we introduce transformer-based deformation networks that represent a shape deformation as a composition of local surface deformations. It learns a set of local latent codes anchored in 3D space, from which we can learn a set of continuous deformation functions for local surfaces. Our method can be applied to challenging deformations and generalizes well to unseen deformations. We validate our approach in experiments using the DeformingThing4D dataset, and compare to both classic optimization-based and recent neural network-based methods. 我们提出了神经形状变形先验，这是一种用于形状操纵的新颖方法，可以根据用户提供的手柄运动来预测非刚性对象的网格变形。最先进的方法将此问题视为优化任务，其中输入源网格迭代变形，以根据手工制作的正则化器（例如 ARAP）最小化目标函数。在这项工作中，我们根据形状的基础几何属性学习变形行为，同时利用包含各种非刚性变形的大规模数据集。具体来说，给定源网格和描述部分表面变形的手柄的所需目标位置，我们预测在 3D 空间中定义的连续变形场来描述空间变形。为此，我们引入基于变压器的变形网络，将形状变形表示为局部表面变形的组合。它学习一组锚定在 3D 空间中的局部潜在代码，从中我们可以学习一组局部表面的连续变形函数。我们的方法可以应用于具有挑战性的变形，并且可以很好地推广到看不见的变形。我们使用 DeformingThing4D 数据集在实验中验证了我们的方法，并与经典的基于优化的方法和最新的基于神经网络的方法进行了比较。 提出一种基于神经网络的形状变形方法，通过用户提供的控制点移动预测非刚性物体的网格变形。 Jiapeng Tang,Lev Markhasin,Bi Wang,Justus Thies,Matthias Nießner cs.CV

authors_text: Chao-Han Huck Yang,I-Fan Chen,Andreas Stolcke,Sabato Marco Siniscalchi,Chin-Hui Lee
title: An Experimental Study on Private Aggregation of Teacher Ensemble Learning for End-to-End Speech Recognition
title_zh: 端到端语音识别教师集成学习的私有聚合实验研究
comment: 5 pages. Accepted to IEEE SLT 2022. A first version draft was finished in Aug 2021
comments: 5 pages. Accepted to IEEE SLT 2022. A first version draft was finished in Aug 2021
abstract: Differential privacy (DP) is one data protection avenue to safeguard user information used for training deep models by imposing noisy distortion on privacy data. Such a noise perturbation often results in a severe performance degradation in automatic speech recognition (ASR) in order to meet a privacy budget $\varepsilon$. Private aggregation of teacher ensemble (PATE) utilizes ensemble probabilities to improve ASR accuracy when dealing with the noise effects controlled by small values of $\varepsilon$. We extend PATE learning to work with dynamic patterns, namely speech utterances, and perform a first experimental demonstration that it prevents acoustic data leakage in ASR training. We evaluate three end-to-end deep models, including LAS, hybrid CTC/attention, and RNN transducer, on the open-source LibriSpeech and TIMIT corpora. PATE learning-enhanced ASR models outperform the benchmark DP-SGD mechanisms, especially under strict DP budgets, giving relative word error rate reductions between 26.2% and 27.5% for an RNN transducer model evaluated with LibriSpeech. We also introduce a DP-preserving ASR solution for pretraining on public speech corpora.
summary: Differential privacy (DP) is one data protection avenue to safeguard user information used for training deep models by imposing noisy distortion on privacy data. Such a noise perturbation often results in a severe performance degradation in automatic speech recognition (ASR) in order to meet a privacy budget $\varepsilon$. Private aggregation of teacher ensemble (PATE) utilizes ensemble probabilities to improve ASR accuracy when dealing with the noise effects controlled by small values of $\varepsilon$. We extend PATE learning to work with dynamic patterns, namely speech utterances, and perform a first experimental demonstration that it prevents acoustic data leakage in ASR training. We evaluate three end-to-end deep models, including LAS, hybrid CTC/attention, and RNN transducer, on the open-source LibriSpeech and TIMIT corpora. PATE learning-enhanced ASR models outperform the benchmark DP-SGD mechanisms, especially under strict DP budgets, giving relative word error rate reductions between 26.2% and 27.5% for an RNN transducer model evaluated with LibriSpeech. We also introduce a DP-preserving ASR solution for pretraining on public speech corpora.
abstract_zh: 差分隐私（DP）是一种数据保护途径，通过对隐私数据施加噪声失真来保护用于训练深度模型的用户信息。为了满足隐私预算 $\varepsilon$，这种噪声扰动通常会导致自动语音识别 (ASR) 的性能严重下降。教师集成的私有聚合 (PATE) 在处理由小值 $\varepsilon$ 控制的噪声影响时，利用集成概率来提高 ASR 准确性。我们将 PATE 学习扩展到动态模式（即语音表达），并进行了首次实验演示，证明它可以防止 ASR 训练中的声学数据泄漏。我们在开源 LibriSpeech 和 TIMIT 语料库上评估了三种端到端深度模型，包括 LAS、混合 CTC/注意力和 RNN 传感器。 PATE 学习增强型 ASR 模型优于基准 DP-SGD 机制，尤其是在严格的 DP 预算下，使用 LibriSpeech 评估的 RNN 转换器模型的相对单词错误率降低了 26.2% 至 27.5%。我们还引入了一种保留 DP 的 ASR 解决方案，用于公共语音语料库的预训练。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将私有聚合教师集成学习（PATE）应用于端到端语音识别，以在满足差分隐私预算的同时提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 差分隐私（DP）在语音识别训练中会因噪声扰动导致性能显著下降，而传统DP-SGD方法难以兼顾隐私保护与模型准确性，需探索更优的隐私保护方案。
AI.method: 扩展PATE方法以适应动态语音模式，基于LibriSpeech和TIMIT数据集对LAS、混合CTC/注意力及RNN转录器三种端到端模型进行实验，对比DP-SGD机制并引入基于公共语料的DP预训练方案。
AI.result: PATE增强的ASR模型在严格DP预算下优于DP-SGD基准，RNN转录器模型的词错误率降低26.2%-27.5%，且验证了预训练方案的可行性。
AI.conclusion: PATE方法有效缓解了语音识别中的隐私泄露风险，在严格隐私约束下显著提升模型性能，为隐私保护与模型精度的平衡提供了新思路。

authors_text: Muhammad Khalifa,Yogarshi Vyas,Shuai Wang,Graham Horwood,Sunil Mallya,Miguel Ballesteros
title: Contrastive Training Improves Zero-Shot Classification of Semi-structured Documents
title_zh: 对比训练改进了半结构化文档的零样本分类
abstract: We investigate semi-structured document classification in a zero-shot setting. Classification of semi-structured documents is more challenging than that of standard unstructured documents, as positional, layout, and style information play a vital role in interpreting such documents. The standard classification setting where categories are fixed during both training and testing falls short in dynamic environments where new document categories could potentially emerge. We focus exclusively on the zero-shot setting where inference is done on new unseen classes. To address this task, we propose a matching-based approach that relies on a pairwise contrastive objective for both pretraining and fine-tuning. Our results show a significant boost in Macro F$_1$ from the proposed pretraining step in both supervised and unsupervised zero-shot settings.
summary: We investigate semi-structured document classification in a zero-shot setting. Classification of semi-structured documents is more challenging than that of standard unstructured documents, as positional, layout, and style information play a vital role in interpreting such documents. The standard classification setting where categories are fixed during both training and testing falls short in dynamic environments where new document categories could potentially emerge. We focus exclusively on the zero-shot setting where inference is done on new unseen classes. To address this task, we propose a matching-based approach that relies on a pairwise contrastive objective for both pretraining and fine-tuning. Our results show a significant boost in Macro F$_1$ from the proposed pretraining step in both supervised and unsupervised zero-shot settings.
abstract_zh: 我们研究零样本设置中的半结构化文档分类。半结构化文档的分类比标准非结构化文档的分类更具挑战性，因为位置、布局和样式信息在解释此类文档时起着至关重要的作用。在训练和测试期间固定类别的标准分类设置在可能出现新文档类别的动态环境中存在不足。我们专门关注零样本设置，其中对新的未见过的类进行推理。为了解决此任务，我们提出了一种基于匹配的方法，该方法依赖于成对对比目标来进行预训练和微调。我们的结果表明，在有监督和无监督的零样本设置中，宏 F$_1$ 从建议的预训练步骤中得到了显着提升。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在零样本设置下通过对比训练提升半结构化文档分类性能的方法。
AI.motivation: 半结构化文档的分类依赖于位置、布局和样式信息，传统固定类别的分类方法难以应对动态环境中新类别的出现。
AI.method: 提出基于匹配的对比训练方法，通过成对对比目标进行预训练和微调。
AI.result: 在监督和无监督零样本设置中，预训练步骤显著提升了Macro F1分数。
AI.conclusion: 对比训练有效增强了半结构化文档在零样本分类任务中的表现，适用于多种场景。

ai_content.method: 提出基于匹配的对比训练方法，通过成对对比目标进行预训练和微调。

ai_content.conclusion: 对比训练有效增强了半结构化文档在零样本分类任务中的表现，适用于多种场景。

search_text: Contrastive Training Improves Zero-Shot Classification of Semi-structured Documents 对比训练改进了半结构化文档的零样本分类 We investigate semi-structured document classification in a zero-shot setting. Classification of semi-structured documents is more challenging than that of standard unstructured documents, as positional, layout, and style information play a vital role in interpreting such documents. The standard classification setting where categories are fixed during both training and testing falls short in dynamic environments where new document categories could potentially emerge. We focus exclusively on the zero-shot setting where inference is done on new unseen classes. To address this task, we propose a matching-based approach that relies on a pairwise contrastive objective for both pretraining and fine-tuning. Our results show a significant boost in Macro F$_1$ from the proposed pretraining step in both supervised and unsupervised zero-shot settings. 我们研究零样本设置中的半结构化文档分类。半结构化文档的分类比标准非结构化文档的分类更具挑战性，因为位置、布局和样式信息在解释此类文档时起着至关重要的作用。在训练和测试期间固定类别的标准分类设置在可能出现新文档类别的动态环境中存在不足。我们专门关注零样本设置，其中对新的未见过的类进行推理。为了解决此任务，我们提出了一种基于匹配的方法，该方法依赖于成对对比目标来进行预训练和微调。我们的结果表明，在有监督和无监督的零样本设置中，宏 F$_1$ 从建议的预训练步骤中得到了显着提升。 本文研究了在零样本设置下通过对比训练提升半结构化文档分类性能的方法。 Muhammad Khalifa,Yogarshi Vyas,Shuai Wang,Graham Horwood,Sunil Mallya,Miguel Ballesteros cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Chinh Ngo,Trieu H. Trinh,Long Phan,Hieu Tran,Tai Dang,Hieu Nguyen,Minh Nguyen,Minh-Thang Luong
title: MTet: Multi-domain Translation for English and Vietnamese
title_zh: MTet：英语和越南语的多领域翻译
abstract: We introduce MTet, the largest publicly available parallel corpus for English-Vietnamese translation. MTet consists of 4.2M high-quality training sentence pairs and a multi-domain test set refined by the Vietnamese research community. Combining with previous works on English-Vietnamese translation, we grow the existing parallel dataset to 6.2M sentence pairs. We also release the first pretrained model EnViT5 for English and Vietnamese languages. Combining both resources, our model significantly outperforms previous state-of-the-art results by up to 2 points in translation BLEU score, while being 1.6 times smaller.
summary: We introduce MTet, the largest publicly available parallel corpus for English-Vietnamese translation. MTet consists of 4.2M high-quality training sentence pairs and a multi-domain test set refined by the Vietnamese research community. Combining with previous works on English-Vietnamese translation, we grow the existing parallel dataset to 6.2M sentence pairs. We also release the first pretrained model EnViT5 for English and Vietnamese languages. Combining both resources, our model significantly outperforms previous state-of-the-art results by up to 2 points in translation BLEU score, while being 1.6 times smaller.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了 MTet，这是最大的公开可用的英语-越南语翻译平行语料库。 MTet 由 420 万个高质量训练句子对和越南研究界完善的多领域测试集组成。结合之前的英语-越南语翻译工作，我们将现有的并行数据集增长到 620 万个句子对。我们还发布了第一个针对英语和越南语的预训练模型 EnViT5。结合这两种资源，我们的模型在翻译 BLEU 分数方面显着优于之前最先进的结果，最高提高了 2 分，同时缩小了 1.6 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MTet，一个包含4.2M高质量英越翻译句子对的多领域平行语料库，并发布预训练模型EnViT5，显著提升英越翻译性能。
AI.motivation: 现有英越翻译数据集规模有限且领域覆盖不足，难以满足多场景需求，需构建更大规模、更高质量的平行语料并优化模型效率。
AI.method: 整合历史数据扩展平行语料至6.2M句子对，构建多领域测试集；基于此训练预训练模型EnViT5，结合领域适配优化技术。
AI.result: EnViT5在BLEU评分上超越现有最优方法2分，模型参数量减少1.6倍，保持翻译质量的同时提升计算效率。
AI.conclusion: MTet语料库与EnViT5模型为英越翻译提供了更全面的数据基础和更高效的解决方案，推动了多领域翻译任务的发展。

authors_text: Yuanzheng He,Jiang Wang,Daobilige Su,Kazuhiro Nakadai,Junfeng Wu,Shoudong Huang,Youfu Li,He Kong
title: Observability Analysis of Graph SLAM-Based Joint Calibration of Multiple Microphone Arrays and Sound Source Localization
title_zh: 基于图SLAM的多麦克风阵列联合标定及声源定位可观测性分析
comment: This paper is accepted to and going to be presented at the 2023 IEEE/SICE International Symposium on System Integrations, Atlanta, USA
comments: This paper is accepted to and going to be presented at the 2023 IEEE/SICE International Symposium on System Integrations, Atlanta, USA
abstract: Multiple microphone arrays have many applications in robot audition, including sound source localization, audio scene perception and analysis, etc. However, accurate calibration of multiple microphone arrays remains a challenge because there are many unknown parameters to be identified, including the Euler angles, geometry, asynchronous factors between the microphone arrays. This paper is concerned with joint calibration of multiple microphone arrays and sound source localization using graph simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM). By using a Fisher information matrix (FIM) approach, we focus on the observability analysis of the graph SLAM framework for the above-mentioned calibration problem. We thoroughly investigate the identifiability of the unknown parameters, including the Euler angles, geometry, asynchronous effects between the microphone arrays, and the sound source locations. We establish necessary/sufficient conditions under which the FIM and the Jacobian matrix have full column rank, which implies the identifiability of the unknown parameters. These conditions are closely related to the variation in the motion of the sound source and the configuration of microphone arrays, and have intuitive and physical interpretations. We also discover several scenarios where the unknown parameters are not uniquely identifiable. All theoretical findings are demonstrated using simulation data.
summary: Multiple microphone arrays have many applications in robot audition, including sound source localization, audio scene perception and analysis, etc. However, accurate calibration of multiple microphone arrays remains a challenge because there are many unknown parameters to be identified, including the Euler angles, geometry, asynchronous factors between the microphone arrays. This paper is concerned with joint calibration of multiple microphone arrays and sound source localization using graph simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM). By using a Fisher information matrix (FIM) approach, we focus on the observability analysis of the graph SLAM framework for the above-mentioned calibration problem. We thoroughly investigate the identifiability of the unknown parameters, including the Euler angles, geometry, asynchronous effects between the microphone arrays, and the sound source locations. We establish necessary/sufficient conditions under which the FIM and the Jacobian matrix have full column rank, which implies the identifiability of the unknown parameters. These conditions are closely related to the variation in the motion of the sound source and the configuration of microphone arrays, and have intuitive and physical interpretations. We also discover several scenarios where the unknown parameters are not uniquely identifiable. All theoretical findings are demonstrated using simulation data.
abstract_zh: 多麦克风阵列在机器人试听中有很多应用，包括声源定位、音频场景感知和分析等。然而，多麦克风阵列的精确校准仍然是一个挑战，因为有许多未知参数需要识别，包括欧拉角、几何形状、麦克风阵列之间的异步因素。本文涉及多个麦克风阵列的联合校准以及使用图同步定位和映射（SLAM）的声源定位。通过使用Fisher信息矩阵（FIM）方法，我们重点关注图SLAM框架对上述校准问题的可观测性分析。我们彻底研究了未知参数的可识别性，包括欧拉角、几何形状、麦克风阵列之间的异步效应以及声源位置。我们建立必要/充分条件，在该条件下 FIM 和雅可比矩阵具有满列秩，这意味着未知参数的可识别性。这些条件与声源运动的变化和麦克风阵列的配置密切相关，并且具有直观和物理解释。我们还发现了一些未知参数无法唯一识别的场景。所有理论结果均使用模拟数据进行论证。

AI.tldr: 本文通过图SLAM框架结合Fisher信息矩阵方法，分析多麦克风阵列联合校准与声源定位的可观测性问题。
AI.motivation: 多麦克风阵列在校准过程中存在欧拉角、几何结构及异步因素等大量未知参数，导致准确校准与声源定位面临挑战。
AI.method: 采用图SLAM框架与Fisher信息矩阵（FIM）方法，分析未知参数的可观测性，并建立FIM与雅可比矩阵满列秩的条件以确保参数可识别性。
AI.result: 确定了参数可识别的必要/充分条件，发现特定场景下参数不可唯一识别，并通过仿真验证了理论分析。
AI.conclusion: 理论分析为多麦克风阵列校准与定位提供了可解释的条件，强调了声源运动变化与麦克风配置对参数可识别性的影响。

authors_text: Long Phan,Tai Dang,Hieu Tran,Trieu H. Trinh,Vy Phan,Lam D. Chau,Minh-Thang Luong
title: Enriching Biomedical Knowledge for Low-resource Language Through Large-Scale Translation
title_zh: 通过大规模翻译丰富低资源语言的生物医学知识
abstract: Biomedical data and benchmarks are highly valuable yet very limited in low-resource languages other than English such as Vietnamese. In this paper, we make use of a state-of-the-art translation model in English-Vietnamese to translate and produce both pretrained as well as supervised data in the biomedical domains. Thanks to such large-scale translation, we introduce ViPubmedT5, a pretrained Encoder-Decoder Transformer model trained on 20 million translated abstracts from the high-quality public PubMed corpus. ViPubMedT5 demonstrates state-of-the-art results on two different biomedical benchmarks in summarization and acronym disambiguation. Further, we release ViMedNLI - a new NLP task in Vietnamese translated from MedNLI using the recently public En-vi translation model and carefully refined by human experts, with evaluations of existing methods against ViPubmedT5.
summary: Biomedical data and benchmarks are highly valuable yet very limited in low-resource languages other than English such as Vietnamese. In this paper, we make use of a state-of-the-art translation model in English-Vietnamese to translate and produce both pretrained as well as supervised data in the biomedical domains. Thanks to such large-scale translation, we introduce ViPubmedT5, a pretrained Encoder-Decoder Transformer model trained on 20 million translated abstracts from the high-quality public PubMed corpus. ViPubMedT5 demonstrates state-of-the-art results on two different biomedical benchmarks in summarization and acronym disambiguation. Further, we release ViMedNLI - a new NLP task in Vietnamese translated from MedNLI using the recently public En-vi translation model and carefully refined by human experts, with evaluations of existing methods against ViPubmedT5.
abstract_zh: 生物医学数据和基准非常有价值，但在英语以外的资源匮乏的语言（如越南语）中却非常有限。在本文中，我们利用最先进的英语-越南语翻译模型来翻译和生成生物医学领域的预训练数据和监督数据。由于如此大规模的翻译，我们引入了 ViPubmedT5，这是一种预训练的编码器-解码器 Transformer 模型，使用来自高质量公共 PubMed 语料库的 2000 万条翻译摘要进行训练。 ViPubMedT5 在总结和首字母缩略词消歧方面展示了两种不同生物医学基准的最新结果。此外，我们还发布了 ViMedNLI - 一项新的越南语 NLP 任务，使用最近公开的 En-vi 翻译模型从 MedNLI 翻译而来，并由人类专家仔细改进，并针对 ViPubmedT5 对现有方法进行了评估。

AI.tldr: 通过大规模翻译技术增强低资源语言（如越南语）的生物医学知识，构建预训练模型与基准数据集。
AI.motivation: 生物医学数据在低资源语言中稀缺，限制了相关自然语言处理任务的发展，需通过翻译生成高质量数据以填补空白。
AI.method: 利用先进英越翻译模型将PubMed的英文医学摘要翻译为越南语，训练ViPubmedT5预训练模型，并人工校对生成ViMedNLI数据集。
AI.result: ViPubmedT5在生物医学摘要与缩写消歧任务中达到SOTA性能，ViMedNLI成为首个越南语医学自然语言推理基准。
AI.conclusion: 大规模翻译有效提升低资源语言生物医学数据质量，为后续研究提供关键模型与数据支持。

In this paper, we make use of a state-of-the-art translation model in English-Vietnamese to translate and produce both pretrained as well as supervised data in the biomedical domains. Thanks to such large-scale translation, we introduce ViPubmedT5, a pretrained Encoder-Decoder Transformer model trained on 20 million translated abstracts from the high-quality public PubMed corpus. ViPubMedT5 demonstrates state-of-the-art results on two different biomedical benchmarks in summarization and acronym disambiguation. Further, we release ViMedNLI - a new NLP task in Vietnamese translated from MedNLI using the recently public En-vi translation model and carefully refined by human experts, with evaluations of existing methods against ViPubmedT5. 生物医学数据和基准非常有价值，但在英语以外的资源匮乏的语言（如越南语）中却非常有限。在本文中，我们利用最先进的英语-越南语翻译模型来翻译和生成生物医学领域的预训练数据和监督数据。由于如此大规模的翻译，我们引入了 ViPubmedT5，这是一种预训练的编码器-解码器 Transformer 模型，使用来自高质量公共 PubMed 语料库的 2000 万条翻译摘要进行训练。 ViPubMedT5 在总结和首字母缩略词消歧方面展示了两种不同生物医学基准的最新结果。此外，我们还发布了 ViMedNLI - 一项新的越南语 NLP 任务，使用最近公开的 En-vi 翻译模型从 MedNLI 翻译而来，并由人类专家仔细改进，并针对 ViPubmedT5 对现有方法进行了评估。 通过大规模翻译技术增强低资源语言（如越南语）的生物医学知识，构建预训练模型与基准数据集。 Long Phan,Tai Dang,Hieu Tran,Trieu H. authors_text: M Quamer Nasim,Narendra Patwardhan,Tannistha Maiti,Tarry Singh
title: Digitization of Raster Logs: A Deep Learning Approach
title_zh: 栅格日志的数字化：深度学习方法
abstract: Raster well-log images are digital representations of well-logs data generated over the years. Raster digital well logs represent bitmaps of the log image in a rectangular array of black (zeros) and white dots (ones) called pixels. Experts study the raster logs manually or with software applications that still require a tremendous amount of manual input. Besides the loss of thousands of person-hours, this process is erroneous and tedious. To digitize these raster logs, one must buy a costly digitizer that is not only manual and time-consuming but also a hidden technical debt since enterprises stand to lose more money in additional servicing and consulting charges. We propose a deep neural network architecture called VeerNet to semantically segment the raster images from the background grid and classify and digitize the well-log curves. Raster logs have a substantially greater resolution than images traditionally consumed by image segmentation pipelines. Since the input has a low signal-to-resolution ratio, we require rapid downsampling to alleviate unnecessary computation. We thus employ a modified UNet-inspired architecture that balances retaining key signals and reducing result dimensionality. We use attention augmented read-process-write architecture. This architecture efficiently classifies and digitizes the curves with an overall F1 score of 35% and IoU of 30%. When compared to the actual las values for Gamma-ray and derived value of Gamma-ray from VeerNet, a high Pearson coefficient score of 0.62 was achieved.
summary: Raster well-log images are digital representations of well-logs data generated over the years. Raster digital well logs represent bitmaps of the log image in a rectangular array of black (zeros) and white dots (ones) called pixels. Experts study the raster logs manually or with software applications that still require a tremendous amount of manual input. Besides the loss of thousands of person-hours, this process is erroneous and tedious. To digitize these raster logs, one must buy a costly digitizer that is not only manual and time-consuming but also a hidden technical debt since enterprises stand to lose more money in additional servicing and consulting charges. We propose a deep neural network architecture called VeerNet to semantically segment the raster images from the background grid and classify and digitize the well-log curves. Raster logs have a substantially greater resolution than images traditionally consumed by image segmentation pipelines. Since the input has a low signal-to-resolution ratio, we require rapid downsampling to alleviate unnecessary computation. We thus employ a modified UNet-inspired architecture that balances retaining key signals and reducing result dimensionality. We use attention augmented read-process-write architecture. This architecture efficiently classifies and digitizes the curves with an overall F1 score of 35% and IoU of 30%. When compared to the actual las values for Gamma-ray and derived value of Gamma-ray from VeerNet, a high Pearson coefficient score of 0.62 was achieved.
abstract_zh: 栅格测井图像是多年来生成的测井数据的数字表示。栅格数字测井曲线以黑色（零）和白色点（一）矩形阵列（称为像素）表示测井图像的位图。专家手动或使用仍需要大量手动输入的软件应用程序研究栅格日志。除了损失数千个工时之外，这个过程是错误且乏味的。为了将这些光栅日志数字化，必须购买一台昂贵的数字化仪，这不仅需要手动操作且耗时，而且还是一项隐藏的技术债务，因为企业可能会在额外的服务和咨询费用上损失更多的钱。我们提出了一种名为 VeerNet 的深度神经网络架构，用于从背景网格中对光栅图像进行语义分割，并对测井曲线进行分类和数字化。栅格日志的分辨率远高于图像分割管道传统上使用的图像。由于输入的信号分辨率较低，我们需要快速下采样以减少不必要的计算。因此，我们采用了一种改进的受 UNet 启发的架构，可以平衡保留关键信号和降低结果维度。我们使用注意力增强的读取-处理-写入架构。该架构可以有效地对曲线进行分类和数字化，总体 F1 得分为 35%，IoU 为 30%。与伽马射线的实际 las 值和来自 VeerNet 的伽马射线导出值进行比较时，获得了 0.62 的高皮尔逊系数得分。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的栅格测井图数字化方法VeerNet，用于语义分割背景网格并分类数字化测井曲线。
AI.motivation: 传统栅格测井图人工处理耗时费力且易出错，现有数字化设备成本高且存在技术债务，亟需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 设计改进的UNet架构结合注意力机制，通过下采样处理高分辨率图像，在保留关键信号的同时降低计算量。
AI.result: 在Gamma-ray数据上实现35%的F1分数和30%的IoU，与真实值的皮尔逊相关系数达0.62。
AI.conclusion: VeerNet为栅格测井图数字化提供可行的自动化方案，但性能仍有提升空间。

authors_text: Ahmad Abuaish,Mohit Srinivasan,Patricio A. Vela
title: Geometry of Radial Basis Neural Networks for Safety Biased Approximation of Unsafe Regions
title_zh: 用于不安全区域安全偏置逼近的径向基神经网络的几何结构
abstract: Barrier function-based inequality constraints are a means to enforce safety specifications for control systems. When used in conjunction with a convex optimization program, they provide a computationally efficient method to enforce safety for the general class of control-affine systems. One of the main assumptions when taking this approach is the a priori knowledge of the barrier function itself, i.e., knowledge of the safe set. In the context of navigation through unknown environments where the locally safe set evolves with time, such knowledge does not exist. This manuscript focuses on the synthesis of a zeroing barrier function characterizing the safe set based on safe and unsafe sample measurements, e.g., from perception data in navigation applications. Prior work formulated a supervised machine learning algorithm whose solution guaranteed the construction of a zeroing barrier function with specific level-set properties. However, it did not explore the geometry of the neural network design used for the synthesis process. This manuscript describes the specific geometry of the neural network used for zeroing barrier function synthesis, and shows how the network provides the necessary representation for splitting the state space into safe and unsafe regions.
summary: Barrier function-based inequality constraints are a means to enforce safety specifications for control systems. When used in conjunction with a convex optimization program, they provide a computationally efficient method to enforce safety for the general class of control-affine systems. One of the main assumptions when taking this approach is the a priori knowledge of the barrier function itself, i.e., knowledge of the safe set. In the context of navigation through unknown environments where the locally safe set evolves with time, such knowledge does not exist. This manuscript focuses on the synthesis of a zeroing barrier function characterizing the safe set based on safe and unsafe sample measurements, e.g., from perception data in navigation applications. Prior work formulated a supervised machine learning algorithm whose solution guaranteed the construction of a zeroing barrier function with specific level-set properties. However, it did not explore the geometry of the neural network design used for the synthesis process. This manuscript describes the specific geometry of the neural network used for zeroing barrier function synthesis, and shows how the network provides the necessary representation for splitting the state space into safe and unsafe regions.
abstract_zh: 基于势垒函数的不等式约束是强制控制系统安全规范的一种手段。当与凸优化程序结合使用时，它们提供了一种计算有效的方法来增强一般类型的控制仿射系统的安全性。采用这种方法时的主要假设之一是屏障函数本身的先验知识，即安全集的知识。在未知环境中导航的背景下，局部安全集随着时间的推移而演变，这样的知识并不存在。本手稿重点关注基于安全和不安全样本测量（例如来自导航应用中的感知数据）的归零屏障函数的合成，该函数表征安全集。先前的工作制定了一种监督机器学习算法，其解决方案保证了具有特定水平集属性的归零障碍函数的构造。然而，它没有探索用于合成过程的神经网络设计的几何形状。该手稿描述了用于归零势垒函数合成的神经网络的具体几何结构，并展示了网络如何提供将状态空间划分为安全和不安全区域的必要表示。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于径向基神经网络的零点屏障函数合成几何结构，以在未知环境中实现控制系统的安全区域划分。
AI.motivation: 传统屏障函数方法需要预先知道安全集，但在动态未知环境中无法获取此类先验知识，需通过样本数据合成屏障函数。
AI.method: 设计特定几何结构的径向基神经网络，利用安全与危险样本数据合成零点屏障函数，实现状态空间的分割。
AI.result: 证明了该神经网络几何结构能够有效表征安全与危险区域的分界，满足屏障函数的水平集性质。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需先验安全集知识，通过数据驱动的神经网络几何设计实现了动态环境中的安全约束合成。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究了基于径向基神经网络的零点屏障函数合成几何结构，以在未知环境中实现控制系统的安全区域划分。

ai_content.result: 证明了该神经网络几何结构能够有效表征安全与危险区域的分界，满足屏障函数的水平集性质。

search_text: Geometry of Radial Basis Neural Networks for Safety Biased Approximation of Unsafe Regions 用于不安全区域安全偏置逼近的径向基神经网络的几何结构 Barrier function-based inequality constraints are a means to enforce safety specifications for control systems. When used in conjunction with a convex optimization program, they provide a computationally efficient method to enforce safety for the general class of control-affine systems. One of the main assumptions when taking this approach is the a priori knowledge of the barrier function itself, i.e., knowledge of the safe set. In the context of navigation through unknown environments where the locally safe set evolves with time, such knowledge does not exist. This manuscript focuses on the synthesis of a zeroing barrier function characterizing the safe set based on safe and unsafe sample measurements, e.g., from perception data in navigation applications. Prior work formulated a supervised machine learning algorithm whose solution guaranteed the construction of a zeroing barrier function with specific level-set properties. However, it did not explore the geometry of the neural network design used for the synthesis process. This manuscript describes the specific geometry of the neural network used for zeroing barrier function synthesis, and shows how the network provides the necessary representation for splitting the state space into safe and unsafe regions. 基于势垒函数的不等式约束是强制控制系统安全规范的一种手段。当与凸优化程序结合使用时，它们提供了一种计算有效的方法来增强一般类型的控制仿射系统的安全性。采用这种方法时的主要假设之一是屏障函数本身的先验知识，即安全集的知识。在未知环境中导航的背景下，局部安全集随着时间的推移而演变，这样的知识并不存在。本手稿重点关注基于安全和不安全样本测量（例如来自导航应用中的感知数据）的归零屏障函数的合成，该函数表征安全集。先前的工作制定了一种监督机器学习算法，其解决方案保证了具有特定水平集属性的归零障碍函数的构造。然而，它没有探索用于合成过程的神经网络设计的几何形状。该手稿描述了用于归零势垒函数合成的神经网络的具体几何结构，并展示了网络如何提供将状态空间划分为安全和不安全区域的必要表示。 本文研究了基于径向基神经网络的零点屏障函数合成几何结构，以在未知环境中实现控制系统的安全区域划分。 Ahmad Abuaish,Mohit Srinivasan,Patricio A. Vela eess.SY,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Shizhen Zhao,Xiaojuan Qi
title: Prototypical VoteNet for Few-Shot 3D Point Cloud Object Detection
title_zh: 用于少样本 3D 点云对象检测的原型 VoteNet
abstract: Most existing 3D point cloud object detection approaches heavily rely on large amounts of labeled training data. However, the labeling process is costly and time-consuming. This paper considers few-shot 3D point cloud object detection, where only a few annotated samples of novel classes are needed with abundant samples of base classes. To this end, we propose Prototypical VoteNet to recognize and localize novel instances, which incorporates two new modules: Prototypical Vote Module (PVM) and Prototypical Head Module (PHM). Specifically, as the 3D basic geometric structures can be shared among categories, PVM is designed to leverage class-agnostic geometric prototypes, which are learned from base classes, to refine local features of novel categories.Then PHM is proposed to utilize class prototypes to enhance the global feature of each object, facilitating subsequent object localization and classification, which is trained by the episodic training strategy. To evaluate the model in this new setting, we contribute two new benchmark datasets, FS-ScanNet and FS-SUNRGBD. We conduct extensive experiments to demonstrate the effectiveness of Prototypical VoteNet, and our proposed method shows significant and consistent improvements compared to baselines on two benchmark datasets.
summary: Most existing 3D point cloud object detection approaches heavily rely on large amounts of labeled training data. However, the labeling process is costly and time-consuming. This paper considers few-shot 3D point cloud object detection, where only a few annotated samples of novel classes are needed with abundant samples of base classes. To this end, we propose Prototypical VoteNet to recognize and localize novel instances, which incorporates two new modules: Prototypical Vote Module (PVM) and Prototypical Head Module (PHM). Specifically, as the 3D basic geometric structures can be shared among categories, PVM is designed to leverage class-agnostic geometric prototypes, which are learned from base classes, to refine local features of novel categories.Then PHM is proposed to utilize class prototypes to enhance the global feature of each object, facilitating subsequent object localization and classification, which is trained by the episodic training strategy. To evaluate the model in this new setting, we contribute two new benchmark datasets, FS-ScanNet and FS-SUNRGBD. We conduct extensive experiments to demonstrate the effectiveness of Prototypical VoteNet, and our proposed method shows significant and consistent improvements compared to baselines on two benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 大多数现有的 3D 点云对象检测方法严重依赖大量标记的训练数据。然而，标记过程既昂贵又耗时。本文考虑少样本 3D 点云目标检测，其中只需要少量新类的带注释样本，并具有丰富的基类样本。为此，我们提出了原型 VoteNet 来识别和定位新实例，其中包含两个新模块：原型投票模块（PVM）和原型头模块（PHM）。具体来说，由于3D基本几何结构可以在类别之间共享，PVM被设计为利用从基类学习的与类别无关的几何原型来细化新类别的局部特征。然后提出PHM利用类原型来增强每个对象的全局特征，促进后续的对象定位和分类，这是通过情景训练策略进行训练的。为了在这个新设置中评估模型，我们提供了两个新的基准数据集：FS-ScanNet 和 FS-SUNRGBD。我们进行了大量的实验来证明原型 VoteNet 的有效性，并且我们提出的方法与两个基准数据集的基线相比显示出显着且一致的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Prototypical VoteNet方法，解决少样本3D点云目标检测问题，通过利用基础类别的几何原型提升新类别的检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有3D点云检测方法依赖大量标注数据，但标注成本高昂。少样本学习可在仅有少量新类别样本时，借助基础类数据提升检测效果。
AI.method: 设计包含Prototypical Vote Module（PVM）和Prototypical Head Module（PHM）的Prototypical VoteNet。PVM利用基础类几何原型优化新类局部特征，PHM通过类别原型增强全局特征，结合情景训练策略进行训练。
AI.result: 在自建的FS-ScanNet和FS-SUNRGBD数据集上，该方法相比基线模型在少样本场景下取得显著且稳定的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: Prototypical VoteNet通过几何原型学习有效解决了少样本3D检测难题，同时为后续研究提供了两个新的基准数据集。

authors_text: Tian Qin,Fengxiang He,Dingfeng Shi,Wenbing Huang,Dacheng Tao
title: Benefits of Permutation-Equivariance in Auction Mechanisms
title_zh: 拍卖机制中排列等变的好处
abstract: Designing an incentive-compatible auction mechanism that maximizes the auctioneer's revenue while minimizes the bidders' ex-post regret is an important yet intricate problem in economics. Remarkable progress has been achieved through learning the optimal auction mechanism by neural networks. In this paper, we consider the popular additive valuation and symmetric valuation setting; i.e., the valuation for a set of items is defined as the sum of all items' valuations in the set, and the valuation distribution is invariant when the bidders and/or the items are permutated. We prove that permutation-equivariant neural networks have significant advantages: the permutation-equivariance decreases the expected ex-post regret, improves the model generalizability, while maintains the expected revenue invariant. This implies that the permutation-equivariance helps approach the theoretically optimal dominant strategy incentive compatible condition, and reduces the required sample complexity for desired generalization. Extensive experiments fully support our theory. To our best knowledge, this is the first work towards understanding the benefits of permutation-equivariance in auction mechanisms.
summary: Designing an incentive-compatible auction mechanism that maximizes the auctioneer's revenue while minimizes the bidders' ex-post regret is an important yet intricate problem in economics. Remarkable progress has been achieved through learning the optimal auction mechanism by neural networks. In this paper, we consider the popular additive valuation and symmetric valuation setting; i.e., the valuation for a set of items is defined as the sum of all items' valuations in the set, and the valuation distribution is invariant when the bidders and/or the items are permutated. We prove that permutation-equivariant neural networks have significant advantages: the permutation-equivariance decreases the expected ex-post regret, improves the model generalizability, while maintains the expected revenue invariant. This implies that the permutation-equivariance helps approach the theoretically optimal dominant strategy incentive compatible condition, and reduces the required sample complexity for desired generalization. Extensive experiments fully support our theory. To our best knowledge, this is the first work towards understanding the benefits of permutation-equivariance in auction mechanisms.
abstract_zh: 设计一种与激励相容的拍卖机制，使拍卖师的收入最大化，同时使投标人的事后后悔最小化，是经济学中一个重要而复杂的问题。通过神经网络学习最优拍卖机制已经取得了显着的进展。在本文中，我们考虑流行的附加估值和对称估值设置；即，一组物品的估价被定义为该组中所有物品估价的总和，并且当投标人和/或物品被排列时，估价分布是不变的。我们证明排列等变神经网络具有显着的优势：排列等变减少了预期的事后遗憾，提高了模型的泛化性，同时保持了预期收入不变。这意味着排列等方差有助于接近理论上最优的主导策略激励兼容条件，并降低了所需泛化所需的样本复杂性。大量的实验完全支持我们的理论。据我们所知，这是第一个了解拍卖机制中排列等变的好处的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文研究置换等变神经网络在拍卖机制设计中的优势，证明其在对称估值设置下能降低投标人遗憾、提升模型泛化能力并保持收入不变。
AI.motivation: 设计兼顾拍卖方收益最大化与投标人遗憾最小化的激励相容拍卖机制是核心挑战，而现有神经网络方法在对称估值场景下缺乏理论指导。
AI.method: 通过理论证明与实验验证，分析置换等变神经网络在对称估值场景中的特性，比较其与非等变模型的性能差异。
AI.result: 置换等变性显著降低预期遗憾，提升模型泛化性，维持收入不变，且减少达到目标泛化所需的样本量，实验结果支持理论分析。
AI.conclusion: 置换等变性有助于逼近理论最优激励相容条件，降低样本复杂度，为拍卖机制设计提供新方向，属该领域的首次系统性研究。

To our best knowledge, this is the first work towards understanding the benefits of permutation-equivariance in auction mechanisms. 设计一种与激励相容的拍卖机制，使拍卖师的收入最大化，同时使投标人的事后后悔最小化，是经济学中一个重要而复杂的问题。通过神经网络学习最优拍卖机制已经取得了显着的进展。在本文中，我们考虑流行的附加估值和对称估值设置；即，一组物品的估价被定义为该组中所有物品估价的总和，并且当投标人和/或物品被排列时，估价分布是不变的。我们证明排列等变神经网络具有显着的优势：排列等变减少了预期的事后遗憾，提高了模型的泛化性，同时保持了预期收入不变。这意味着排列等方差有助于接近理论上最优的主导策略激励兼容条件，并降低了所需泛化所需的样本复杂性。大量的实验完全支持我们的理论。据我们所知，这是第一个了解拍卖机制中排列等变的好处的工作。 本文研究置换等变神经网络在拍卖机制设计中的优势，证明其在对称估值设置下能降低投标人遗憾、提升模型泛化能力并保持收入不变。 Tian Qin,Fengxiang He,Dingfeng Shi,Wenbing Huang,Dacheng Tao cs.GT,cs.AI,cs.LG,stat.ML

authors_text: Ayush K. Rai,Tarun Krishna,Julia Dietlmeier,Kevin McGuinness,Alan F. Smeaton,Noel E. O'Connor
title: Motion Aware Self-Supervision for Generic Event Boundary Detection
title_zh: 用于通用事件边界检测的运动感知自我监督
comment: Accepted in IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV) 2023
comments: Accepted in IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV) 2023
abstract: The task of Generic Event Boundary Detection (GEBD) aims to detect moments in videos that are naturally perceived by humans as generic and taxonomy-free event boundaries. Modeling the dynamically evolving temporal and spatial changes in a video makes GEBD a difficult problem to solve. Existing approaches involve very complex and sophisticated pipelines in terms of architectural design choices, hence creating a need for more straightforward and simplified approaches. In this work, we address this issue by revisiting a simple and effective self-supervised method and augment it with a differentiable motion feature learning module to tackle the spatial and temporal diversities in the GEBD task. We perform extensive experiments on the challenging Kinetics-GEBD and TAPOS datasets to demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed approach compared to the other self-supervised state-of-the-art methods. We also show that this simple self-supervised approach learns motion features without any explicit motion-specific pretext task.
summary: The task of Generic Event Boundary Detection (GEBD) aims to detect moments in videos that are naturally perceived by humans as generic and taxonomy-free event boundaries. Modeling the dynamically evolving temporal and spatial changes in a video makes GEBD a difficult problem to solve. Existing approaches involve very complex and sophisticated pipelines in terms of architectural design choices, hence creating a need for more straightforward and simplified approaches. In this work, we address this issue by revisiting a simple and effective self-supervised method and augment it with a differentiable motion feature learning module to tackle the spatial and temporal diversities in the GEBD task. We perform extensive experiments on the challenging Kinetics-GEBD and TAPOS datasets to demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed approach compared to the other self-supervised state-of-the-art methods. We also show that this simple self-supervised approach learns motion features without any explicit motion-specific pretext task.
abstract_zh: 通用事件边界检测（GEBD）的任务旨在检测视频中人类自然感知为通用且无分类事件边界的时刻。 Modeling the dynamically evolving temporal and spatial changes in a video makes GEBD a difficult problem to solve.现有方法在架构设计选择方面涉及非常复杂和复杂的流程，因此需要更直接和简化的方法。在这项工作中，我们通过重新审视一种简单而有效的自监督方法来解决这个问题，并用可微的运动特征学习模块对其进行增强，以解决 GEBD 任务中的空间和时间多样性。我们在具有挑战性的 Kinetics-GEBD 和 TAPOS 数据集上进行了广泛的实验，以证明所提出的方法与其他自我监督的最先进方法相比的有效性。 We also show that this simple self-supervised approach learns motion features without any explicit motion-specific pretext task.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于运动感知的自监督方法，用于检测视频中通用事件边界，无需复杂架构。
AI.motivation: 现有事件边界检测方法依赖复杂管道，缺乏简单有效的解决方案，需简化模型设计并提升对时空变化的适应性。
AI.method: 通过改进自监督学习方法，引入可微分运动特征学习模块，无需显式运动预训练任务即可捕捉时空多样性。
AI.result: 在Kinetics-GEBD和TAPOS数据集上实验表明，该方法优于其他自监督前沿方法，且能有效学习运动特征。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法验证了简单自监督框架结合运动感知模块的有效性，为事件边界检测提供新思路。

authors_text: Zhenbang Wu,Huaxiu Yao,Zhe Su,David M Liebovitz,Lucas M Glass,James Zou,Chelsea Finn,Jimeng Sun
title: Knowledge-Driven New Drug Recommendation
title_zh: 知识驱动的新药推荐
abstract: Drug recommendation assists doctors in prescribing personalized medications to patients based on their health conditions. Existing drug recommendation solutions adopt the supervised multi-label classification setup and only work with existing drugs with sufficient prescription data from many patients. However, newly approved drugs do not have much historical prescription data and cannot leverage existing drug recommendation methods. To address this, we formulate the new drug recommendation as a few-shot learning problem. Yet, directly applying existing few-shot learning algorithms faces two challenges: (1) complex relations among diseases and drugs and (2) numerous false-negative patients who were eligible but did not yet use the new drugs. To tackle these challenges, we propose EDGE, which can quickly adapt to the recommendation for a new drug with limited prescription data from a few support patients. EDGE maintains a drug-dependent multi-phenotype few-shot learner to bridge the gap between existing and new drugs. Specifically, EDGE leverages the drug ontology to link new drugs to existing drugs with similar treatment effects and learns ontology-based drug representations. Such drug representations are used to customize the metric space of the phenotype-driven patient representations, which are composed of a set of phenotypes capturing complex patient health status. Lastly, EDGE eliminates the false-negative supervision signal using an external drug-disease knowledge base. We evaluate EDGE on two real-world datasets: the public EHR data (MIMIC-IV) and private industrial claims data. Results show that EDGE achieves 7.3% improvement on the ROC-AUC score over the best baseline.
summary: Drug recommendation assists doctors in prescribing personalized medications to patients based on their health conditions. Existing drug recommendation solutions adopt the supervised multi-label classification setup and only work with existing drugs with sufficient prescription data from many patients. However, newly approved drugs do not have much historical prescription data and cannot leverage existing drug recommendation methods. To address this, we formulate the new drug recommendation as a few-shot learning problem. Yet, directly applying existing few-shot learning algorithms faces two challenges: (1) complex relations among diseases and drugs and (2) numerous false-negative patients who were eligible but did not yet use the new drugs. To tackle these challenges, we propose EDGE, which can quickly adapt to the recommendation for a new drug with limited prescription data from a few support patients. EDGE maintains a drug-dependent multi-phenotype few-shot learner to bridge the gap between existing and new drugs. Specifically, EDGE leverages the drug ontology to link new drugs to existing drugs with similar treatment effects and learns ontology-based drug representations. Such drug representations are used to customize the metric space of the phenotype-driven patient representations, which are composed of a set of phenotypes capturing complex patient health status. Lastly, EDGE eliminates the false-negative supervision signal using an external drug-disease knowledge base. We evaluate EDGE on two real-world datasets: the public EHR data (MIMIC-IV) and private industrial claims data. Results show that EDGE achieves 7.3% improvement on the ROC-AUC score over the best baseline.
abstract_zh: 药物推荐帮助医生根据患者的健康状况为患者开出个性化药物。现有的药物推荐解决方案采用有监督的多标签分类设置，并且仅适用于具有来自许多患者的足够处方数据的现有药物。然而，新批准的药物没有太多历史处方数据，无法利用现有的药物推荐方法。为了解决这个问题，我们将新药推荐制定为几次学习问题。然而，直接应用现有的少样本学习算法面临两个挑战：（1）疾病和药物之间的复杂关系；（2）大量符合条件但尚未使用新药的假阴性患者。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 EDGE，它可以在少数支持患者的有限处方数据的情况下快速适应新药的推荐。 EDGE 维护一个药物依赖性多表型少样本学习器，以弥合现有药物和新药物之间的差距。具体来说，EDGE 利用药物本体将新药与具有相似治疗效果的现有药物联系起来，并学习基于本体的药物表示。这种药物表示用于定制表型驱动的患者表示的度量空间，该表示由一组捕获复杂患者健康状况的表型组成。最后，EDGE 使用外部药物疾病知识库消除假阴性监督信号。我们在两个真实数据集上评估 EDGE：公共 EHR 数据 (MIMIC-IV) 和私人工业索赔数据。结果显示，EDGE 的 ROC-AUC 评分比最佳基线提高了 7.3%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于知识驱动的新药推荐方法EDGE，解决新药因历史处方数据不足而无法使用现有推荐方法的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有药物推荐方法依赖大量历史处方数据，而新药缺乏此类数据，导致无法有效推荐。需通过少样本学习解决新药推荐难题。
AI.method: EDGE通过药物本体关联新药与现有药物，构建多表型少样本学习器，结合疾病-药物知识库消除假阴性干扰，定制化患者表型的度量空间。
AI.result: 在MIMIC-IV和工业理赔数据集上，EDGE的ROC-AUC得分较最佳基线提升7.3%。
AI.conclusion: EDGE通过知识驱动的少样本学习有效解决了新药推荐中数据稀缺和假阴性问题，为临床个性化用药提供新思路。

authors_text: Bo Li,Yongqiang Yao,Jingru Tan,Xin Lu,Fengwei Yu,Ye Luo,Jianwei Lu
title: Improving Long-tailed Object Detection with Image-Level Supervision by Multi-Task Collaborative Learning
title_zh: 通过多任务协作学习通过图像级监督改进长尾目标检测
abstract: Data in real-world object detection often exhibits the long-tailed distribution. Existing solutions tackle this problem by mitigating the competition between the head and tail categories. However, due to the scarcity of training samples, tail categories are still unable to learn discriminative representations. Bringing more data into the training may alleviate the problem, but collecting instance-level annotations is an excruciating task. In contrast, image-level annotations are easily accessible but not fully exploited. In this paper, we propose a novel framework CLIS (multi-task Collaborative Learning with Image-level Supervision), which leverage image-level supervision to enhance the detection ability in a multi-task collaborative way. Specifically, there are an object detection task (consisting of an instance-classification task and a localization task) and an image-classification task in our framework, responsible for utilizing the two types of supervision. Different tasks are trained collaboratively by three key designs: (1) task-specialized sub-networks that learn specific representations of different tasks without feature entanglement. (2) a siamese sub-network for the image-classification task that shares its knowledge with the instance-classification task, resulting in feature enrichment of detectors. (3) a contrastive learning regularization that maintains representation consistency, bridging feature gaps of different supervision. Extensive experiments are conducted on the challenging LVIS dataset. Without sophisticated loss engineering, CLIS achieves an overall AP of 31.1 with 10.1 point improvement on tail categories, establishing a new state-of-the-art. Code will be at https://github.com/waveboo/CLIS.
summary: Data in real-world object detection often exhibits the long-tailed distribution. Existing solutions tackle this problem by mitigating the competition between the head and tail categories. In this paper, we propose a novel framework CLIS (multi-task Collaborative Learning with Image-level Supervision), which leverage image-level supervision to enhance the detection ability in a multi-task collaborative way. (2) a siamese sub-network for the image-classification task that shares its knowledge with the instance-classification task, resulting in feature enrichment of detectors. (3) a contrastive learning regularization that maintains representation consistency, bridging feature gaps of different supervision. Extensive experiments are conducted on the challenging LVIS dataset. Without sophisticated loss engineering, CLIS achieves an overall AP of 31.1 with 10.1 point improvement on tail categories, establishing a new state-of-the-art. Code will be at https://github.com/waveboo/CLIS.
abstract_zh: 现实世界中的目标检测数据通常呈现长尾分布。现有的解决方案通过减轻头部类别和尾部类别之间的竞争来解决这个问题。然而，由于训练样本的稀缺，尾部类别仍然无法学习判别性表示。将更多数据引入训练可能会缓解问题，但收集实例级注释是一项艰巨的任务。相比之下，图像级注释很容易访问，但尚未得到充分利用。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架 CLIS（具有图像级监督的多任务协作学习），它利用图像级监督以多任务协作的方式增强检测能力。具体来说，我们的框架中有一个对象检测任务（由实例分类任务和定位任务组成）和图像分类任务，负责利用两种类型的监督。不同的任务通过三个关键设计进行协作训练：（1）任务专用子网络，无需特征纠缠即可学习不同任务的特定表示。 （2）用于图像分类任务的暹罗子网络，与实例分类任务共享其知识，从而丰富检测器的特征。 （3）对比学习正则化，保持表示一致性，弥合不同监督的特征差距。在具有挑战性的 LVIS 数据集上进行了广泛的实验。在没有复杂的损失工程的情况下，CLIS 的整体 AP 达到了 31.1，尾部类别提高了 10.1 分，建立了新的最先进水平。代码位于 https://github.com/waveboo/CLIS。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CLIS的多任务协作学习框架，利用图像级监督提升长尾目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现实世界目标检测数据存在长尾分布问题，尾部类别因样本稀缺难以学习判别性特征，而图像级标注易获取但未被充分挖掘。
AI.method: 框架包含目标检测任务（实例分类与定位）和图像分类任务，通过三个设计实现协作：1) 任务专用子网络避免特征纠缠；2) 知识共享的Siamese网络增强检测器特征；3) 对比学习正则化保持表示一致性。
AI.result: 在LVIS数据集上，CLIS在尾部类别上提升10.1点，整体AP达31.1，刷新现有最优结果。
AI.conclusion: 通过多任务协作利用图像级监督，CLIS有效缓解长尾分布问题，为弱监督目标检测提供新思路。

search_text: Improving Long-tailed Object Detection with Image-Level Supervision by Multi-Task Collaborative Learning 通过多任务协作学习通过图像级监督改进长尾目标检测 Data in real-world object detection often exhibits the long-tailed distribution. Existing solutions tackle this problem by mitigating the competition between the head and tail categories. However, due to the scarcity of training samples, tail categories are still unable to learn discriminative representations. Bringing more data into the training may alleviate the problem, but collecting instance-level annotations is an excruciating task. In contrast, image-level annotations are easily accessible but not fully exploited. In this paper, we propose a novel framework CLIS (multi-task Collaborative Learning with Image-level Supervision), which leverage image-level supervision to enhance the detection ability in a multi-task collaborative way. Specifically, there are an object detection task (consisting of an instance-classification task and a localization task) and an image-classification task in our framework, responsible for utilizing the two types of supervision. Different tasks are trained collaboratively by three key designs: (1) task-specialized sub-networks that learn specific representations of different tasks without feature entanglement. (2) a siamese sub-network for the image-classification task that shares its knowledge with the instance-classification task, resulting in feature enrichment of detectors. (3) a contrastive learning regularization that maintains representation consistency, bridging feature gaps of different supervision. Extensive experiments are conducted on the challenging LVIS dataset. Without sophisticated loss engineering, CLIS achieves an overall AP of 31.1 with 10.1 point improvement on tail categories, establishing a new state-of-the-art. Code will be at https://github.com/waveboo/CLIS. 现实世界中的目标检测数据通常呈现长尾分布。现有的解决方案通过减轻头部类别和尾部类别之间的竞争来解决这个问题。然而，由于训练样本的稀缺，尾部类别仍然无法学习判别性表示。将更多数据引入训练可能会缓解问题，但收集实例级注释是一项艰巨的任务。相比之下，图像级注释很容易访问，但尚未得到充分利用。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架 CLIS（具有图像级监督的多任务协作学习），它利用图像级监督以多任务协作的方式增强检测能力。具体来说，我们的框架中有一个对象检测任务（由实例分类任务和定位任务组成）和图像分类任务，负责利用两种类型的监督。不同的任务通过三个关键设计进行协作训练：（1）任务专用子网络，无需特征纠缠即可学习不同任务的特定表示。 （2）用于图像分类任务的暹罗子网络，与实例分类任务共享其知识，从而丰富检测器的特征。 （3）对比学习正则化，保持表示一致性，弥合不同监督的特征差距。在具有挑战性的 LVIS 数据集上进行了广泛的实验。在没有复杂的损失工程的情况下，CLIS 的整体 AP 达到了 31.1，尾部类别提高了 10.1 分，建立了新的最先进水平。代码位于 https://github.com/waveboo/CLIS。 本文提出一种名为CLIS的多任务协作学习框架，利用图像级监督提升长尾目标检测性能。 Bo Li,Yongqiang Yao,Jingru Tan,Xin Lu,Fengwei Yu,Ye Luo,Jianwei Lu cs.CV

authors_text: Yong Liu,Ran Yu,Jiahao Wang,Xinyuan Zhao,Yitong Wang,Yansong Tang,Yujiu Yang
title: Global Spectral Filter Memory Network for Video Object Segmentation
title_zh: 用于视频对象分割的全局光谱滤波器内存网络
abstract: This paper studies semi-supervised video object segmentation through boosting intra-frame interaction. Recent memory network-based methods focus on exploiting inter-frame temporal reference while paying little attention to intra-frame spatial dependency. Specifically, these segmentation model tends to be susceptible to interference from unrelated nontarget objects in a certain frame. To this end, we propose Global Spectral Filter Memory network (GSFM), which improves intra-frame interaction through learning long-term spatial dependencies in the spectral domain. The key components of GSFM is 2D (inverse) discrete Fourier transform for spatial information mixing. Besides, we empirically find low frequency feature should be enhanced in encoder (backbone) while high frequency for decoder (segmentation head). We attribute this to semantic information extracting role for encoder and fine-grained details highlighting role for decoder. Thus, Low (High) Frequency Module is proposed to fit this circumstance. Extensive experiments on the popular DAVIS and YouTube-VOS benchmarks demonstrate that GSFM noticeably outperforms the baseline method and achieves state-of-the-art performance. Besides, extensive analysis shows that the proposed modules are reasonable and of great generalization ability. Our source code is available at https://github.com/workforai/GSFM.
summary: This paper studies semi-supervised video object segmentation through boosting intra-frame interaction. Recent memory network-based methods focus on exploiting inter-frame temporal reference while paying little attention to intra-frame spatial dependency. Specifically, these segmentation model tends to be susceptible to interference from unrelated nontarget objects in a certain frame. To this end, we propose Global Spectral Filter Memory network (GSFM), which improves intra-frame interaction through learning long-term spatial dependencies in the spectral domain. The key components of GSFM is 2D (inverse) discrete Fourier transform for spatial information mixing. Besides, we empirically find low frequency feature should be enhanced in encoder (backbone) while high frequency for decoder (segmentation head). We attribute this to semantic information extracting role for encoder and fine-grained details highlighting role for decoder. Thus, Low (High) Frequency Module is proposed to fit this circumstance. Extensive experiments on the popular DAVIS and YouTube-VOS benchmarks demonstrate that GSFM noticeably outperforms the baseline method and achieves state-of-the-art performance. Besides, extensive analysis shows that the proposed modules are reasonable and of great generalization ability. Our source code is available at https://github.com/workforai/GSFM.
abstract_zh: 本文通过增强帧内交互来研究半监督视频对象分割。最近的基于记忆网络的方法侧重于利用帧间时间参考，而很少关注帧内空间依赖性。具体来说，这些分割模型往往容易受到特定帧中不相关的非目标对象的干扰。为此，我们提出了全局谱滤波器记忆网络（GSFM），它通过学习谱域中的长期空间依赖性来改善帧内交互。 GSFM 的关键组件是用于空间信息混合的 2D（逆）离散傅里叶变换。此外，我们凭经验发现低频特征应在编码器（骨干）中增强，而高频特征应在解码器（分割头）中增强。我们将此归因于编码器的语义信息提取作用和解码器的细粒度细节突出作用。因此，低频（高频）模块就是为了适应这种情况而提出的。对流行的 DAVIS 和 YouTube-VOS 基准进行的大量实验表明，GSFM 明显优于基线方法并实现了最先进的性能。此外，大量的分析表明所提出的模块是合理的并且具有很强的泛化能力。我们的源代码可在 https://github.com/workforai/GSFM 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为GSFM的全局光谱滤波记忆网络，用于解决半监督视频对象分割问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于记忆网络的方法主要关注帧间时间参考，而忽视了帧内空间依赖性，导致模型容易受到非目标对象的干扰。
AI.method: GSFM通过在频域中学习长期空间依赖性来增强帧内交互，使用2D离散傅里叶变换进行空间信息混合，并提出高低频模块分别增强编码器和解码器的特征。
AI.result: 在DAVIS和YouTube-VOS基准测试中，GSFM显著优于基线方法，达到最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的模块合理且具有良好的泛化能力，为视频对象分割提供了有效的方法。
