authors_text: Jingru Tan,Bo Li,Xin Lu,Yongqiang Yao,Fengwei Yu,Tong He,Wanli Ouyang
title: The Equalization Losses: Gradient-Driven Training for Long-tailed Object Recognition
title_zh: 均衡损失：长尾物体识别的梯度驱动训练
abstract: Long-tail distribution is widely spread in real-world applications. Due to the extremely small ratio of instances, tail categories often show inferior accuracy. In this paper, we find such performance bottleneck is mainly caused by the imbalanced gradients, which can be categorized into two parts: (1) positive part, deriving from the samples of the same category, and (2) negative part, contributed by other categories. Based on comprehensive experiments, it is also observed that the gradient ratio of accumulated positives to negatives is a good indicator to measure how balanced a category is trained. Inspired by this, we come up with a gradient-driven training mechanism to tackle the long-tail problem: re-balancing the positive/negative gradients dynamically according to current accumulative gradients, with a unified goal of achieving balance gradient ratios. Taking advantage of the simple and flexible gradient mechanism, we introduce a new family of gradient-driven loss functions, namely equalization losses. We conduct extensive experiments on a wide spectrum of visual tasks, including two-stage/single-stage long-tailed object detection (LVIS), long-tailed image classification (ImageNet-LT, Places-LT, iNaturalist), and long-tailed semantic segmentation (ADE20K). Our method consistently outperforms the baseline models, demonstrating the effectiveness and generalization ability of the proposed equalization losses. Codes will be released at https://github.com/ModelTC/United-Perception.
summary: Long-tail distribution is widely spread in real-world applications. Due to the extremely small ratio of instances, tail categories often show inferior accuracy. In this paper, we find such performance bottleneck is mainly caused by the imbalanced gradients, which can be categorized into two parts: (1) positive part, deriving from the samples of the same category, and (2) negative part, contributed by other categories. Based on comprehensive experiments, it is also observed that the gradient ratio of accumulated positives to negatives is a good indicator to measure how balanced a category is trained. Inspired by this, we come up with a gradient-driven training mechanism to tackle the long-tail problem: re-balancing the positive/negative gradients dynamically according to current accumulative gradients, with a unified goal of achieving balance gradient ratios. Taking advantage of the simple and flexible gradient mechanism, we introduce a new family of gradient-driven loss functions, namely equalization losses. We conduct extensive experiments on a wide spectrum of visual tasks, including two-stage/single-stage long-tailed object detection (LVIS), long-tailed image classification (ImageNet-LT, Places-LT, iNaturalist), and long-tailed semantic segmentation (ADE20K). Our method consistently outperforms the baseline models, demonstrating the effectiveness and generalization ability of the proposed equalization losses. Codes will be released at https://github.com/ModelTC/United-Perception.
abstract_zh: 长尾分布在现实应用中广泛传播。由于实例比例极小，尾部类别的准确率通常较低。在本文中，我们发现这种性能瓶颈主要是由不平衡梯度引起的，它可以分为两部分：（1）正部分，来自同一类别的样本，（2）负部分，由其他类别贡献。基于综合实验，还观察到累积的正样本与负样本的梯度比是衡量类别训练平衡程度的一个很好的指标。受此启发，我们提出了一种梯度驱动的训练机制来解决长尾问题：根据当前累积的梯度动态地重新平衡正/负梯度，以实现平衡梯度比率为统一目标。利用简单灵活的梯度机制，我们引入了一系列新的梯度驱动损失函数，即均衡损失。我们对广泛的视觉任务进行了广泛的实验，包括两阶段/单阶段长尾目标检测（LVIS）、长尾图像分类（ImageNet-LT、Places-LT、iNaturalist）和长尾语义分割（ADE20K）。我们的方法始终优于基线模型，证明了所提出的均衡损失的有效性和泛化能力。代码将在 https://github.com/ModelTC/United-Perception 发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于梯度驱动的训练机制，用于解决长尾分布下的目标识别问题，通过动态平衡正负梯度比例来提升尾部类别的识别性能。
AI.motivation: 长尾分布中尾部类别因样本数量极少导致识别精度低下，传统方法未能有效解决梯度不平衡问题，需通过分析梯度分布机制寻找新方案。
AI.method: 提出梯度驱动训练机制，动态调整正负梯度比例，设计统一的等化损失函数家族，通过累积梯度比值衡量类别训练平衡性并实现梯度再平衡。
AI.result: 在LVIS、ImageNet-LT、ADE20K等多任务数据集上持续优于基线模型，验证了等化损失函数在长尾场景下的有效性与泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 梯度驱动的等化损失函数通过动态平衡正负梯度，有效缓解长尾分布问题，为多任务视觉识别提供了简单灵活的通用解决方案。

search_text: The Equalization Losses: Gradient-Driven Training for Long-tailed Object Recognition 均衡损失：长尾物体识别的梯度驱动训练 Long-tail distribution is widely spread in real-world applications. Due to the extremely small ratio of instances, tail categories often show inferior accuracy. In this paper, we find such performance bottleneck is mainly caused by the imbalanced gradients, which can be categorized into two parts: (1) positive part, deriving from the samples of the same category, and (2) negative part, contributed by other categories. Based on comprehensive experiments, it is also observed that the gradient ratio of accumulated positives to negatives is a good indicator to measure how balanced a category is trained. Inspired by this, we come up with a gradient-driven training mechanism to tackle the long-tail problem: re-balancing the positive/negative gradients dynamically according to current accumulative gradients, with a unified goal of achieving balance gradient ratios. Taking advantage of the simple and flexible gradient mechanism, we introduce a new family of gradient-driven loss functions, namely equalization losses. We conduct extensive experiments on a wide spectrum of visual tasks, including two-stage/single-stage long-tailed object detection (LVIS), long-tailed image classification (ImageNet-LT, Places-LT, iNaturalist), and long-tailed semantic segmentation (ADE20K). Our method consistently outperforms the baseline models, demonstrating the effectiveness and generalization ability of the proposed equalization losses. Codes will be released at https://github.com/ModelTC/United-Perception. 长尾分布在现实应用中广泛传播。由于实例比例极小，尾部类别的准确率通常较低。在本文中，我们发现这种性能瓶颈主要是由不平衡梯度引起的，它可以分为两部分：（1）正部分，来自同一类别的样本，（2）负部分，由其他类别贡献。基于综合实验，还观察到累积的正样本与负样本的梯度比是衡量类别训练平衡程度的一个很好的指标。受此启发，我们提出了一种梯度驱动的训练机制来解决长尾问题：根据当前累积的梯度动态地重新平衡正/负梯度，以实现平衡梯度比率为统一目标。利用简单灵活的梯度机制，我们引入了一系列新的梯度驱动损失函数，即均衡损失。我们对广泛的视觉任务进行了广泛的实验，包括两阶段/单阶段长尾目标检测（LVIS）、长尾图像分类（ImageNet-LT、Places-LT、iNaturalist）和长尾语义分割（ADE20K）。我们的方法始终优于基线模型，证明了所提出的均衡损失的有效性和泛化能力。代码将在 https://github.com/ModelTC/United-Perception 发布。 本文提出了一种基于梯度驱动的训练机制，用于解决长尾分布下的目标识别问题，通过动态平衡正负梯度比例来提升尾部类别的识别性能。 Jingru Tan,Bo Li,Xin Lu,Yongqiang Yao,Fengwei Yu,Tong He,Wanli Ouyang cs.CV

authors_text: Jhony H. Giraldo,Vincenzo Scarrica,Antonino Staiano,Francesco Camastra,Thierry Bouwmans
title: Hypergraph Convolutional Networks for Weakly-Supervised Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于弱监督语义分割的超图卷积网络
comment: Accepted in IEEE International Conference on Image Processing 2022
comments: Accepted in IEEE International Conference on Image Processing 2022
abstract: Semantic segmentation is a fundamental topic in computer vision. Several deep learning methods have been proposed for semantic segmentation with outstanding results. However, these models require a lot of densely annotated images. To address this problem, we propose a new algorithm that uses HyperGraph Convolutional Networks for Weakly-supervised Semantic Segmentation (HyperGCN-WSS). Our algorithm constructs spatial and k-Nearest Neighbor (k-NN) graphs from the images in the dataset to generate the hypergraphs. Then, we train a specialized HyperGraph Convolutional Network (HyperGCN) architecture using some weak signals. The outputs of the HyperGCN are denominated pseudo-labels, which are later used to train a DeepLab model for semantic segmentation. HyperGCN-WSS is evaluated on the PASCAL VOC 2012 dataset for semantic segmentation, using scribbles or clicks as weak signals. Our algorithm shows competitive performance against previous methods.
summary: Semantic segmentation is a fundamental topic in computer vision. Several deep learning methods have been proposed for semantic segmentation with outstanding results. However, these models require a lot of densely annotated images. To address this problem, we propose a new algorithm that uses HyperGraph Convolutional Networks for Weakly-supervised Semantic Segmentation (HyperGCN-WSS). Our algorithm constructs spatial and k-Nearest Neighbor (k-NN) graphs from the images in the dataset to generate the hypergraphs. Then, we train a specialized HyperGraph Convolutional Network (HyperGCN) architecture using some weak signals. The outputs of the HyperGCN are denominated pseudo-labels, which are later used to train a DeepLab model for semantic segmentation. HyperGCN-WSS is evaluated on the PASCAL VOC 2012 dataset for semantic segmentation, using scribbles or clicks as weak signals. Our algorithm shows competitive performance against previous methods.
abstract_zh: 语义分割是计算机视觉中的一个基本主题。已经提出了几种用于语义分割的深度学习方法，并取得了显着的效果。然而，这些模型需要大量密集注释的图像。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种使用超图卷积网络进行弱监督语义分割的新算法（HyperGCN-WSS）。我们的算法根据数据集中的图像构建空间图和 k 最近邻 (k-NN) 图来生成超图。然后，我们使用一些弱信号训练专门的超图卷积网络（HyperGCN）架构。 HyperGCN 的输出被命名为伪标签，随后用于训练用于语义分割的 DeepLab 模型。 HyperGCN-WSS 在 PASCAL VOC 2012 数据集上进行语义分割评估，使用涂鸦或点击作为弱信号。我们的算法显示出与以前的方法相比具有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于超图卷积网络的弱监督语义分割方法HyperGCN-WSS，通过利用弱标注信号（如涂鸦或点击）减少对密集标注数据的依赖。
AI.motivation: 传统语义分割模型需要大量密集标注的图像，而获取这些标注成本高昂。本文旨在通过弱监督学习降低标注需求。
AI.method: 从数据集中构建空间图和k-NN图生成超图，训练超图卷积网络（HyperGCN）生成伪标签，再用伪标签训练DeepLab模型进行语义分割。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC 2012数据集上，使用涂鸦或点击作为弱信号时，HyperGCN-WSS的表现与先前方法具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 超图卷积网络能有效利用弱标注信号进行语义分割，为减少密集标注需求提供了可行方案。

Several deep learning methods have been proposed for semantic segmentation with outstanding results. However, these models require a lot of densely annotated images. To address this problem, we propose a new algorithm that uses HyperGraph Convolutional Networks for Weakly-supervised Semantic Segmentation (HyperGCN-WSS). authors_text: Chen Henry Wu,Fernando De la Torre
title: Unifying Diffusion Models' Latent Space, with Applications to CycleDiffusion and Guidance
title_zh: 统一扩散模型的潜在空间，及其在循环扩散和引导中的应用
abstract: Diffusion models have achieved unprecedented performance in generative modeling. The commonly-adopted formulation of the latent code of diffusion models is a sequence of gradually denoised samples, as opposed to the simpler (e.g., Gaussian) latent space of GANs, VAEs, and normalizing flows. This paper provides an alternative, Gaussian formulation of the latent space of various diffusion models, as well as an invertible DPM-Encoder that maps images into the latent space. While our formulation is purely based on the definition of diffusion models, we demonstrate several intriguing consequences. (1) Empirically, we observe that a common latent space emerges from two diffusion models trained independently on related domains. In light of this finding, we propose CycleDiffusion, which uses DPM-Encoder for unpaired image-to-image translation. Furthermore, applying CycleDiffusion to text-to-image diffusion models, we show that large-scale text-to-image diffusion models can be used as zero-shot image-to-image editors. (2) One can guide pre-trained diffusion models and GANs by controlling the latent codes in a unified, plug-and-play formulation based on energy-based models. Using the CLIP model and a face recognition model as guidance, we demonstrate that diffusion models have better coverage of low-density sub-populations and individuals than GANs. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/ChenWu98/cycle-diffusion.
summary: Diffusion models have achieved unprecedented performance in generative modeling. The commonly-adopted formulation of the latent code of diffusion models is a sequence of gradually denoised samples, as opposed to the simpler (e.g., Gaussian) latent space of GANs, VAEs, and normalizing flows. This paper provides an alternative, Gaussian formulation of the latent space of various diffusion models, as well as an invertible DPM-Encoder that maps images into the latent space. While our formulation is purely based on the definition of diffusion models, we demonstrate several intriguing consequences. (1) Empirically, we observe that a common latent space emerges from two diffusion models trained independently on related domains. In light of this finding, we propose CycleDiffusion, which uses DPM-Encoder for unpaired image-to-image translation. Furthermore, applying CycleDiffusion to text-to-image diffusion models, we show that large-scale text-to-image diffusion models can be used as zero-shot image-to-image editors. (2) One can guide pre-trained diffusion models and GANs by controlling the latent codes in a unified, plug-and-play formulation based on energy-based models. Using the CLIP model and a face recognition model as guidance, we demonstrate that diffusion models have better coverage of low-density sub-populations and individuals than GANs. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/ChenWu98/cycle-diffusion.
abstract_zh: 扩散模型在生成建模中取得了前所未有的性能。扩散模型潜在代码的普遍采用的表述是一系列逐渐去噪的样本，这与 GAN、VAE 和归一化流的更简单（例如高斯）潜在空间相反。本文提供了各种扩散模型的潜在空间的替代高斯公式，以及将图像映射到潜在空间的可逆 DPM 编码器。虽然我们的公式纯粹基于扩散模型的定义，但我们展示了一些有趣的结果。 (1) 根据经验，我们观察到一个共同的潜在空间是从在相关领域独立训练的两个扩散模型中出现的。鉴于这一发现，我们提出了 CycleDiffusion，它使用 DPM-Encoder 进行不配对的图像到图像的转换。此外，将 CycleDiffusion 应用于文本到图像扩散模型，我们表明大规模文本到图像扩散模型可以用作零样本图像到图像编辑器。 (2) 通过控制基于能量模型的统一、即插即用公式中的潜在代码，可以指导预训练的扩散模型和 GAN。使用 CLIP 模型和人脸识别模型作为指导，我们证明扩散模型比 GAN 能够更好地覆盖低密度子群体和个体。该代码可在 https://github.com/ChenWu98/cycle-diffusion 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一扩散模型潜在空间的方法，并应用于CycleDiffusion和指导生成。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型的潜在空间通常由逐步去噪的样本序列组成，与GANs、VAEs等模型的简单潜在空间不同。本文旨在提供一种基于高斯分布的潜在空间表示，以简化扩散模型的应用并提升其灵活性。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于高斯分布的潜在空间表示，并设计了一个可逆的DPM-Encoder，将图像映射到潜在空间。此外，还提出了CycleDiffusion，用于无配对图像到图像的转换，并展示了如何通过控制潜在代码来指导预训练的扩散模型和GANs。
AI.result: 实验表明，不同领域训练的扩散模型可以共享一个潜在空间。CycleDiffusion可用于无配对图像转换，并能将大规模文本到图像的扩散模型作为零样本图像编辑工具。同时，扩散模型在低密度子人群和个体的覆盖上优于GANs。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过统一扩散模型的潜在空间，提出了CycleDiffusion和潜在代码指导的新方法，为扩散模型的应用提供了更广泛的可能。

search_text: Unifying Diffusion Models' Latent Space, with Applications to CycleDiffusion and Guidance 统一扩散模型的潜在空间，及其在循环扩散和引导中的应用 Diffusion models have achieved unprecedented performance in generative modeling. The commonly-adopted formulation of the latent code of diffusion models is a sequence of gradually denoised samples, as opposed to the simpler (e.g., Gaussian) latent space of GANs, VAEs, and normalizing flows. This paper provides an alternative, Gaussian formulation of the latent space of various diffusion models, as well as an invertible DPM-Encoder that maps images into the latent space. While our formulation is purely based on the definition of diffusion models, we demonstrate several intriguing consequences. (1) Empirically, we observe that a common latent space emerges from two diffusion models trained independently on related domains. In light of this finding, we propose CycleDiffusion, which uses DPM-Encoder for unpaired image-to-image translation. Furthermore, applying CycleDiffusion to text-to-image diffusion models, we show that large-scale text-to-image diffusion models can be used as zero-shot image-to-image editors. (2) One can guide pre-trained diffusion models and GANs by controlling the latent codes in a unified, plug-and-play formulation based on energy-based models. Using the CLIP model and a face recognition model as guidance, we demonstrate that diffusion models have better coverage of low-density sub-populations and individuals than GANs. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/ChenWu98/cycle-diffusion. 扩散模型在生成建模中取得了前所未有的性能。扩散模型潜在代码的普遍采用的表述是一系列逐渐去噪的样本，这与 GAN、VAE 和归一化流的更简单（例如高斯）潜在空间相反。本文提供了各种扩散模型的潜在空间的替代高斯公式，以及将图像映射到潜在空间的可逆 DPM 编码器。虽然我们的公式纯粹基于扩散模型的定义，但我们展示了一些有趣的结果。 (1) 根据经验，我们观察到一个共同的潜在空间是从在相关领域独立训练的两个扩散模型中出现的。鉴于这一发现，我们提出了 CycleDiffusion，它使用 DPM-Encoder 进行不配对的图像到图像的转换。此外，将 CycleDiffusion 应用于文本到图像扩散模型，我们表明大规模文本到图像扩散模型可以用作零样本图像到图像编辑器。 (2) 通过控制基于能量模型的统一、即插即用公式中的潜在代码，可以指导预训练的扩散模型和 GAN。使用 CLIP 模型和人脸识别模型作为指导，我们证明扩散模型比 GAN 能够更好地覆盖低密度子群体和个体。该代码可在 https://github.com/ChenWu98/cycle-diffusion 上公开获取。 本文提出了一种统一扩散模型潜在空间的方法，并应用于CycleDiffusion和指导生成。 Chen Henry Wu,Fernando De la Torre cs.CV,cs.GR,cs.LG

authors_text: Xiaole Tang,Xile Zhao,Jun Liu,Jianli Wang,Yuchun Miao,Tieyong Zeng
title: Uncertainty-Aware Unsupervised Image Deblurring with Deep Residual Prior
title_zh: 利用深度残差先验进行不确定性感知的无监督图像去模糊
abstract: Non-blind deblurring methods achieve decent performance under the accurate blur kernel assumption. Since the kernel uncertainty (i.e. kernel error) is inevitable in practice, semi-blind deblurring is suggested to handle it by introducing the prior of the kernel (or induced) error. However, how to design a suitable prior for the kernel (or induced) error remains challenging. Hand-crafted prior, incorporating domain knowledge, generally performs well but may lead to poor performance when kernel (or induced) error is complex. Data-driven prior, which excessively depends on the diversity and abundance of training data, is vulnerable to out-of-distribution blurs and images. To address this challenge, we suggest a dataset-free deep residual prior for the kernel induced error (termed as residual) expressed by a customized untrained deep neural network, which allows us to flexibly adapt to different blurs and images in real scenarios. By organically integrating the respective strengths of deep priors and hand-crafted priors, we propose an unsupervised semi-blind deblurring model which recovers the latent image from the blurry image and inaccurate blur kernel. To tackle the formulated model, an efficient alternating minimization algorithm is developed. Extensive experiments demonstrate the favorable performance of the proposed method as compared to data-driven and model-driven methods in terms of image quality and the robustness to the kernel error.
summary: Non-blind deblurring methods achieve decent performance under the accurate blur kernel assumption. Since the kernel uncertainty (i.e. kernel error) is inevitable in practice, semi-blind deblurring is suggested to handle it by introducing the prior of the kernel (or induced) error. However, how to design a suitable prior for the kernel (or induced) error remains challenging. Hand-crafted prior, incorporating domain knowledge, generally performs well but may lead to poor performance when kernel (or induced) error is complex. Data-driven prior, which excessively depends on the diversity and abundance of training data, is vulnerable to out-of-distribution blurs and images. To address this challenge, we suggest a dataset-free deep residual prior for the kernel induced error (termed as residual) expressed by a customized untrained deep neural network, which allows us to flexibly adapt to different blurs and images in real scenarios. By organically integrating the respective strengths of deep priors and hand-crafted priors, we propose an unsupervised semi-blind deblurring model which recovers the latent image from the blurry image and inaccurate blur kernel. To tackle the formulated model, an efficient alternating minimization algorithm is developed. Extensive experiments demonstrate the favorable performance of the proposed method as compared to data-driven and model-driven methods in terms of image quality and the robustness to the kernel error.
abstract_zh: 非盲去模糊方法在精确的模糊核假设下取得了不错的性能。由于核不确定性（即核误差）在实践中是不可避免的，因此建议通过引入核（或诱导）误差的先验来处理半盲去模糊。然而，如何为内核（或诱发）误差设计合适的先验仍然具有挑战性。手工设计的先验，结合领域知识，通常表现良好，但当内核（或引起的）错误很复杂时，可能会导致性能不佳。数据驱动的先验过度依赖于训练数据的多样性和丰富性，很容易受到分布模糊和图像的影响。为了应对这一挑战，我们建议对由定制的未经训练的深度神经网络表示的内核引起的误差（称为残差）使用无数据集的深度残差先验，这使我们能够灵活地适应实际场景中的不同模糊和图像。通过有机地结合深度先验和手工先验的各自优势，我们提出了一种无监督半盲去模糊模型，可以从模糊图像和不准确的模糊核中恢复潜在图像。为了解决公式化模型，开发了一种有效的交替最小化算法。大量的实验证明，与数据驱动和模型驱动的方法相比，该方法在图像质量和对核误差的鲁棒性方面具有良好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需数据集的深度残差先验方法，用于处理图像去模糊中的核不确定性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理核误差时存在局限性：手工先验难以应对复杂误差，数据驱动先验依赖训练数据且泛化能力差。
AI.method: 设计定制化未训练神经网络表达核诱导误差，结合深度先验与手工先验优势，提出半盲去模糊模型并开发交替优化算法。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在图像质量与核误差鲁棒性方面优于数据驱动和模型驱动方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过融合深度先验与手工先验，在无需数据集的情况下有效解决了核不确定性问题。

Since the kernel uncertainty (i.e. kernel error) is inevitable in practice, semi-blind deblurring is suggested to handle it by introducing the prior of the kernel (or induced) error. However, how to design a suitable prior for the kernel (or induced) error remains challenging. Hand-crafted prior, incorporating domain knowledge, generally performs well but may lead to poor performance when kernel (or induced) error is complex. Data-driven prior, which excessively depends on the diversity and abundance of training data, is vulnerable to out-of-distribution blurs and images. To address this challenge, we suggest a dataset-free deep residual prior for the kernel induced error (termed as residual) expressed by a customized untrained deep neural network, which allows us to flexibly adapt to different blurs and images in real scenarios. By organically integrating the respective strengths of deep priors and hand-crafted priors, we propose an unsupervised semi-blind deblurring model which recovers the latent image from the blurry image and inaccurate blur kernel. To tackle the formulated model, an efficient alternating minimization algorithm is developed. Extensive experiments demonstrate the favorable performance of the proposed method as compared to data-driven and model-driven methods in terms of image quality and the robustness to the kernel error. 非盲去模糊方法在精确的模糊核假设下取得了不错的性能。由于核不确定性（即核误差）在实践中是不可避免的，因此建议通过引入核（或诱导）误差的先验来处理半盲去模糊。然而，如何为内核（或诱发）误差设计合适的先验仍然具有挑战性。手工设计的先验，结合领域知识，通常表现良好，但当内核（或引起的）错误很复杂时，可能会导致性能不佳。数据驱动的先验过度依赖于训练数据的多样性和丰富性，很容易受到分布模糊和图像的影响。为了应对这一挑战，我们建议对由定制的未经训练的深度神经网络表示的内核引起的误差（称为残差）使用无数据集的深度残差先验，这使我们能够灵活地适应实际场景中的不同模糊和图像。通过有机地结合深度先验和手工先验的各自优势，我们提出了一种无监督半盲去模糊模型，可以从模糊图像和不准确的模糊核中恢复潜在图像。为了解决公式化模型，开发了一种有效的交替最小化算法。大量的实验证明，与数据驱动和模型驱动的方法相比，该方法在图像质量和对核误差的鲁棒性方面具有良好的性能。 本文提出一种无需数据集的深度残差先验方法，用于处理图像去模糊中的核不确定性问题。 Xiaole Tang,Xile Zhao,Jun Liu,Jianli Wang,Yuchun Miao,Tieyong Zeng cs.CV

authors_text: Ruibo Liu,Jason Wei,Shixiang Shane Gu,Te-Yen Wu,Soroush Vosoughi,Claire Cui,Denny Zhou,Andrew M. Dai
title: Mind's Eye: Grounded Language Model Reasoning through Simulation
title_zh: Mind's Eye：通过模拟进行基础语言模型推理
abstract: Successful and effective communication between humans and AI relies on a shared experience of the world. By training solely on written text, current language models (LMs) miss the grounded experience of humans in the real-world -- their failure to relate language to the physical world causes knowledge to be misrepresented and obvious mistakes in their reasoning. We present Mind's Eye, a paradigm to ground language model reasoning in the physical world. Given a physical reasoning question, we use a computational physics engine (DeepMind's MuJoCo) to simulate the possible outcomes, and then use the simulation results as part of the input, which enables language models to perform reasoning. Experiments on 39 tasks in a physics alignment benchmark demonstrate that Mind's Eye can improve reasoning ability by a large margin (27.9% zero-shot, and 46.0% few-shot absolute accuracy improvement on average). Smaller language models armed with Mind's Eye can obtain similar performance to models that are 100x larger. Finally, we confirm the robustness of Mind's Eye through ablation studies.
summary: Successful and effective communication between humans and AI relies on a shared experience of the world. By training solely on written text, current language models (LMs) miss the grounded experience of humans in the real-world -- their failure to relate language to the physical world causes knowledge to be misrepresented and obvious mistakes in their reasoning. We present Mind's Eye, a paradigm to ground language model reasoning in the physical world. Given a physical reasoning question, we use a computational physics engine (DeepMind's MuJoCo) to simulate the possible outcomes, and then use the simulation results as part of the input, which enables language models to perform reasoning. Experiments on 39 tasks in a physics alignment benchmark demonstrate that Mind's Eye can improve reasoning ability by a large margin (27.9% zero-shot, and 46.0% few-shot absolute accuracy improvement on average). Smaller language models armed with Mind's Eye can obtain similar performance to models that are 100x larger. Finally, we confirm the robustness of Mind's Eye through ablation studies.
abstract_zh: 人类与人工智能之间成功且有效的沟通依赖于对世界的共享经验。通过仅对书面文本进行训练，当前的语言模型（LM）错过了人类在现实世界中的基础经验——他们无法将语言与物理世界联系起来，导致知识被歪曲，并且在推理中出现明显的错误。我们提出了 Mind's Eye，这是物理世界中基础语言模型推理的范例。给定一个物理推理问题，我们使用计算物理引擎（DeepMind 的 MuJoCo）来模拟可能的结果，然后将模拟结果作为输入的一部分，从而使语言模型能够执行推理。在物理对齐基准中对 39 个任务进行的实验表明，Mind's Eye 可以大幅提高推理能力（零样本绝对准确率平均提高 27.9%，少样本绝对准确率平均提高 46.0%）。配备 Mind's Eye 的较小语言模型可以获得与 100 倍大的模型相似的性能。最后，我们通过消融研究确认了 Mind's Eye 的稳健性。

AI.tldr: 提出Mind's Eye方法，通过物理模拟增强语言模型的物理世界推理能力
AI.motivation: 现有语言模型因缺乏现实世界体验而无法正确关联语言与物理世界，导致推理错误
AI.method: 利用计算物理引擎（如MuJoCo）模拟物理场景，将模拟结果作为输入辅助语言模型进行推理
AI.result: 在物理对齐基准测试中，零样本和少样本准确率分别提升27.9%和46.0%，小模型性能接近大模型
AI.conclusion: 通过消融实验验证了Mind's Eye方法的有效性和鲁棒性

conclusion: 通过消融实验验证了Mind's Eye方法的有效性和鲁棒性
search_text: Mind's Eye: Grounded Language Model Reasoning through Simulation Mind's Eye：通过模拟进行基础语言模型推理 Successful and effective communication between humans and AI relies on a shared experience of the world. By training solely on written text, current language models (LMs) miss the grounded experience of humans in the real-world -- their failure to relate language to the physical world causes knowledge to be misrepresented and obvious mistakes in their reasoning. We present Mind's Eye, a paradigm to ground language model reasoning in the physical world. Given a physical reasoning question, we use a computational physics engine (DeepMind's MuJoCo) to simulate the possible outcomes, and then use the simulation results as part of the input, which enables language models to perform reasoning. Experiments on 39 tasks in a physics alignment benchmark demonstrate that Mind's Eye can improve reasoning ability by a large margin (27.9% zero-shot, and 46.0% few-shot absolute accuracy improvement on average). Smaller language models armed with Mind's Eye can obtain similar performance to models that are 100x larger. Finally, we confirm the robustness of Mind's Eye through ablation studies. 人类与人工智能之间成功且有效的沟通依赖于对世界的共享经验。通过仅对书面文本进行训练，当前的语言模型（LM）错过了人类在现实世界中的基础经验——他们无法将语言与物理世界联系起来，导致知识被歪曲，并且在推理中出现明显的错误。我们提出了 Mind's Eye，这是物理世界中基础语言模型推理的范例。给定一个物理推理问题，我们使用计算物理引擎（DeepMind 的 MuJoCo）来模拟可能的结果，然后将模拟结果作为输入的一部分，从而使语言模型能够执行推理。在物理对齐基准中对 39 个任务进行的实验表明，Mind's Eye 可以大幅提高推理能力（零样本绝对准确率平均提高 27.9%，少样本绝对准确率平均提高 46.0%）。配备 Mind's Eye 的较小语言模型可以获得与 100 倍大的模型相似的性能。最后，我们通过消融研究确认了 Mind's Eye 的稳健性。 提出Mind's Eye方法，通过物理模拟增强语言模型的物理世界推理能力 Ruibo Liu,Jason Wei,Shixiang Shane Gu,Te-Yen Wu,Soroush Vosoughi,Claire Cui,Denny Zhou,Andrew M. Dai cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Haoning Wu,Chaofeng Chen,Liang Liao,Jingwen Hou,Wenxiu Sun,Qiong Yan,Jinwei Gu,Weisi Lin
title: Neighbourhood Representative Sampling for Efficient End-to-end Video Quality Assessment
title_zh: 用于高效端到端视频质量评估的邻里代表采样
abstract: The increased resolution of real-world videos presents a dilemma between efficiency and accuracy for deep Video Quality Assessment (VQA). On the one hand, keeping the original resolution will lead to unacceptable computational costs. On the other hand, existing practices, such as resizing and cropping, will change the quality of original videos due to the loss of details and contents, and are therefore harmful to quality assessment. With the obtained insight from the study of spatial-temporal redundancy in the human visual system and visual coding theory, we observe that quality information around a neighbourhood is typically similar, motivating us to investigate an effective quality-sensitive neighbourhood representatives scheme for VQA. In this work, we propose a unified scheme, spatial-temporal grid mini-cube sampling (St-GMS) to get a novel type of sample, named fragments. Full-resolution videos are first divided into mini-cubes with preset spatial-temporal grids, then the temporal-aligned quality representatives are sampled to compose the fragments that serve as inputs for VQA. In addition, we design the Fragment Attention Network (FANet), a network architecture tailored specifically for fragments. With fragments and FANet, the proposed efficient end-to-end FAST-VQA and FasterVQA achieve significantly better performance than existing approaches on all VQA benchmarks while requiring only 1/1612 FLOPs compared to the current state-of-the-art. Codes, models and demos are available at https://github.com/timothyhtimothy/FAST-VQA-and-FasterVQA.
summary: The increased resolution of real-world videos presents a dilemma between efficiency and accuracy for deep Video Quality Assessment (VQA). On the one hand, keeping the original resolution will lead to unacceptable computational costs. On the other hand, existing practices, such as resizing and cropping, will change the quality of original videos due to the loss of details and contents, and are therefore harmful to quality assessment. With the obtained insight from the study of spatial-temporal redundancy in the human visual system and visual coding theory, we observe that quality information around a neighbourhood is typically similar, motivating us to investigate an effective quality-sensitive neighbourhood representatives scheme for VQA. In this work, we propose a unified scheme, spatial-temporal grid mini-cube sampling (St-GMS) to get a novel type of sample, named fragments. Full-resolution videos are first divided into mini-cubes with preset spatial-temporal grids, then the temporal-aligned quality representatives are sampled to compose the fragments that serve as inputs for VQA. In addition, we design the Fragment Attention Network (FANet), a network architecture tailored specifically for fragments. With fragments and FANet, the proposed efficient end-to-end FAST-VQA and FasterVQA achieve significantly better performance than existing approaches on all VQA benchmarks while requiring only 1/1612 FLOPs compared to the current state-of-the-art. Codes, models and demos are available at https://github.com/timothyhtimothy/FAST-VQA-and-FasterVQA.
abstract_zh: 现实世界视频分辨率的提高给深度视频质量评估 (VQA) 带来了效率和准确性之间的困境。一方面，保持原始分辨率会导致不可接受的计算成本。另一方面，现有的调整大小和裁剪等做法会因细节和内容的丢失而改变原始视频的质量，因此不利于质量评估。通过对人类视觉系统时空冗余和视觉编码理论的研究，我们观察到邻域周围的质量信息通常是相似的，这促使我们研究一种有效的 VQA 质量敏感邻域代表方案。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种统一的方案，时空网格小立方体采样（St-GMS）来获得一种新型样本，称为片段。全分辨率视频首先被分成具有预设时空网格的迷你立方体，然后对时间对齐的质量代表进行采样以组成用作 VQA 输入的片段。此外，我们还设计了片段注意力网络（FANet），这是一种专门为片段量身定制的网络架构。借助片段和 FANet，所提出的高效端到端 FAST-VQA 和 FasterVQA 在所有 VQA 基准上比现有方法实现了显着更好的性能，而与当前最先进的技术相比，仅需要 1/1612 FLOP。代码、模型和演示可在 https://github.com/timothyhtimothy/FAST-VQA-and-FasterVQA 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效端到端视频质量评估方法，通过邻域代表性抽样解决高分辨率视频在计算效率与评估精度间的矛盾。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率视频导致传统VQA方法计算成本过高，而降分辨率或裁剪操作会破坏视频内容细节，影响质量评估准确性。
AI.method: 提出空间-时间网格微立方抽样（St-GMS）将全分辨率视频分割为时空网格单元，采样邻域质量代表生成片段（fragments），并设计片段注意力网络（FANet）进行特征提取与评估。
AI.result: FAST-VQA和FasterVQA在主流VQA基准测试中显著优于现有方法，计算量仅为当前最优方法的1/1612。
AI.conclusion: 通过时空冗余特性建模与碎片化输入设计，实现了视频质量评估的高效性与精度平衡，为实际应用提供可行方案。

authors_text: Sen-Zhe Xu,Jia-Hong Liu,Miao Wang,Fang-Lue Zhang,Song-Hai Zhang
title: Multi-User Redirected Walking in Separate Physical Spaces for Online VR Scenarios
title_zh: 在线 VR 场景的多用户在单独物理空间中的重定向行走
abstract: With the recent rise of Metaverse, online multiplayer VR applications are becoming increasingly prevalent worldwide. Allowing users to move easily in virtual environments is crucial for high-quality experiences in such collaborative VR applications. This paper focuses on redirected walking technology (RDW) to allow users to move beyond the confines of the limited physical environments (PE). The existing RDW methods lack the scheme to coordinate multiple users in different PEs, and thus have the issue of triggering too many resets for all the users. We propose a novel multi-user RDW method that is able to significantly reduce the overall reset number and give users a better immersive experience by providing a more continuous exploration. Our key idea is to first find out the "bottleneck" user that may cause all users to be reset and estimate the time to reset, and then redirect all the users to favorable poses during that maximized bottleneck time to ensure the subsequent resets can be postponed as much as possible. More particularly, we develop methods to estimate the time of possibly encountering obstacles and the reachable area for a specific pose to enable the prediction of the next reset caused by any user. Our experiments and user study found that our method outperforms existing RDW methods in online VR applications.
summary: With the recent rise of Metaverse, online multiplayer VR applications are becoming increasingly prevalent worldwide. Allowing users to move easily in virtual environments is crucial for high-quality experiences in such collaborative VR applications. This paper focuses on redirected walking technology (RDW) to allow users to move beyond the confines of the limited physical environments (PE). The existing RDW methods lack the scheme to coordinate multiple users in different PEs, and thus have the issue of triggering too many resets for all the users. We propose a novel multi-user RDW method that is able to significantly reduce the overall reset number and give users a better immersive experience by providing a more continuous exploration. Our key idea is to first find out the "bottleneck" user that may cause all users to be reset and estimate the time to reset, and then redirect all the users to favorable poses during that maximized bottleneck time to ensure the subsequent resets can be postponed as much as possible. More particularly, we develop methods to estimate the time of possibly encountering obstacles and the reachable area for a specific pose to enable the prediction of the next reset caused by any user. Our experiments and user study found that our method outperforms existing RDW methods in online VR applications.
abstract_zh: 随着Metaverse的兴起，在线多人VR应用程序在全球范围内变得越来越流行。允许用户在虚拟环境中轻松移动对于此类协作 VR 应用程序的高质量体验至关重要。本文重点介绍重定向行走技术（RDW），以允许用户超越有限的物理环境（PE）的限制。现有的RDW方法缺乏协调不同PE中的多个用户的方案，因此存在对所有用户触发过多重置的问题。我们提出了一种新颖的多用户 RDW 方法，该方法能够显着减少总体重置次数，并通过提供更连续的探索为用户提供更好的沉浸式体验。我们的关键思想是首先找出可能导致所有用户重置的“瓶颈”用户并估计重置时间，然后在最大化瓶颈时间内将所有用户重定向到有利的姿势，以确保后续重置能够尽可能推迟。更具体地说，我们开发了方法来估计可能遇到障碍物的时间和特定姿势的可到达区域，以便能够预测由任何用户引起的下一次重置。我们的实验和用户研究发现，我们的方法在在线 VR 应用中优于现有的 RDW 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多用户重定向行走技术，用于在线VR场景中减少用户重置次数并提升沉浸感。
AI.motivation: 现有重定向行走技术无法协调不同物理空间中的多用户，导致频繁触发重置，影响用户体验。
AI.method: 通过识别可能引发全局重置的‘瓶颈’用户，预估重置时间，并在该时间段内将所有用户引导至有利姿态，以最大化延迟后续重置。
AI.result: 实验和用户研究表明，该方法在在线VR应用中显著优于现有重定向行走技术。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效降低了多用户VR场景中的重置次数，为协作式虚拟现实应用提供了更连续的探索体验。

Our key idea is to first find out the "bottleneck" user that may cause all users to be reset and estimate the time to reset, and then redirect all the users to favorable poses during that maximized bottleneck time to ensure the subsequent resets can be postponed as much as possible. More particularly, we develop methods to estimate the time of possibly encountering obstacles and the reachable area for a specific pose to enable the prediction of the next reset caused by any user. Our experiments and user study found that our method outperforms existing RDW methods in online VR applications. 随着Metaverse的兴起，在线多人VR应用程序在全球范围内变得越来越流行。允许用户在虚拟环境中轻松移动对于此类协作 VR 应用程序的高质量体验至关重要。本文重点介绍重定向行走技术（RDW），以允许用户超越有限的物理环境（PE）的限制。现有的RDW方法缺乏协调不同PE中的多个用户的方案，因此存在对所有用户触发过多重置的问题。我们提出了一种新颖的多用户 RDW 方法，该方法能够显着减少总体重置次数，并通过提供更连续的探索为用户提供更好的沉浸式体验。我们的关键思想是首先找出可能导致所有用户重置的“瓶颈”用户并估计重置时间，然后在最大化瓶颈时间内将所有用户重定向到有利的姿势，以确保后续重置能够尽可能推迟。更具体地说，我们开发了方法来估计可能遇到障碍物的时间和特定姿势的可到达区域，以便能够预测由任何用户引起的下一次重置。我们的实验和用户研究发现，我们的方法在在线 VR 应用中优于现有的 RDW 方法。 本文提出一种多用户重定向行走技术，用于在线VR场景中减少用户重置次数并提升沉浸感。 Sen-Zhe Xu,Jia-Hong Liu,Miao Wang,Fang-Lue Zhang,Song-Hai Zhang cs.HC,cs.GR

authors_text: Ashwin Agrawal,Vishal Singh,Martin Fischer
title: A new perspective on Digital Twins: Imparting intelligence and agency to entities
title_zh: 数字孪生的新视角：向实体赋予情报和代理权
comment: ef:IEEE Journal of Radio Frequency Identification 2022
comments: ef:IEEE Journal of Radio Frequency Identification 2022
abstract: Despite the Digital Twin (DT) concept being in the industry for a long time, it remains ambiguous, unable to differentiate itself from information models, general computing, and simulation technologies. Part of this confusion stems from previous studies overlooking the DT's bidirectional nature, that enables the shift of agency (delegating control) from humans to physical elements, something that was not possible with earlier technologies. Thus, we present DTs in a new light by viewing them as a means of imparting intelligence and agency to entities, emphasizing that DTs are not just expert-centric tools but are active systems that extend the capabilities of the entities being twinned. This new perspective on DTs can help reduce confusion and humanize the concept by starting discussions about how intelligent a DT should be, and its roles and responsibilities, as well as setting a long-term direction for DTs.
summary: Despite the Digital Twin (DT) concept being in the industry for a long time, it remains ambiguous, unable to differentiate itself from information models, general computing, and simulation technologies. Part of this confusion stems from previous studies overlooking the DT's bidirectional nature, that enables the shift of agency (delegating control) from humans to physical elements, something that was not possible with earlier technologies. Thus, we present DTs in a new light by viewing them as a means of imparting intelligence and agency to entities, emphasizing that DTs are not just expert-centric tools but are active systems that extend the capabilities of the entities being twinned. This new perspective on DTs can help reduce confusion and humanize the concept by starting discussions about how intelligent a DT should be, and its roles and responsibilities, as well as setting a long-term direction for DTs.
abstract_zh: 尽管数字孪生（DT）概念在业界存在很长时间，但它仍然很模糊，无法与信息模型、通用计算和仿真技术区分开来。这种混乱的部分原因在于之前的研究忽视了 DT 的双向性质，这种性质使得代理（委托控制）从人类转移到物理元素，这是早期技术不可能实现的。因此，我们以新的视角呈现DT，将其视为向实体传递情报和代理的一种手段，强调DT不仅仅是以专家为中心的工具，而且是扩展配对实体能力的主动系统。这种关于 DT 的新视角可以通过开始讨论 DT 应该有多智能、其角色和责任以及为 DT 设定长期方向来帮助减少混乱并使概念人性化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出数字孪生的新视角，强调其通过赋予实体智能和自主权来扩展实体能力。
AI.motivation: 现有数字孪生概念定义模糊，难以与信息模型等技术区分，且未充分重视其双向特性及代理权转移能力。
AI.method: 通过重新定义数字孪生为智能自主系统，突出其非专家中心化特性及对实体能力的扩展作用。
AI.result: 澄清了数字孪生概念，减少技术混淆，并为讨论其智能水平、责任角色及长期发展方向提供框架。
AI.conclusion: 新视角有助于推动数字孪生从工具属性向自主智能体演进，明确其未来研究与应用方向。

authors_text: Peng Xu,Zhiyuan Chen,Jiankun Wang,Max Q. -H. Meng
title: Extrinsic Manipulation on a Support Plane by Learning Regrasping
title_zh: 通过学习重新抓取在支撑平面上进行外部操纵
abstract: Extrinsic manipulation, a technique that enables robots to leverage extrinsic resources for object manipulation, presents practical yet challenging scenarios. Particularly in the context of extrinsic manipulation on a supporting plane, regrasping becomes essential for achieving the desired final object poses. This process involves sequential operation steps and stable placements of objects, which provide grasp space for the robot. To address this challenge, we focus on predicting diverse placements of objects on the plane using deep neural networks. A framework that comprises orientation generation, placement refinement, and placement discrimination stages is proposed, leveraging point clouds to obtain precise and diverse stable placements. To facilitate training, a large-scale dataset is constructed, encompassing stable object placements and contact information between objects. Through extensive experiments, our approach is demonstrated to outperform the start-of-the-art, achieving an accuracy rate of 90.4\% and a diversity rate of 81.3\% in predicted placements. Furthermore, we validate the effectiveness of our approach through real-robot experiments, demonstrating its capability to compute sequential pick-and-place steps based on the predicted placements for regrasping objects to goal poses that are not readily attainable within a single step. Videos and dataset are available at https://sites.google.com/view/pmvlr2022/.
summary: Extrinsic manipulation, a technique that enables robots to leverage extrinsic resources for object manipulation, presents practical yet challenging scenarios. Particularly in the context of extrinsic manipulation on a supporting plane, regrasping becomes essential for achieving the desired final object poses. This process involves sequential operation steps and stable placements of objects, which provide grasp space for the robot. To address this challenge, we focus on predicting diverse placements of objects on the plane using deep neural networks. A framework that comprises orientation generation, placement refinement, and placement discrimination stages is proposed, leveraging point clouds to obtain precise and diverse stable placements. To facilitate training, a large-scale dataset is constructed, encompassing stable object placements and contact information between objects. Through extensive experiments, our approach is demonstrated to outperform the start-of-the-art, achieving an accuracy rate of 90.4\% and a diversity rate of 81.3\% in predicted placements. Furthermore, we validate the effectiveness of our approach through real-robot experiments, demonstrating its capability to compute sequential pick-and-place steps based on the predicted placements for regrasping objects to goal poses that are not readily attainable within a single step. Videos and dataset are available at https://sites.google.com/view/pmvlr2022/.
abstract_zh: 外部操纵是一种使机器人能够利用外部资源进行对象操纵的技术，提出了实用但具有挑战性的场景。特别是在支撑平面上进行外部操作的情况下，重新抓取对于实现所需的最终物体姿势至关重要。这个过程涉及顺序操作步骤和物体的稳定放置，这为机器人提供了抓取空间。为了应对这一挑战，我们专注于使用深度神经网络预测物体在平面上的不同位置。提出了一个包括方向生成、放置细化和放置辨别阶段的框架，利用点云获得精确且多样化的稳定放置。为了便于训练，构建了一个大规模数据集，其中包含稳定的对象放置和对象之间的联系信息。通过大量的实验，我们的方法被证明优于最先进的方法，在预测的展示位置中实现了 90.4% 的准确率和 81.3% 的多样性率。此外，我们通过真实的机器人实验验证了我们的方法的有效性，证明了它能够根据预测的位置来计算顺序拾取和放置步骤，以将物体重新抓取到目标姿势，而这些姿势在单个步骤中是不容易实现的。视频和数据集可在 https://sites.google.com/view/pmvlr2022/ 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过学习重抓取实现支撑平面上外在操作的方法，利用深度神经网络预测物体的多样化稳定放置位置，以完成复杂的操作任务。
AI.motivation: 在支撑平面上进行外在操作时，机器人需要通过重抓取实现目标物体姿态，但现有方法难以有效预测稳定且多样化的放置位置，限制了操作效率与灵活性。
AI.method: 提出包含方向生成、放置优化和放置判别阶段的框架，基于点云数据预测稳定放置位置，并构建包含物体稳定放置及接触信息的大规模数据集进行训练。
AI.result: 在预测放置位置任务中达到90.4%的准确率和81.3%的多样性率，实际机器人实验验证了其计算顺序抓取-放置步骤的有效性，可实现单步难以完成的目标姿态。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过深度学习有效解决了支撑平面上外在操作的重抓取问题，为复杂物体操作提供了高效且通用的解决方案。

authors_text: Roman Chaban,Olga Taran,Joakim Tutt,Yury Belousov,Brian Pulfer,Taras Holotyak,Slava Voloshynovskiy
title: Printing variability of copy detection patterns
title_zh: 复印检测图案的打印可变性
abstract: Copy detection pattern (CDP) is a novel solution for products' protection against counterfeiting, which gains its popularity in recent years. CDP attracts the anti-counterfeiting industry due to its numerous benefits in comparison to alternative protection techniques. Besides its attractiveness, there is an essential gap in the fundamental analysis of CDP authentication performance in large-scale industrial applications. It concerns variability of CDP parameters under different production conditions that include a type of printer, substrate, printing resolution, etc. Since digital off-set printing represents great flexibility in terms of product personalized in comparison with traditional off-set printing, it looks very interesting to address the above concerns for digital off-set printers that are used by several companies for the CDP protection of physical objects. In this paper, we thoroughly investigate certain factors impacting CDP. The experimental results obtained during our study reveal some previously unknown results and raise new and even more challenging questions. The results prove that it is a matter of great importance to choose carefully the substrate or printer for CDP production. This paper presents a new dataset produced by two industrial HP Indigo printers. The similarity between printed CDP and the digital templates, from which they have been produced, is chosen as a simple measure in our study. We found several particularities that might be of interest for large-scale industrial applications.

The similarity between printed CDP and the digital templates, from which they have been produced, is chosen as a simple measure in our study. We found several particularities that might be of interest for large-scale industrial applications.
abstract_zh: 复制检测模式（CDP）是一种新颖的产品防伪解决方案，近年来受到欢迎。与替代保护技术相比，CDP 因其众多优势而吸引了防伪行业。除了其吸引力之外，CDP认证性能在大规模工业应用中的基本分析还存在本质差距。它涉及不同生产条件下的 CDP 参数的变化，包括打印机类型、承印物、印刷分辨率等。由于与传统胶印相比，数字胶印在产品个性化方面具有很大的灵活性，因此解决多家公司使用的数字胶印机对物理对象进行 CDP 保护的上述问题看起来非常有趣。在本文中，我们深入研究了影响 CDP 的某些因素。我们研究期间获得的实验结果揭示了一些以前未知的结果，并提出了新的、甚至更具挑战性的问题。结果证明，仔细选择用于CDP生产的基材或打印机是非常重要的。本文介绍了由两台工业 HP Indigo 打印机生成的新数据集。我们的研究中选择印刷 CDP 与生成它们的数字模板之间的相似性作为简单的衡量标准。我们发现了大规模工业应用可能感兴趣的几个特性。

AI.motivation: 尽管CDP在防伪中受欢迎，但其在大规模工业应用中的认证性能分析存在关键缺口，需研究不同生产条件下的参数变化
AI.method: 通过实验分析数字胶印机生产CDP时的参数变化，使用两个工业HP Indigo打印机生成数据集，并以印刷CDP与数字模板的相似性作为衡量指标
AI.result: 实验揭示了CDP印刷变异性中的新现象，证明选择合适的基材或打印机对CDP生产至关重要
AI.conclusion: 工业应用中需谨慎选择基材和打印机，并需进一步研究以解决新出现的挑战

search_text: Printing variability of copy detection patterns 复印检测图案的打印可变性 Copy detection pattern (CDP) is a novel solution for products' protection against counterfeiting, which gains its popularity in recent years. CDP attracts the anti-counterfeiting industry due to its numerous benefits in comparison to alternative protection techniques. Besides its attractiveness, there is an essential gap in the fundamental analysis of CDP authentication performance in large-scale industrial applications. It concerns variability of CDP parameters under different production conditions that include a type of printer, substrate, printing resolution, etc. Since digital off-set printing represents great flexibility in terms of product personalized in comparison with traditional off-set printing, it looks very interesting to address the above concerns for digital off-set printers that are used by several companies for the CDP protection of physical objects. In this paper, we thoroughly investigate certain factors impacting CDP. The experimental results obtained during our study reveal some previously unknown results and raise new and even more challenging questions. The results prove that it is a matter of great importance to choose carefully the substrate or printer for CDP production. This paper presents a new dataset produced by two industrial HP Indigo printers. The similarity between printed CDP and the digital templates, from which they have been produced, is chosen as a simple measure in our study. We found several particularities that might be of interest for large-scale industrial applications. 复制检测模式（CDP）是一种新颖的产品防伪解决方案，近年来受到欢迎。与替代保护技术相比，CDP 因其众多优势而吸引了防伪行业。除了其吸引力之外，CDP认证性能在大规模工业应用中的基本分析还存在本质差距。它涉及不同生产条件下的 CDP 参数的变化，包括打印机类型、承印物、印刷分辨率等。由于与传统胶印相比，数字胶印在产品个性化方面具有很大的灵活性，因此解决多家公司使用的数字胶印机对物理对象进行 CDP 保护的上述问题看起来非常有趣。在本文中，我们深入研究了影响 CDP 的某些因素。我们研究期间获得的实验结果揭示了一些以前未知的结果，并提出了新的、甚至更具挑战性的问题。结果证明，仔细选择用于CDP生产的基材或打印机是非常重要的。本文介绍了由两台工业 HP Indigo 打印机生成的新数据集。我们的研究中选择印刷 CDP 与生成它们的数字模板之间的相似性作为简单的衡量标准。我们发现了大规模工业应用可能感兴趣的几个特性。 研究数字胶印机在不同生产条件下对复制检测模式（CDP）印刷变异性的影响 Roman Chaban,Olga Taran,Joakim Tutt,Yury Belousov,Brian Pulfer,Taras Holotyak,Slava Voloshynovskiy cs.CR,cs.CV

authors_text: Yatai Ji,Junjie Wang,Yuan Gong,Lin Zhang,Yanru Zhu,Hongfa Wang,Jiaxing Zhang,Tetsuya Sakai,Yujiu Yang
title: MAP: Multimodal Uncertainty-Aware Vision-Language Pre-training Model
title_zh: MAP：多模态不确定性感知视觉语言预训练模型
abstract: Multimodal semantic understanding often has to deal with uncertainty, which means the obtained messages tend to refer to multiple targets. Such uncertainty is problematic for our interpretation, including inter- and intra-modal uncertainty. Little effort has studied the modeling of this uncertainty, particularly in pre-training on unlabeled datasets and fine-tuning in task-specific downstream datasets. In this paper, we project the representations of all modalities as probabilistic distributions via a Probability Distribution Encoder (PDE) by utilizing sequence-level interactions. Compared to the existing deterministic methods, such uncertainty modeling can convey richer multimodal semantic information and more complex relationships. Furthermore, we integrate uncertainty modeling with popular pre-training frameworks and propose suitable pre-training tasks: Distribution-based Vision-Language Contrastive learning (D-VLC), Distribution-based Masked Language Modeling (D-MLM), and Distribution-based Image-Text Matching (D-ITM). The fine-tuned models are applied to challenging downstream tasks, including image-text retrieval, visual question answering, visual reasoning, and visual entailment, and achieve state-of-the-art results.
summary: Multimodal semantic understanding often has to deal with uncertainty, which means the obtained messages tend to refer to multiple targets. Such uncertainty is problematic for our interpretation, including inter- and intra-modal uncertainty. Little effort has studied the modeling of this uncertainty, particularly in pre-training on unlabeled datasets and fine-tuning in task-specific downstream datasets. In this paper, we project the representations of all modalities as probabilistic distributions via a Probability Distribution Encoder (PDE) by utilizing sequence-level interactions. Compared to the existing deterministic methods, such uncertainty modeling can convey richer multimodal semantic information and more complex relationships. Furthermore, we integrate uncertainty modeling with popular pre-training frameworks and propose suitable pre-training tasks: Distribution-based Vision-Language Contrastive learning (D-VLC), Distribution-based Masked Language Modeling (D-MLM), and Distribution-based Image-Text Matching (D-ITM). The fine-tuned models are applied to challenging downstream tasks, including image-text retrieval, visual question answering, visual reasoning, and visual entailment, and achieve state-of-the-art results.
abstract_zh: 多模态语义理解通常需要处理不确定性，这意味着获得的消息往往涉及多个目标。这种不确定性对我们的解释来说是有问题的，包括模式间和模式内的不确定性。人们很少研究这种不确定性的建模，特别是在未标记数据集的预训练和特定任务下游数据集的微调方面。在本文中，我们利用序列级交互，通过概率分布编码器（PDE）将所有模态的表示投影为概率分布。与现有的确定性方法相比，这种不确定性建模可以传达更丰富的多模态语义信息和更复杂的关系。此外，我们将不确定性建模与流行的预训练框架相结合，并提出了合适的预训练任务：基于分布的视觉语言对比学习（D-VLC）、基于分布的掩码语言建模（D-MLM）和基于分布的图像文本匹配（D-ITM）。经过微调的模型应用于具有挑战性的下游任务，包括图像文本检索、视觉问答、视觉推理和视觉蕴涵，并取得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态不确定性感知的视觉-语言预训练模型MAP，通过概率分布编码器建模模态间的不确定性，并设计新的预训练任务以提升下游任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未充分处理多模态语义理解中的不确定性问题，尤其在未标注数据预训练和下游任务微调阶段缺乏有效建模手段。
AI.method: 引入概率分布编码器（PDE）将多模态表征转化为概率分布，设计基于分布的对比学习（D-VLC）、掩码语言建模（D-MLM）和图像-文本匹配（D-ITM）预训练任务。
AI.result: 在图像-文本检索、视觉问答等下游任务中取得当前最优结果，验证了不确定性建模的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模多模态不确定性，提出的MAP框架显著提升了视觉-语言预训练模型的语义理解能力与任务适应性。

authors_text: Iris Dominguez-Catena,Daniel Paternain,Mikel Galar
title: Gender Stereotyping Impact in Facial Expression Recognition
title_zh: 性别刻板印象对面部表情识别的影响
comment: Presented at SoGood 2022, The 7th Workshop on Data Science for Social Good, held in conjunction with ECML PKDD 2022, in September 2022, at Grenoble, France
comments: Presented at SoGood 2022, The 7th Workshop on Data Science for Social Good, held in conjunction with ECML PKDD 2022, in September 2022, at Grenoble, France
abstract: Facial Expression Recognition (FER) uses images of faces to identify the emotional state of users, allowing for a closer interaction between humans and autonomous systems. Unfortunately, as the images naturally integrate some demographic information, such as apparent age, gender, and race of the subject, these systems are prone to demographic bias issues. In recent years, machine learning-based models have become the most popular approach to FER. These models require training on large datasets of facial expression images, and their generalization capabilities are strongly related to the characteristics of the dataset. In publicly available FER datasets, apparent gender representation is usually mostly balanced, but their representation in the individual label is not, embedding social stereotypes into the datasets and generating a potential for harm. Although this type of bias has been overlooked so far, it is important to understand the impact it may have in the context of FER. To do so, we use a popular FER dataset, FER+, to generate derivative datasets with different amounts of stereotypical bias by altering the gender proportions of certain labels. We then proceed to measure the discrepancy between the performance of the models trained on these datasets for the apparent gender groups. We observe a discrepancy in the recognition of certain emotions between genders of up to $29 \%$ under the worst bias conditions. Our results also suggest a safety range for stereotypical bias in a dataset that does not appear to produce stereotypical bias in the resulting model. Our findings support the need for a thorough bias analysis of public datasets in problems like FER, where a global balance of demographic representation can still hide other types of bias that harm certain demographic groups.
summary: Facial Expression Recognition (FER) uses images of faces to identify the emotional state of users, allowing for a closer interaction between humans and autonomous systems. Unfortunately, as the images naturally integrate some demographic information, such as apparent age, gender, and race of the subject, these systems are prone to demographic bias issues. In recent years, machine learning-based models have become the most popular approach to FER. These models require training on large datasets of facial expression images, and their generalization capabilities are strongly related to the characteristics of the dataset. In publicly available FER datasets, apparent gender representation is usually mostly balanced, but their representation in the individual label is not, embedding social stereotypes into the datasets and generating a potential for harm. Although this type of bias has been overlooked so far, it is important to understand the impact it may have in the context of FER. To do so, we use a popular FER dataset, FER+, to generate derivative datasets with different amounts of stereotypical bias by altering the gender proportions of certain labels. We then proceed to measure the discrepancy between the performance of the models trained on these datasets for the apparent gender groups. We observe a discrepancy in the recognition of certain emotions between genders of up to $29 \%$ under the worst bias conditions. Our results also suggest a safety range for stereotypical bias in a dataset that does not appear to produce stereotypical bias in the resulting model. Our findings support the need for a thorough bias analysis of public datasets in problems like FER, where a global balance of demographic representation can still hide other types of bias that harm certain demographic groups.
abstract_zh: 面部表情识别（FER）使用面部图像来识别用户的情绪状态，从而实现人类与自主系统之间更紧密的交互。不幸的是，由于图像自然地整合了一些人口统计信息，例如对象的明显年龄、性别和种族，这些系统很容易出现人口统计偏差问题。近年来，基于机器学习的模型已成为最流行的 FER 方法。这些模型需要在大型面部表情图像数据集上进行训练，其泛化能力与数据集的特征密切相关。在公开的 FER 数据集中，表面上的性别代表性通常大多是平衡的，但它们在个人标签中的代表性却并非如此，这将社会刻板印象嵌入到数据集中并产生潜在的伤害。尽管迄今为止这种类型的偏见已被忽视，但了解它在 FER 背景下可能产生的影响非常重要。为此，我们使用流行的 FER 数据集 FER+，通过改变某些标签的性别比例来生成具有不同刻板偏见程度的衍生数据集。然后，我们继续测量在这些数据集上针对明显性别群体训练的模型的性能之间的差异。我们观察到，在最坏的偏见条件下，性别之间对某些情绪的识别差异高达 29 \%$。我们的结果还提出了数据集中刻板偏见的安全范围，该范围似乎不会在结果模型中产生刻板偏见。我们的研究结果支持在 FER 等问题中对公共数据集进行彻底的偏见分析的必要性，其中人口代表性的全球平衡仍然可以隐藏损害某些人口群体的其他类型的偏见。

AI.tldr: 研究性别刻板印象对面部表情识别模型性能的影响，分析数据集中的隐性偏差如何导致模型在不同性别间的识别差异。
AI.motivation: 现有面部表情识别数据集虽表面性别平衡，但标签中嵌入的社会刻板印象可能引发模型对特定群体的识别偏差，需揭示此类隐性危害。
AI.method: 基于FER+数据集，通过调整标签性别比例构建不同刻板印象强度的子数据集，训练模型后对比不同性别组的识别准确率差异。
AI.result: 极端偏差条件下，特定情绪识别准确率性别差异达29%，并确定了数据集中可接受的刻板印象偏差安全阈值。
AI.conclusion: 需对公共数据集进行深度偏差分析，表面的群体平衡可能掩盖标签层面的刻板印象，进而影响模型公平性。

search_text: Gender Stereotyping Impact in Facial Expression Recognition 性别刻板印象对面部表情识别的影响 Facial Expression Recognition (FER) uses images of faces to identify the emotional state of users, allowing for a closer interaction between humans and autonomous systems. Unfortunately, as the images naturally integrate some demographic information, such as apparent age, gender, and race of the subject, these systems are prone to demographic bias issues. In recent years, machine learning-based models have become the most popular approach to FER. These models require training on large datasets of facial expression images, and their generalization capabilities are strongly related to the characteristics of the dataset. In publicly available FER datasets, apparent gender representation is usually mostly balanced, but their representation in the individual label is not, embedding social stereotypes into the datasets and generating a potential for harm. Although this type of bias has been overlooked so far, it is important to understand the impact it may have in the context of FER. To do so, we use a popular FER dataset, FER+, to generate derivative datasets with different amounts of stereotypical bias by altering the gender proportions of certain labels. We then proceed to measure the discrepancy between the performance of the models trained on these datasets for the apparent gender groups. We observe a discrepancy in the recognition of certain emotions between genders of up to $29 \%$ under the worst bias conditions. Our results also suggest a safety range for stereotypical bias in a dataset that does not appear to produce stereotypical bias in the resulting model. Our findings support the need for a thorough bias analysis of public datasets in problems like FER, where a global balance of demographic representation can still hide other types of bias that harm certain demographic groups. 面部表情识别（FER）使用面部图像来识别用户的情绪状态，从而实现人类与自主系统之间更紧密的交互。不幸的是，由于图像自然地整合了一些人口统计信息，例如对象的明显年龄、性别和种族，这些系统很容易出现人口统计偏差问题。近年来，基于机器学习的模型已成为最流行的 FER 方法。这些模型需要在大型面部表情图像数据集上进行训练，其泛化能力与数据集的特征密切相关。在公开的 FER 数据集中，表面上的性别代表性通常大多是平衡的，但它们在个人标签中的代表性却并非如此，这将社会刻板印象嵌入到数据集中并产生潜在的伤害。尽管迄今为止这种类型的偏见已被忽视，但了解它在 FER 背景下可能产生的影响非常重要。为此，我们使用流行的 FER 数据集 FER+，通过改变某些标签的性别比例来生成具有不同刻板偏见程度的衍生数据集。然后，我们继续测量在这些数据集上针对明显性别群体训练的模型的性能之间的差异。我们观察到，在最坏的偏见条件下，性别之间对某些情绪的识别差异高达 29 \%$。我们的结果还提出了数据集中刻板偏见的安全范围，该范围似乎不会在结果模型中产生刻板偏见。我们的研究结果支持在 FER 等问题中对公共数据集进行彻底的偏见分析的必要性，其中人口代表性的全球平衡仍然可以隐藏损害某些人口群体的其他类型的偏见。 研究性别刻板印象对面部表情识别模型性能的影响，分析数据集中的隐性偏差如何导致模型在不同性别间的识别差异。 Iris Dominguez-Catena,Daniel Paternain,Mikel Galar cs.CV

authors_text: Sander Beckers,Hana Chockler,Joseph Y. Halpern
title: A Causal Analysis of Harm
title_zh: 危害的因果分析
abstract: As autonomous systems rapidly become ubiquitous, there is a growing need for a legal and regulatory framework to address when and how such a system harms someone. There have been several attempts within the philosophy literature to define harm, but none of them has proven capable of dealing with with the many examples that have been presented, leading some to suggest that the notion of harm should be abandoned and "replaced by more well-behaved notions". As harm is generally something that is caused, most of these definitions have involved causality at some level. Yet surprisingly, none of them makes use of causal models and the definitions of actual causality that they can express. In this paper we formally define a qualitative notion of harm that uses causal models and is based on a well-known definition of actual causality (Halpern, 2016). The key novelty of our definition is that it is based on contrastive causation and uses a default utility to which the utility of actual outcomes is compared. We show that our definition is able to handle the examples from the literature, and illustrate its importance for reasoning about situations involving autonomous systems.
summary: As autonomous systems rapidly become ubiquitous, there is a growing need for a legal and regulatory framework to address when and how such a system harms someone. There have been several attempts within the philosophy literature to define harm, but none of them has proven capable of dealing with with the many examples that have been presented, leading some to suggest that the notion of harm should be abandoned and "replaced by more well-behaved notions". As harm is generally something that is caused, most of these definitions have involved causality at some level. Yet surprisingly, none of them makes use of causal models and the definitions of actual causality that they can express. In this paper we formally define a qualitative notion of harm that uses causal models and is based on a well-known definition of actual causality (Halpern, 2016). The key novelty of our definition is that it is based on contrastive causation and uses a default utility to which the utility of actual outcomes is compared. We show that our definition is able to handle the examples from the literature, and illustrate its importance for reasoning about situations involving autonomous systems.
abstract_zh: 随着自主系统迅速普及，越来越需要法律和监管框架来解决此类系统何时以及如何伤害某人的问题。哲学文献中曾多次尝试定义伤害，但没有一个被证明能够处理已经提出的许多例子，导致一些人建议应该放弃伤害的概念并“用更行为良好的概念取代”。由于伤害通常是造成的，因此大多数定义都在某种程度上涉及因果关系。然而令人惊讶的是，他们都没有使用因果模型以及它们可以表达的实际因果关系的定义。在本文中，我们使用因果模型正式定义了伤害的定性概念，并基于实际因果关系的众所周知的定义（Halpern，2016）。我们定义的关键新颖之处在于，它基于对比因果关系，并使用默认效用来与实际结果的效用进行比较。我们证明我们的定义能够处理文献中的例子，并说明它对于推理涉及自治系统的情况的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于因果模型的伤害定义，用于解决自主系统引发的法律和监管问题。
AI.motivation: 现有哲学文献中对伤害的定义无法有效处理自主系统带来的复杂案例，需建立更严谨的因果分析框架。
AI.method: 结合Halpern（2016）的实际因果性定义，采用对比因果关系和默认效用比较的定性方法。
AI.result: 新定义成功处理文献中的案例，并凸显其在自主系统场景下的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为法律和监管领域提供了更可靠的伤害分析工具，推动自主系统的责任界定。

authors_text: Niklas Gard,Anna Hilsmann,Peter Eisert
title: CASAPose: Class-Adaptive and Semantic-Aware Multi-Object Pose Estimation
title_zh: CASAPose：类自适应和语义感知的多对象姿态估计
comment: BMVC 2022, camera-ready version (this submission includes the paper and supplementary material)
comments: BMVC 2022, camera-ready version (this submission includes the paper and supplementary material)
abstract: Applications in the field of augmented reality or robotics often require joint localisation and 6D pose estimation of multiple objects. However, most algorithms need one network per object class to be trained in order to provide the best results. Analysing all visible objects demands multiple inferences, which is memory and time-consuming. We present a new single-stage architecture called CASAPose that determines 2D-3D correspondences for pose estimation of multiple different objects in RGB images in one pass. It is fast and memory efficient, and achieves high accuracy for multiple objects by exploiting the output of a semantic segmentation decoder as control input to a keypoint recognition decoder via local class-adaptive normalisation. Our new differentiable regression of keypoint locations significantly contributes to a faster closing of the domain gap between real test and synthetic training data. We apply segmentation-aware convolutions and upsampling operations to increase the focus inside the object mask and to reduce mutual interference of occluding objects. For each inserted object, the network grows by only one output segmentation map and a negligible number of parameters. We outperform state-of-the-art approaches in challenging multi-object scenes with inter-object occlusion and synthetic training.
summary: Applications in the field of augmented reality or robotics often require joint localisation and 6D pose estimation of multiple objects. However, most algorithms need one network per object class to be trained in order to provide the best results. Analysing all visible objects demands multiple inferences, which is memory and time-consuming. We present a new single-stage architecture called CASAPose that determines 2D-3D correspondences for pose estimation of multiple different objects in RGB images in one pass. It is fast and memory efficient, and achieves high accuracy for multiple objects by exploiting the output of a semantic segmentation decoder as control input to a keypoint recognition decoder via local class-adaptive normalisation. Our new differentiable regression of keypoint locations significantly contributes to a faster closing of the domain gap between real test and synthetic training data. We apply segmentation-aware convolutions and upsampling operations to increase the focus inside the object mask and to reduce mutual interference of occluding objects. For each inserted object, the network grows by only one output segmentation map and a negligible number of parameters. We outperform state-of-the-art approaches in challenging multi-object scenes with inter-object occlusion and synthetic training.
abstract_zh: 增强现实或机器人领域的应用通常需要多个对象的联合定位和 6D 姿态估计。然而，大多数算法需要为每个对象类别训练一个网络才能提供最佳结果。分析所有可见对象需要多次推理，这既费内存又费时间。我们提出了一种名为 CASAPose 的新单级架构，它可以一次确定 RGB 图像中多个不同对象的姿态估计的 2D-3D 对应关系。它速度快、内存效率高，并且通过局部类自适应归一化利用语义分割解码器的输出作为关键点识别解码器的控制输入，实现了多个对象的高精度。我们新的关键点位置可微回归显着有助于更快地缩小真实测试数据和合成训练数据之间的域差距。我们应用分段感知卷积和上采样操作来增加对象掩模内的焦点并减少遮挡对象的相互干扰。对于每个插入的对象，网络仅增长一个输出分割图和可忽略数量的参数。我们通过对象间遮挡和综合训练来挑战多对象场景，其表现优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CASAPose的单阶段架构，用于在RGB图像中实现多物体的2D-3D对应关系和6D姿态估计。
AI.motivation: 现有方法需为每个物体类别训练独立网络，导致内存消耗大且效率低，难以实时处理多物体场景。
AI.method: 通过语义分割解码器输出控制关键点识别解码器的局部类别自适应归一化，结合可微分关键点回归和分割感知卷积，实现单次推理处理多物体姿态估计。
AI.result: 在存在物体遮挡和合成训练数据的复杂场景中，优于现有最先进的多物体姿态估计方法。
AI.conclusion: CASAPose通过高效架构设计，在保证精度的同时显著降低计算和内存开销，为多物体姿态估计提供新思路。

However, most algorithms need one network per object class to be trained in order to provide the best results. Analysing all visible objects demands multiple inferences, which is memory and time-consuming. We present a new single-stage architecture called CASAPose that determines 2D-3D correspondences for pose estimation of multiple different objects in RGB images in one pass. It is fast and memory efficient, and achieves high accuracy for multiple objects by exploiting the output of a semantic segmentation decoder as control input to a keypoint recognition decoder via local class-adaptive normalisation. Our new differentiable regression of keypoint locations significantly contributes to a faster closing of the domain gap between real test and synthetic training data. We apply segmentation-aware convolutions and upsampling operations to increase the focus inside the object mask and to reduce mutual interference of occluding objects. For each inserted object, the network grows by only one output segmentation map and a negligible number of parameters. We outperform state-of-the-art approaches in challenging multi-object scenes with inter-object occlusion and synthetic training. 增强现实或机器人领域的应用通常需要多个对象的联合定位和 6D 姿态估计。然而，大多数算法需要为每个对象类别训练一个网络才能提供最佳结果。分析所有可见对象需要多次推理，这既费内存又费时间。我们提出了一种名为 CASAPose 的新单级架构，它可以一次确定 RGB 图像中多个不同对象的姿态估计的 2D-3D 对应关系。它速度快、内存效率高，并且通过局部类自适应归一化利用语义分割解码器的输出作为关键点识别解码器的控制输入，实现了多个对象的高精度。我们新的关键点位置可微回归显着有助于更快地缩小真实测试数据和合成训练数据之间的域差距。我们应用分段感知卷积和上采样操作来增加对象掩模内的焦点并减少遮挡对象的相互干扰。对于每个插入的对象，网络仅增长一个输出分割图和可忽略数量的参数。我们通过对象间遮挡和综合训练来挑战多对象场景，其表现优于最先进的方法。 本文提出一种名为CASAPose的单阶段架构，用于在RGB图像中实现多物体的2D-3D对应关系和6D姿态估计。 Niklas Gard,Anna Hilsmann,Peter Eisert cs.CV

authors_text: Ermiyas Birihanu,Jiyan Mahmud,Péter Kiss,Adolf Kamuzora,Wadie Skaf,Tomáš Horváth,Tamás Jursonovics,Peter Pogrzeba,Imre Lendák
title: Client Error Clustering Approaches in Content Delivery Networks (CDN)
title_zh: 内容分发网络 (CDN) 中的客户端错误聚类方法
abstract: Content delivery networks (CDNs) are the backbone of the Internet and are key in delivering high quality video on demand (VoD), web content and file services to billions of users. CDNs usually consist of hierarchically organized content servers positioned as close to the customers as possible. CDN operators face a significant challenge when analyzing billions of web server and proxy logs generated by their systems. The main objective of this study was to analyze the applicability of various clustering methods in CDN error log analysis. We worked with real-life CDN proxy logs, identified key features included in the logs (e.g., content type, HTTP status code, time-of-day, host) and clustered the log lines corresponding to different host types offering live TV, video on demand, file caching and web content. Our experiments were run on a dataset consisting of proxy logs collected over a 7-day period from a single, physical CDN server running multiple types of services (VoD, live TV, file). The dataset consisted of 2.2 billion log lines. Our analysis showed that CDN error clustering is a viable approach towards identifying recurring errors and improving overall quality of service.
summary: Content delivery networks (CDNs) are the backbone of the Internet and are key in delivering high quality video on demand (VoD), web content and file services to billions of users. CDNs usually consist of hierarchically organized content servers positioned as close to the customers as possible. CDN operators face a significant challenge when analyzing billions of web server and proxy logs generated by their systems. The main objective of this study was to analyze the applicability of various clustering methods in CDN error log analysis. We worked with real-life CDN proxy logs, identified key features included in the logs (e.g., content type, HTTP status code, time-of-day, host) and clustered the log lines corresponding to different host types offering live TV, video on demand, file caching and web content. Our experiments were run on a dataset consisting of proxy logs collected over a 7-day period from a single, physical CDN server running multiple types of services (VoD, live TV, file). The dataset consisted of 2.2 billion log lines. Our analysis showed that CDN error clustering is a viable approach towards identifying recurring errors and improving overall quality of service.
abstract_zh: 内容交付网络 (CDN) 是互联网的支柱，是向数十亿用户提供高质量视频点播 (VoD)、网络内容和文件服务的关键。 CDN 通常由分层组织的内容服务器组成，这些服务器尽可能靠近客户。 CDN 运营商在分析其系统生成的数十亿个 Web 服务器和代理日志时面临着重大挑战。本研究的主要目的是分析各种聚类方法在 CDN 错误日志分析中的适用性。我们使用现实生活中的 CDN 代理日志，识别日志中包含的关键特征（例如，内容类型、HTTP 状态代码、当天时间、主机），并对提供直播电视、视频点播、文件缓存和 Web 内容的不同主机类型对应的日志行进行聚类。我们的实验在一个数据集上运行，该数据集由运行多种类型服务（VoD、直播电视、文件）的单个物理 CDN 服务器在 7 天内收集的代理日志组成。该数据集包含 22 亿条日志行。我们的分析表明，CDN 错误聚类是识别重复出现的错误并提高整体服务质量的可行方法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在内容分发网络（CDN）中应用多种聚类方法分析客户端错误日志的可行性，以识别重复错误并提升服务质量。
AI.motivation: CDN系统每天生成海量日志，手动分析效率低且难以发现潜在问题，需通过聚类方法自动识别错误模式以优化服务质量。
AI.method: 基于真实CDN代理日志，提取内容类型、HTTP状态码、时间及主机等特征，对不同服务类型（如直播、点播）的日志进行聚类分析。
AI.result: 实验表明，聚类方法能有效识别重复性错误，为改进CDN服务质量提供了可行的技术路径。
AI.conclusion: CDN错误聚类分析是可行的，可帮助运营商快速定位问题并提升整体服务表现。

authors_text: Loic Themyr,Clément Rambour,Nicolas Thome,Toby Collins,Alexandre Hostettler
title: Memory transformers for full context and high-resolution 3D Medical Segmentation
title_zh: 用于完整上下文和高分辨率 3D 医疗分割的内存转换器
abstract: Transformer models achieve state-of-the-art results for image segmentation. However, achieving long-range attention, necessary to capture global context, with high-resolution 3D images is a fundamental challenge. This paper introduces the Full resolutIoN mEmory (FINE) transformer to overcome this issue. The core idea behind FINE is to learn memory tokens to indirectly model full range interactions while scaling well in both memory and computational costs. FINE introduces memory tokens at two levels: the first one allows full interaction between voxels within local image regions (patches), the second one allows full interactions between all regions of the 3D volume. Combined, they allow full attention over high resolution images, e.g. 512 x 512 x 256 voxels and above. Experiments on the BCV image segmentation dataset shows better performances than state-of-the-art CNN and transformer baselines, highlighting the superiority of our full attention mechanism compared to recent transformer baselines, e.g. CoTr, and nnFormer.
summary: Transformer models achieve state-of-the-art results for image segmentation. However, achieving long-range attention, necessary to capture global context, with high-resolution 3D images is a fundamental challenge. This paper introduces the Full resolutIoN mEmory (FINE) transformer to overcome this issue. The core idea behind FINE is to learn memory tokens to indirectly model full range interactions while scaling well in both memory and computational costs. FINE introduces memory tokens at two levels: the first one allows full interaction between voxels within local image regions (patches), the second one allows full interactions between all regions of the 3D volume. Combined, they allow full attention over high resolution images, e.g. 512 x 512 x 256 voxels and above. Experiments on the BCV image segmentation dataset shows better performances than state-of-the-art CNN and transformer baselines, highlighting the superiority of our full attention mechanism compared to recent transformer baselines, e.g. CoTr, and nnFormer.
abstract_zh: Transformer 模型实现了最先进的图像分割结果。然而，利用高分辨率 3D 图像实现捕捉全局背景所必需的远程注意力是一项根本挑战。本文介绍了全分辨率存储器 (FINE) 变压器来解决这个问题。 FINE 背后的核心思想是学习内存标记来间接建模全方位交互，同时很好地扩展内存和计算成本。 FINE 在两个级别上引入了内存标记：第一个级别允许局部图像区域（补丁）内体素之间的完全交互，第二个级别允许 3D 体积的所有区域之间的完全交互。结合起来，它们可以让您充分关注高分辨率图像，例如512 x 512 x 256 体素及以上。 BCV 图像分割数据集的实验显示出比最先进的 CNN 和 Transformer 基线更好的性能，突显了我们的完整注意力机制相对于最近的 Transformer 基线的优越性，例如CoTr 和 nnFormer。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为FINE的Transformer模型，用于解决高分辨率3D医学图像分割中的全局上下文建模难题。
AI.motivation: 传统Transformer在处理高分辨率3D图像时面临长距离注意力计算复杂度高、内存消耗大的挑战，难以兼顾全局上下文建模与计算效率。
AI.method: 设计两级记忆标记机制：局部记忆标记处理图像块内体素交互，全局记忆标记实现跨区域全连接，通过分层结构降低计算成本并保持全范围注意力能力。
AI.result: 在BCV数据集上优于CNN和最新Transformer基线（如CoTr、nnFormer），验证了全注意力机制在高分辨率3D分割中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: FINE通过创新的记忆标记分层架构，有效解决了高分辨率3D医学图像分割的全局上下文建模难题，为后续研究提供了新思路。

However, achieving long-range attention, necessary to capture global context, with high-resolution 3D images is a fundamental challenge. This paper introduces the Full resolutIoN mEmory (FINE) transformer to overcome this issue. The core idea behind FINE is to learn memory tokens to indirectly model full range interactions while scaling well in both memory and computational costs. FINE introduces memory tokens at two levels: the first one allows full interaction between voxels within local image regions (patches), the second one allows full interactions between all regions of the 3D volume. Combined, they allow full attention over high resolution images, e.g. 512 x 512 x 256 voxels and above. Experiments on the BCV image segmentation dataset shows better performances than state-of-the-art CNN and transformer baselines, highlighting the superiority of our full attention mechanism compared to recent transformer baselines, e.g. CoTr, and nnFormer. Transformer 模型实现了最先进的图像分割结果。然而，利用高分辨率 3D 图像实现捕捉全局背景所必需的远程注意力是一项根本挑战。本文介绍了全分辨率存储器 (FINE) 变压器来解决这个问题。 FINE 背后的核心思想是学习内存标记来间接建模全方位交互，同时很好地扩展内存和计算成本。 FINE 在两个级别上引入了内存标记：第一个级别允许局部图像区域（补丁）内体素之间的完全交互，第二个级别允许 3D 体积的所有区域之间的完全交互。结合起来，它们可以让您充分关注高分辨率图像，例如512 x 512 x 256 体素及以上。 BCV 图像分割数据集的实验显示出比最先进的 CNN 和 Transformer 基线更好的性能，突显了我们的完整注意力机制相对于最近的 Transformer 基线的优越性，例如CoTr 和 nnFormer。 本文提出一种名为FINE的Transformer模型，用于解决高分辨率3D医学图像分割中的全局上下文建模难题。 Loic Themyr,Clément Rambour,Nicolas Thome,Toby Collins,Alexandre Hostettler cs.CV

authors_text: Wuti Xiong
title: CD-FSOD: A Benchmark for Cross-domain Few-shot Object Detection
title_zh: CD-FSOD：跨域少样本目标检测的基准
abstract: In this paper, we propose a study of the cross-domain few-shot object detection (CD-FSOD) benchmark, consisting of image data from a diverse data domain. On the proposed benchmark, we evaluate state-of-art FSOD approaches, including meta-learning FSOD approaches and fine-tuning FSOD approaches. The results show that these methods tend to fall, and even underperform the naive fine-tuning model. We analyze the reasons for their failure and introduce a strong baseline that uses a mutually-beneficial manner to alleviate the overfitting problem. Our approach is remarkably superior to existing approaches by significant margins (2.0\% on average) on the proposed benchmark. Our code is available at \url{https://github.com/FSOD/CD-FSOD}.
summary: In this paper, we propose a study of the cross-domain few-shot object detection (CD-FSOD) benchmark, consisting of image data from a diverse data domain. On the proposed benchmark, we evaluate state-of-art FSOD approaches, including meta-learning FSOD approaches and fine-tuning FSOD approaches. The results show that these methods tend to fall, and even underperform the naive fine-tuning model. We analyze the reasons for their failure and introduce a strong baseline that uses a mutually-beneficial manner to alleviate the overfitting problem. Our approach is remarkably superior to existing approaches by significant margins (2.0\% on average) on the proposed benchmark. Our code is available at \url{https://github.com/FSOD/CD-FSOD}.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一项跨域少样本目标检测（CD-FSOD）基准的研究，该基准由来自不同数据域的图像数据组成。在提议的基准上，我们评估了最先进的 FSOD 方法，包括元学习 FSOD 方法和微调 FSOD 方法。结果表明，这些方法往往会下降，甚至不如朴素的微调模型。我们分析了它们失败的原因，并引入了一个强大的基线，使用互利的方式来缓解过度拟合问题。在提议的基准上，我们的方法明显优于现有方法（平均 2.0%）。我们的代码可在 \url{https://github.com/FSOD/CD-FSOD} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个跨领域少样本目标检测基准CD-FSOD，评估现有方法并提出新的基线模型。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本目标检测方法在跨领域场景下表现不佳，需建立新基准并探索有效解决方案。
AI.method: 设计相互促进的机制缓解过拟合问题，提出强基线模型以提升跨领域少样本检测性能。
AI.result: 在CD-FSOD基准上，新方法较现有方法平均提升2.0%，显著优于元学习和微调方法。
AI.conclusion: 跨领域少样本检测需针对性优化，本文方法通过缓解过拟合有效提升性能，并开源代码促进研究。
