search_text: CD-FSOD: A Benchmark for Cross-domain Few-shot Object Detection CD-FSOD：跨域少样本目标检测的基准 In this paper, we propose a study of the cross-domain few-shot object detection (CD-FSOD) benchmark, consisting of image data from a diverse data domain. On the proposed benchmark, we evaluate state-of-art FSOD approaches, including meta-learning FSOD approaches and fine-tuning FSOD approaches. The results show that these methods tend to fall, and even underperform the naive fine-tuning model. We analyze the reasons for their failure and introduce a strong baseline that uses a mutually-beneficial manner to alleviate the overfitting problem. Our approach is remarkably superior to existing approaches by significant margins (2.0\% on average) on the proposed benchmark. Our code is available at \url{https://github.com/FSOD/CD-FSOD}. 在本文中，我们提出了一项跨域少样本目标检测（CD-FSOD）基准的研究，该基准由来自不同数据域的图像数据组成。在提议的基准上，我们评估了最先进的 FSOD 方法，包括元学习 FSOD 方法和微调 FSOD 方法。结果表明，这些方法往往会下降，甚至不如朴素的微调模型。我们分析了它们失败的原因，并引入了一个强大的基线，使用互利的方式来缓解过度拟合问题。在提议的基准上，我们的方法明显优于现有方法（平均 2.0%）。我们的代码可在 \url{https://github.com/FSOD/CD-FSOD} 获取。 本文提出一个跨领域少样本目标检测基准CD-FSOD，评估现有方法并提出新的基线模型。 Wuti Xiong cs.CV

authors_text: Đorđe Žikelić,Mathias Lechner,Thomas A. Henzinger,Krishnendu Chatterjee
title: Learning Control Policies for Stochastic Systems with Reach-avoid Guarantees
title_zh: 具有避免到达保证的随机系统的学习控制策略
abstract: We study the problem of learning controllers for discrete-time non-linear stochastic dynamical systems with formal reach-avoid guarantees. This work presents the first method for providing formal reach-avoid guarantees, which combine and generalize stability and safety guarantees, with a tolerable probability threshold $p\in[0,1]$ over the infinite time horizon. Our method leverages advances in machine learning literature and it represents formal certificates as neural networks. In particular, we learn a certificate in the form of a reach-avoid supermartingale (RASM), a novel notion that we introduce in this work. Our RASMs provide reachability and avoidance guarantees by imposing constraints on what can be viewed as a stochastic extension of level sets of Lyapunov functions for deterministic systems. Our approach solves several important problems -- it can be used to learn a control policy from scratch, to verify a reach-avoid specification for a fixed control policy, or to fine-tune a pre-trained policy if it does not satisfy the reach-avoid specification. We validate our approach on $3$ stochastic non-linear reinforcement learning tasks.
summary: We study the problem of learning controllers for discrete-time non-linear stochastic dynamical systems with formal reach-avoid guarantees. This work presents the first method for providing formal reach-avoid guarantees, which combine and generalize stability and safety guarantees, with a tolerable probability threshold $p\in[0,1]$ over the infinite time horizon. Our method leverages advances in machine learning literature and it represents formal certificates as neural networks. In particular, we learn a certificate in the form of a reach-avoid supermartingale (RASM), a novel notion that we introduce in this work. Our RASMs provide reachability and avoidance guarantees by imposing constraints on what can be viewed as a stochastic extension of level sets of Lyapunov functions for deterministic systems. Our approach solves several important problems -- it can be used to learn a control policy from scratch, to verify a reach-avoid specification for a fixed control policy, or to fine-tune a pre-trained policy if it does not satisfy the reach-avoid specification. We validate our approach on $3$ stochastic non-linear reinforcement learning tasks.
abstract_zh: 我们研究具有形式避免到达保证的离散时间非线性随机动力系统的学习控制器问题。这项工作提出了第一种提供正式避免到达保证的方法，该方法结合并概括了稳定性和安全保证，并在无限时间范围内具有可容忍的概率阈值 $p\in[0,1]$。我们的方法利用了机器学习文献的进步，并将正式证书表示为神经网络。特别是，我们学习了避免超鞅（RASM）形式的证书，这是我们在这项工作中引入的一个新颖概念。我们的 RASM 通过对确定性系统的 Lyapunov 函数水平集的随机扩展施加约束来提供可达性和避免性保证。我们的方法解决了几个重要的问题——它可以用来从头开始学习控制策略，验证固定控制策略的避免到达规范，或者在不满足避免到达规范的情况下微调预先训练的策略。我们在 3 美元随机非线性强化学习任务上验证了我们的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了为离散时间非线性随机动态系统学习控制器的问题，提供形式化的可达-避碰保证。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以在无限时间范围内为随机系统提供严格的可达-避碰保证，需结合机器学习与形式化验证技术。
AI.method: 提出一种新型神经网络表示的可达-避碰超鞅（RASM），通过约束随机系统的Lyapunov函数水平集扩展，实现形式化验证。
AI.result: 方法在三个随机非线性强化学习任务中验证有效，可从零训练策略、验证固定策略或微调预训练策略。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次将形式化保证与机器学习结合，为随机系统控制提供了可扩展的可达-避碰验证框架。

authors_text: Matin Ansaripour,Krishnendu Chatterjee,Thomas A. Henzinger,Mathias Lechner,Đorđe Žikelić
title: Learning Provably Stabilizing Neural Controllers for Discrete-Time Stochastic Systems
title_zh: 学习离散时间随机系统的可证明稳定的神经控制器
comment: Accepted at ATVA 2023. Follow-up work of arXiv:2112.09495
comments: Accepted at ATVA 2023. Follow-up work of arXiv:2112.09495
abstract: We consider the problem of learning control policies in discrete-time stochastic systems which guarantee that the system stabilizes within some specified stabilization region with probability~$1$. Our approach is based on the novel notion of stabilizing ranking supermartingales (sRSMs) that we introduce in this work. Our sRSMs overcome the limitation of methods proposed in previous works whose applicability is restricted to systems in which the stabilizing region cannot be left once entered under any control policy. We present a learning procedure that learns a control policy together with an sRSM that formally certifies probability~$1$ stability, both learned as neural networks. We show that this procedure can also be adapted to formally verifying that, under a given Lipschitz continuous control policy, the stochastic system stabilizes within some stabilizing region with probability~$1$. Our experimental evaluation shows that our learning procedure can successfully learn provably stabilizing policies in practice.
summary: We consider the problem of learning control policies in discrete-time stochastic systems which guarantee that the system stabilizes within some specified stabilization region with probability~$1$. Our approach is based on the novel notion of stabilizing ranking supermartingales (sRSMs) that we introduce in this work. Our sRSMs overcome the limitation of methods proposed in previous works whose applicability is restricted to systems in which the stabilizing region cannot be left once entered under any control policy. We present a learning procedure that learns a control policy together with an sRSM that formally certifies probability~$1$ stability, both learned as neural networks. We show that this procedure can also be adapted to formally verifying that, under a given Lipschitz continuous control policy, the stochastic system stabilizes within some stabilizing region with probability~$1$. Our experimental evaluation shows that our learning procedure can successfully learn provably stabilizing policies in practice.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑离散时间随机系统中学习控制策略的问题，保证系统以大约 1 美元的概率稳定在某个指定的稳定区域内。我们的方法基于我们在这项工作中引入的稳定排名超级鞅 (sRSM) 的新颖概念。我们的 sRSM 克服了先前工作中提出的方法的局限性，这些方法的适用性仅限于一旦进入任何控制策略就无法离开稳定区域的系统。我们提出了一个学习程序，它可以学习控制策略以及 sRSM，正式证明概率~$1$ 的稳定性，两者都是作为神经网络学习的。我们证明，这个过程也可以适用于正式验证，在给定的 Lipschitz 连续控制策略下，随机系统以大约 1 美元的概率稳定在某个稳定区域内。我们的实验评估表明，我们的学习过程可以在实践中成功学习可证明的稳定策略。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何为离散时间随机系统学习可证明稳定的神经控制器，确保系统以概率1在指定区域稳定。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅适用于进入稳定区域后无法离开的系统，限制了应用范围。本文旨在提出更通用的稳定性保证方法。
AI.method: 引入稳定排名超鞅(sRSMs)概念，设计学习算法同时训练控制策略与sRSM神经网络，并扩展用于验证给定策略的稳定性。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法能成功学习到具有概率1稳定性的控制器，且适用于更广泛的系统场景。
AI.conclusion: 提出的sRSM框架有效克服了传统方法限制，在保证稳定性的同时提升了控制器的学习能力与适用性。

We show that this procedure can also be adapted to formally verifying that, under a given Lipschitz continuous control policy, the stochastic system stabilizes within some stabilizing region with probability~$1$. Our experimental evaluation shows that our learning procedure can successfully learn provably stabilizing policies in practice. 我们考虑离散时间随机系统中学习控制策略的问题，保证系统以大约 1 美元的概率稳定在某个指定的稳定区域内。我们的方法基于我们在这项工作中引入的稳定排名超级鞅 (sRSM) 的新颖概念。我们的 sRSM 克服了先前工作中提出的方法的局限性，这些方法的适用性仅限于一旦进入任何控制策略就无法离开稳定区域的系统。我们提出了一个学习程序，它可以学习控制策略以及 sRSM，正式证明概率~$1$ 的稳定性，两者都是作为神经网络学习的。我们证明，这个过程也可以适用于正式验证，在给定的 Lipschitz 连续控制策略下，随机系统以大约 1 美元的概率稳定在某个稳定区域内。我们的实验评估表明，我们的学习过程可以在实践中成功学习可证明的稳定策略。 本文研究如何为离散时间随机系统学习可证明稳定的神经控制器，确保系统以概率1在指定区域稳定。 Matin Ansaripour,Krishnendu Chatterjee,Thomas A. Henzinger,Mathias Lechner,Đorđe Žikelić cs.LG,cs.AI,eess.SY

authors_text: Maximilian Stubbemann,Tom Hanika,Friedrich Martin Schneider
title: Intrinsic Dimension for Large-Scale Geometric Learning
title_zh: 大规模几何学习的内在维度
comment: 18 pages, 4 tables, 3 figures. This is the version accepted to TMLR, see: https://openreview.net/forum?id=85BfDdYMBY
comments: 18 pages, 4 tables, 3 figures. This is the version accepted to TMLR, see: https://openreview.net/forum?id=85BfDdYMBY
abstract: The concept of dimension is essential to grasp the complexity of data. A naive approach to determine the dimension of a dataset is based on the number of attributes. More sophisticated methods derive a notion of intrinsic dimension (ID) that employs more complex feature functions, e.g., distances between data points. Yet, many of these approaches are based on empirical observations, cannot cope with the geometric character of contemporary datasets, and do lack an axiomatic foundation. A different approach was proposed by V. Pestov, who links the intrinsic dimension axiomatically to the mathematical concentration of measure phenomenon. First methods to compute this and related notions for ID were computationally intractable for large-scale real-world datasets. In the present work, we derive a computationally feasible method for determining said axiomatic ID functions. Moreover, we demonstrate how the geometric properties of complex data are accounted for in our modeling. In particular, we propose a principle way to incorporate neighborhood information, as in graph data, into the ID. This allows for new insights into common graph learning procedures, which we illustrate by experiments on the Open Graph Benchmark.
summary: The concept of dimension is essential to grasp the complexity of data. A naive approach to determine the dimension of a dataset is based on the number of attributes. More sophisticated methods derive a notion of intrinsic dimension (ID) that employs more complex feature functions, e.g., distances between data points. Yet, many of these approaches are based on empirical observations, cannot cope with the geometric character of contemporary datasets, and do lack an axiomatic foundation. A different approach was proposed by V. Pestov, who links the intrinsic dimension axiomatically to the mathematical concentration of measure phenomenon. First methods to compute this and related notions for ID were computationally intractable for large-scale real-world datasets. In the present work, we derive a computationally feasible method for determining said axiomatic ID functions. Moreover, we demonstrate how the geometric properties of complex data are accounted for in our modeling. In particular, we propose a principle way to incorporate neighborhood information, as in graph data, into the ID. This allows for new insights into common graph learning procedures, which we illustrate by experiments on the Open Graph Benchmark.
abstract_zh: 维度的概念对于掌握数据的复杂性至关重要。确定数据集维度的简单方法是基于属性的数量。更复杂的方法衍生出使用更复杂的特征函数（例如数据点之间的距离）的内在维度（ID）的概念。然而，其中许多方法都是基于经验观察，无法应对当代数据集的几何特征，并且缺乏公理基础。 V. Pestov 提出了一种不同的方法，他将内在维度公理地与测量现象的数学集中联系起来。对于大规模现实世界数据集来说，第一种计算 ID 和相关 ID 概念的方法在计算上很困难。在目前的工作中，我们推导了一种计算上可行的方法来确定所述公理 ID 函数。此外，我们还演示了如何在建模中考虑复杂数据的几何属性。特别是，我们提出了一种将邻域信息（如图形数据）合并到 ID 中的原则方法。这允许对常见的图学习过程有新的见解，我们通过开放图基准的实验来说明这一点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种计算大尺度几何学习中公理化内在维度（ID）的可行方法，并将其应用于图数据以揭示几何特性。
AI.motivation: 传统内在维度计算方法缺乏公理基础且难以处理大规模数据的几何特性，而现有公理化方法计算复杂度高，无法实际应用。
AI.method: 基于Pestov的公理化框架，设计可扩展算法计算ID，并引入图邻域信息以建模复杂数据的几何结构。
AI.result: 方法在Open Graph Benchmark上验证有效，展示了对图学习过程的新见解，证明了其在大规模数据中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为大规模几何学习提供了高效的ID计算范式，通过整合邻域信息改进了图数据的建模与分析。

authors_text: Michael Schelling,Pedro Hermosilla,Timo Ropinski
title: Weakly-Supervised Optical Flow Estimation for Time-of-Flight
title_zh: 飞行时间的弱监督光流估计
comment: accepted at WACV 2023. The code, dataset and pretrained weights available at https://github.com/schellmi42/WFlowToF
comments: accepted at WACV 2023. The code, dataset and pretrained weights available at https://github.com/schellmi42/WFlowToF
abstract: Indirect Time-of-Flight (iToF) cameras are a widespread type of 3D sensor, which perform multiple captures to obtain depth values of the captured scene. While recent approaches to correct iToF depths achieve high performance when removing multi-path-interference and sensor noise, little research has been done to tackle motion artifacts. In this work we propose a training algorithm, which allows to supervise Optical Flow (OF) networks directly on the reconstructed depth, without the need of having ground truth flows. We demonstrate that this approach enables the training of OF networks to align raw iToF measurements and compensate motion artifacts in the iToF depth images. The approach is evaluated for both single- and multi-frequency sensors as well as multi-tap sensors, and is able to outperform other motion compensation techniques.
summary: Indirect Time-of-Flight (iToF) cameras are a widespread type of 3D sensor, which perform multiple captures to obtain depth values of the captured scene. While recent approaches to correct iToF depths achieve high performance when removing multi-path-interference and sensor noise, little research has been done to tackle motion artifacts. In this work we propose a training algorithm, which allows to supervise Optical Flow (OF) networks directly on the reconstructed depth, without the need of having ground truth flows. We demonstrate that this approach enables the training of OF networks to align raw iToF measurements and compensate motion artifacts in the iToF depth images. The approach is evaluated for both single- and multi-frequency sensors as well as multi-tap sensors, and is able to outperform other motion compensation techniques.
abstract_zh: 间接飞行时间 (iToF) 相机是一种广泛使用的 3D 传感器，它执行多次捕获以获得所捕获场景的深度值。虽然最近纠正 iToF 深度的方法在消除多路径干扰和传感器噪声时实现了高性能，但针对解决运动伪影的研究却很少。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种训练算法，它允许直接在重建深度上监督光流（OF）网络，而不需要地面实况流。我们证明，这种方法能够训练 OF 网络来对齐原始 iToF 测量值并补偿 iToF 深度图像中的运动伪影。该方法针对单频和多频传感器以及多抽头传感器进行了评估，并且能够优于其他运动补偿技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督光流估计方法，用于补偿间接飞行时间（iToF）深度图像中的运动伪影。
AI.motivation: 现有iToF深度校正方法在处理噪声和多路径干扰有效，但缺乏针对运动伪影的解决方案，需新方法提升动态场景下的深度质量。
AI.method: 设计无需真实光流标注的训练算法，通过重建深度直接监督光流网络，实现原始iToF测量对齐与运动补偿。
AI.result: 方法在单频/多频及多tap传感器上均优于现有运动补偿技术，有效减少动态场景下的深度失真。
AI.conclusion: 该弱监督框架为iToF传感器的运动伪影补偿提供了新思路，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Ahmed Abd Elrahman,Ahmed I. Taloba,Mohammed F. Farghally,Taysir Hassan A Soliman
title: Identifying Difficult exercises in an eTextbook Using Item Response Theory and Logged Data Analysis
title_zh: 使用项目响应理论和记录数据分析识别电子教科书中的困难练习
abstract: The growing dependence on eTextbooks and Massive Open Online Courses (MOOCs) has led to an increase in the amount of students' learning data. By carefully analyzing this data, educators can identify difficult exercises, and evaluate the quality of the exercises when teaching a particular topic. In this study, an analysis of log data from the semester usage of the OpenDSA eTextbook was offered to identify the most difficult data structure course exercises and to evaluate the quality of the course exercises. Our study is based on analyzing students' responses to the course exercises. We applied item response theory (IRT) analysis and a latent trait mode (LTM) to identify the most difficult exercises .To evaluate the quality of the course exercises we applied IRT theory. Our findings showed that the exercises that related to algorithm analysis topics represented the most difficult exercises, and there existing six exercises were classified as poor exercises which could be improved or need some attention.
summary: The growing dependence on eTextbooks and Massive Open Online Courses (MOOCs) has led to an increase in the amount of students' learning data. By carefully analyzing this data, educators can identify difficult exercises, and evaluate the quality of the exercises when teaching a particular topic. In this study, an analysis of log data from the semester usage of the OpenDSA eTextbook was offered to identify the most difficult data structure course exercises and to evaluate the quality of the course exercises. Our study is based on analyzing students' responses to the course exercises. We applied item response theory (IRT) analysis and a latent trait mode (LTM) to identify the most difficult exercises .To evaluate the quality of the course exercises we applied IRT theory. Our findings showed that the exercises that related to algorithm analysis topics represented the most difficult exercises, and there existing six exercises were classified as poor exercises which could be improved or need some attention.
abstract_zh: 对电子教科书和大规模开放在线课程（MOOC）的日益依赖导致学生学习数据量的增加。通过仔细分析这些数据，教育工作者可以识别困难的练习，并在教授特定主题时评估练习的质量。在本研究中，对 OpenDSA 电子教科书学期使用情况的日志数据进行了分析，以识别最困难的数据结构课程练习并评估课程练习的质量。我们的研究基于分析学生对课程练习的反应。我们应用项目反应理论（IRT）分析和潜在特质模式（LTM）来识别最困难的练习。为了评估课程练习的质量，我们应用了IRT理论。我们的研究结果表明，与算法分析主题相关的练习是最困难的练习，现有六个练习被归类为较差的练习，可以改进或需要注意。

AI.tldr: 利用项目反应理论和日志数据分析识别电子教材中的困难练习，评估练习质量。
AI.motivation: 随着电子教材和MOOCs的普及，学生学习数据激增，需要分析数据以识别困难练习并评估其质量，从而改进教学内容。
AI.method: 采用项目反应理论（IRT）分析和潜在特质模型（LTM）分析学生对练习的响应，识别困难练习，并通过IRT理论评估练习质量。
AI.result: 发现与算法分析相关的练习最难，且存在六个质量较差的练习需改进或关注。
AI.conclusion: 通过分析学习数据，能够有效识别课程中的困难练习和低质量练习，为教学内容优化和个性化学习支持提供依据。

search_text: Identifying Difficult exercises in an eTextbook Using Item Response Theory and Logged Data Analysis 使用项目响应理论和记录数据分析识别电子教科书中的困难练习 The growing dependence on eTextbooks and Massive Open Online Courses (MOOCs) has led to an increase in the amount of students' learning data. By carefully analyzing this data, educators can identify difficult exercises, and evaluate the quality of the exercises when teaching a particular topic. In this study, an analysis of log data from the semester usage of the OpenDSA eTextbook was offered to identify the most difficult data structure course exercises and to evaluate the quality of the course exercises. Our study is based on analyzing students' responses to the course exercises. We applied item response theory (IRT) analysis and a latent trait mode (LTM) to identify the most difficult exercises .To evaluate the quality of the course exercises we applied IRT theory. Our findings showed that the exercises that related to algorithm analysis topics represented the most difficult exercises, and there existing six exercises were classified as poor exercises which could be improved or need some attention. 对电子教科书和大规模开放在线课程（MOOC）的日益依赖导致学生学习数据量的增加。通过仔细分析这些数据，教育工作者可以识别困难的练习，并在教授特定主题时评估练习的质量。在本研究中，对 OpenDSA 电子教科书学期使用情况的日志数据进行了分析，以识别最困难的数据结构课程练习并评估课程练习的质量。我们的研究基于分析学生对课程练习的反应。我们应用项目反应理论（IRT）分析和潜在特质模式（LTM）来识别最困难的练习。为了评估课程练习的质量，我们应用了IRT理论。我们的研究结果表明，与算法分析主题相关的练习是最困难的练习，现有六个练习被归类为较差的练习，可以改进或需要注意。 利用项目反应理论和日志数据分析识别电子教材中的困难练习，评估练习质量。 Ahmed Abd Elrahman,Ahmed I. Taloba,Mohammed F. Farghally,Taysir Hassan A Soliman cs.DS,cs.LO

authors_text: Gaëlle Laperrière,Valentin Pelloin,Mickaël Rouvier,Themos Stafylakis,Yannick Estève
title: On the Use of Semantically-Aligned Speech Representations for Spoken Language Understanding
title_zh: 关于使用语义对齐的语音表示进行口语理解
comment: Accepted in IEEE SLT 2022. This work was performed using HPC resources from GENCI/IDRIS (grant 2022 AD011012565) and received funding from the EU H2020 research and innovation programme under the Marie Sklodowska-Curie ESPERANTO project (grant agreement No 101007666), through the SELMA project (grant No 957017) and from the French ANR through the AISSPER project (ANR-19-CE23-0004)
comments: Accepted in IEEE SLT 2022. This work was performed using HPC resources from GENCI/IDRIS (grant 2022 AD011012565) and received funding from the EU H2020 research and innovation programme under the Marie Sklodowska-Curie ESPERANTO project (grant agreement No 101007666), through the SELMA project (grant No 957017) and from the French ANR through the AISSPER project (ANR-19-CE23-0004)
abstract: In this paper we examine the use of semantically-aligned speech representations for end-to-end spoken language understanding (SLU). We employ the recently-introduced SAMU-XLSR model, which is designed to generate a single embedding that captures the semantics at the utterance level, semantically aligned across different languages. This model combines the acoustic frame-level speech representation learning model (XLS-R) with the Language Agnostic BERT Sentence Embedding (LaBSE) model. We show that the use of the SAMU-XLSR model instead of the initial XLS-R model improves significantly the performance in the framework of end-to-end SLU. Finally, we present the benefits of using this model towards language portability in SLU.
summary: In this paper we examine the use of semantically-aligned speech representations for end-to-end spoken language understanding (SLU). We employ the recently-introduced SAMU-XLSR model, which is designed to generate a single embedding that captures the semantics at the utterance level, semantically aligned across different languages. This model combines the acoustic frame-level speech representation learning model (XLS-R) with the Language Agnostic BERT Sentence Embedding (LaBSE) model. We show that the use of the SAMU-XLSR model instead of the initial XLS-R model improves significantly the performance in the framework of end-to-end SLU. Finally, we present the benefits of using this model towards language portability in SLU.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了语义对齐的语音表示在端到端口语理解（SLU）中的使用。我们采用最近推出的 SAMU-XLSR 模型，该模型旨在生成单个嵌入，捕获话语级别的语义，并在不同语言之间进行语义对齐。该模型将声学帧级语音表示学习模型 (XLS-R) 与语言无关的 BERT 句子嵌入 (LaBSE) 模型相结合。我们表明，使用 SAMU-XLSR 模型代替最初的 XLS-R 模型可以显着提高端到端 SLU 框架中的性能。最后，我们展示了在 SLU 中使用此模型实现语言可移植性的好处。

AI.tldr: 本文研究语义对齐的语音表征在端到端口语语言理解（SLU）中的应用，提出结合XLS-R和LaBSE的SAMU-XLSR模型。
AI.motivation: 现有SLU模型在跨语言任务中存在语义对齐不足的问题，需提升语言可移植性与多语言理解能力。
AI.method: 采用SAMU-XLSR模型，融合XLS-R的声学特征与LaBSE的语言无关语义表征，生成跨语言语义对齐的语音嵌入。
AI.result: 实验表明SAMU-XLSR较XLS-R在SLU任务中性能显著提升，并有效支持多语言模型的可移植性。
AI.conclusion: SAMU-XLSR通过语义对齐的跨语言表征，为端到端SLU提供了更高效且具有语言适应性的解决方案。

authors_text: Mateusz Żarski,Bartosz Wójcik,Jarosław A. Miszczak,Bartłomiej Blachowski,Mariusz Ostrowski
title: Computer Vision based inspection on post-earthquake with UAV synthetic dataset
title_zh: 基于计算机视觉的无人机合成数据集进行震后检查
comment: 15 pages, 8 figures, published version, software available from https://github.com/MatZar01/IC_SHM_P2
comments: 15 pages, 8 figures, published version, software available from https://github.com/MatZar01/IC_SHM_P2
abstract: The area affected by the earthquake is vast and often difficult to entirely cover, and the earthquake itself is a sudden event that causes multiple defects simultaneously, that cannot be effectively traced using traditional, manual methods. This article presents an innovative approach to the problem of detecting damage after sudden events by using an interconnected set of deep machine learning models organized in a single pipeline and allowing for easy modification and swapping models seamlessly. Models in the pipeline were trained with a synthetic dataset and were adapted to be further evaluated and used with unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) in real-world conditions. Thanks to the methods presented in the article, it is possible to obtain high accuracy in detecting buildings defects, segmenting constructions into their components and estimating their technical condition based on a single drone flight.
summary: The area affected by the earthquake is vast and often difficult to entirely cover, and the earthquake itself is a sudden event that causes multiple defects simultaneously, that cannot be effectively traced using traditional, manual methods. This article presents an innovative approach to the problem of detecting damage after sudden events by using an interconnected set of deep machine learning models organized in a single pipeline and allowing for easy modification and swapping models seamlessly. Models in the pipeline were trained with a synthetic dataset and were adapted to be further evaluated and used with unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) in real-world conditions. Thanks to the methods presented in the article, it is possible to obtain high accuracy in detecting buildings defects, segmenting constructions into their components and estimating their technical condition based on a single drone flight.
abstract_zh: 地震影响区域广阔，往往难以完全覆盖，而且地震本身是突发事件，会同时造成多种缺陷，无法使用传统的人工方法进行有效追踪。本文提出了一种创新方法，通过使用在单个管道中组织的一组互连的深度机器学习模型来检测突发事件后的损坏问题，并允许轻松修改和无缝交换模型。管道中的模型使用合成数据集进行训练，并进行了调整，以便在现实条件下进一步评估和与无人机 (UAV) 一起使用。借助本文中介绍的方法，可以在检测建筑物缺陷、将建筑物分割为其组件以及基于单次无人机飞行评估其技术状况方面获得高精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于无人机和合成数据集的计算机视觉方法，用于地震后建筑损伤的自动化检测与评估。
AI.motivation: 地震影响范围广且传统人工检测效率低，难以全面覆盖和追踪多发性损伤，需开发高效自动化检测技术。
AI.method: 构建深度学习模型流水线，利用合成数据集训练模型，并通过无人机在真实场景中部署检测、分割及技术状态评估。
AI.result: 实现单次无人机飞行即可高精度检测建筑缺陷、分割结构组件并评估技术状态。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著提升地震后建筑损伤检测的效率与准确性，为实际灾后评估提供可行技术方案。

authors_text: Yuqian Fu,Yu Xie,Yanwei Fu,Jingjing Chen,Yu-Gang Jiang
title: ME-D2N: Multi-Expert Domain Decompositional Network for Cross-Domain Few-Shot Learning
title_zh: ME-D2N：用于跨域小样本学习的多专家域分解网络
abstract: Recently, Cross-Domain Few-Shot Learning (CD-FSL) which aims at addressing the Few-Shot Learning (FSL) problem across different domains has attracted rising attention. The core challenge of CD-FSL lies in the domain gap between the source and novel target datasets. Though many attempts have been made for CD-FSL without any target data during model training, the huge domain gap makes it still hard for existing CD-FSL methods to achieve very satisfactory results. Alternatively, learning CD-FSL models with few labeled target domain data which is more realistic and promising is advocated in previous work~\cite{fu2021meta}. Thus, in this paper, we stick to this setting and technically contribute a novel Multi-Expert Domain Decompositional Network (ME-D2N). Concretely, to solve the data imbalance problem between the source data with sufficient examples and the auxiliary target data with limited examples, we build our model under the umbrella of multi-expert learning. Two teacher models which can be considered to be experts in their corresponding domain are first trained on the source and the auxiliary target sets, respectively. Then, the knowledge distillation technique is introduced to transfer the knowledge from two teachers to a unified student model. Taking a step further, to help our student model learn knowledge from different domain teachers simultaneously, we further present a novel domain decomposition module that learns to decompose the student model into two domain-related sub parts. This is achieved by a novel domain-specific gate that learns to assign each filter to only one specific domain in a learnable way. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. Codes and models are available at https://github.com/lovelyqian/ME-D2N_for_CDFSL.
summary: Recently, Cross-Domain Few-Shot Learning (CD-FSL) which aims at addressing the Few-Shot Learning (FSL) problem across different domains has attracted rising attention. The core challenge of CD-FSL lies in the domain gap between the source and novel target datasets. Though many attempts have been made for CD-FSL without any target data during model training, the huge domain gap makes it still hard for existing CD-FSL methods to achieve very satisfactory results. Alternatively, learning CD-FSL models with few labeled target domain data which is more realistic and promising is advocated in previous work~\cite{fu2021meta}. Thus, in this paper, we stick to this setting and technically contribute a novel Multi-Expert Domain Decompositional Network (ME-D2N). Concretely, to solve the data imbalance problem between the source data with sufficient examples and the auxiliary target data with limited examples, we build our model under the umbrella of multi-expert learning. Two teacher models which can be considered to be experts in their corresponding domain are first trained on the source and the auxiliary target sets, respectively. Then, the knowledge distillation technique is introduced to transfer the knowledge from two teachers to a unified student model. Taking a step further, to help our student model learn knowledge from different domain teachers simultaneously, we further present a novel domain decomposition module that learns to decompose the student model into two domain-related sub parts. This is achieved by a novel domain-specific gate that learns to assign each filter to only one specific domain in a learnable way. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. Codes and models are available at https://github.com/lovelyqian/ME-D2N_for_CDFSL.
abstract_zh: 近年来，旨在解决跨不同领域的少样本学习（FSL）问题的跨域少样本学习（CD-FSL）引起了越来越多的关注。 CD-FSL 的核心挑战在于源数据集和新目标数据集之间的领域差距。尽管在模型训练过程中在没有任何目标数据的情况下对 CD-FSL 进行了很多尝试，但巨大的领域差距使得现有的 CD-FSL 方法仍然很难取得非常令人满意的结果。或者，在之前的工作~\cite{fu2021meta}中提倡学习具有少量标记目标域数据的 CD-FSL 模型，这是更现实和有前途的。因此，在本文中，我们坚持这种设置，并在技术上贡献了一种新颖的多专家域分解网络（ME-D2N）。具体来说，为了解决具有足够示例的源数据与示例有限的辅助目标数据之间的数据不平衡问题，我们在多专家学习的框架下构建模型。首先分别在源目标集和辅助目标集上训练两个可被视为相应领域专家的教师模型。然后，引入知识蒸馏技术，将知识从两名教师转移到统一的学生模型。更进一步，为了帮助我们的学生模型同时从不同领域教师那里学习知识，我们进一步提出了一种新颖的领域分解模块，该模块学习将学生模型分解为两个与领域相关的子部分。这是通过一种新颖的特定于域的门来实现的，该门以可学习的方式学习将每个过滤器仅分配给一个特定域。大量的实验证明了我们方法的有效性。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/lovelyqian/ME-D2N_for_CDFSL 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ME-D2N的多专家领域分解网络，用于解决跨领域小样本学习（CD-FSL）中的领域差异问题。
AI.motivation: 现有CD-FSL方法在无目标域数据训练时难以应对显著的领域差异，而使用少量标注目标域数据的设置更符合实际需求，但如何有效利用有限目标数据仍是挑战。
AI.method: 构建两个分别在源域和辅助目标域训练的教师模型，通过知识蒸馏将两者的知识迁移至统一的学生模型，并引入领域分解模块，利用可学习的领域特定门控机制将学生模型分解为两个领域相关的子模块。
AI.result: 大量实验验证了ME-D2N在跨领域小样本任务中的有效性，代码和模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: ME-D2N通过多专家学习与领域分解机制，有效缓解了跨领域小样本学习中的领域差异问题，为利用有限目标域数据的CD-FSL提供了新思路。

search_text: ME-D2N: Multi-Expert Domain Decompositional Network for Cross-Domain Few-Shot Learning ME-D2N：用于跨域小样本学习的多专家域分解网络 Recently, Cross-Domain Few-Shot Learning (CD-FSL) which aims at addressing the Few-Shot Learning (FSL) problem across different domains has attracted rising attention. The core challenge of CD-FSL lies in the domain gap between the source and novel target datasets. Though many attempts have been made for CD-FSL without any target data during model training, the huge domain gap makes it still hard for existing CD-FSL methods to achieve very satisfactory results. Alternatively, learning CD-FSL models with few labeled target domain data which is more realistic and promising is advocated in previous work~\cite{fu2021meta}. Thus, in this paper, we stick to this setting and technically contribute a novel Multi-Expert Domain Decompositional Network (ME-D2N). Concretely, to solve the data imbalance problem between the source data with sufficient examples and the auxiliary target data with limited examples, we build our model under the umbrella of multi-expert learning. Two teacher models which can be considered to be experts in their corresponding domain are first trained on the source and the auxiliary target sets, respectively. Then, the knowledge distillation technique is introduced to transfer the knowledge from two teachers to a unified student model. Taking a step further, to help our student model learn knowledge from different domain teachers simultaneously, we further present a novel domain decomposition module that learns to decompose the student model into two domain-related sub parts. This is achieved by a novel domain-specific gate that learns to assign each filter to only one specific domain in a learnable way. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. Codes and models are available at https://github.com/lovelyqian/ME-D2N_for_CDFSL. 近年来，旨在解决跨不同领域的少样本学习（FSL）问题的跨域少样本学习（CD-FSL）引起了越来越多的关注。 CD-FSL 的核心挑战在于源数据集和新目标数据集之间的领域差距。尽管在模型训练过程中在没有任何目标数据的情况下对 CD-FSL 进行了很多尝试，但巨大的领域差距使得现有的 CD-FSL 方法仍然很难取得非常令人满意的结果。或者，在之前的工作~\cite{fu2021meta}中提倡学习具有少量标记目标域数据的 CD-FSL 模型，这是更现实和有前途的。因此，在本文中，我们坚持这种设置，并在技术上贡献了一种新颖的多专家域分解网络（ME-D2N）。具体来说，为了解决具有足够示例的源数据与示例有限的辅助目标数据之间的数据不平衡问题，我们在多专家学习的框架下构建模型。首先分别在源目标集和辅助目标集上训练两个可被视为相应领域专家的教师模型。然后，引入知识蒸馏技术，将知识从两名教师转移到统一的学生模型。更进一步，为了帮助我们的学生模型同时从不同领域教师那里学习知识，我们进一步提出了一种新颖的领域分解模块，该模块学习将学生模型分解为两个与领域相关的子部分。这是通过一种新颖的特定于域的门来实现的，该门以可学习的方式学习将每个过滤器仅分配给一个特定域。大量的实验证明了我们方法的有效性。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/lovelyqian/ME-D2N_for_CDFSL 获取。 本文提出了一种名为ME-D2N的多专家领域分解网络，用于解决跨领域小样本学习（CD-FSL）中的领域差异问题。 Yuqian Fu,Yu Xie,Yanwei Fu,Jingjing Chen,Yu-Gang Jiang cs.CV

authors_text: Yunhao Du,Zihang Liu,Fei Su
title: EnsembleMOT: A Step towards Ensemble Learning of Multiple Object Tracking
title_zh: EnsembleMOT：迈向多目标跟踪集成学习的一步
abstract: Multiple Object Tracking (MOT) has rapidly progressed in recent years. Existing works tend to design a single tracking algorithm to perform both detection and association. Though ensemble learning has been exploited in many tasks, i.e, classification and object detection, it hasn't been studied in the MOT task, which is mainly caused by its complexity and evaluation metrics. In this paper, we propose a simple but effective ensemble method for MOT, called EnsembleMOT, which merges multiple tracking results from various trackers with spatio-temporal constraints. Meanwhile, several post-processing procedures are applied to filter out abnormal results. Our method is model-independent and doesn't need the learning procedure. What's more, it can easily work in conjunction with other algorithms, e.g., tracklets interpolation. Experiments on the MOT17 dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. Codes are available at https://github.com/dyhBUPT/EnsembleMOT.
summary: Multiple Object Tracking (MOT) has rapidly progressed in recent years. Existing works tend to design a single tracking algorithm to perform both detection and association. Though ensemble learning has been exploited in many tasks, i.e, classification and object detection, it hasn't been studied in the MOT task, which is mainly caused by its complexity and evaluation metrics. In this paper, we propose a simple but effective ensemble method for MOT, called EnsembleMOT, which merges multiple tracking results from various trackers with spatio-temporal constraints. Meanwhile, several post-processing procedures are applied to filter out abnormal results. Our method is model-independent and doesn't need the learning procedure. What's more, it can easily work in conjunction with other algorithms, e.g., tracklets interpolation. Experiments on the MOT17 dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. Codes are available at https://github.com/dyhBUPT/EnsembleMOT.
abstract_zh: 多目标跟踪（MOT）近年来发展迅速。现有的工作倾向于设计单一的跟踪算法来执行检测和关联。尽管集成学习已经在分类和目标检测等许多任务中得到了应用，但在 MOT 任务中尚未得到研究，这主要是由于其复杂性和评估指标造成的。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单但有效的 MOT 集成方法，称为 EnsembleMOT，它将来自具有时空约束的各种跟踪器的多个跟踪结果合并在一起。同时，应用多种后处理程序来过滤掉异常结果。我们的方法与模型无关，不需要学习过程。此外，它可以轻松地与其他算法结合使用，例如轨迹插值。 MOT17数据集上的实验证明了该方法的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/dyhBUPT/EnsembleMOT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为EnsembleMOT的多目标跟踪（MOT）集成学习方法，通过融合多种跟踪器的结果并应用时空约束及后处理步骤提升跟踪性能。
AI.motivation: 现有MOT方法多依赖单一算法同时完成检测与关联，而集成学习在MOT任务中尚未被充分研究，主要受限于其复杂性和评估指标。
AI.method: EnsembleMOT通过时空约束合并多种跟踪器的结果，并采用后处理步骤过滤异常结果，且无需模型训练，可与其它算法（如轨迹插值）结合使用。
AI.result: 在MOT17数据集上的实验验证了EnsembleMOT方法的有效性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: EnsembleMOT为MOT任务提供了简单有效的集成学习框架，具有模型无关性和良好的扩展性。

authors_text: Matthew Baas,Herman Kamper
title: GAN You Hear Me? Reclaiming Unconditional Speech Synthesis from Diffusion Models
title_zh: 甘 你听到了吗？从扩散模型中回收无条件语音合成
comment: 6 pages, 2 figures, 2 tables. Accepted at IEEE SLT 2022
comments: 6 pages, 2 figures, 2 tables. Accepted at IEEE SLT 2022
abstract: We propose AudioStyleGAN (ASGAN), a new generative adversarial network (GAN) for unconditional speech synthesis. As in the StyleGAN family of image synthesis models, ASGAN maps sampled noise to a disentangled latent vector which is then mapped to a sequence of audio features so that signal aliasing is suppressed at every layer. To successfully train ASGAN, we introduce a number of new techniques, including a modification to adaptive discriminator augmentation to probabilistically skip discriminator updates. ASGAN achieves state-of-the-art results in unconditional speech synthesis on the Google Speech Commands dataset. It is also substantially faster than the top-performing diffusion models. Through a design that encourages disentanglement, ASGAN is able to perform voice conversion and speech editing without being explicitly trained to do so. ASGAN demonstrates that GANs are still highly competitive with diffusion models. Code, models, samples: https://github.com/RF5/simple-asgan/.
summary: We propose AudioStyleGAN (ASGAN), a new generative adversarial network (GAN) for unconditional speech synthesis. As in the StyleGAN family of image synthesis models, ASGAN maps sampled noise to a disentangled latent vector which is then mapped to a sequence of audio features so that signal aliasing is suppressed at every layer. To successfully train ASGAN, we introduce a number of new techniques, including a modification to adaptive discriminator augmentation to probabilistically skip discriminator updates. ASGAN achieves state-of-the-art results in unconditional speech synthesis on the Google Speech Commands dataset. It is also substantially faster than the top-performing diffusion models. Through a design that encourages disentanglement, ASGAN is able to perform voice conversion and speech editing without being explicitly trained to do so. ASGAN demonstrates that GANs are still highly competitive with diffusion models. Code, models, samples: https://github.com/RF5/simple-asgan/.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 AudioStyleGAN (ASGAN)，一种用于无条件语音合成的新型生成对抗网络 (GAN)。与图像合成模型的 StyleGAN 系列一样，ASGAN 将采样的噪声映射到解开的潜在向量，然后将其映射到音频特征序列，以便在每一层抑制信号混叠。为了成功训练 ASGAN，我们引入了许多新技术，包括对自适应判别器增强进行修改，以概率性地跳过判别器更新。 ASGAN 在 Google 语音命令数据集上的无条件语音合成中取得了最先进的结果。它也比表现最好的扩散模型快得多。通过鼓励解开的设计，ASGAN 能够执行语音转换和语音编辑，而无需经过明确的培训。 ASGAN 表明，GAN 与扩散模型相比仍然具有很强的竞争力。代码、模型、示例：https://github.com/RF5/simple-asgan/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AudioStyleGAN（ASGAN），一种用于无条件语音合成的生成对抗网络（GAN），旨在挑战扩散模型在该领域的主导地位。
AI.motivation: 尽管扩散模型在语音合成中表现优异，但其计算效率较低。作者认为GAN在图像生成中的成功可迁移至语音领域，需证明其在语音合成中的竞争力。
AI.method: 基于StyleGAN架构，将噪声映射为解耦潜在向量并生成音频特征序列，通过抑制信号混叠提升质量；引入自适应判别器增强改进技术，以概率方式跳过判别器更新。
AI.result: 在Google Speech Commands数据集上达到无条件语音合成最先进水平，生成速度显著优于扩散模型，且可实现未显式训练的语音转换与编辑。
AI.conclusion: GAN在语音合成任务中仍具有显著优势，通过设计优化可实现与扩散模型相当甚至更优的性能，证明其在该领域的竞争力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出AudioStyleGAN（ASGAN），一种用于无条件语音合成的生成对抗网络（GAN），旨在挑战扩散模型在该领域的主导地位。
ai_content.motivation: 尽管扩散模型在语音合成中表现优异，但其计算效率较低。作者认为GAN在图像生成中的成功可迁移至语音领域，需证明其在语音合成中的竞争力。
ai_content.method: 基于StyleGAN架构，将噪声映射为解耦潜在向量并生成音频特征序列，通过抑制信号混叠提升质量；引入自适应判别器增强改进技术，以概率方式跳过判别器更新。
ai_content.result: 在Google Speech Commands数据集上达到无条件语音合成最先进水平，生成速度显著优于扩散模型，且可实现未显式训练的语音转换与编辑。
ai_content.conclusion: GAN在语音合成任务中仍具有显著优势，通过设计优化可实现与扩散模型相当甚至更优的性能，证明其在该领域的竞争力。

search_text: GAN You Hear Me? Reclaiming Unconditional Speech Synthesis from Diffusion Models 甘 你听到了吗？从扩散模型中回收无条件语音合成 We propose AudioStyleGAN (ASGAN), a new generative adversarial network (GAN) for unconditional speech synthesis. As in the StyleGAN family of image synthesis models, ASGAN maps sampled noise to a disentangled latent vector which is then mapped to a sequence of audio features so that signal aliasing is suppressed at every layer. To successfully train ASGAN, we introduce a number of new techniques, including a modification to adaptive discriminator augmentation to probabilistically skip discriminator updates. ASGAN achieves state-of-the-art results in unconditional speech synthesis on the Google Speech Commands dataset. It is also substantially faster than the top-performing diffusion models. Through a design that encourages disentanglement, ASGAN is able to perform voice conversion and speech editing without being explicitly trained to do so. ASGAN demonstrates that GANs are still highly competitive with diffusion models. Code, models, samples: https://github.com/RF5/simple-asgan/. 我们提出了 AudioStyleGAN (ASGAN)，一种用于无条件语音合成的新型生成对抗网络 (GAN)。与图像合成模型的 StyleGAN 系列一样，ASGAN 将采样的噪声映射到解开的潜在向量，然后将其映射到音频特征序列，以便在每一层抑制信号混叠。为了成功训练 ASGAN，我们引入了许多新技术，包括对自适应判别器增强进行修改，以概率性地跳过判别器更新。 ASGAN 在 Google 语音命令数据集上的无条件语音合成中取得了最先进的结果。它也比表现最好的扩散模型快得多。通过鼓励解开的设计，ASGAN 能够执行语音转换和语音编辑，而无需经过明确的培训。 ASGAN 表明，GAN 与扩散模型相比仍然具有很强的竞争力。代码、模型、示例：https://github.com/RF5/simple-asgan/。 本文提出AudioStyleGAN（ASGAN），一种用于无条件语音合成的生成对抗网络（GAN），旨在挑战扩散模型在该领域的主导地位。 Matthew Baas,Herman Kamper cs.SD,cs.AI,eess.AS

authors_text: Fabian Czappa,Alexander Geiß,Felix Wolf
title: Simulating Structural Plasticity of the Brain more Scalable than Expected
title_zh: 模拟大脑的结构可塑性比预期更具可扩展性
comment: ef:Journal of Parallel and Distributed Computing, Volume 171, January 2023, Pages 24-27
comments: ef:Journal of Parallel and Distributed Computing, Volume 171, January 2023, Pages 24-27
abstract: Structural plasticity of the brain describes the creation of new and the deletion of old synapses over time. Rinke et al. (JPDC 2018) introduced a scalable algorithm that simulates structural plasticity for up to one billion neurons on current hardware using a variant of the Barnes-Hut algorithm. They demonstrate good scalability and prove a runtime complexity of $O(n \log^2 n)$. In this comment paper, we show that with careful consideration of the algorithm and a rigorous proof, the theoretical runtime can even be classified as $O(n \log n)$.
summary: Structural plasticity of the brain describes the creation of new and the deletion of old synapses over time. Rinke et al. (JPDC 2018) introduced a scalable algorithm that simulates structural plasticity for up to one billion neurons on current hardware using a variant of the Barnes-Hut algorithm. They demonstrate good scalability and prove a runtime complexity of $O(n \log^2 n)$. In this comment paper, we show that with careful consideration of the algorithm and a rigorous proof, the theoretical runtime can even be classified as $O(n \log n)$.
abstract_zh: 大脑的结构可塑性描述了随着时间的推移新突触的产生和旧突触的删除。林克等人。 (JPDC 2018) 引入了一种可扩展算法，该算法使用 Barnes-Hut 算法的变体在当前硬件上模拟多达 10 亿个神经元的结构可塑性。它们展示了良好的可扩展性，并证明运行时复杂度为 $O(n \log^2 n)$。在这篇评论文章中，我们表明，通过仔细考虑算法和严格的证明，理论运行时间甚至可以归类为$O(n \log n)$。

AI.tldr: 本文通过严谨的数学证明，将用于模拟大脑结构可塑性的算法时间复杂度从O(n log²n)优化为O(n log n)。
AI.motivation: 现有算法虽能模拟十亿级神经元的结构可塑性，但其理论时间复杂度仍存在优化空间，提升计算效率对大规模神经网络研究至关重要。
AI.method: 通过重新分析Rinke等人的Barnes-Hut算法变体，结合数学证明优化算法步骤，消除冗余计算并降低复杂度。
AI.result: 理论证明表明，该算法的时间复杂度可严格归类为O(n log n)，优于原有O(n log²n)的结论。
AI.conclusion: 严谨的算法分析与数学证明能够显著提升神经科学模拟的计算效率，为大规模脑结构研究提供更优工具。

authors_text: Fan Yu,Shiliang Zhang,Pengcheng Guo,Yuhao Liang,Zhihao Du,Yuxiao Lin,Lei Xie
title: MFCCA:Multi-Frame Cross-Channel attention for multi-speaker ASR in Multi-party meeting scenario
title_zh: MFCCA：多方会议场景中多发言者ASR的多帧跨通道注意力
abstract: Recently cross-channel attention, which better leverages multi-channel signals from microphone array, has shown promising results in the multi-party meeting scenario. Cross-channel attention focuses on either learning global correlations between sequences of different channels or exploiting fine-grained channel-wise information effectively at each time step. Considering the delay of microphone array receiving sound, we propose a multi-frame cross-channel attention, which models cross-channel information between adjacent frames to exploit the complementarity of both frame-wise and channel-wise knowledge. Besides, we also propose a multi-layer convolutional mechanism to fuse the multi-channel output and a channel masking strategy to combat the channel number mismatch problem between training and inference. Experiments on the AliMeeting, a real-world corpus, reveal that our proposed model outperforms single-channel model by 31.7\% and 37.0\% CER reduction on Eval and Test sets. Moreover, with comparable model parameters and training data, our proposed model achieves a new SOTA performance on the AliMeeting corpus, as compared with the top ranking systems in the ICASSP2022 M2MeT challenge, a recently held multi-channel multi-speaker ASR challenge.
summary: Recently cross-channel attention, which better leverages multi-channel signals from microphone array, has shown promising results in the multi-party meeting scenario. Cross-channel attention focuses on either learning global correlations between sequences of different channels or exploiting fine-grained channel-wise information effectively at each time step. Considering the delay of microphone array receiving sound, we propose a multi-frame cross-channel attention, which models cross-channel information between adjacent frames to exploit the complementarity of both frame-wise and channel-wise knowledge. Besides, we also propose a multi-layer convolutional mechanism to fuse the multi-channel output and a channel masking strategy to combat the channel number mismatch problem between training and inference. Experiments on the AliMeeting, a real-world corpus, reveal that our proposed model outperforms single-channel model by 31.7\% and 37.0\% CER reduction on Eval and Test sets. Moreover, with comparable model parameters and training data, our proposed model achieves a new SOTA performance on the AliMeeting corpus, as compared with the top ranking systems in the ICASSP2022 M2MeT challenge, a recently held multi-channel multi-speaker ASR challenge.
abstract_zh: 最近，跨通道注意力更好地利用了麦克风阵列的多通道信号，在多方会议场景中显示出了可喜的结果。跨通道注意力集中于学习不同通道序列之间的全局相关性或在每个时间步有效地利用细粒度的通道信息。考虑到麦克风阵列接收声音的延迟，我们提出了多帧跨通道注意，它对相邻帧之间的跨通道信息进行建模，以利用帧级和通道级知识的互补性。此外，我们还提出了一种多层卷积机制来融合多通道输出，并提出了一种通道掩蔽策略来解决训练和推理之间的通道数不匹配问题。在真实世界语料库 AliMeeting 上进行的实验表明，我们提出的模型在评估集和测试集上的 CER 比单通道模型分别降低了 31.7% 和 37.0%。此外，通过可比较的模型参数和训练数据，与最近举办的多通道多说话人 ASR 挑战赛 ICASSP2022 M2MeT 挑战赛中的顶级系统相比，我们提出的模型在 AliMeeting 语料库上实现了新的 SOTA 性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出多帧交叉通道注意力机制（MFCCA），用于多方会议场景下的多说话人语音识别（ASR），以提升多通道信号的利用效率。
AI.motivation: 现有交叉通道注意力机制未充分考虑麦克风阵列接收声音的延迟问题，且存在训练与推理阶段通道数不匹配的挑战。
AI.method: 设计多帧交叉通道注意力建模相邻帧的通道互补性，结合多层卷积融合多通道输出，并引入通道掩码策略解决通道数不匹配问题。
AI.result: 在AliMeeting数据集上，相较单通道模型CER降低31.7%（Eval）和37.0%（Test），且在参数量和训练数据相当的情况下达到ICASSP2022 M2MeT挑战赛的SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: MFCCA通过融合帧间与通道间信息并优化通道对齐策略，显著提升了多方会议场景下多说话人ASR的识别准确率。

Moreover, with comparable model parameters and training data, our proposed model achieves a new SOTA performance on the AliMeeting corpus, as compared with the top ranking systems in the ICASSP2022 M2MeT challenge, a recently held multi-channel multi-speaker ASR challenge. 最近，跨通道注意力更好地利用了麦克风阵列的多通道信号，在多方会议场景中显示出了可喜的结果。跨通道注意力集中于学习不同通道序列之间的全局相关性或在每个时间步有效地利用细粒度的通道信息。考虑到麦克风阵列接收声音的延迟，我们提出了多帧跨通道注意，它对相邻帧之间的跨通道信息进行建模，以利用帧级和通道级知识的互补性。此外，我们还提出了一种多层卷积机制来融合多通道输出，并提出了一种通道掩蔽策略来解决训练和推理之间的通道数不匹配问题。在真实世界语料库 AliMeeting 上进行的实验表明，我们提出的模型在评估集和测试集上的 CER 比单通道模型分别降低了 31.7% 和 37.0%。此外，通过可比较的模型参数和训练数据，与最近举办的多通道多说话人 ASR 挑战赛 ICASSP2022 M2MeT 挑战赛中的顶级系统相比，我们提出的模型在 AliMeeting 语料库上实现了新的 SOTA 性能。 本文提出多帧交叉通道注意力机制（MFCCA），用于多方会议场景下的多说话人语音识别（ASR），以提升多通道信号的利用效率。 Fan Yu,Shiliang Zhang,Pengcheng Guo,Yuhao Liang,Zhihao Du,Yuxiao Lin,Lei Xie cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Julius Wagenbach,Matthia Sabatelli
title: Factors of Influence of the Overestimation Bias of Q-Learning
title_zh: Q-Learning高估偏差的影响因素
abstract: We study whether the learning rate $α$, the discount factor $γ$ and the reward signal $r$ have an influence on the overestimation bias of the Q-Learning algorithm. Our preliminary results in environments which are stochastic and that require the use of neural networks as function approximators, show that all three parameters influence overestimation significantly. By carefully tuning $α$ and $γ$, and by using an exponential moving average of $r$ in Q-Learning's temporal difference target, we show that the algorithm can learn value estimates that are more accurate than the ones of several other popular model-free methods that have addressed its overestimation bias in the past.
summary: We study whether the learning rate $α$, the discount factor $γ$ and the reward signal $r$ have an influence on the overestimation bias of the Q-Learning algorithm. Our preliminary results in environments which are stochastic and that require the use of neural networks as function approximators, show that all three parameters influence overestimation significantly. By carefully tuning $α$ and $γ$, and by using an exponential moving average of $r$ in Q-Learning's temporal difference target, we show that the algorithm can learn value estimates that are more accurate than the ones of several other popular model-free methods that have addressed its overestimation bias in the past.
abstract_zh: 我们研究学习率$α$、折扣因子$γ$和奖励信号$r$是否对Q-Learning算法的高估偏差有影响。我们在随机且需要使用神经网络作为函数逼近器的环境中的初步结果表明，所有三个参数都会显着影响高估。通过仔细调整 $α$ 和 $γ$，并在 Q-Learning 的时间差异目标中使用 $r$ 的指数移动平均值，我们表明该算法可以学习比其他几种流行的无模型方法更准确的价值估计，这些方法过去已经解决了其高估偏差。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究Q-Learning算法中过度估计偏差的影响因素，并提出改进方法。
AI.motivation: Q-Learning的过度估计偏差会影响算法性能，现有方法未充分探讨参数与奖励信号处理对偏差的影响。
AI.method: 通过调整学习率α和折扣因子γ，并采用奖励信号r的指数移动平均优化时间差分目标。
AI.result: 改进后的算法在随机环境中能学习到比其他无模型方法更准确的价值估计。
AI.conclusion: 参数调优与奖励信号处理可有效缓解Q-Learning的过度估计偏差，提升算法准确性。

authors_text: Yuanhang Yang,Shiyi Qi,Chuanyi Liu,Qifan Wang,Cuiyun Gao,Zenglin Xu
title: Once is Enough: A Light-Weight Cross-Attention for Fast Sentence Pair Modeling
title_zh: 一次就足够了：用于快速句子对建模的轻量级交叉注意力
abstract: Transformer-based models have achieved great success on sentence pair modeling tasks, such as answer selection and natural language inference (NLI). These models generally perform cross-attention over input pairs, leading to prohibitive computational costs. Recent studies propose dual-encoder and late interaction architectures for faster computation. However, the balance between the expressive of cross-attention and computation speedup still needs better coordinated. To this end, this paper introduces a novel paradigm MixEncoder for efficient sentence pair modeling. MixEncoder involves a light-weight cross-attention mechanism. It conducts query encoding only once while modeling the query-candidate interaction in parallel. Extensive experiments conducted on four tasks demonstrate that our MixEncoder can speed up sentence pairing by over 113x while achieving comparable performance as the more expensive cross-attention models.
summary: Transformer-based models have achieved great success on sentence pair modeling tasks, such as answer selection and natural language inference (NLI). These models generally perform cross-attention over input pairs, leading to prohibitive computational costs. Recent studies propose dual-encoder and late interaction architectures for faster computation. However, the balance between the expressive of cross-attention and computation speedup still needs better coordinated. To this end, this paper introduces a novel paradigm MixEncoder for efficient sentence pair modeling. MixEncoder involves a light-weight cross-attention mechanism. It conducts query encoding only once while modeling the query-candidate interaction in parallel. Extensive experiments conducted on four tasks demonstrate that our MixEncoder can speed up sentence pairing by over 113x while achieving comparable performance as the more expensive cross-attention models.
abstract_zh: 基于 Transformer 的模型在句子对建模任务上取得了巨大成功，例如答案选择和自然语言推理 (NLI)。这些模型通常对输入对执行交叉注意力，导致计算成本过高。最近的研究提出了双编码器和后期交互架构以实现更快的计算。然而，交叉注意力的表达和计算加速之间的平衡仍然需要更好的协调。为此，本文引入了一种新颖的 MixEncoder 范式，用于高效的句子对建模。 MixEncoder涉及轻量级交叉注意力机制。它在并行建模查询-候选交互时仅进行一次查询编码。对四项任务进行的大量实验表明，我们的 MixEncoder 可以将句子配对速度提高 113 倍以上，同时实现与更昂贵的交叉注意力模型相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级交叉注意力机制MixEncoder，用于高效句子对建模，在保持性能的同时显著提升计算速度。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer模型在句子对任务中因交叉注意力计算成本过高导致效率低下，而双编码器等方法难以平衡表达能力与计算速度。
AI.method: 设计MixEncoder架构，通过仅进行一次查询编码并并行建模查询-候选交互，实现轻量级交叉注意力机制。
AI.result: 在四个任务中实验表明，MixEncoder相比传统模型加速113倍且性能相当。
AI.conclusion: MixEncoder有效协调了交叉注意力的表达能力与计算效率，为快速句子对建模提供新思路。

authors_text: Tianling Liu,Ran Su,Changming Sun,Xiuting Li,Leyi Wei
title: EOCSA: Predicting Prognosis of Epithelial Ovarian Cancer with Whole Slide Histopathological Images
title_zh: EOCSA：利用全玻片组织病理学图像预测上皮性卵巢癌的预后
comment: Published in Expert Systems with Applications 2022
comments: Published in Expert Systems with Applications 2022
abstract: Ovarian cancer is one of the most serious cancers that threaten women around the world. Epithelial ovarian cancer (EOC), as the most commonly seen subtype of ovarian cancer, has rather high mortality rate and poor prognosis among various gynecological cancers. Survival analysis outcome is able to provide treatment advices to doctors. In recent years, with the development of medical imaging technology, survival prediction approaches based on pathological images have been proposed. In this study, we designed a deep framework named EOCSA which analyzes the prognosis of EOC patients based on pathological whole slide images (WSIs). Specifically, we first randomly extracted patches from WSIs and grouped them into multiple clusters. Next, we developed a survival prediction model, named DeepConvAttentionSurv (DCAS), which was able to extract patch-level features, removed less discriminative clusters and predicted the EOC survival precisely. Particularly, channel attention, spatial attention, and neuron attention mechanisms were used to improve the performance of feature extraction. Then patient-level features were generated from our weight calculation method and the survival time was finally estimated using LASSO-Cox model. The proposed EOCSA is efficient and effective in predicting prognosis of EOC and the DCAS ensures more informative and discriminative features can be extracted. As far as we know, our work is the first to analyze the survival of EOC based on WSIs and deep neural network technologies. The experimental results demonstrate that our proposed framework has achieved state-of-the-art performance of 0.980 C-index. The implementation of the approach can be found at https://github.com/RanSuLab/EOCprognosis.
summary: Ovarian cancer is one of the most serious cancers that threaten women around the world. Epithelial ovarian cancer (EOC), as the most commonly seen subtype of ovarian cancer, has rather high mortality rate and poor prognosis among various gynecological cancers. Survival analysis outcome is able to provide treatment advices to doctors. In recent years, with the development of medical imaging technology, survival prediction approaches based on pathological images have been proposed. In this study, we designed a deep framework named EOCSA which analyzes the prognosis of EOC patients based on pathological whole slide images (WSIs). Specifically, we first randomly extracted patches from WSIs and grouped them into multiple clusters. Next, we developed a survival prediction model, named DeepConvAttentionSurv (DCAS), which was able to extract patch-level features, removed less discriminative clusters and predicted the EOC survival precisely. Particularly, channel attention, spatial attention, and neuron attention mechanisms were used to improve the performance of feature extraction. Then patient-level features were generated from our weight calculation method and the survival time was finally estimated using LASSO-Cox model. The proposed EOCSA is efficient and effective in predicting prognosis of EOC and the DCAS ensures more informative and discriminative features can be extracted. As far as we know, our work is the first to analyze the survival of EOC based on WSIs and deep neural network technologies. The experimental results demonstrate that our proposed framework has achieved state-of-the-art performance of 0.980 C-index. The implementation of the approach can be found at https://github.com/RanSuLab/EOCprognosis.
abstract_zh: 卵巢癌是威胁全世界女性的最严重的癌症之一。上皮性卵巢癌（EOC）作为卵巢癌中最常见的亚型，在各种妇科癌症中死亡率较高，预后较差。生存分析结果能够为医生提供治疗建议。近年来，随着医学影像技术的发展，基于病理图像的生存预测方法被提出。在本研究中，我们设计了一个名为 EOCSA 的深度框架，该框架根据病理全切片图像（WSI）分析 EOC 患者的预后。具体来说，我们首先从 WSI 中随机提取补丁并将它们分组为多个集群。接下来，我们开发了一种生存预测模型，名为 DeepConvAttentionSurv (DCAS)，它能够提取补丁级特征，删除判别性较差的簇并精确预测 EOC 生存。特别是，通道注意、空间注意和神经元注意机制被用来提高特征提取的性能。然后根据我们的体重计算方法生成患者级别的特征，并最终使用 LASSO-Cox 模型估计生存时间。所提出的 EOCSA 在预测 EOC 预后方面是高效且有效的，并且 DCAS 确保可以提取更多信息和判别性特征。据我们所知，我们的工作是第一个基于 WSI 和深度神经网络技术来分析 EOC 生存的工作。实验结果表明，我们提出的框架已经实现了 0.980 C 指数的最先进性能。该方法的实现可以在 https://github.com/RanSuLab/EOCprognosis 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于全切片病理图像（WSI）的深度学习框架EOCSA，用于预测上皮性卵巢癌（EOC）患者的预后。
AI.motivation: 卵巢癌是全球女性面临的严重癌症，其中EOC具有高死亡率和较差预后。传统生存分析方法需依赖医生经验，而基于病理图像的自动化预测方法尚未充分探索。
AI.method: 通过从WSI中随机提取图像块并聚类，设计DCAS模型提取块级特征，结合通道注意力、空间注意力和神经元注意力机制提升特征区分度，再通过权重计算生成患者级特征，最终使用LASSO-Cox模型预测生存时间。
AI.result: 在实验中，EOCSA框架实现了0.980的C-index，达到当时最先进的性能水平。
AI.conclusion: EOCSA是首个结合WSI与深度神经网络分析EOC生存率的方法，证明了其在预后预测中的高效性与准确性。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于全切片病理图像（WSI）的深度学习框架EOCSA，用于预测上皮性卵巢癌（EOC）患者的预后。
motivation: 卵巢癌是全球女性面临的严重癌症，其中EOC具有高死亡率和较差预后。传统生存分析方法需依赖医生经验，而基于病理图像的自动化预测方法尚未充分探索。
method: 通过从WSI中随机提取图像块并聚类，设计DCAS模型提取块级特征，结合通道注意力、空间注意力和神经元注意力机制提升特征区分度，再通过权重计算生成患者级特征，最终使用LASSO-Cox模型预测生存时间。
result: 在实验中，EOCSA框架实现了0.980的C-index，达到当时最先进的性能水平。
conclusion: EOCSA是首个结合WSI与深度神经网络分析EOC生存率的方法，证明了其在预后预测中的高效性与准确性。
search_text: EOCSA: Predicting Prognosis of Epithelial Ovarian Cancer with Whole Slide Histopathological Images EOCSA：利用全玻片组织病理学图像预测上皮性卵巢癌的预后 Ovarian cancer is one of the most serious cancers that threaten women around the world. Epithelial ovarian cancer (EOC), as the most commonly seen subtype of ovarian cancer, has rather high mortality rate and poor prognosis among various gynecological cancers. Survival analysis outcome is able to provide treatment advices to doctors. In recent years, with the development of medical imaging technology, survival prediction approaches based on pathological images have been proposed. In this study, we designed a deep framework named EOCSA which analyzes the prognosis of EOC patients based on pathological whole slide images (WSIs). Specifically, we first randomly extracted patches from WSIs and grouped them into multiple clusters. Next, we developed a survival prediction model, named DeepConvAttentionSurv (DCAS), which was able to extract patch-level features, removed less discriminative clusters and predicted the EOC survival precisely. Particularly, channel attention, spatial attention, and neuron attention mechanisms were used to improve the performance of feature extraction. Then patient-level features were generated from our weight calculation method and the survival time was finally estimated using LASSO-Cox model. The proposed EOCSA is efficient and effective in predicting prognosis of EOC and the DCAS ensures more informative and discriminative features can be extracted. As far as we know, our work is the first to analyze the survival of EOC based on WSIs and deep neural network technologies. The experimental results demonstrate that our proposed framework has achieved state-of-the-art performance of 0.980 C-index. The implementation of the approach can be found at https://github.com/RanSuLab/EOCprognosis. 卵巢癌是威胁全世界女性的最严重的癌症之一。上皮性卵巢癌（EOC）作为卵巢癌中最常见的亚型，在各种妇科癌症中死亡率较高，预后较差。生存分析结果能够为医生提供治疗建议。近年来，随着医学影像技术的发展，基于病理图像的生存预测方法被提出。在本研究中，我们设计了一个名为 EOCSA 的深度框架，该框架根据病理全切片图像（WSI）分析 EOC 患者的预后。具体来说，我们首先从 WSI 中随机提取补丁并将它们分组为多个集群。接下来，我们开发了一种生存预测模型，名为 DeepConvAttentionSurv (DCAS)，它能够提取补丁级特征，删除判别性较差的簇并精确预测 EOC 生存。特别是，通道注意、空间注意和神经元注意机制被用来提高特征提取的性能。然后根据我们的体重计算方法生成患者级别的特征，并最终使用 LASSO-Cox 模型估计生存时间。所提出的 EOCSA 在预测 EOC 预后方面是高效且有效的，并且 DCAS 确保可以提取更多信息和判别性特征。据我们所知，我们的工作是第一个基于 WSI 和深度神经网络技术来分析 EOC 生存的工作。实验结果表明，我们提出的框架已经实现了 0.980 C 指数的最先进性能。该方法的实现可以在 https://github.com/RanSuLab/EOCprognosis 找到。 本文提出了一种基于全切片病理图像（WSI）的深度学习框架EOCSA，用于预测上皮性卵巢癌（EOC）患者的预后。 Tianling Liu,Ran Su,Changming Sun,Xiuting Li,Leyi Wei eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Clément Lefebvre,Niklas Stoehr
title: Rethinking the Event Coding Pipeline with Prompt Entailment
title_zh: 重新思考带有提示蕴涵的事件编码管道
comment: Revised from published version in the proceedings of the FEVER workshop at EACL 2023
comments: Revised from published version in the proceedings of the FEVER workshop at EACL 2023
abstract: For monitoring crises, political events are extracted from the news. The large amount of unstructured full-text event descriptions makes a case-by-case analysis unmanageable, particularly for low-resource humanitarian aid organizations. This creates a demand to classify events into event types, a task referred to as event coding. Typically, domain experts craft an event type ontology, annotators label a large dataset and technical experts develop a supervised coding system. In this work, we propose PR-ENT, a new event coding approach that is more flexible and resource-efficient, while maintaining competitive accuracy: first, we extend an event description such as "Military injured two civilians'' by a template, e.g. "People were [Z]" and prompt a pre-trained (cloze) language model to fill the slot Z. Second, we select answer candidates Z* = {"injured'', "hurt"...} by treating the event description as premise and the filled templates as hypothesis in a textual entailment task. This allows domain experts to draft the codebook directly as labeled prompts and interpretable answer candidates. This human-in-the-loop process is guided by our interactive codebook design tool. We evaluate PR-ENT in several robustness checks: perturbing the event description and prompt template, restricting the vocabulary and removing contextual information.
summary: For monitoring crises, political events are extracted from the news. The large amount of unstructured full-text event descriptions makes a case-by-case analysis unmanageable, particularly for low-resource humanitarian aid organizations. This creates a demand to classify events into event types, a task referred to as event coding. Typically, domain experts craft an event type ontology, annotators label a large dataset and technical experts develop a supervised coding system. In this work, we propose PR-ENT, a new event coding approach that is more flexible and resource-efficient, while maintaining competitive accuracy: first, we extend an event description such as "Military injured two civilians'' by a template, e.g. "People were [Z]" and prompt a pre-trained (cloze) language model to fill the slot Z. Second, we select answer candidates Z* = {"injured'', "hurt"...} by treating the event description as premise and the filled templates as hypothesis in a textual entailment task. This allows domain experts to draft the codebook directly as labeled prompts and interpretable answer candidates. This human-in-the-loop process is guided by our interactive codebook design tool. We evaluate PR-ENT in several robustness checks: perturbing the event description and prompt template, restricting the vocabulary and removing contextual information.
abstract_zh: 为了监控危机，从新闻中提取政治事件。大量非结构化的全文事件描述使得逐案分析变得难以管理，特别是对于资源匮乏的人道主义援助组织而言。这就产生了将事件分类为事件类型的需求，该任务称为事件编码。通常，领域专家制作事件类型本体，注释者标记大型数据集，技术专家开发监督编码系统。在这项工作中，我们提出了 PR-ENT，一种更加灵活和资源高效的新事件编码方法，同时保持有竞争力的准确性：首先，我们通过模板扩展事件描述，例如“军事伤害两名平民”，例如“人们是[Z]”，并提示预先训练的（完型填空）语言模型来填充槽 Z。其次，我们通过将事件描述视为前提并将填充的模板视为候选答案 Z* = {“受伤”，“受伤”...}文本蕴涵任务中的假设。这使得领域专家可以直接起草密码本作为标记的提示和可解释的候选答案。这个人机交互过程由我们的交互式密码本设计工具指导。我们通过多项稳健性检查来评估 PR-ENT：干扰事件描述和提示模板、限制词汇并删除上下文信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PR-ENT事件编码方法，通过模板扩展和预训练语言模型填充槽位，结合文本蕴含任务选择候选答案，实现更灵活高效的事件分类。
AI.motivation: 传统事件编码依赖专家构建本体、大量标注数据及监督系统，对低资源组织不友好，需更节省资源且保持准确性的方法。
AI.method: 通过模板扩展事件描述（如将'军方伤害两名平民'转为'人们被[Z]'），利用预训练语言模型填充槽位Z；再以事件描述为前提、填充模板为假设，通过文本蕴含任务筛选候选答案Z*，结合交互式工具辅助专家构建代码本。
AI.result: 在扰动描述/模板、词汇限制及去上下文等鲁棒性测试中，PR-ENT保持较高准确性，验证其灵活性和稳定性。
AI.conclusion: PR-ENT通过人类专家与模型协作，实现资源高效且可解释的事件编码，在低资源场景下具有应用潜力。

authors_text: Xiaohui Liu,Meng Liu,Lin Zhang,Linjuan Zhang,Chang Zeng,Kai Li,Nan Li,Kong Aik Lee,Longbiao Wang,Jianwu Dang
title: Deep Spectro-temporal Artifacts for Detecting Synthesized Speech
title_zh: 用于检测合成语音的深度频谱时间伪影
comment: 7 pages, 1 figures, Accecpted by Proceedings of the 1st International Workshop on Deepfake Detection for Audio Multimedia
comments: 7 pages, 1 figures, Accecpted by Proceedings of the 1st International Workshop on Deepfake Detection for Audio Multimedia
abstract: The Audio Deep Synthesis Detection (ADD) Challenge has been held to detect generated human-like speech. With our submitted system, this paper provides an overall assessment of track 1 (Low-quality Fake Audio Detection) and track 2 (Partially Fake Audio Detection). In this paper, spectro-temporal artifacts were detected using raw temporal signals, spectral features, as well as deep embedding features. To address track 1, low-quality data augmentation, domain adaptation via finetuning, and various complementary feature information fusion were aggregated in our system. Furthermore, we analyzed the clustering characteristics of subsystems with different features by visualization method and explained the effectiveness of our proposed greedy fusion strategy. As for track 2, frame transition and smoothing were detected using self-supervised learning structure to capture the manipulation of PF attacks in the time domain. We ranked 4th and 5th in track 1 and track 2, respectively.
summary: The Audio Deep Synthesis Detection (ADD) Challenge has been held to detect generated human-like speech. With our submitted system, this paper provides an overall assessment of track 1 (Low-quality Fake Audio Detection) and track 2 (Partially Fake Audio Detection). In this paper, spectro-temporal artifacts were detected using raw temporal signals, spectral features, as well as deep embedding features. To address track 1, low-quality data augmentation, domain adaptation via finetuning, and various complementary feature information fusion were aggregated in our system. Furthermore, we analyzed the clustering characteristics of subsystems with different features by visualization method and explained the effectiveness of our proposed greedy fusion strategy. As for track 2, frame transition and smoothing were detected using self-supervised learning structure to capture the manipulation of PF attacks in the time domain. We ranked 4th and 5th in track 1 and track 2, respectively.
abstract_zh: 音频深度合成检测（ADD）挑战赛的举办是为了检测生成的类人语音。通过我们提交的系统，本文对轨道 1（低质量虚假音频检测）和轨道 2（部分虚假音频检测）进行了总体评估。在本文中，使用原始时间信号、光谱特征以及深度嵌入特征来检测光谱时间伪影。为了解决第一轨问题，我们的系统中聚合了低质量数据增强、通过微调进行领域适应以及各种补充特征信息融合。此外，我们通过可视化方法分析了具有不同特征的子系统的聚类特征，并解释了我们提出的贪婪融合策略的有效性。对于轨道 2，使用自监督学习结构检测帧过渡和平滑，以捕获时域中 PF 攻击的操纵。我们在赛道 1 和赛道 2 中分别排名第四和第五。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用深度频谱时域特征检测合成语音的方法，并在ADD挑战赛的两个任务中取得排名。
AI.motivation: 随着深度学习语音合成技术的发展，检测低质量或部分伪造的合成语音对信息安全至关重要。
AI.method: 通过分析原始时域信号、频谱特征及深度嵌入特征中的频谱时域伪影，结合数据增强、领域自适应和特征融合策略，采用可视化方法验证子系统聚类特性，并使用自监督学习检测部分伪造攻击的时域操作。
AI.result: 在ADD挑战赛Track 1（低质量伪造音频检测）和Track 2（部分伪造音频检测）中分别获得第4名和第5名。
AI.conclusion: 基于深度频谱时域伪影的检测方法结合多特征融合策略能有效提升合成语音检测性能，验证了贪婪融合策略的有效性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出利用深度频谱时域特征检测合成语音的方法，并在ADD挑战赛的两个任务中取得排名。

tldr: 本文提出利用深度频谱时域特征检测合成语音的方法，并在ADD挑战赛的两个任务中取得排名。
motivation: 随着深度学习语音合成技术的发展，检测低质量或部分伪造的合成语音对信息安全至关重要。
method: 通过分析原始时域信号、频谱特征及深度嵌入特征中的频谱时域伪影，结合数据增强、领域自适应和特征融合策略，采用可视化方法验证子系统聚类特性，并使用自监督学习检测部分伪造攻击的时域操作。
result: 在ADD挑战赛Track 1（低质量伪造音频检测）和Track 2（部分伪造音频检测）中分别获得第4名和第5名。
conclusion: 基于深度频谱时域伪影的检测方法结合多特征融合策略能有效提升合成语音检测性能，验证了贪婪融合策略的有效性。
search_text: Deep Spectro-temporal Artifacts for Detecting Synthesized Speech 用于检测合成语音的深度频谱时间伪影 The Audio Deep Synthesis Detection (ADD) Challenge has been held to detect generated human-like speech. With our submitted system, this paper provides an overall assessment of track 1 (Low-quality Fake Audio Detection) and track 2 (Partially Fake Audio Detection). In this paper, spectro-temporal artifacts were detected using raw temporal signals, spectral features, as well as deep embedding features. To address track 1, low-quality data augmentation, domain adaptation via finetuning, and various complementary feature information fusion were aggregated in our system. Furthermore, we analyzed the clustering characteristics of subsystems with different features by visualization method and explained the effectiveness of our proposed greedy fusion strategy. As for track 2, frame transition and smoothing were detected using self-supervised learning structure to capture the manipulation of PF attacks in the time domain. We ranked 4th and 5th in track 1 and track 2, respectively. 音频深度合成检测（ADD）挑战赛的举办是为了检测生成的类人语音。通过我们提交的系统，本文对轨道 1（低质量虚假音频检测）和轨道 2（部分虚假音频检测）进行了总体评估。在本文中，使用原始时间信号、光谱特征以及深度嵌入特征来检测光谱时间伪影。为了解决第一轨问题，我们的系统中聚合了低质量数据增强、通过微调进行领域适应以及各种补充特征信息融合。此外，我们通过可视化方法分析了具有不同特征的子系统的聚类特征，并解释了我们提出的贪婪融合策略的有效性。对于轨道 2，使用自监督学习结构检测帧过渡和平滑，以捕获时域中 PF 攻击的操纵。我们在赛道 1 和赛道 2 中分别排名第四和第五。 本文提出利用深度频谱时域特征检测合成语音的方法，并在ADD挑战赛的两个任务中取得排名。 Xiaohui Liu,Meng Liu,Lin Zhang,Linjuan Zhang,Chang Zeng,Kai Li,Nan Li,Kong Aik Lee,Longbiao Wang,Jianwu Dang cs.SD,cs.AI,eess.AS

authors_text: Geon Yeong Park,Chanyong Jung,Sangmin Lee,Jong Chul Ye,Sang Wan Lee
title: Self-supervised debiasing using low rank regularization
title_zh: 使用低秩正则化进行自监督去偏
abstract: Spurious correlations can cause strong biases in deep neural networks, impairing generalization ability. While most existing debiasing methods require full supervision on either spurious attributes or target labels, training a debiased model from a limited amount of both annotations is still an open question. To address this issue, we investigate an interesting phenomenon using the spectral analysis of latent representations: spuriously correlated attributes make neural networks inductively biased towards encoding lower effective rank representations. We also show that a rank regularization can amplify this bias in a way that encourages highly correlated features. Leveraging these findings, we propose a self-supervised debiasing framework potentially compatible with unlabeled samples. Specifically, we first pretrain a biased encoder in a self-supervised manner with the rank regularization, serving as a semantic bottleneck to enforce the encoder to learn the spuriously correlated attributes. This biased encoder is then used to discover and upweight bias-conflicting samples in a downstream task, serving as a boosting to effectively debias the main model. Remarkably, the proposed debiasing framework significantly improves the generalization performance of self-supervised learning baselines and, in some cases, even outperforms state-of-the-art supervised debiasing approaches.
summary: Spurious correlations can cause strong biases in deep neural networks, impairing generalization ability. While most existing debiasing methods require full supervision on either spurious attributes or target labels, training a debiased model from a limited amount of both annotations is still an open question. To address this issue, we investigate an interesting phenomenon using the spectral analysis of latent representations: spuriously correlated attributes make neural networks inductively biased towards encoding lower effective rank representations. We also show that a rank regularization can amplify this bias in a way that encourages highly correlated features. Leveraging these findings, we propose a self-supervised debiasing framework potentially compatible with unlabeled samples. Specifically, we first pretrain a biased encoder in a self-supervised manner with the rank regularization, serving as a semantic bottleneck to enforce the encoder to learn the spuriously correlated attributes. This biased encoder is then used to discover and upweight bias-conflicting samples in a downstream task, serving as a boosting to effectively debias the main model. Remarkably, the proposed debiasing framework significantly improves the generalization performance of self-supervised learning baselines and, in some cases, even outperforms state-of-the-art supervised debiasing approaches.
abstract_zh: 虚假相关性可能会导致深度神经网络出现强烈偏差，从而损害泛化能力。虽然大多数现有的去偏差方法需要对虚假属性或目标标签进行全面监督，但从有限数量的两个注释中训练去偏差模型仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。为了解决这个问题，我们使用潜在表示的谱分析来研究一个有趣的现象：虚假相关的属性使神经网络归纳偏向于编码较低的有效等级表示。我们还表明，排名正则化可以以鼓励高度相关特征的方式放大这种偏差。利用这些发现，我们提出了一个可能与未标记样本兼容的自我监督去偏框架。具体来说，我们首先通过排名正则化以自监督的方式预训练有偏差的编码器，作为语义瓶颈来强制编码器学习虚假相关的属性。然后，该有偏差的编码器用于发现并增加下游任务中存在偏差冲突的样本的权重，从而有效地消除主模型的偏差。值得注意的是，所提出的去偏框架显着提高了自监督学习基线的泛化性能，在某些情况下，甚至优于最先进的监督去偏方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于低秩正则化的自监督去偏方法，通过利用潜在表示的谱分析特性，减少深度神经网络中的虚假相关性偏差。
AI.motivation: 现有去偏方法依赖完整标注数据，而实际场景中标签稀缺，需探索无需大量监督的去偏框架以提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 通过谱分析发现虚假属性会导致表示的有效秩降低，利用低秩正则化增强这一特性，预训练带偏见的编码器作为语义瓶颈，并在下游任务中加权冲突样本以实现去偏。
AI.result: 该框架显著提升自监督基线模型的泛化性能，在部分场景下超越现有监督去偏方法。
AI.conclusion: 低秩正则化驱动的自监督去偏框架能有效缓解虚假相关性偏差，且兼容无标签样本，为弱监督场景提供新思路。

authors_text: Geon Yeong Park,Sangmin Lee,Sang Wan Lee,Jong Chul Ye
title: Training Debiased Subnetworks with Contrastive Weight Pruning
title_zh: 通过对比权重剪枝训练去偏子网络
abstract: Neural networks are often biased to spuriously correlated features that provide misleading statistical evidence that does not generalize. This raises an interesting question: ``Does an optimal unbiased functional subnetwork exist in a severely biased network? If so, how to extract such subnetwork?" While empirical evidence has been accumulated about the existence of such unbiased subnetworks, these observations are mainly based on the guidance of ground-truth unbiased samples. Thus, it is unexplored how to discover the optimal subnetworks with biased training datasets in practice. To address this, here we first present our theoretical insight that alerts potential limitations of existing algorithms in exploring unbiased subnetworks in the presence of strong spurious correlations. We then further elucidate the importance of bias-conflicting samples on structure learning. Motivated by these observations, we propose a Debiased Contrastive Weight Pruning (DCWP) algorithm, which probes unbiased subnetworks without expensive group annotations. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms state-of-the-art debiasing methods despite its considerable reduction in the number of parameters.
summary: Neural networks are often biased to spuriously correlated features that provide misleading statistical evidence that does not generalize. This raises an interesting question: ``Does an optimal unbiased functional subnetwork exist in a severely biased network? If so, how to extract such subnetwork?" While empirical evidence has been accumulated about the existence of such unbiased subnetworks, these observations are mainly based on the guidance of ground-truth unbiased samples. Thus, it is unexplored how to discover the optimal subnetworks with biased training datasets in practice. To address this, here we first present our theoretical insight that alerts potential limitations of existing algorithms in exploring unbiased subnetworks in the presence of strong spurious correlations. We then further elucidate the importance of bias-conflicting samples on structure learning. Motivated by these observations, we propose a Debiased Contrastive Weight Pruning (DCWP) algorithm, which probes unbiased subnetworks without expensive group annotations. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms state-of-the-art debiasing methods despite its considerable reduction in the number of parameters.
abstract_zh: 神经网络通常偏向于虚假相关的特征，这些特征提供了无法概括的误导性统计证据。这就提出了一个有趣的问题：“在严重偏差的网络中是否存在最优的无偏差功能子网络？如果是这样，如何提取这样的子网络？”虽然已经积累了关于这种无偏子网络存在的经验证据，但这些观察主要基于真实无偏样本的指导。因此，在实践中如何发现具有有偏训练数据集的最佳子网络尚未被探索。为了解决这个问题，在这里我们首先提出我们的理论见解，提醒现有算法在存在强虚假相关性的情况下探索无偏子网络的潜在局限性。然后我们进一步阐明偏差冲突样本对结构学习的重要性，受这些观察的启发，我们提出了一种去偏差对比权重修剪（DCWP）算法，该算法无需昂贵的组注释即可探测无偏差子网络。实验结果表明，尽管我们的方法大大减少了参数数量，但其性能仍显着优于最先进的去偏差方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DCWP的去偏对比权重剪枝算法，旨在从严重偏见的神经网络中提取最优无偏子网络。
AI.motivation: 现有算法在强虚假相关性存在时难以有效探索无偏子网络，且依赖昂贵的无偏样本标注，亟需一种无需标注的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过理论分析揭示现有方法的局限性，提出基于对比学习的权重剪枝方法DCWP，在不依赖无偏样本的情况下直接挖掘无偏子网络结构。
AI.result: 实验表明，DCWP在参数数量大幅减少的情况下，显著优于现有去偏方法，在多个基准数据集上取得更优性能。
AI.conclusion: DCWP算法有效解决了偏见网络中无偏子网络挖掘问题，为实际场景下的模型去偏提供了高效可行的解决方案。

We then further elucidate the importance of bias-conflicting samples on structure learning. Motivated by these observations, we propose a Debiased Contrastive Weight Pruning (DCWP) algorithm, which probes unbiased subnetworks without expensive group annotations. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms state-of-the-art debiasing methods despite its considerable reduction in the number of parameters. 神经网络通常偏向于虚假相关的特征，这些特征提供了无法概括的误导性统计证据。这就提出了一个有趣的问题：“在严重偏差的网络中是否存在最优的无偏差功能子网络？如果是这样，如何提取这样的子网络？”虽然已经积累了关于这种无偏子网络存在的经验证据，但这些观察主要基于真实无偏样本的指导。因此，在实践中如何发现具有有偏训练数据集的最佳子网络尚未被探索。为了解决这个问题，在这里我们首先提出我们的理论见解，提醒现有算法在存在强虚假相关性的情况下探索无偏子网络的潜在局限性。然后我们进一步阐明偏差冲突样本对结构学习的重要性，受这些观察的启发，我们提出了一种去偏差对比权重修剪（DCWP）算法，该算法无需昂贵的组注释即可探测无偏差子网络。实验结果表明，尽管我们的方法大大减少了参数数量，但其性能仍显着优于最先进的去偏差方法。 本文提出了一种名为DCWP的去偏对比权重剪枝算法，旨在从严重偏见的神经网络中提取最优无偏子网络。 Geon Yeong Park,Sangmin Lee,Sang Wan Lee,Jong Chul Ye cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Alessandro Conti,Paolo Rota,Yiming Wang,Elisa Ricci
title: Cluster-level pseudo-labelling for source-free cross-domain facial expression recognition
title_zh: 用于无源跨域面部表情识别的集群级伪标记
comment: Accepted at BMVC2022, 13 pages, 4 figures, code is available at https://github.com/altndrr/clup
comments: Accepted at BMVC2022, 13 pages, 4 figures, code is available at https://github.com/altndrr/clup
abstract: Automatically understanding emotions from visual data is a fundamental task for human behaviour understanding. While models devised for Facial Expression Recognition (FER) have demonstrated excellent performances on many datasets, they often suffer from severe performance degradation when trained and tested on different datasets due to domain shift. In addition, as face images are considered highly sensitive data, the accessibility to large-scale datasets for model training is often denied. In this work, we tackle the above-mentioned problems by proposing the first Source-Free Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (SFUDA) method for FER. Our method exploits self-supervised pretraining to learn good feature representations from the target data and proposes a novel and robust cluster-level pseudo-labelling strategy that accounts for in-cluster statistics. We validate the effectiveness of our method in four adaptation setups, proving that it consistently outperforms existing SFUDA methods when applied to FER, and is on par with methods addressing FER in the UDA setting.
summary: Automatically understanding emotions from visual data is a fundamental task for human behaviour understanding. While models devised for Facial Expression Recognition (FER) have demonstrated excellent performances on many datasets, they often suffer from severe performance degradation when trained and tested on different datasets due to domain shift. In addition, as face images are considered highly sensitive data, the accessibility to large-scale datasets for model training is often denied. In this work, we tackle the above-mentioned problems by proposing the first Source-Free Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (SFUDA) method for FER. Our method exploits self-supervised pretraining to learn good feature representations from the target data and proposes a novel and robust cluster-level pseudo-labelling strategy that accounts for in-cluster statistics. We validate the effectiveness of our method in four adaptation setups, proving that it consistently outperforms existing SFUDA methods when applied to FER, and is on par with methods addressing FER in the UDA setting.
abstract_zh: 从视觉数据中自动理解情感是人类行为理解的一项基本任务。虽然为面部表情识别 (FER) 设计的模型在许多数据集上表现出了出色的性能，但由于域转移，在不同数据集上进行训练和测试时，它们常常会出现严重的性能下降。此外，由于人脸图像被认为是高度敏感的数据，因此经常无法访问用于模型训练的大规模数据集。在这项工作中，我们通过提出第一个 FER 的无源无监督域适应（SFUDA）方法来解决上述问题。我们的方法利用自监督预训练从目标数据中学习良好的特征表示，并提出一种新颖且鲁棒的集群级伪标记策略来解释集群内的统计数据。我们在四种适应设置中验证了我们的方法的有效性，证明它在应用于 FER 时始终优于现有的 SFUDA 方法，并且与 UDA 设置中解决 FER 的方法相当。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无源跨域面部表情识别的聚类级伪标签方法，解决领域迁移导致的性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 现有面部表情识别模型在跨域场景下性能显著下降，且因隐私限制难以获取大规模训练数据，需开发无需源域数据的自适应方法。
AI.method: 结合自监督预训练与聚类级伪标签策略，通过分析目标域数据的聚类内统计信息生成可靠伪标签，实现无监督领域自适应。
AI.result: 在四个跨域适应场景中，该方法持续优于现有SFUDA方法，且效果与传统有源领域自适应方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 提出的聚类级伪标签策略有效缓解了跨域面部表情识别的领域偏移问题，为无源领域自适应研究提供了新思路。
