authors_text: Tim Schopf,Simon Klimek,Florian Matthes
title: PatternRank: Leveraging Pretrained Language Models and Part of Speech for Unsupervised Keyphrase Extraction
title_zh: PatternRank：利用预训练的语言模型和部分语音进行无监督关键短语提取
comment: Accepted to 14th International Joint Conference on Knowledge Discovery, Knowledge Engineering and Knowledge Management - KDIR
comments: Accepted to 14th International Joint Conference on Knowledge Discovery, Knowledge Engineering and Knowledge Management - KDIR
abstract: Keyphrase extraction is the process of automatically selecting a small set of most relevant phrases from a given text. Supervised keyphrase extraction approaches need large amounts of labeled training data and perform poorly outside the domain of the training data. In this paper, we present PatternRank, which leverages pretrained language models and part-of-speech for unsupervised keyphrase extraction from single documents. Our experiments show PatternRank achieves higher precision, recall and F1-scores than previous state-of-the-art approaches. In addition, we present the KeyphraseVectorizers package, which allows easy modification of part-of-speech patterns for candidate keyphrase selection, and hence adaptation of our approach to any domain.
summary: Keyphrase extraction is the process of automatically selecting a small set of most relevant phrases from a given text. Supervised keyphrase extraction approaches need large amounts of labeled training data and perform poorly outside the domain of the training data. In this paper, we present PatternRank, which leverages pretrained language models and part-of-speech for unsupervised keyphrase extraction from single documents. Our experiments show PatternRank achieves higher precision, recall and F1-scores than previous state-of-the-art approaches. In addition, we present the KeyphraseVectorizers package, which allows easy modification of part-of-speech patterns for candidate keyphrase selection, and hence adaptation of our approach to any domain.
abstract_zh: 关键短语提取是从给定文本中自动选择一小组最相关短语的过程。有监督的关键短语提取方法需要大量标记的训练数据，并且在训练数据域之外表现不佳。在本文中，我们提出了 PatternRank，它利用预训练的语言模型和词性从单个文档中进行无监督的关键短语提取。我们的实验表明，与之前最先进的方法相比，PatternRank 实现了更高的精确度、召回率和 F1 分数。此外，我们还提供了 KeyphraseVectorizers 包，它可以轻松修改候选关键短语选择的词性模式，从而使我们的方法适应任何领域。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PatternRank方法，结合预训练语言模型与词性信息实现单文档无监督关键词短语提取。
AI.motivation: 传统监督方法依赖大量标注数据且领域适应性差，需开发无需标注数据的通用关键词提取方法。
AI.method: 融合预训练语言模型语义表示与词性规则，通过KeyphraseVectorizers工具包动态调整词性模式生成候选短语。
AI.result: 在标准数据集上取得优于现有方法的精确率、召回率和F1分数，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: PatternRank通过结合模型语义与语言学特征，在无监督场景下实现跨领域的高效关键词提取。

authors_text: Yuanyuan Jiang,Jianqin Yin,Yonghao Dang
title: Leveraging the Video-level Semantic Consistency of Event for Audio-visual Event Localization
title_zh: 利用事件的视频级语义一致性进行视听事件定位
comment: 13 pages, 10 figures, Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Multimedia
comments: 13 pages, 10 figures, Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Multimedia
abstract: Audio-visual event (AVE) localization has attracted much attention in recent years. Most existing methods are often limited to independently encoding and classifying each video segment separated from the full video (which can be regarded as the segment-level representations of events). However, they ignore the semantic consistency of the event within the same full video (which can be considered as the video-level representations of events). In contrast to existing methods, we propose a novel video-level semantic consistency guidance network for the AVE localization task. Specifically, we propose an event semantic consistency modeling (ESCM) module to explore video-level semantic information for semantic consistency modeling. It consists of two components: a cross-modal event representation extractor (CERE) and an intra-modal semantic consistency enhancer (ISCE). CERE is proposed to obtain the event semantic information at the video level. Furthermore, ISCE takes video-level event semantics as prior knowledge to guide the model to focus on the semantic continuity of an event within each modality. Moreover, we propose a new negative pair filter loss to encourage the network to filter out the irrelevant segment pairs and a new smooth loss to further increase the gap between different categories of events in the weakly-supervised setting. We perform extensive experiments on the public AVE dataset and outperform the state-of-the-art methods in both fully- and weakly-supervised settings, thus verifying the effectiveness of our method.The code is available at https://github.com/Bravo5542/VSCG.
summary: Audio-visual event (AVE) localization has attracted much attention in recent years. Most existing methods are often limited to independently encoding and classifying each video segment separated from the full video (which can be regarded as the segment-level representations of events). However, they ignore the semantic consistency of the event within the same full video (which can be considered as the video-level representations of events). In contrast to existing methods, we propose a novel video-level semantic consistency guidance network for the AVE localization task. Specifically, we propose an event semantic consistency modeling (ESCM) module to explore video-level semantic information for semantic consistency modeling. It consists of two components: a cross-modal event representation extractor (CERE) and an intra-modal semantic consistency enhancer (ISCE). CERE is proposed to obtain the event semantic information at the video level. Furthermore, ISCE takes video-level event semantics as prior knowledge to guide the model to focus on the semantic continuity of an event within each modality. Moreover, we propose a new negative pair filter loss to encourage the network to filter out the irrelevant segment pairs and a new smooth loss to further increase the gap between different categories of events in the weakly-supervised setting. We perform extensive experiments on the public AVE dataset and outperform the state-of-the-art methods in both fully- and weakly-supervised settings, thus verifying the effectiveness of our method.The code is available at https://github.com/Bravo5542/VSCG.
abstract_zh: 近年来，视听事件（AVE）本地化备受关注。大多数现有方法通常仅限于对从完整视频中分离出来的每个视频片段进行独立编码和分类（可以将其视为事件的片段级表示）。然而，它们忽略了同一完整视频中事件的语义一致性（可以将其视为事件的视频级表示）。与现有方法相比，我们为 AVE 定位任务提出了一种新颖的视频级语义一致性指导网络。具体来说，我们提出了一个事件语义一致性建模（ESCM）模块来探索用于语义一致性建模的视频级语义信息。它由两个组件组成：跨模态事件表示提取器（CERE）和模内语义一致性增强器（ISCE）。 CERE的提出是为了获取视频级别的事件语义信息。此外，ISCE 将视频级事件语义作为先验知识，指导模型关注每种模态内事件的语义连续性。此外，我们提出了一种新的负对过滤损失，以鼓励网络过滤掉不相关的片段对，并提出了一种新的平滑损失，以进一步增加弱监督设置中不同类别事件之间的差距。我们在公共 AVE 数据集上进行了广泛的实验，在完全监督和弱监督的设置中都优于最先进的方法，从而验证了我们方法的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/Bravo5542/VSCG 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视频级语义一致性的音频-视觉事件定位方法，通过建模事件在全视频中的语义连续性来提升定位性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常独立编码视频片段而忽略全视频内事件的语义一致性，导致无法充分利用视频级语义信息进行事件定位。
AI.method: 设计了事件语义一致性建模模块（ESCM），包含跨模态事件表示提取器（CERE）和模态内语义一致性增强器（ISCE），并提出负样本对过滤损失和光滑损失以增强语义区分度。
AI.result: 在公开AVE数据集上，该方法在全监督和弱监督设置下均优于现有最先进方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模视频级语义一致性，该方法显著提升了音频-视觉事件定位的准确性和鲁棒性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视频级语义一致性的音频-视觉事件定位方法，通过建模事件在全视频中的语义连续性来提升定位性能。

search_text: Leveraging the Video-level Semantic Consistency of Event for Audio-visual Event Localization 利用事件的视频级语义一致性进行视听事件定位 Audio-visual event (AVE) localization has attracted much attention in recent years. Most existing methods are often limited to independently encoding and classifying each video segment separated from the full video (which can be regarded as the segment-level representations of events). However, they ignore the semantic consistency of the event within the same full video (which can be considered as the video-level representations of events). In contrast to existing methods, we propose a novel video-level semantic consistency guidance network for the AVE localization task. Specifically, we propose an event semantic consistency modeling (ESCM) module to explore video-level semantic information for semantic consistency modeling. It consists of two components: a cross-modal event representation extractor (CERE) and an intra-modal semantic consistency enhancer (ISCE). CERE is proposed to obtain the event semantic information at the video level. Furthermore, ISCE takes video-level event semantics as prior knowledge to guide the model to focus on the semantic continuity of an event within each modality. Moreover, we propose a new negative pair filter loss to encourage the network to filter out the irrelevant segment pairs and a new smooth loss to further increase the gap between different categories of events in the weakly-supervised setting. We perform extensive experiments on the public AVE dataset and outperform the state-of-the-art methods in both fully- and weakly-supervised settings, thus verifying the effectiveness of our method.The code is available at https://github.com/Bravo5542/VSCG. 近年来，视听事件（AVE）本地化备受关注。大多数现有方法通常仅限于对从完整视频中分离出来的每个视频片段进行独立编码和分类（可以将其视为事件的片段级表示）。然而，它们忽略了同一完整视频中事件的语义一致性（可以将其视为事件的视频级表示）。与现有方法相比，我们为 AVE 定位任务提出了一种新颖的视频级语义一致性指导网络。具体来说，我们提出了一个事件语义一致性建模（ESCM）模块来探索用于语义一致性建模的视频级语义信息。它由两个组件组成：跨模态事件表示提取器（CERE）和模内语义一致性增强器（ISCE）。 CERE的提出是为了获取视频级别的事件语义信息。此外，ISCE 将视频级事件语义作为先验知识，指导模型关注每种模态内事件的语义连续性。此外，我们提出了一种新的负对过滤损失，以鼓励网络过滤掉不相关的片段对，并提出了一种新的平滑损失，以进一步增加弱监督设置中不同类别事件之间的差距。我们在公共 AVE 数据集上进行了广泛的实验，在完全监督和弱监督的设置中都优于最先进的方法，从而验证了我们方法的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/Bravo5542/VSCG 获取。 本文提出了一种基于视频级语义一致性的音频-视觉事件定位方法，通过建模事件在全视频中的语义连续性来提升定位性能。 Yuanyuan Jiang,Jianqin Yin,Yonghao Dang cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Chengting Yu,Zheming Gu,Da Li,Gaoang Wang,Aili Wang,Erping Li
title: STSC-SNN: Spatio-Temporal Synaptic Connection with Temporal Convolution and Attention for Spiking Neural Networks
title_zh: STSC-SNN：时空突触连接与时间卷积和尖峰神经网络的注意力
abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs), as one of the algorithmic models in neuromorphic computing, have gained a great deal of research attention owing to temporal information processing capability, low power consumption, and high biological plausibility. The potential to efficiently extract spatio-temporal features makes it suitable for processing the event streams. However, existing synaptic structures in SNNs are almost full-connections or spatial 2D convolution, neither of which can extract temporal dependencies adequately. In this work, we take inspiration from biological synapses and propose a spatio-temporal synaptic connection SNN (STSC-SNN) model, to enhance the spatio-temporal receptive fields of synaptic connections, thereby establishing temporal dependencies across layers. Concretely, we incorporate temporal convolution and attention mechanisms to implement synaptic filtering and gating functions. We show that endowing synaptic models with temporal dependencies can improve the performance of SNNs on classification tasks. In addition, we investigate the impact of performance vias varied spatial-temporal receptive fields and reevaluate the temporal modules in SNNs. Our approach is tested on neuromorphic datasets, including DVS128 Gesture (gesture recognition), N-MNIST, CIFAR10-DVS (image classification), and SHD (speech digit recognition). The results show that the proposed model outperforms the state-of-the-art accuracy on nearly all datasets.
summary: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs), as one of the algorithmic models in neuromorphic computing, have gained a great deal of research attention owing to temporal information processing capability, low power consumption, and high biological plausibility. The potential to efficiently extract spatio-temporal features makes it suitable for processing the event streams. However, existing synaptic structures in SNNs are almost full-connections or spatial 2D convolution, neither of which can extract temporal dependencies adequately. In this work, we take inspiration from biological synapses and propose a spatio-temporal synaptic connection SNN (STSC-SNN) model, to enhance the spatio-temporal receptive fields of synaptic connections, thereby establishing temporal dependencies across layers. Concretely, we incorporate temporal convolution and attention mechanisms to implement synaptic filtering and gating functions. We show that endowing synaptic models with temporal dependencies can improve the performance of SNNs on classification tasks. In addition, we investigate the impact of performance vias varied spatial-temporal receptive fields and reevaluate the temporal modules in SNNs. Our approach is tested on neuromorphic datasets, including DVS128 Gesture (gesture recognition), N-MNIST, CIFAR10-DVS (image classification), and SHD (speech digit recognition). The results show that the proposed model outperforms the state-of-the-art accuracy on nearly all datasets.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络（SNN）作为神经形态计算中的算法模型之一，由于时间信息处理能力、低功耗和高生物学合理性而受到广泛的研究关注。有效提取时空特征的潜力使其适合处理事件流。然而，SNN 中现有的突触结构几乎都是全连接或空间二维卷积，这两种结构都无法充分提取时间依赖性。在这项工作中，我们从生物突触中汲取灵感，提出了时空突触连接SNN（STSC-SNN）模型，以增强突触连接的时空感受野，从而建立跨层的时间依赖性。具体来说，我们结合时间卷积和注意力机制来实现突触过滤和门控功能。我们证明，赋予突触模型时间依赖性可以提高 SNN 在分类任务上的性能。此外，我们还研究了不同时空感受野对性能的影响，并重新评估 SNN 中的时间模块。我们的方法在神经形态数据集上进行了测试，包括 DVS128 Gesture（手势识别）、N-MNIST、CIFAR10-DVS（图像分类）和 SHD（语音数字识别）。结果表明，所提出的模型在几乎所有数据集上都优于最先进的精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合时空突触连接、时序卷积和注意力机制的脉冲神经网络模型（STSC-SNN），以提升对事件流数据的时空特征提取能力。
AI.motivation: 现有脉冲神经网络（SNN）的突触结构多为全连接或二维卷积，难以充分捕捉时间依赖性，限制了其在处理事件流数据时的性能。
AI.method: 受生物突触启发，设计时空突触连接结构，集成时序卷积和注意力机制实现突触滤波与门控功能，增强跨层时间依赖性建模。
AI.result: 在DVS128 Gesture、N-MNIST、CIFAR10-DVS和SHD等数据集上，该模型在分类任务中达到或超越现有最优方法的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入时空突触连接结构，STSC-SNN有效提升了SNN对时空特征的建模能力，验证了时间依赖性在事件流处理中的关键作用。

authors_text: Vigneshwaran Shankaran,Bhaskaran V
title: Multi-site Diagnostic Classification Of Schizophrenia Using 3D CNN On Aggregated Task-based fMRI Data
title_zh: 使用 3D CNN 对基于聚合任务的 fMRI 数据进行精神分裂症的多站点诊断分类
abstract: In spite of years of research, the mechanisms that underlie the development of schizophrenia, as well as its relapse, symptomatology, and treatment, continue to be a mystery. The absence of appropriate analytic tools to deal with the variable and complicated nature of schizophrenia may be one of the factors that contribute to the development of this disorder. Deep learning is a subfield of artificial intelligence that was inspired by the nervous system. In recent years, deep learning has made it easier to model and analyse complicated, high-dimensional, and nonlinear systems. Research on schizophrenia is one of the many areas of study that has been revolutionised as a result of the outstanding accuracy that deep learning algorithms have demonstrated in classification and prediction tasks. Deep learning has the potential to become a powerful tool for understanding the mechanisms that are at the root of schizophrenia. In addition, a growing variety of techniques aimed at improving model interpretability and causal reasoning are contributing to this trend. Using multi-site fMRI data and a variety of deep learning approaches, this study seeks to identify different types of schizophrenia. Our proposed method of temporal aggregation of the 4D fMRI data outperforms existing work. In addition, this study aims to shed light on the strength of connections between various brain areas in schizophrenia individuals.
summary: In spite of years of research, the mechanisms that underlie the development of schizophrenia, as well as its relapse, symptomatology, and treatment, continue to be a mystery. The absence of appropriate analytic tools to deal with the variable and complicated nature of schizophrenia may be one of the factors that contribute to the development of this disorder. Deep learning is a subfield of artificial intelligence that was inspired by the nervous system. Research on schizophrenia is one of the many areas of study that has been revolutionised as a result of the outstanding accuracy that deep learning algorithms have demonstrated in classification and prediction tasks. In addition, a growing variety of techniques aimed at improving model interpretability and causal reasoning are contributing to this trend. Using multi-site fMRI data and a variety of deep learning approaches, this study seeks to identify different types of schizophrenia. Our proposed method of temporal aggregation of the 4D fMRI data outperforms existing work. In addition, this study aims to shed light on the strength of connections between various brain areas in schizophrenia individuals.
abstract_zh: 尽管进行了多年的研究，精神分裂症的发展机制及其复发、症状和治疗仍然是一个谜。缺乏适当的分析工具来处理精神分裂症的可变性和复杂性可能是导致这种疾病发展的因素之一。深度学习是人工智能的一个子领域，受到神经系统的启发。近年来，深度学习使得复杂、高维和非线性系统的建模和分析变得更加容易。由于深度学习算法在分类和预测任务中表现出出色的准确性，精神分裂症的研究是众多发生革命性变化的研究领域之一。深度学习有潜力成为理解精神分裂症根源机制的强大工具。此外，越来越多旨在提高模型可解释性和因果推理的技术也促进了这一趋势。这项研究利用多站点功能磁共振成像数据和各种深度学习方法，旨在识别不同类型的精神分裂症。我们提出的 4D fMRI 数据时间聚合方法优于现有工作。此外，这项研究旨在揭示精神分裂症患者不同大脑区域之间的联系强度。

AI.tldr: 本研究利用3D卷积神经网络（CNN）对多站点任务型fMRI数据进行聚合分析，旨在实现精神分裂症的诊断分类。
AI.motivation: 精神分裂症的发病机制及治疗仍不明确，现有分析工具难以处理其复杂性。深度学习在处理高维非线性数据方面表现优异，可能成为研究该疾病的新工具。
AI.method: 采用多站点fMRI数据，通过时间聚合处理4D fMRI数据，并使用3D CNN进行分类建模，结合多种深度学习方法提升诊断效果。
AI.result: 提出的时间聚合方法优于现有技术，成功识别了精神分裂症患者的脑区连接强度差异。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习可有效辅助解析精神分裂症的神经机制，未来需进一步结合模型可解释性与因果推理技术以提升诊断可靠性。

search_text: Multi-site Diagnostic Classification Of Schizophrenia Using 3D CNN On Aggregated Task-based fMRI Data 使用 3D CNN 对基于聚合任务的 fMRI 数据进行精神分裂症的多站点诊断分类 In spite of years of research, the mechanisms that underlie the development of schizophrenia, as well as its relapse, symptomatology, and treatment, continue to be a mystery. The absence of appropriate analytic tools to deal with the variable and complicated nature of schizophrenia may be one of the factors that contribute to the development of this disorder. Deep learning is a subfield of artificial intelligence that was inspired by the nervous system. In recent years, deep learning has made it easier to model and analyse complicated, high-dimensional, and nonlinear systems. Research on schizophrenia is one of the many areas of study that has been revolutionised as a result of the outstanding accuracy that deep learning algorithms have demonstrated in classification and prediction tasks. Deep learning has the potential to become a powerful tool for understanding the mechanisms that are at the root of schizophrenia. In addition, a growing variety of techniques aimed at improving model interpretability and causal reasoning are contributing to this trend. Using multi-site fMRI data and a variety of deep learning approaches, this study seeks to identify different types of schizophrenia. Our proposed method of temporal aggregation of the 4D fMRI data outperforms existing work. In addition, this study aims to shed light on the strength of connections between various brain areas in schizophrenia individuals. 尽管进行了多年的研究，精神分裂症的发展机制及其复发、症状和治疗仍然是一个谜。缺乏适当的分析工具来处理精神分裂症的可变性和复杂性可能是导致这种疾病发展的因素之一。深度学习是人工智能的一个子领域，受到神经系统的启发。近年来，深度学习使得复杂、高维和非线性系统的建模和分析变得更加容易。由于深度学习算法在分类和预测任务中表现出出色的准确性，精神分裂症的研究是众多发生革命性变化的研究领域之一。深度学习有潜力成为理解精神分裂症根源机制的强大工具。此外，越来越多旨在提高模型可解释性和因果推理的技术也促进了这一趋势。这项研究利用多站点功能磁共振成像数据和各种深度学习方法，旨在识别不同类型的精神分裂症。我们提出的 4D fMRI 数据时间聚合方法优于现有工作。此外，这项研究旨在揭示精神分裂症患者不同大脑区域之间的联系强度。 本研究利用3D卷积神经网络（CNN）对多站点任务型fMRI数据进行聚合分析，旨在实现精神分裂症的诊断分类。 Vigneshwaran Shankaran,Bhaskaran V cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.SP

authors_text: Lin Ma,Jiangtao Gong,Hao Xu,Hao Chen,Hao Zhao,Wenbing Huang,Guyue Zhou
title: Planning Assembly Sequence with Graph Transformer
title_zh: 使用图形转换器规划装配顺序
abstract: Assembly sequence planning (ASP) is the essential process for modern manufacturing, proven to be NP-complete thus its effective and efficient solution has been a challenge for researchers in the field. In this paper, we present a graph-transformer based framework for the ASP problem which is trained and demonstrated on a self-collected ASP database. The ASP database contains a self-collected set of LEGO models. The LEGO model is abstracted to a heterogeneous graph structure after a thorough analysis of the original structure and feature extraction. The ground truth assembly sequence is first generated by brute-force search and then adjusted manually to in line with human rational habits. Based on this self-collected ASP dataset, we propose a heterogeneous graph-transformer framework to learn the latent rules for assembly planning. We evaluated the proposed framework in a series of experiment. The results show that the similarity of the predicted and ground truth sequences can reach 0.44, a medium correlation measured by Kendall's $τ$. Meanwhile, we compared the different effects of node features and edge features and generated a feasible and reasonable assembly sequence as a benchmark for further research. Our data set and code is available on https://github.com/AIR-DISCOVER/ICRA\_ASP.
summary: Assembly sequence planning (ASP) is the essential process for modern manufacturing, proven to be NP-complete thus its effective and efficient solution has been a challenge for researchers in the field. In this paper, we present a graph-transformer based framework for the ASP problem which is trained and demonstrated on a self-collected ASP database. The ASP database contains a self-collected set of LEGO models. The LEGO model is abstracted to a heterogeneous graph structure after a thorough analysis of the original structure and feature extraction. The ground truth assembly sequence is first generated by brute-force search and then adjusted manually to in line with human rational habits. Based on this self-collected ASP dataset, we propose a heterogeneous graph-transformer framework to learn the latent rules for assembly planning. We evaluated the proposed framework in a series of experiment. The results show that the similarity of the predicted and ground truth sequences can reach 0.44, a medium correlation measured by Kendall's $τ$. Meanwhile, we compared the different effects of node features and edge features and generated a feasible and reasonable assembly sequence as a benchmark for further research. Our data set and code is available on https://github.com/AIR-DISCOVER/ICRA\_ASP.
abstract_zh: 装配序列规划（ASP）是现代制造的基本过程，已被证明是NP完全的，因此其有效且高效的解决方案一直是该领域研究人员面临的挑战。在本文中，我们针对 ASP 问题提出了一个基于图转换器的框架，该框架在自收集的 ASP 数据库上进行了训练和演示。 ASP 数据库包含一组自行收集的乐高模型。经过对原始结构的深入分析和特征提取，乐高模型被抽象为异构图结构。地面实况组装序列首先通过暴力搜索生成，然后手动调整以符合人类理性习惯。基于这个自行收集的 ASP 数据集，我们提出了一个异构图转换器框架来学习装配规划的潜在规则。我们通过一系列实验评估了所提出的框架。结果表明，预测序列和真实序列的相似度可以达到 0.44，通过 Kendall 的 $τ$ 衡量，属于中等相关性。同时，我们比较了节点特征和边缘特征的不同效果，并生成了可行合理的组装序列，作为进一步研究的基准。我们的数据集和代码可在 https://github.com/AIR-DISCOVER/ICRA\_ASP 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图Transformer的框架，用于解决复杂制造中的装配序列规划（ASP）问题，并构建了自建的LEGO模型数据集进行训练与验证。
AI.motivation: 装配序列规划（ASP）是NP完全问题，传统方法效率低下。现有研究缺乏高效且符合人类习惯的解决方案，需探索新型深度学习方法。
AI.method: 将LEGO模型抽象为异构图结构，通过暴力搜索生成初始装配序列并人工调整以符合人类逻辑。基于自建数据集设计异构图Transformer框架，学习装配规则并生成序列。
AI.result: 预测序列与真实序列的Kendall's τ相似度达0.44，验证了方法有效性；通过节点与边特征对比实验，生成可作为基准的合理装配序列。
AI.conclusion: 图Transformer框架在ASP任务中表现可行，自建数据集与代码为后续研究提供基准，未来可拓展至更复杂工业场景。

authors_text: Yuxin Song,Min Yang,Wenhao Wu,Dongliang He,Fu Li,Jingdong Wang
title: It Takes Two: Masked Appearance-Motion Modeling for Self-supervised Video Transformer Pre-training
title_zh: 需要两个：用于自监督视频 Transformer 预训练的蒙面外观运动建模
abstract: Self-supervised video transformer pre-training has recently benefited from the mask-and-predict pipeline. They have demonstrated outstanding effectiveness on downstream video tasks and superior data efficiency on small datasets. However, temporal relation is not fully exploited by these methods. In this work, we explicitly investigate motion cues in videos as extra prediction target and propose our Masked Appearance-Motion Modeling (MAM2) framework. Specifically, we design an encoder-regressor-decoder pipeline for this task. The regressor separates feature encoding and pretext tasks completion, such that the feature extraction process is completed adequately by the encoder. In order to guide the encoder to fully excavate spatial-temporal features, two separate decoders are used for two pretext tasks of disentangled appearance and motion prediction. We explore various motion prediction targets and figure out RGB-difference is simple yet effective. As for appearance prediction, VQGAN codes are leveraged as prediction target. With our pre-training pipeline, convergence can be remarkably speed up, e.g., we only require half of epochs than state-of-the-art VideoMAE (400 v.s. 800) to achieve the competitive performance. Extensive experimental results prove that our method learns generalized video representations. Notably, our MAM2 with ViT-B achieves 82.3% on Kinects-400, 71.3% on Something-Something V2, 91.5% on UCF101, and 62.5% on HMDB51.
summary: Self-supervised video transformer pre-training has recently benefited from the mask-and-predict pipeline. They have demonstrated outstanding effectiveness on downstream video tasks and superior data efficiency on small datasets. However, temporal relation is not fully exploited by these methods. In this work, we explicitly investigate motion cues in videos as extra prediction target and propose our Masked Appearance-Motion Modeling (MAM2) framework. Specifically, we design an encoder-regressor-decoder pipeline for this task. The regressor separates feature encoding and pretext tasks completion, such that the feature extraction process is completed adequately by the encoder. In order to guide the encoder to fully excavate spatial-temporal features, two separate decoders are used for two pretext tasks of disentangled appearance and motion prediction. We explore various motion prediction targets and figure out RGB-difference is simple yet effective. As for appearance prediction, VQGAN codes are leveraged as prediction target. With our pre-training pipeline, convergence can be remarkably speed up, e.g., we only require half of epochs than state-of-the-art VideoMAE (400 v.s. 800) to achieve the competitive performance. Extensive experimental results prove that our method learns generalized video representations. Notably, our MAM2 with ViT-B achieves 82.3% on Kinects-400, 71.3% on Something-Something V2, 91.5% on UCF101, and 62.5% on HMDB51.
abstract_zh: 自监督视频变换器预训练最近受益于掩模和预测管道。他们在下游视频任务上表现出了出色的有效性，在小数据集上表现出了卓越的数据效率。然而，这些方法并没有充分利用时间关系。在这项工作中，我们明确研究视频中的运动线索作为额外的预测目标，并提出我们的蒙面外观运动建模（MAM2）框架。具体来说，我们为此任务设计了一个编码器-回归器-解码器管道。回归器将特征编码和借口任务完成分开，以便编码器充分完成特征提取过程。为了引导编码器充分挖掘时空特征，使用两个独立的解码器来执行解纠缠外观和运动预测两个借口任务。我们探索了各种运动预测目标，并发现 RGB 差异简单而有效。至于外观预测，利用 VQGAN 代码作为预测目标。通过我们的预训练流程，收敛速度可以显着加快，例如，我们只需要比最先进的 VideoMAE（400 vs 800）一半的 epoch 即可实现有竞争力的性能。大量的实验结果证明我们的方法可以学习广义的视频表示。值得注意的是，我们采用 ViT-B 的 MAM2 在 Kinects-400 上达到 82.3%，在 Something-Something V2 上达到 71.3%，在 UCF101 上达到 91.5%，在 HMDB51 上达到 62.5%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MAM2的框架，通过结合外观和运动线索进行自监督视频Transformer预训练，以提升视频表示学习的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督视频预训练方法未能充分挖掘时间关系，本文旨在通过显式建模运动信息作为额外预测目标来增强时序特征学习。
AI.method: 设计了编码器-回归器-解码器架构，使用两个独立解码器分别完成解耦的外观（VQGAN码）和运动（RGB差值）预测任务，分离特征编码与预训练任务。
AI.result: 在Kinetics-400等数据集上达到SOTA性能，仅需VideoMAE一半训练轮次（400 vs 800），并在多个基准测试中取得显著提升。
AI.conclusion: MAM2通过联合建模外观与运动信息，有效学习了通用视频表征，在收敛速度和下游任务性能上均优于现有方法。

method: 设计了编码器-回归器-解码器架构，使用两个独立解码器分别完成解耦的外观（VQGAN码）和运动（RGB差值）预测任务，分离特征编码与预训练任务。
result: 在Kinetics-400等数据集上达到SOTA性能，仅需VideoMAE一半训练轮次（400 vs 800），并在多个基准测试中取得显著提升。
conclusion: MAM2通过联合建模外观与运动信息，有效学习了通用视频表征，在收敛速度和下游任务性能上均优于现有方法。
search_text: It Takes Two: Masked Appearance-Motion Modeling for Self-supervised Video Transformer Pre-training 需要两个：用于自监督视频 Transformer 预训练的蒙面外观运动建模 Self-supervised video transformer pre-training has recently benefited from the mask-and-predict pipeline. They have demonstrated outstanding effectiveness on downstream video tasks and superior data efficiency on small datasets. However, temporal relation is not fully exploited by these methods. In this work, we explicitly investigate motion cues in videos as extra prediction target and propose our Masked Appearance-Motion Modeling (MAM2) framework. Specifically, we design an encoder-regressor-decoder pipeline for this task. The regressor separates feature encoding and pretext tasks completion, such that the feature extraction process is completed adequately by the encoder. In order to guide the encoder to fully excavate spatial-temporal features, two separate decoders are used for two pretext tasks of disentangled appearance and motion prediction. We explore various motion prediction targets and figure out RGB-difference is simple yet effective. As for appearance prediction, VQGAN codes are leveraged as prediction target. With our pre-training pipeline, convergence can be remarkably speed up, e.g., we only require half of epochs than state-of-the-art VideoMAE (400 v.s. 800) to achieve the competitive performance. Extensive experimental results prove that our method learns generalized video representations. Notably, our MAM2 with ViT-B achieves 82.3% on Kinects-400, 71.3% on Something-Something V2, 91.5% on UCF101, and 62.5% on HMDB51. 自监督视频变换器预训练最近受益于掩模和预测管道。他们在下游视频任务上表现出了出色的有效性，在小数据集上表现出了卓越的数据效率。然而，这些方法并没有充分利用时间关系。在这项工作中，我们明确研究视频中的运动线索作为额外的预测目标，并提出我们的蒙面外观运动建模（MAM2）框架。具体来说，我们为此任务设计了一个编码器-回归器-解码器管道。回归器将特征编码和借口任务完成分开，以便编码器充分完成特征提取过程。为了引导编码器充分挖掘时空特征，使用两个独立的解码器来执行解纠缠外观和运动预测两个借口任务。我们探索了各种运动预测目标，并发现 RGB 差异简单而有效。至于外观预测，利用 VQGAN 代码作为预测目标。通过我们的预训练流程，收敛速度可以显着加快，例如，我们只需要比最先进的 VideoMAE（400 vs 800）一半的 epoch 即可实现有竞争力的性能。大量的实验结果证明我们的方法可以学习广义的视频表示。值得注意的是，我们采用 ViT-B 的 MAM2 在 Kinects-400 上达到 82.3%，在 Something-Something V2 上达到 71.3%，在 UCF101 上达到 91.5%，在 HMDB51 上达到 62.5%。 本文提出了一种名为MAM2的框架，通过结合外观和运动线索进行自监督视频Transformer预训练，以提升视频表示学习的效果。 Yuxin Song,Min Yang,Wenhao Wu,Dongliang He,Fu Li,Jingdong Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Hongyang Li,Jiehong Lin,Kui Jia
title: DCL-Net: Deep Correspondence Learning Network for 6D Pose Estimation
title_zh: DCL-Net：用于 6D 姿态估计的深度对应学习网络
abstract: Establishment of point correspondence between camera and object coordinate systems is a promising way to solve 6D object poses. However, surrogate objectives of correspondence learning in 3D space are a step away from the true ones of object pose estimation, making the learning suboptimal for the end task. In this paper, we address this shortcoming by introducing a new method of Deep Correspondence Learning Network for direct 6D object pose estimation, shortened as DCL-Net. Specifically, DCL-Net employs dual newly proposed Feature Disengagement and Alignment (FDA) modules to establish, in the feature space, partial-to-partial correspondence and complete-to-complete one for partial object observation and its complete CAD model, respectively, which result in aggregated pose and match feature pairs from two coordinate systems; these two FDA modules thus bring complementary advantages. The match feature pairs are used to learn confidence scores for measuring the qualities of deep correspondence, while the pose feature pairs are weighted by confidence scores for direct object pose regression. A confidence-based pose refinement network is also proposed to further improve pose precision in an iterative manner. Extensive experiments show that DCL-Net outperforms existing methods on three benchmarking datasets, including YCB-Video, LineMOD, and Oclussion-LineMOD; ablation studies also confirm the efficacy of our novel designs.
summary: Establishment of point correspondence between camera and object coordinate systems is a promising way to solve 6D object poses. However, surrogate objectives of correspondence learning in 3D space are a step away from the true ones of object pose estimation, making the learning suboptimal for the end task. In this paper, we address this shortcoming by introducing a new method of Deep Correspondence Learning Network for direct 6D object pose estimation, shortened as DCL-Net. Specifically, DCL-Net employs dual newly proposed Feature Disengagement and Alignment (FDA) modules to establish, in the feature space, partial-to-partial correspondence and complete-to-complete one for partial object observation and its complete CAD model, respectively, which result in aggregated pose and match feature pairs from two coordinate systems; these two FDA modules thus bring complementary advantages. The match feature pairs are used to learn confidence scores for measuring the qualities of deep correspondence, while the pose feature pairs are weighted by confidence scores for direct object pose regression. A confidence-based pose refinement network is also proposed to further improve pose precision in an iterative manner. Extensive experiments show that DCL-Net outperforms existing methods on three benchmarking datasets, including YCB-Video, LineMOD, and Oclussion-LineMOD; ablation studies also confirm the efficacy of our novel designs.
abstract_zh: 建立相机和物体坐标系之间的点对应关系是解决 6D 物体位姿的一种有前途的方法。然而，3D 空间中对应学习的代理目标与物体姿态估计的真实目标相差一步，使得学习对于最终任务而言不是最佳的。在本文中，我们通过引入一种用于直接 6D 物体姿态估计的深度对应学习网络新方法（简称 DCL-Net）来解决这一缺点。具体来说，DCL-Net 采用双新提出的特征分离和对齐 (FDA) 模块，在特征空间中分别建立部分对象观察及其完整 CAD 模型的部分到部分对应和完整到完整对应，从而产生来自两个坐标系的聚合姿态和匹配特征对；因此，这两个 FDA 模块带来了互补的优势。匹配特征对用于学习置信度分数以测量深度对应的质量，而姿势特征对则通过置信度分数进行加权以用于直接对象姿势回归。还提出了基于置信度的姿态细化网络，以迭代方式进一步提高姿态精度。大量实验表明，DCL-Net 在三个基准数据集上的性能优于现有方法，包括 YCB-Video、LineMOD 和 Oclussion-LineMOD；消融研究也证实了我们新颖设计的功效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DCL-Net网络，通过深度对应学习直接估计物体6D姿态。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在3D空间中使用替代目标进行对应学习，与真实姿态估计目标存在偏差，导致学习效果次优。
AI.method: 设计双FDA模块建立特征空间部分-部分和整体-整体对应关系，生成跨坐标系的特征对；通过置信度评分筛选高质量对应关系，并加权回归姿态；提出基于置信度的迭代精炼网络。
AI.result: 在YCB-Video、LineMOD和Oclussion-LineMOD三个数据集上均优于现有方法，消融实验验证了模块有效性。
AI.conclusion: DCL-Net通过直接优化姿态估计目标，结合特征对齐与置信度机制，显著提升了6D姿态估计精度。

The match feature pairs are used to learn confidence scores for measuring the qualities of deep correspondence, while the pose feature pairs are weighted by confidence scores for direct object pose regression. authors_text: Juliette Achddou,Olivier Cappe,Aurélien Garivier
title: Stochastic Direct Search Method for Blind Resource Allocation
title_zh: 资源盲分配的随机直接搜索方法
comment: ef:Transactions on Machine Learning Research Journal, 2024
comments: ef:Transactions on Machine Learning Research Journal, 2024
abstract: Motivated by programmatic advertising optimization, we consider the task of sequentially allocating budget across a set of resources. At every time step, a feasible allocation is chosen and only a corresponding random return is observed. The goal is to maximize the cumulative expected sum of returns. This is a realistic model for budget allocation across subdivisions of marketing campaigns, with the objective of maximizing the number of conversions. We study direct search (also known as pattern search) methods for linearly constrained and derivative-free optimization in the presence of noise, which apply in particular to sequential budget allocation. These algorithms, which do not rely on hierarchical partitioning of the resource space, are easy to implement; they respect the operational constraints of resource allocation by avoiding evaluation outside of the feasible domain; and they are also compatible with warm start by being (approximate) descent algorithms. However, they have not yet been analyzed from the perspective of cumulative regret. We show that direct search methods achieves finite regret in the deterministic and unconstrained case. In the presence of evaluation noise and linear constraints, we propose a simple extension of direct search that achieves a regret upper-bound of the order of $T^{2/3}$. We also propose an accelerated version of the algorithm, relying on repeated sequential testing, that significantly improves the practical behavior of the approach.
summary: Motivated by programmatic advertising optimization, we consider the task of sequentially allocating budget across a set of resources. At every time step, a feasible allocation is chosen and only a corresponding random return is observed. The goal is to maximize the cumulative expected sum of returns. This is a realistic model for budget allocation across subdivisions of marketing campaigns, with the objective of maximizing the number of conversions. We study direct search (also known as pattern search) methods for linearly constrained and derivative-free optimization in the presence of noise, which apply in particular to sequential budget allocation. These algorithms, which do not rely on hierarchical partitioning of the resource space, are easy to implement; they respect the operational constraints of resource allocation by avoiding evaluation outside of the feasible domain; and they are also compatible with warm start by being (approximate) descent algorithms. However, they have not yet been analyzed from the perspective of cumulative regret. We show that direct search methods achieves finite regret in the deterministic and unconstrained case. In the presence of evaluation noise and linear constraints, we propose a simple extension of direct search that achieves a regret upper-bound of the order of $T^{2/3}$. We also propose an accelerated version of the algorithm, relying on repeated sequential testing, that significantly improves the practical behavior of the approach.
abstract_zh: 在程序化广告优化的推动下，我们考虑在一组资源之间顺序分配预算的任务。在每个时间步，选择一个可行的分配，并且只观察到相应的随机回报。目标是最大化累积预期回报之和。这是跨营销活动细分的预算分配的现实模型，其目标是最大化转化次数。我们研究直接搜索（也称为模式搜索）方法，用于在存在噪声的情况下进行线性约束和无导数优化，特别适用于顺序预算分配。这些算法不依赖于资源空间的层次划分，易于实现；他们尊重资源分配的操作限制，避免在可行领域之外进行评估；并且它们还通过（近似）下降算法与热启动兼容。但目前还没有从累积遗憾的角度进行分析。我们证明直接搜索方法在确定性和无约束的情况下实现了有限的遗憾。在存在评估噪声和线性约束的情况下，我们提出了直接搜索的简单扩展，该扩展实现了$T^{2/3}$量级的遗憾上限。我们还提出了该算法的加速版本，依赖于重复的顺序测试，显着改进了该方法的实际行为。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于盲资源分配的随机直接搜索方法，旨在通过顺序分配预算以最大化累积收益。
AI.motivation: 受程序化广告优化启发，需要在未知回报分布的情况下，有效分配预算以最大化营销活动的转化率。
AI.method: 基于直接搜索（模式搜索）的无导数优化方法，结合线性约束处理和噪声鲁棒性扩展，并提出加速版本以提升实际效果。
AI.result: 在确定性无约束场景下实现有限遗憾，噪声和约束条件下遗憾上界为$T^{2/3}$，加速算法显著提升实践表现。
AI.conclusion: 直接搜索方法适用于带约束的盲资源分配问题，其扩展算法在理论保证和实际应用中均表现优异。

However, they have not yet been analyzed from the perspective of cumulative regret. We show that direct search methods achieves finite regret in the deterministic and unconstrained case. In the presence of evaluation noise and linear constraints, we propose a simple extension of direct search that achieves a regret upper-bound of the order of $T^{2/3}$. We also propose an accelerated version of the algorithm, relying on repeated sequential testing, that significantly improves the practical behavior of the approach. 在程序化广告优化的推动下，我们考虑在一组资源之间顺序分配预算的任务。在每个时间步，选择一个可行的分配，并且只观察到相应的随机回报。目标是最大化累积预期回报之和。这是跨营销活动细分的预算分配的现实模型，其目标是最大化转化次数。我们研究直接搜索（也称为模式搜索）方法，用于在存在噪声的情况下进行线性约束和无导数优化，特别适用于顺序预算分配。这些算法不依赖于资源空间的层次划分，易于实现；他们尊重资源分配的操作限制，避免在可行领域之外进行评估；并且它们还通过（近似）下降算法与热启动兼容。但目前还没有从累积遗憾的角度进行分析。我们证明直接搜索方法在确定性和无约束的情况下实现了有限的遗憾。在存在评估噪声和线性约束的情况下，我们提出了直接搜索的简单扩展，该扩展实现了$T^{2/3}$量级的遗憾上限。我们还提出了该算法的加速版本，依赖于重复的顺序测试，显着改进了该方法的实际行为。 本文提出了一种用于盲资源分配的随机直接搜索方法，旨在通过顺序分配预算以最大化累积收益。 Juliette Achddou,Olivier Cappe,Aurélien Garivier cs.AI,math.ST

authors_text: Xinpeng Wang,Han Jiang,Zhihua Wei,Shanlin Zhou
title: CHAE: Fine-Grained Controllable Story Generation with Characters, Actions and Emotions
title_zh: CHAE：具有角色、动作和情感的细粒度可控故事生成
abstract: Story generation has emerged as an interesting yet challenging NLP task in recent years. Some existing studies aim at generating fluent and coherent stories from keywords and outlines; while others attempt to control the global features of the story, such as emotion, style and topic. However, these works focus on coarse-grained control on the story, neglecting control on the details of the story, which is also crucial for the task. To fill the gap, this paper proposes a model for fine-grained control on the story, which allows the generation of customized stories with characters, corresponding actions and emotions arbitrarily assigned. Extensive experimental results on both automatic and human manual evaluations show the superiority of our method. It has strong controllability to generate stories according to the fine-grained personalized guidance, unveiling the effectiveness of our methodology. Our code is available at https://github.com/victorup/CHAE.
summary: Story generation has emerged as an interesting yet challenging NLP task in recent years. Some existing studies aim at generating fluent and coherent stories from keywords and outlines; while others attempt to control the global features of the story, such as emotion, style and topic. However, these works focus on coarse-grained control on the story, neglecting control on the details of the story, which is also crucial for the task. To fill the gap, this paper proposes a model for fine-grained control on the story, which allows the generation of customized stories with characters, corresponding actions and emotions arbitrarily assigned. Extensive experimental results on both automatic and human manual evaluations show the superiority of our method. It has strong controllability to generate stories according to the fine-grained personalized guidance, unveiling the effectiveness of our methodology. Our code is available at https://github.com/victorup/CHAE.
abstract_zh: 近年来，故事生成已成为一项有趣但具有挑战性的 NLP 任务。一些现有的研究旨在根据关键词和大纲生成流畅且连贯的故事；而另一些人则试图控制故事的整体特征，例如情感、风格和主题。然而，这些作品注重对故事的粗粒度控制，而忽视了对故事细节的控制，而这对于任务来说也是至关重要的。为了填补这一空白，本文提出了一种对故事进行细粒度控制的模型，该模型允许生成具有任意分配的角色、相应动作和情感的定制故事。自动和人工评估的大量实验结果表明了我们方法的优越性。根据细粒度的个性化指导生成故事具有很强的可控性，揭示了我们方法论的有效性。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/victorup/CHAE 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CHAE的细粒度可控故事生成模型，能够根据用户指定的角色、动作和情感生成个性化故事。
AI.motivation: 现有故事生成方法多关注全局特征控制，忽视了对故事细节（如角色、动作、情感）的精细化控制，而这些细节对故事质量至关重要。
AI.method: 设计CHAE框架，通过分离并控制角色（Characters）、动作（Actions）和情感（Emotions）三个核心要素，实现故事生成的细粒度定制化。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在自动评估和人工评估中均优于现有方法，能有效生成符合用户指定细粒度要求的故事。
AI.conclusion: CHAE验证了细粒度控制在故事生成中的有效性，为个性化内容创作提供了新思路。

authors_text: Vaggos Chatziafratis,Ioannis Panageas,Clayton Sanford,Stelios Andrew Stavroulakis
title: On Scrambling Phenomena for Randomly Initialized Recurrent Networks
title_zh: 关于随机初始化循环网络的置乱现象
abstract: Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) frequently exhibit complicated dynamics, and their sensitivity to the initialization process often renders them notoriously hard to train. Recent works have shed light on such phenomena analyzing when exploding or vanishing gradients may occur, either of which is detrimental for training dynamics. In this paper, we point to a formal connection between RNNs and chaotic dynamical systems and prove a qualitatively stronger phenomenon about RNNs than what exploding gradients seem to suggest. Our main result proves that under standard initialization (e.g., He, Xavier etc.), RNNs will exhibit \textit{Li-Yorke chaos} with \textit{constant} probability \textit{independent} of the network's width. This explains the experimentally observed phenomenon of \textit{scrambling}, under which trajectories of nearby points may appear to be arbitrarily close during some timesteps, yet will be far away in future timesteps. In stark contrast to their feedforward counterparts, we show that chaotic behavior in RNNs is preserved under small perturbations and that their expressive power remains exponential in the number of feedback iterations. Our technical arguments rely on viewing RNNs as random walks under non-linear activations, and studying the existence of certain types of higher-order fixed points called \textit{periodic points} that lead to phase transitions from order to chaos.
summary: Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) frequently exhibit complicated dynamics, and their sensitivity to the initialization process often renders them notoriously hard to train. Recent works have shed light on such phenomena analyzing when exploding or vanishing gradients may occur, either of which is detrimental for training dynamics. In this paper, we point to a formal connection between RNNs and chaotic dynamical systems and prove a qualitatively stronger phenomenon about RNNs than what exploding gradients seem to suggest. Our main result proves that under standard initialization (e.g., He, Xavier etc.), RNNs will exhibit \textit{Li-Yorke chaos} with \textit{constant} probability \textit{independent} of the network's width. This explains the experimentally observed phenomenon of \textit{scrambling}, under which trajectories of nearby points may appear to be arbitrarily close during some timesteps, yet will be far away in future timesteps. In stark contrast to their feedforward counterparts, we show that chaotic behavior in RNNs is preserved under small perturbations and that their expressive power remains exponential in the number of feedback iterations. Our technical arguments rely on viewing RNNs as random walks under non-linear activations, and studying the existence of certain types of higher-order fixed points called \textit{periodic points} that lead to phase transitions from order to chaos.
abstract_zh: 循环神经网络 (RNN) 经常表现出复杂的动态变化，并且它们对初始化过程的敏感性通常使得它们很难训练。最近的工作揭示了这种现象，分析了何时可能发生梯度爆炸或消失，这两种情况都不利于训练动态。在本文中，我们指出了 RNN 和混沌动力系统之间的形式联系，并证明了 RNN 的定性现象比梯度爆炸所暗示的现象更强。我们的主要结果证明，在标准初始化（例如 He、Xavier 等）下，RNN 将表现出 \textit{Li-Yorke 混沌}，且 \textit{constant} 概率 \textit{independent} 与网络宽度无关。这解释了实验观察到的 \textit{scrambling} 现象，在这种现象下，附近点的轨迹在某些时间步长中可能看起来任意接近，但在未来的时间步长中却会很远。与前馈对应物形成鲜明对比的是，我们表明 RNN 中的混沌行为在小扰动下得以保留，并且它们的表达能力在反馈迭代次数中保持指数级增长。我们的技术论证依赖于将 RNN 视为非线性激活下的随机游走，并研究某些类型的高阶固定点（称为 \textit{周期点}）的存在，这些固定点会导致从有序到混沌的相变。

AI.tldr: 研究随机初始化的循环神经网络（RNN）中出现的scrambling现象，并建立其与混沌动力系统的理论联系。
AI.motivation: RNN的训练困难与其初始化敏感性相关，现有研究主要关注梯度爆炸/消失问题，但未能解释scrambling现象（轨迹在短期接近但长期发散）的成因。
AI.method: 将RNN视为非线性激活下的随机游走，通过分析高阶不动点（周期点）的存在性，证明其相变行为从有序到混沌的过渡。
AI.result: 证明标准初始化下RNN几乎必然呈现Li-Yorke混沌，且混沌概率与网络宽度无关；揭示其混沌行为对微扰鲁棒且表达能力呈指数级增长。
AI.conclusion: RNN的混沌特性是初始化导致的固有属性，而非训练结果，解释了其训练难度，并凸显了与前馈网络的本质差异。

authors_text: Xiangguang Chen,Ye Zhu,Yu Li,Bingtao Fu,Lei Sun,Ying Shan,Shan Liu
title: Robust Human Matting via Semantic Guidance
title_zh: 通过语义指导实现稳健的人体抠图
abstract: Automatic human matting is highly desired for many real applications. We investigate recent human matting methods and show that common bad cases happen when semantic human segmentation fails. This indicates that semantic understanding is crucial for robust human matting. From this, we develop a fast yet accurate human matting framework, named Semantic Guided Human Matting (SGHM). It builds on a semantic human segmentation network and introduces a light-weight matting module with only marginal computational cost. Unlike previous works, our framework is data efficient, which requires a small amount of matting ground-truth to learn to estimate high quality object mattes. Our experiments show that trained with merely 200 matting images, our method can generalize well to real-world datasets, and outperform recent methods on multiple benchmarks, while remaining efficient. Considering the unbearable labeling cost of matting data and widely available segmentation data, our method becomes a practical and effective solution for the task of human matting. Source code is available at https://github.com/cxgincsu/SemanticGuidedHumanMatting.
summary: Automatic human matting is highly desired for many real applications. We investigate recent human matting methods and show that common bad cases happen when semantic human segmentation fails. This indicates that semantic understanding is crucial for robust human matting. From this, we develop a fast yet accurate human matting framework, named Semantic Guided Human Matting (SGHM). It builds on a semantic human segmentation network and introduces a light-weight matting module with only marginal computational cost. Unlike previous works, our framework is data efficient, which requires a small amount of matting ground-truth to learn to estimate high quality object mattes. Our experiments show that trained with merely 200 matting images, our method can generalize well to real-world datasets, and outperform recent methods on multiple benchmarks, while remaining efficient. Considering the unbearable labeling cost of matting data and widely available segmentation data, our method becomes a practical and effective solution for the task of human matting. Source code is available at https://github.com/cxgincsu/SemanticGuidedHumanMatting.
abstract_zh: 许多实际应用都非常需要自动人体抠图。我们研究了最新的人体抠图方法，并表明当语义人体分割失败时会发生常见的不良情况。这表明语义理解对于稳健的人类抠图至关重要。由此，我们开发了一个快速而准确的人体抠图框架，称为语义引导人体抠图（SGHM）。它建立在语义人类分割网络的基础上，并引入了仅具有边际计算成本的轻量级抠图模块。与以前的工作不同，我们的框架是数据高效的，这需要少量的遮罩基础事实来学习估计高质量的对象遮罩。我们的实验表明，仅使用 200 个抠图图像进行训练，我们的方法就可以很好地推广到现实世界的数据集，并且在多个基准上优于最新的方法，同时保持高效。考虑到抠图数据难以承受的标记成本和广泛可用的分割数据，我们的方法成为人类抠图任务的实用且有效的解决方案。源代码可在 https://github.com/cxgincsu/SemanticGuidedHumanMatting 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于语义引导的鲁棒人体抠图框架SGHM，通过结合语义分割网络和轻量级抠图模块，实现高效且准确的人体抠图。
AI.motivation: 现有抠图方法在语义分割失败时表现不佳，而高质量抠图数据标注成本高昂，因此需要一种数据高效且依赖语义理解的解决方案。
AI.method: 构建基于语义分割网络的框架，引入轻量级抠图模块，仅需少量标注数据（200张图像）进行训练，利用语义信息指导抠图过程。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上优于最新方法，且在真实场景中具有良好泛化能力，计算成本低。
AI.conclusion: SGHM通过语义引导实现了高效的人体抠图，解决了标注数据不足和语义分割误差的问题，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

search_text: Robust Human Matting via Semantic Guidance 通过语义指导实现稳健的人体抠图 Automatic human matting is highly desired for many real applications. We investigate recent human matting methods and show that common bad cases happen when semantic human segmentation fails. This indicates that semantic understanding is crucial for robust human matting. From this, we develop a fast yet accurate human matting framework, named Semantic Guided Human Matting (SGHM). It builds on a semantic human segmentation network and introduces a light-weight matting module with only marginal computational cost. Unlike previous works, our framework is data efficient, which requires a small amount of matting ground-truth to learn to estimate high quality object mattes. Our experiments show that trained with merely 200 matting images, our method can generalize well to real-world datasets, and outperform recent methods on multiple benchmarks, while remaining efficient. Considering the unbearable labeling cost of matting data and widely available segmentation data, our method becomes a practical and effective solution for the task of human matting. Source code is available at https://github.com/cxgincsu/SemanticGuidedHumanMatting. 许多实际应用都非常需要自动人体抠图。我们研究了最新的人体抠图方法，并表明当语义人体分割失败时会发生常见的不良情况。这表明语义理解对于稳健的人类抠图至关重要。由此，我们开发了一个快速而准确的人体抠图框架，称为语义引导人体抠图（SGHM）。它建立在语义人类分割网络的基础上，并引入了仅具有边际计算成本的轻量级抠图模块。与以前的工作不同，我们的框架是数据高效的，这需要少量的遮罩基础事实来学习估计高质量的对象遮罩。我们的实验表明，仅使用 200 个抠图图像进行训练，我们的方法就可以很好地推广到现实世界的数据集，并且在多个基准上优于最新的方法，同时保持高效。考虑到抠图数据难以承受的标记成本和广泛可用的分割数据，我们的方法成为人类抠图任务的实用且有效的解决方案。源代码可在 https://github.com/cxgincsu/SemanticGuidedHumanMatting 获取。 本文提出了一种基于语义引导的鲁棒人体抠图框架SGHM，通过结合语义分割网络和轻量级抠图模块，实现高效且准确的人体抠图。 Xiangguang Chen,Ye Zhu,Yu Li,Bingtao Fu,Lei Sun,Ying Shan,Shan Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Philippe Wenger,Damien Chablat
title: A review of cuspidal serial and parallel manipulators
title_zh: 尖头串联和并联机械手综述
comment: ef:Journal of Mechanisms and Robotics, American Society of Mechanical Engineers, 2022, pp.1-37
comments: ef:Journal of Mechanisms and Robotics, American Society of Mechanical Engineers, 2022, pp.1-37
abstract: Cuspidal robots can move from one inverse or direct kinematic solution to another without ever passing through a singularity. These robots have remained unknown because almost all industrial robots do not have this feature. However, in fact, industrial robots are the exceptions. Some robots appeared recently in the industrial market can be shown to be cuspidal but, surprisingly, almost nobody knows it and robot users meet difficulties in planning trajectories with these robots. This paper proposes a review on the fundamental and application aspects of cuspidal robots. It addresses the important issues raised by these robots for the design and planning of trajectories. The identification of all cuspidal robots is still an open issue. This paper recalls in details the case of serial robots with three joints but it also addresses robots with more complex architectures such as 6-revolute-jointed robot and parallel robots. We hope that this paper will help disseminate more widely knowledge on cuspidal robots.
summary: Cuspidal robots can move from one inverse or direct kinematic solution to another without ever passing through a singularity. These robots have remained unknown because almost all industrial robots do not have this feature. However, in fact, industrial robots are the exceptions. Some robots appeared recently in the industrial market can be shown to be cuspidal but, surprisingly, almost nobody knows it and robot users meet difficulties in planning trajectories with these robots. This paper proposes a review on the fundamental and application aspects of cuspidal robots. It addresses the important issues raised by these robots for the design and planning of trajectories. The identification of all cuspidal robots is still an open issue. This paper recalls in details the case of serial robots with three joints but it also addresses robots with more complex architectures such as 6-revolute-jointed robot and parallel robots. We hope that this paper will help disseminate more widely knowledge on cuspidal robots.
abstract_zh: 尖形机器人可以从一种逆运动学解或正运动学解移动到另一种运动学解，而无需穿过奇点。这些机器人一直不为人所知，因为几乎所有工业机器人都不具备此功能。但事实上，工业机器人是例外。最近出现在工业市场上的一些机器人可以被证明是有尖角的，但令人惊讶的是，几乎没有人知道这一点，并且机器人用户在使用这些机器人规划轨迹时遇到了困难。本文对尖瓣机器人的基础和应用方面进行了综述。它解决了这些机器人在轨迹设计和规划方面提出的重要问题。所有尖牙机器人的识别仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。本文详细回顾了三关节串联机器人的情况，但也讨论了具有更复杂架构的机器人，例如六旋转关节机器人和并联机器人。我们希望本文能够帮助更广泛地传播有关尖牙机器人的知识。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了具有 cuspidal 特性的串行和并行机械臂的基本原理和应用。
AI.motivation: cuspidal 机器人能够在不经过奇异点的情况下从一个逆运动学或正运动学解转换到另一个解，但这一特性在工业机器人中鲜为人知，导致轨迹规划存在困难。
AI.method: 本文回顾了 cuspidal 机器人在设计和轨迹规划中的关键问题，并详细讨论了具有三个关节的串行机器人以及更复杂的六自由度关节机器人和并行机器人的案例。
AI.result: 本文总结了 cuspidal 机器人在工业应用中的重要性，并指出目前识别所有 cuspidal 机器人仍是一个开放性问题。
AI.conclusion: 希望本文能够促进 cuspidal 机器人相关知识的传播，推动其在工业领域的应用和发展。

authors_text: Brian Yan,Siddharth Dalmia,Yosuke Higuchi,Graham Neubig,Florian Metze,Alan W Black,Shinji Watanabe
title: CTC Alignments Improve Autoregressive Translation
title_zh: CTC 对齐改进自回归翻译
abstract: Connectionist Temporal Classification (CTC) is a widely used approach for automatic speech recognition (ASR) that performs conditionally independent monotonic alignment. However for translation, CTC exhibits clear limitations due to the contextual and non-monotonic nature of the task and thus lags behind attentional decoder approaches in terms of translation quality. In this work, we argue that CTC does in fact make sense for translation if applied in a joint CTC/attention framework wherein CTC's core properties can counteract several key weaknesses of pure-attention models during training and decoding. To validate this conjecture, we modify the Hybrid CTC/Attention model originally proposed for ASR to support text-to-text translation (MT) and speech-to-text translation (ST). Our proposed joint CTC/attention models outperform pure-attention baselines across six benchmark translation tasks.
summary: Connectionist Temporal Classification (CTC) is a widely used approach for automatic speech recognition (ASR) that performs conditionally independent monotonic alignment. However for translation, CTC exhibits clear limitations due to the contextual and non-monotonic nature of the task and thus lags behind attentional decoder approaches in terms of translation quality. In this work, we argue that CTC does in fact make sense for translation if applied in a joint CTC/attention framework wherein CTC's core properties can counteract several key weaknesses of pure-attention models during training and decoding. To validate this conjecture, we modify the Hybrid CTC/Attention model originally proposed for ASR to support text-to-text translation (MT) and speech-to-text translation (ST). Our proposed joint CTC/attention models outperform pure-attention baselines across six benchmark translation tasks.
abstract_zh: 连接主义时间分类 (CTC) 是一种广泛使用的自动语音识别 (ASR) 方法，它执行条件独立的单调对齐。然而，对于翻译而言，由于任务的上下文和非单调性质，CTC 表现出明显的局限性，因此在翻译质量方面落后于注意力解码器方法。在这项工作中，我们认为，如果将 CTC 应用于联合 CTC/注意力框架中，CTC 实际上对翻译有意义，其中 CTC 的核心属性可以抵消纯注意力模型在训练和解码过程中的几个关键弱点。为了验证这个猜想，我们修改了最初为 ASR 提出的混合 CTC/Attention 模型，以支持文本到文本翻译（MT）和语音到文本翻译（ST）。我们提出的联合 CTC/注意力模型在六个基准翻译任务中优于纯注意力基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将CTC对齐机制与注意力机制结合，用于改进自回归翻译模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统CTC在翻译任务中因上下文依赖性和非单调性表现不足，而纯注意力模型存在训练和解码阶段的弱点，需探索联合框架以互补优势。
AI.method: 修改原有混合CTC/注意力模型，适配文本到文本翻译（MT）和语音到文本翻译（ST）任务，构建联合CTC/注意力框架。
AI.result: 在六个基准翻译任务中，联合模型显著优于纯注意力基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 联合CTC/注意力框架能有效提升翻译质量，通过CTC的特性弥补纯注意力模型的不足。

conclusion: 联合CTC/注意力框架能有效提升翻译质量，通过CTC的特性弥补纯注意力模型的不足。
search_text: CTC Alignments Improve Autoregressive Translation CTC 对齐改进自回归翻译 Connectionist Temporal Classification (CTC) is a widely used approach for automatic speech recognition (ASR) that performs conditionally independent monotonic alignment. However for translation, CTC exhibits clear limitations due to the contextual and non-monotonic nature of the task and thus lags behind attentional decoder approaches in terms of translation quality. In this work, we argue that CTC does in fact make sense for translation if applied in a joint CTC/attention framework wherein CTC's core properties can counteract several key weaknesses of pure-attention models during training and decoding. To validate this conjecture, we modify the Hybrid CTC/Attention model originally proposed for ASR to support text-to-text translation (MT) and speech-to-text translation (ST). Our proposed joint CTC/attention models outperform pure-attention baselines across six benchmark translation tasks. 连接主义时间分类 (CTC) 是一种广泛使用的自动语音识别 (ASR) 方法，它执行条件独立的单调对齐。然而，对于翻译而言，由于任务的上下文和非单调性质，CTC 表现出明显的局限性，因此在翻译质量方面落后于注意力解码器方法。在这项工作中，我们认为，如果将 CTC 应用于联合 CTC/注意力框架中，CTC 实际上对翻译有意义，其中 CTC 的核心属性可以抵消纯注意力模型在训练和解码过程中的几个关键弱点。为了验证这个猜想，我们修改了最初为 ASR 提出的混合 CTC/Attention 模型，以支持文本到文本翻译（MT）和语音到文本翻译（ST）。我们提出的联合 CTC/注意力模型在六个基准翻译任务中优于纯注意力基线。 本文提出将CTC对齐机制与注意力机制结合，用于改进自回归翻译模型的性能。 Brian Yan,Siddharth Dalmia,Yosuke Higuchi,Graham Neubig,Florian Metze,Alan W Black,Shinji Watanabe cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Junjie Huang,Wanjun Zhong,Qian Liu,Ming Gong,Daxin Jiang,Nan Duan
title: Mixed-modality Representation Learning and Pre-training for Joint Table-and-Text Retrieval in OpenQA
title_zh: OpenQA 中联合表文本检索的混合模态表示学习和预训练
abstract: Retrieving evidences from tabular and textual resources is essential for open-domain question answering (OpenQA), which provides more comprehensive information. However, training an effective dense table-text retriever is difficult due to the challenges of table-text discrepancy and data sparsity problem. To address the above challenges, we introduce an optimized OpenQA Table-Text Retriever (OTTeR) to jointly retrieve tabular and textual evidences. Firstly, we propose to enhance mixed-modality representation learning via two mechanisms: modality-enhanced representation and mixed-modality negative sampling strategy. Secondly, to alleviate data sparsity problem and enhance the general retrieval ability, we conduct retrieval-centric mixed-modality synthetic pre-training. Experimental results demonstrate that OTTeR substantially improves the performance of table-and-text retrieval on the OTT-QA dataset. Comprehensive analyses examine the effectiveness of all the proposed mechanisms. Besides, equipped with OTTeR, our OpenQA system achieves the state-of-the-art result on the downstream QA task, with 10.1% absolute improvement in terms of the exact match over the previous best system. All the code and data are available at https://github.com/Jun-jie-Huang/OTTeR.
summary: Retrieving evidences from tabular and textual resources is essential for open-domain question answering (OpenQA), which provides more comprehensive information. However, training an effective dense table-text retriever is difficult due to the challenges of table-text discrepancy and data sparsity problem. To address the above challenges, we introduce an optimized OpenQA Table-Text Retriever (OTTeR) to jointly retrieve tabular and textual evidences. Firstly, we propose to enhance mixed-modality representation learning via two mechanisms: modality-enhanced representation and mixed-modality negative sampling strategy. Secondly, to alleviate data sparsity problem and enhance the general retrieval ability, we conduct retrieval-centric mixed-modality synthetic pre-training. Experimental results demonstrate that OTTeR substantially improves the performance of table-and-text retrieval on the OTT-QA dataset. Comprehensive analyses examine the effectiveness of all the proposed mechanisms. Besides, equipped with OTTeR, our OpenQA system achieves the state-of-the-art result on the downstream QA task, with 10.1% absolute improvement in terms of the exact match over the previous best system. All the code and data are available at https://github.com/Jun-jie-Huang/OTTeR.
abstract_zh: 从表格和文本资源中检索证据对于开放域问答 (OpenQA) 至关重要，它可以提供更全面的信息。然而，由于表文本差异和数据稀疏问题的挑战，训练有效的密集表文本检索器很困难。为了解决上述挑战，我们引入了一种优化的 OpenQA 表文本检索器（OTTeR）来联合检索表格和文本证据。首先，我们建议通过两种机制来增强混合模态表示学习：模态增强表示和混合模态负采样策略。其次，为了缓解数据稀疏问题并增强一般检索能力，我们进行了以检索为中心的混合模态综合预训练。实验结果表明，OTTeR 显着提高了 OTT-QA 数据集上表文本检索的性能。综合分析检验所有提议机制的有效性。此外，配备了 OTTeR，我们的 OpenQA 系统在下游 QA 任务上取得了最先进的结果，与之前的最佳系统相比，在精确匹配方面绝对提高了 10.1%。所有代码和数据均可在 https://github.com/Jun-jie-Huang/OTTeR 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合模态表示学习与预训练方法OTTeR，用于开放域问答中联合检索表格和文本证据。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以应对表格与文本的模态差异及数据稀疏性问题，导致检索效果受限。
AI.method: 通过模态增强表示、混合模态负采样策略及检索为中心的合成预训练，提升混合模态检索能力。
AI.result: OTTeR在OTT-QA数据集上显著提升检索性能，下游QA任务准确率较之前最佳系统提升10.1%。
AI.conclusion: OTTeR有效解决了表格-文本联合检索的挑战，为开放域问答系统提供了更优的证据检索方案。

authors_text: Qiayuan Liao,Zhefeng Cao,Hua Chen,Wei Zhang
title: Real-time Trajectory Optimization and Control for Ball Bumping with Quadruped Robots
title_zh: 四足机器人碰撞球的实时轨迹优化与控制
abstract: This paper studies real-time motion planning and control for ball bumping motion with quadruped robots. To enable the quadruped to bump the flying ball with different initializations, we develop a nonlinear trajectory optimization-based planning scheme that jointly identifies the take-off time and state to achieve accurate ball hitting during the flight phase. Such a planning scheme employs a two-dimensional single rigid body model that achieves a satisfactory balance between accuracy and efficiency for the highly time-sensitive task. To precisely execute the planned motion, the tracking controller needs to incorporate the strict time-state constraint imposed on the take-off and ball-hitting events. To this end, we develop an improved model predictive controller that respects the critical time-state constraints. The proposed planning and control framework is validated with a real Aliengo robot. Experiments show that the problem planning approach can be computed in approximately 60ms on average, enabling successful accomplishment of the ball bumping motion with various initializations in real time.
summary: This paper studies real-time motion planning and control for ball bumping motion with quadruped robots. To enable the quadruped to bump the flying ball with different initializations, we develop a nonlinear trajectory optimization-based planning scheme that jointly identifies the take-off time and state to achieve accurate ball hitting during the flight phase. Such a planning scheme employs a two-dimensional single rigid body model that achieves a satisfactory balance between accuracy and efficiency for the highly time-sensitive task. To precisely execute the planned motion, the tracking controller needs to incorporate the strict time-state constraint imposed on the take-off and ball-hitting events. To this end, we develop an improved model predictive controller that respects the critical time-state constraints. The proposed planning and control framework is validated with a real Aliengo robot. Experiments show that the problem planning approach can be computed in approximately 60ms on average, enabling successful accomplishment of the ball bumping motion with various initializations in real time.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了四足机器人碰撞球运动的实时运动规划和控制。为了使四足动物能够以不同的初始化来撞击飞球，我们开发了一种基于非线性轨迹优化的规划方案，该方案联合识别起飞时间和状态，以在飞行阶段实现准确的击球。这种规划方案采用二维单刚体模型，在高度时间敏感的任务中实现了精度和效率之间的令人满意的平衡。为了精确执行计划的运动，跟踪控制器需要纳入对起飞和击球事件施加的严格时间状态约束。为此，我们开发了一种改进的模型预测控制器，该控制器尊重关键时间状态约束。所提出的规划和控制框架通过真实的 Aliengo 机器人进行了验证。实验表明，该问题规划方法的计算时间平均约为 60ms，能够实时成功完成各种初始化的球碰撞运动。

AI.tldr: 本文研究四足机器人实时轨迹优化与控制，以实现不同初始条件下的球类击打运动。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以满足四足机器人在高度时间敏感任务中对球飞行阶段精准击打的需求，需开发高效且精确的规划与控制方案。
AI.method: 提出基于非线性轨迹优化的规划框架，结合二维刚体模型与改进模型预测控制器，满足击球事件的严格时间-状态约束。
AI.result: 实验证明该框架在Aliengo机器人上平均60ms内完成规划，成功实现多种初始条件下的实时球类击打。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在保证计算效率的同时实现了高精度击球控制，验证了框架在真实四足机器人上的有效性。

authors_text: Zhaowei Wang
title: Legal Element-oriented Modeling with Multi-view Contrastive Learning for Legal Case Retrieval
title_zh: 面向法律要素的法律案例检索多视角对比学习建模
comment: accepted by the 2022 IEEE International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN 2022)
comments: accepted by the 2022 IEEE International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN 2022)
abstract: Legal case retrieval, which aims to retrieve relevant cases given a query case, plays an essential role in the legal system. While recent research efforts improve the performance of traditional ad-hoc retrieval models, legal case retrieval is still challenging since queries are legal cases, which contain hundreds of tokens. Legal cases are much longer and more complicated than keywords queries. Apart from that, the definition of legal relevance is beyond the general definition. In addition to general topical relevance, the relevant cases also involve similar situations and legal elements, which can support the judgment of the current case. In this paper, we propose an interaction-focused network for legal case retrieval with a multi-view contrastive learning objective. The contrastive learning views, including case-view and element-view, aim to overcome the above challenges. The case-view contrastive learning minimizes the hidden space distance between relevant legal case representations produced by a pre-trained language model (PLM) encoder. The element-view builds positive and negative instances by changing legal elements of cases to help the network better compute legal relevance. To achieve this, we employ a legal element knowledge-aware indicator to detect legal elements of cases. We conduct extensive experiments on the benchmark of relevant case retrieval. Evaluation results indicate our proposed method obtains significant improvement over the existing methods.
summary: Legal case retrieval, which aims to retrieve relevant cases given a query case, plays an essential role in the legal system. While recent research efforts improve the performance of traditional ad-hoc retrieval models, legal case retrieval is still challenging since queries are legal cases, which contain hundreds of tokens. Legal cases are much longer and more complicated than keywords queries. Apart from that, the definition of legal relevance is beyond the general definition. In addition to general topical relevance, the relevant cases also involve similar situations and legal elements, which can support the judgment of the current case. In this paper, we propose an interaction-focused network for legal case retrieval with a multi-view contrastive learning objective. The contrastive learning views, including case-view and element-view, aim to overcome the above challenges. The case-view contrastive learning minimizes the hidden space distance between relevant legal case representations produced by a pre-trained language model (PLM) encoder. The element-view builds positive and negative instances by changing legal elements of cases to help the network better compute legal relevance. To achieve this, we employ a legal element knowledge-aware indicator to detect legal elements of cases. We conduct extensive experiments on the benchmark of relevant case retrieval. Evaluation results indicate our proposed method obtains significant improvement over the existing methods.
abstract_zh: 法律案例检索的目的是根据查询案例检索相关案例，在法律系统中发挥着至关重要的作用。虽然最近的研究工作提高了传统即席检索模型的性能，但法律案例检索仍然具有挑战性，因为查询是包含数百个标记的法律案例。法律案件比关键字查询更长、更复杂。除此之外，法律相关性的定义超出了一般定义。相关案件除具有一般性的话题相关性外，还涉及类似的情形和法律要素，能够支撑当前案件的判断。在本文中，我们提出了一种以交互为中心的网络，用于具有多视图对比学习目标的法律案例检索。对比学习观，包括案例观和元素观，旨在克服上述挑战。案例视图对比学习最大限度地减少了预训练语言模型（PLM）编码器生成的相关法律案例表示之间的隐藏空间距离。元素视图通过改变案件的法律要素来构建正面和负面实例，以帮助网络更好地计算法律相关性。为了实现这一目标，我们采用法律要素知识感知指标来检测案件的法律要素。我们在相关案例检索的基准上进行了大量的实验。评估结果表明我们提出的方法比现有方法取得了显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多视角对比学习的法律案例检索方法，通过结合案例视角和法律元素视角来提升检索效果。
AI.motivation: 现有法律案例检索方法难以应对法律案例长文本特性及法律相关性定义的复杂性，需同时考虑主题、情境和法律元素的匹配。
AI.method: 构建交互网络，采用多视角对比学习：1）案例视角通过预训练语言模型编码案例表示并最小化相关案例的距离；2）元素视角通过修改法律元素生成正负样本，并引入法律元素检测指标辅助计算相关性。
AI.result: 在基准测试中显著优于现有方法，验证了多视角对比学习在法律案例检索中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合案例整体语义与法律元素细节，有效解决了法律案例检索的复杂性问题，为后续研究提供了新思路。

search_text: Legal Element-oriented Modeling with Multi-view Contrastive Learning for Legal Case Retrieval 面向法律要素的法律案例检索多视角对比学习建模 Legal case retrieval, which aims to retrieve relevant cases given a query case, plays an essential role in the legal system. While recent research efforts improve the performance of traditional ad-hoc retrieval models, legal case retrieval is still challenging since queries are legal cases, which contain hundreds of tokens. Legal cases are much longer and more complicated than keywords queries. Apart from that, the definition of legal relevance is beyond the general definition. In addition to general topical relevance, the relevant cases also involve similar situations and legal elements, which can support the judgment of the current case. In this paper, we propose an interaction-focused network for legal case retrieval with a multi-view contrastive learning objective. The contrastive learning views, including case-view and element-view, aim to overcome the above challenges. The case-view contrastive learning minimizes the hidden space distance between relevant legal case representations produced by a pre-trained language model (PLM) encoder. The element-view builds positive and negative instances by changing legal elements of cases to help the network better compute legal relevance. To achieve this, we employ a legal element knowledge-aware indicator to detect legal elements of cases. We conduct extensive experiments on the benchmark of relevant case retrieval. Evaluation results indicate our proposed method obtains significant improvement over the existing methods. 法律案例检索的目的是根据查询案例检索相关案例，在法律系统中发挥着至关重要的作用。虽然最近的研究工作提高了传统即席检索模型的性能，但法律案例检索仍然具有挑战性，因为查询是包含数百个标记的法律案例。法律案件比关键字查询更长、更复杂。除此之外，法律相关性的定义超出了一般定义。相关案件除具有一般性的话题相关性外，还涉及类似的情形和法律要素，能够支撑当前案件的判断。在本文中，我们提出了一种以交互为中心的网络，用于具有多视图对比学习目标的法律案例检索。对比学习观，包括案例观和元素观，旨在克服上述挑战。案例视图对比学习最大限度地减少了预训练语言模型（PLM）编码器生成的相关法律案例表示之间的隐藏空间距离。元素视图通过改变案件的法律要素来构建正面和负面实例，以帮助网络更好地计算法律相关性。为了实现这一目标，我们采用法律要素知识感知指标来检测案件的法律要素。我们在相关案例检索的基准上进行了大量的实验。评估结果表明我们提出的方法比现有方法取得了显着的改进。 本文提出一种基于多视角对比学习的法律案例检索方法，通过结合案例视角和法律元素视角来提升检索效果。 Zhaowei Wang cs.CL,cs.AI
